Comment: Always thereabout. Kept on well from 4th 400 M but failed to match speed with the winner closing stages.
Towards rear. Made progress on outside final turn. Ran on well from 7th early straight to take command inside 150 M.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Recovered ground steadily to be midfield rounding home bend. Weakened closing stages.
Midfield from widest draw. Steady progress from 1000 M to be 5th rounding home bend. Ran on steadily.
Led briefly early, then remained 3rd and 2Ls behind lead until weakening out of contention inside 300 M.
Sat outside leader to 600 M where he shared the lead. Kept on until faded final 250 M. (Bled.)
Last to 850 M. Ran on from 13th early straight, never nearer.
Towards rear. Box-seated near 300 M. Kept on moderately when in clear closing stages.
Soon led. Was joined passing 600 M. Failed to quicken when headed 150 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Dropped to the last soon after being checked near 1100 M and 950 M. Recovered good ground on outisde 200 M out.
Lost ground at start, towards rear throughout.
Midfield or slightly behind. Found no extra when under pressure closing stages.
Midfield early. Soon dropped back gradually towards the rear. Stayed on a bit in straight.
Midfield to straight. Kept on for distant 4th.
Ridden to prominent position early. Lost position coming out of back straight. Gave further ground into straight.
Soon outpaced. Never seen with a chance.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Never a danger.
Settled in rear. Failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Never far off to straight. Weakened gradually.
Well there, disputing lead rounding home bend and into straight. Outsprinted by winner inside 200 M and lost 2nd late.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to reach 2nd position about 100 M out.
Narrow lead far side. Joined rounding home bend. Weakened out of contention in straight.
Well there. Faded steadily in straight.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well in straight to take charge over 250 M out.
Near rear throughout.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group. Detached from the field from final turn.
Near rear to straight. Lacked of daylight when improving near 400 M. Held up again at 200 M. Ran on when in clear.
Towards rear. Recovered good ground 200 M out, never nearer.
Led field to 800 M. Was 2Ls 3rd final turn. Ran on under pressure on rail to re-gain advantage close home.
In touch early. Dropped back steadily to midfield home bend. One-paced thereafter.
In touch. Improved rounding home bend to be alongside with the leader final turn. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Broke down near 300 M.
Better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Sat outside leader before taking over at 800 M. Kept on until headed close home.
Midfield or slightly behind. Responsed quite well when asked 400 M. Kept on.
Settled behind midfield from widest draw. Crept a bit closer on straightening. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Soon dropped to rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Always in last few.
Mainly in prominent position. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in forward of midfield. Took closer order entering home straight. No clear passage early on. Obtained clear run passing 200 M and made up some late ground while drifting out.
Settled in midfield. Not much room in straight before making some late impression closing stages.
Settled in prominent 4th. Came under pressure turning in but only ran home one-paced.
Took up running 400 M after start. Led the field and went some 2Ls clear early in straight. Tiring but hung on to the line for 1/2L victory.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Always thereabouts. Driven to tackle leader upon straightening but only making moderate headway to the line.
Settled behind midfield. Widest runner turning in. Kept on same pace.
Rear far side. Short-lived effort rounding home bend. Dropped out under pressure in straight.
Missed the break. Trailed the field most of way.

Broke fairly from widest and hard ridden along to race in a forward position around 3 wide without cover through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and faded quickly inside final 200 M.
From wide draw was soon raced in midfield 3 wide with cover. Switched wide and made little headway at home bend. No extra in straight and soon tailed out.
On jumping stumbled and dropped to the rear around 2 wide. Made steady headway from the outside rounding the home turn. Responded very well when asked 350 M but just lost out in a ding dong finish.
Broke best and niggled along to take up running on rail with around 1/2L advantage through to straight. Headed shortly after the 400 M mark and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and soon raced in midfield on rail. Near the 1200 M was checked when crowded for room and dropped to a rearward position. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly and pushed along to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M but was unable to match speed with the placegetters inside final 150 M.
Broke with field from wide draw and soon raced in midfield or better around 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and steadily faded inside final 250 M.
Hard ridden along in the early stages to race in a prominent position 2 wide. Commenced to give ground near the 400 M mark and dropped out quickly in straight. (Bled.)

Broke with field from wide draw and soon settled in midfield or worse 3 wide with cover. Switched out and made little headway at home bend. Ran on well when asked 350 M but was overhauled by the first pair near the line.

Began fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in midfield on inner. Continued to be ridden along down back straight to maintain position. Under pressure 400 M out and kept on fairly to the line.

Broke fairly and soon settled in a rearward position 2 wide. Steadily shifted out at home bend to obtain clear running. Ran home strongly when asked 350 M out to snatch victory on the line in a 3 way battle.
Broke well and raced around 1/2L off leader through to straight. Hit the front shortly after straightening but was headed near 200 M mark and weakened steadily thereafter.

Broke with field and steadily eased to a rearward position on inner. Near the 1200 M checked to avoid heels. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began awkwardly and raced at the rear on rail through to straight. Shortly after 400 M was steadied when crowded for room. Kept on same pace in straight and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Had cover when 3-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, hard pressed to keep up when quite wide (4-wide) on straightening when 4Ls down in 6th, no impression.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, about 2Ls down in 2nd at the top of home straight, swamped at 200 M and eased final 100 M.
About 4th or 5th place between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, one-paced from then on.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, always held by principals.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls behind in 13th at 1000 M, 3-wide when 4Ls down in 10th off home turn, hung out until 200 M when 2Ls down in 2nd, finished off very strongly, just failed.
Always in rear about 6Ls off pace on fence until home straight, soon detached.
Dwelt, 3-wide with cover and worse than midfield when 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until 600 M, under pressure to lie up off home turn, faded.
Always 3-wide without cover but in leading bunch until 600 M when hard ridden to keep up, beaten shortly after turning for home.
6Ls off pace in 11th when 2-wide at 1000 M, travelled well when 4Ls down in mid-division on straightening, chances at 300 M but failed to quicken and well held by front pair final 200 M. (Lame.)
Slowly away, raced in rear 2 or 3-wide with cover 6Ls off pace until 600 M, 4-wide in rear on straightening, ran on down centre of track without threatening.
Well placed on fence 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 4th on fence from 800 M to home turn, failed to quicken up.
Awkwardly away, three back on the fence until home straight when about 3Ls off pace in midfield, short of room on fence from 400 M to 200 M, not much dash when clear close home.
Led on fence at 1400 M by 1L, nearly 2Ls clear at top of home straight, skipped over 2Ls clear at the 200 M, hung out inside final 100 M, all out to score.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in midfield at 1100 M, towards rear when about 5Ls off pace and 3-wide off home turn, never troubled leaders.
Ridden up to be among leaders early stages. Took a narrow lead after 1000 M and kept a 1L advantage into the straight. Found nothing thereafter and weakened final 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly and settled 2-wide behind midfield until home straight. Quickened well and fought on gamely to deny rival near the line.
Jumped well and was eased back to race 4-wide in rear section. Continued in similar position rounding home turn and lacked a rally in the straight.
Dropped back steadily from widest draw and trailed field from 1000 M. 8Ls down in last place at 400 M and closed the race off with a strong rally.
Missed the kick slightly and was niggled along early stages. 6Ls behind the leader in 5th at 800 M. Closed to within 3Ls on straightening but couldn't find extra thereafter.
Trailed field shortly after start. Remained in a rearward position rounding home turn and rallied in the straight to be closest at finish.
Slowly away and raced in rear section. Ridden along in a 4-wide position rounding home turn. Only kept on same pace in the straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield until straightening. Never quickened and tired closing stages.
Jumped well and led briefly early stages. Took a sit at 1000 M and raced 3Ls behind the leaders. Kept in a prominent position home turn but lacked a response when asked inside 300 M.
Off slowly and settled in a rearward position until straightening. Kept on fairly and made up some ground in the straight.
Among leaders shortly after start and then was eased back to midfield. Swung out on straightening and picked up well. Matched strides inside with winner final 200 M but fell short near the post.
Began well and raced in the forward position early stages. Kept within 3Ls in 4th after 1000 M and was 3-wide making the turn. Moved into the lead briefly final 300 M but faded thereafter. (Mucus.)
Raced among leaders in the early stages. Kept alongside the leader home turn but weakened shortly after straightening and finished tailed out.
Stumbled out of the gates. Settled 3-wide at midfield until straightening. Kept on steadily in the straight to make the frame.
5Ls behind in 5th when 2-wide at 1200 M, head up at 1000 M, over 2Ls down in 5th off home turn, ran on fairly but always held by principals.
Steadied at start, 8Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1200 M, 3-wide into stretch when 4Ls down in midfield, rallied gamely to lead final strides.
Disputed early lead out 2-wide but soon settled about 1L off pace in 2nd until top of homestretch when in front, 1L clear 200 M and grabbed final strides.
7Ls behind when 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, keen at 1000 M when checked, 3Ls down in mid-division when 4-wide off home turn, ran on strongly to nick a place near line.
Settled 13Ls last at 1200 M, 6Ls down in rear on straightening when under pressure, made some nice late ground, never nearer.
Always towards rear, 11Ls behind in 11th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 13th off home turn, posed very little threat.
Steadied at 1500 M, 12Ls behind in 13th at 1200 M, improved to be 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, no clear run from 350 M to 100 M, nearest at the finish, unlucky.
9Ls behind in 9th at 1200 M, checked at 1000 M and forced 3-wide without cover, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls behind in 12th, ran on well enough, nearest at finish.
Always well placed about 2-wide and 2Ls behind 3rd from 1400 M to 600 M, 1L down in 3rd and very dangerous off home turn, failed to quicken up and weakened through final 100 M.
Had the box-seat run on the fence 2Ls off pace in 4th from back to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
10Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, head up at 1000 M, 4Ls off speed and still worse than midfield towards inner off home turn, always outpaced.
6Ls behind on fence in 6th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 6th at home turn, 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, kept on well but lost a place final strides.
11Ls behind in 12th at 1200 M, checked at 1000 M, 5Ls behind in 11th when 3-wide off home turn, always outpaced.
Disputed lead at 1400 M, a little keen when 1L clear at 1200 M, joined at top of home straight and gone 300 M out.
Had a nice position 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th from 1000 M to 600 M out, 4Ls down in midfield off final bend, always well held.
10Ls last at 1000 M, over 7Ls last at home turn, made a little late ground but scarcely dangerous.
Slowly away, 9Ls behind in 13th on fence at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when 7Ls down in rear, ran on well but just missed out on the money.
4Ls behind and 2-wide in 6th at 1000 M, improved nicely to be 2Ls down in 4th when straightening 3-wide, picked up well to lead at 200 M, driven out.
7Ls behind and 3-wide in 8th at 1000 M, severely checked at 900 M and 7Ls down when 3-wide off home turn, not much impression thereafter.
3-wide without cover early on when 1L down, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M when 2-wide, closer on straightening and led briefly at the 300 M, soon headed and no extra through final 200 M.
Disputed lead early on, half a length clear on fence at 1000 M and same at final bend, headed 300 M out and folded tamely inside final 200 M. (Mucus and blood in trachea.)
7Ls behind in 10th at 1000 M on fence, threw head up and lost place at 800 M, 6Ls down in 12th at the home turn, never troubled principals.
Very awkwardly away, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th at 1200 M, all out to hold this position on straightening, soon beaten.
Checked at start, 7Ls behind in 9th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls behind in mid-division entering straight, over 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept finding but couldn't overhaul winner.
On fence 5Ls behind in 7th at 1000 M, 2-wide and 4Ls behind in 9th off home turn, always held by leading pair but still ran on well for a place.
Checked at start, 4-wide no cover when 6Ls behind in 7th at 1000 M, steadied at 900 M, pressed on 3Ls down in 6th off home turn when 4-wide, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, weak final 200 M.
8Ls behind and 2-wide in 11th at 1000 M, keen but only briefly when 3-wide no cover at 900 M, 4-wide off home turn when over 3Ls down in 8th, ran on well, narrowly missed a place.
Had to work hard to dispute early lead, left 2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 800 M, struggling to hold this spot off final bend, soon beaten and eased final 200 M.
Raced 6th and 5Ls behind lead to 450 M. Responded well to take control 250 M out. Won going away.
Towards rear early. Soon recovered some ground to midfield. Weakened from 7th 400 M.
Near rear. Improved on inside early straight. Held up when lacked of daylight 250 M. No recovery.
Better than midfield. Ran on well early straight but unable to match speed with winner final 200 M. Lost 2nd closing stages.
Took lead soon after start. Was headed 300 M out. Faded.
Towards rear. 5-wide turning into straight. Ran on steadily to get a remote 2nd closing stages.
Towards rear. Checked on straightening. Failed to recover.
Sat outside leader. Gained upper hand very briefly early straight. Soon weakened.
Rear from widest draw. Recovered some ground on outside final turn. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Kept on moderately in straight.
Near rear. Became last 600 M. Made up some ground from outside inside 200 M.
Held 3rd to final turn. Held up on straightening. Soon found no extra.
Behind midfield. Recovered some ground inside 250 M.
Held 4th to straight where he improved to a close-up 3rd. Kept on until fading out of contention 200 M out.
Mainly in midfield within 4Ls behind lead to 200 M. Ran on solidly to take command close home.
Led field soon after start. Faded when headed 200 M.
Made no show.
In similar position throughout.
Better than midfield. 4th from 600 M. Kept on quite well in straight.
4th on inside rail. 5th from 600 M. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield or slightly behind. Unbalanced when crowded for room on the rail 250 M. One-paced.
Never in contention.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Jumped well. Prominent on the rail. Kept on under pressure inside 150 M to just obtain 2nd at finish.
Prominent. 2-wide 2nd or 3rd to 400 M where he came to tackle the leader. Gained upper hand 200 M but failed to contain the winner close home.
Towards rear. Ran on moderately from 8th near 300 M.
Mostly in midfield. Produced some late headway closing stages.
Raced very wide throughout. Never better than midfield.
Soon dropped to rear. Never nearer.
Soon in rear. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Slow out. Soon moved up to rear of field. Remained same before clipped heels and lost position 600 M out. Never recovered.
Broke well. Chased leaders. Swamped final stages.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Responded well when asked inside final 200 M. Unable to draw level throughout closing stages.
Led or disputed lead. Unable to sustain closing stages and faded.
Prominent. Ran home one-paced.
Held narrow lead to Rock. Regained advantage turning in. Weakening passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well in straight to assert authority inside final 200 M.
Held 1L 3rd to 900 M. Gave a little ground to 5th until straight. Re-newed effort 250 M to challenge the winner but failed narrowly.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd passing 600 M. Kept on without threatening the quinella pair.
Held 4th or 5th within 3Ls behind lead. Kept on without quickening.
Was last soon after start.
In touch early but soon dropped to the rear group. Never recovered. (Slightly lame.)
Towards rear. Was steadied near 200 M and again near 50 M when making ground.
Slightly behind midfield. Found not much room final turn. Kept on when in clear in straight.
Towards rear. Hung in after final turn. Recovered some ground 200 M out.
Held narrow lead throughout the race.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or behind. Failed to quicken in straight.
Sat outside leader 200 M. Weakened steadily.
Settled in rear of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from midfield into straight without threatening.
Prominent early, dropping to mid-division halfway out. Hampered and lost position around home bend. Last into straight. Found nothing.
Led field to 600 M. Dropped out of contention quickly.
Settled in midfield. Commenced run coming out of back straight. Hit front turning for home. Hung on well to the line.
Towards rear early. Took closer order far side. Gained 2Ls 2nd entering straight. Weakened under pressure.
Prominent. Took up running approaching home bend. Soon headed turning in, then dropped away quickly.
Waited with. Commenced move rounding home bend. Widest runner when midfield into straight. Sustained progress to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on same pace early in straight before making moderate late impression closing stages.
Midfield most of way. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened badly.
Settled at the back. Made up ground down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Hampered by weakening horse and lost a few lengths rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Began well and soon settled in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and kicked home well to take charge inside final 150 M.
Began very awkwardly and lost a lot of ground. Raced at the tail on rail through to straight. Unable to show any impression in home straight.
Began well from wide draw and soon raced in a prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside final 150 M.
Broke with field and soon raced in a rearward position 2-wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but was only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.

Broke with field from wide draw and hard ridden along to take up running on rail from around the 1400 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 250 M out, headed near 200 M and slightly weakened thereafter.
Broke fairly and pushed along to race in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Near the 200 M whilst only running on evenly was crowded for room and unable to show much running thereafter.
Shortly after the start was hampered and dropped to the rear on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke well and soon raced in a handy position 2-wide with cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and only able to keep on evenly to the line.
Tardy start and soon raced in a handy position on rail. Under pressure rounding the home turn to maintain position. Only kept on evenly in straight and faded inside final 100 M.

Began awkwardly and niggled along to race in midfield or better 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain running, ran on fairly in straight but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.

Broke with field and soon eased to a rearward position on fence through to straight. Near the 200 M was checked when crowded for room. Ran home strongly when clear running was obtained near 150 M to grab 2nd on the line.

Jumped fairly and ridden along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Shifted to the middle to obtain clear running and ran on well inside final 200 M but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter on the line.
Three back on the fence 4Ls behind in 5th at the 600 M, went 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, never likely to catch the winner.
Slowly away, always detached in rear.
Disputed lead out 2-wide until the 600 M, under pressure to lie up when 1L down in 2nd at the corner, dropped away.
Caught 3-wide without cover at 700 M when 4Ls behind in 6th, 3-wide off home turn and 3Ls down and same at 200 M, faded thereafter.
Had the run of the race in 3rd on fence 2Ls off pace until home turn, quickened up to lead at 200 M, always in charge.
Keen when checked and 6Ls behind in 9th at 700 M, 4-wide (widest) on straightening when 5Ls behind in 9th, closer at 200 M but effort not sustained.
Brushed rail at 1000 M, four back on the fence about 5Ls behind in 8th at the 600 M, didn't have a clear run from home turn to 200 M, ran on okay but always held.
2-wide and 4Ls behind in 6th at 600 M and in 7th off home turn, failed to muster any kind of kick. (Distressed.)
2-wide about 2Ls behind in 4th through to home turn, same at 200 M, one-paced close home but held onto a place comfortably.
Fractious in gates and broke very awkwardly, 6Ls or 7Ls behind in 10th on fence through to home straight, never looked likely.
Checked at start, 8Ls behind in 11th at 800 M, still well behind on straightening, ran on well late, never nearer.
Disputed early lead on fence, 1L clear off home turn, headed 200 M out, weakened.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and closed the race off strongly.
Settled in a 3-wide position at midfield in the early and middle stages. Lacked a response when ridden 500 M and weakened in the straight.
Eased back shortly after start and settled near the rear. Ridden 500 M out and made up ground in the straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield until straightening. Rallied strongly over the concluding stages and missed by a narrow margin.
Jumped awkwardly and soon trailed field. Remained at the rear on straightening. Made a strong run along the inside rails before being held up over the final 100 M.
Improved steadily early stages to take the lead 1500 M. Took a length's advantage into the straight but weakened thereafter.
Jumped well and raced in a forward position. Kept within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Commenced to lose ground after 600 M and finished tailed out.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Pressured at 400 M and kept on steadily in the straight.
Crowded shortly after start and raced 3-wide in rear section. Continued to be 3-wide in back straight and home turn. Found no extra in the straight.
Jumped well and settled on fence at midfield. Kept on well in straight to make the frame.

Caught 4-wide at midfield into 1st turn. Allowed to stride forward after 1200 M and tracked leader along the back straight. Kept on well on straightening, took the lead inside 200 M and held on at the line.
Jumped well and raced in a forward position early. Settled in a prominent position behind the leaders from 1400 M until home straight. Kept on well before fading out of contention final 200 M.
Prominent within 1L of speed out 3-wide but with cover until the 600 M, struggling to keep up off home turn when 2Ls down in 5th, faded out.
Crowded at start and crowded again at 700 M when 2Ls down in 6th, over 1L down in 2nd entering straight, all out when 2Ls behind in 2nd at 200 M, eased final 100 M when beaten. (Blood in trachea.)
1L down in 2nd at 800 M, 3Ls down in midfield when 2-wide into homestretch, weakened.
Prominent early on over 1L behind in mid-division, three back on the fence in midfield off home turn when 3Ls down, no impression late.
Ridden along to maintain box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 700 M to home straight, ran on well but winner was too strong.
Fractious at start, always 4-wide without cover within 2Ls of the speed in 5th or so until 500 M, 3-wide off final bend, over 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
In rear bunch always about 4Ls off pace and four back on the fence until home turn, stayed on well to just nick a place.
Raced 2 and 3-wide with cover towards rear about 4Ls behind until 600 M, 4-wide off home turn, ran on strongly and narrowly failed to place.
In midfield with cover about 2Ls off pace at 800 M, lost place on the bend and forced 5-wide (widest) entering straight when 4Ls last, ran on past a few tired ones late.
About 4Ls behind in rear couple until straightening when without a clear run, made some late headway when clear final 250 M but never really threatened.
Hard pressed to lead on fence by 1L 700 M out, same margin clear off final bend and at 200 M, ran on well.
Towards rear. Gradually recovered ground and became 6th rounding home bend. Held up on inside near 350 M. Ran on steadily when in clear 200 M out.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Took lead from 1200 M to 300 M. Faded.
Near rear. Last early straight. Ran past a few beaten horses.
Not far off to 400 M. Weakened steadily.
Led briefly early, then raced 2-1/2Ls 3rd from 1200 M to home bend. Moved up from 700 M to tackle the leader final turn. Found no extra final 300 M.
Well there. Kept on well in straight without threatening.
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit when 8th 200 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on from 10th 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Made no show.
Soon in midfield. Made ground moderately final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Midfield early, soon gave ground to race near the rear. Made up a little ground inside 250 M.
Settled 4th and 5th. Crept closer on 4-wide final turn. Ran on well to take control 300 M. Won readily.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage momentarily early in straight. Overhauled over 200 M out.
Midfield. Gradually weakened under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Raced tight between runners early in straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages. (Lame.)
Jumped well. Settled behind leaders. Baulked for a run on inner early in straight. Only kept on at the same pace inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running and led till headed shortly after straightening. Weakened gradually.
Settled in prominent position. Quickened to assert authority over 200 M out. Won readily.
Restrained in prominent position never further than 3Ls back to straight. Inconvenienced for a run early in straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Made short-lived effort early in straight. Soon found no extra.
Settled at the back. Finished off race well.
Raced in midfield. Faded gradually in straight.
Slow out. Travelled in last few to straight. No clear running early on. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Lacked pace early. Took closer order when very wide rounding home bend. Dropped out from midfield into straight.
Midfield. Lost position around home bend. Faded steadily in straight.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well from 9th early straight to assert authority close home.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Unable to recover in straight.
Near the rear throughout.
In touch. 3Ls 5th 400 M. Kept on.
Led field to 900 M. 2Ls 3rd early straight. Weakened inside 200 M.
Always prominent. 1-1/2Ls 2nd final turn. Kept on when under pressure inside 200 M to maintain a minor placing.
Midfield or better. Improved to 4th 500 M. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Missed the start from the widest draw, near rear. Recovered good ground from outside final 300 M, just missed a minor placing.
Behind midfield. Widest turning in. Faded.
In touch. Ridden along to take lead from 900 M. With 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn, kept on well but was just captured close home.
Lost a little ground at start, soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Kept on similar pace in straight.
Never better than midfield, making moderate late headway closing stages.
Settled in 5th just off leader of second flight. Moved up to hit front shortly after straightening but unable to sustain effort and swamped 200 M out.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened to hold every chance 200 M out but over-shadowed nearing finish.
Settled around mid-division. Not much room early in straight, but had not much to give under pressure final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Came to challenge under pressure early in straight. Hit front passing 200 M and hung on well to the line.
Settled in rear. Ran on past beaten horses in straight to be nearest at finish.
Led second flight some 5Ls behind leading trio, with gap extending to 8Ls coming out of back straight. Caught up with leaders turning in but only ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear. Found no room early in straight. Made modest headway inside final 200 M.
Never far off. Caught behind weakening pacemaker in straight and lost position. Found nothing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
Tracked pacemaker. Hit front briefly early in straight, then weakened.
Waited with. Made steady headway between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Led field until headed into straight. Soon weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke with field and soon raced in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Soon raced towards the rear around 3 wide with cover. Ridden along to home turn to maintain position. Failed to show any running in home straight.

Jumped fairly and steadily eased to worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Had no clear running in early to middle part of straight. Ran home well when clear running was obtained inside final 200 M to take 2nd.
Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to race in a handy position around 4 wide without cover through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and steadily dropped out from 300 M.

Broke well and niggled along to take up a box-seat position behind the leader through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but was unable to match speed with the placegetters inside final 100 M.
Began awkwardly and unable to muster early spped to race at the tail on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening.

Crowded for room shortly after start and raced in a rearward position 2 wide. Switched to the widest and made little headway at home turn. Under pressure 350 M out and made up steady ground to be closest at finish.
Began fairly and soon raced in a handy position 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and rattled home to take charge inside final 250 M.
Best out from wide draw and ridden along to race in a prominent position 2 wide to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and slightly weakened inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from widest and raced towards the rear out wide making the first turn. Dropped to the back with cover running down back straight. Switched wide in home straight to obtain clear running but unable to make much impression.

Tardy start and hard ridden along in the early stages to take lead on rail from 1200 M with around 1/2L advantage to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out, headed near the 250 M and further weakened thereafter.

Broke fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in a handy position 2 to 3 wide with no cover from back straight to home straight. No extra when asked 350 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 300 M.

Shortly after the start was crowded for room and soon raced towards the rear 2 wide. Moved up to midfield 3 wide with cover down back straight. Switched out on straightening to obtain running but failed to show any running.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield on rail through to straight. Whilst only running on evenly lost its rightful running and checked at the 200 M. Made no impression thereafter.
2-wide when 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, held up off home turn when 4Ls behind in 9th, clear 350 M out, making minor headway but held by principals when checked at 200 M.
4-back the fence and 7Ls behind in 11th at 1200 M, 5Ls behind in 12th off home turn, no impression.
Slowly away, over-raced a little and mostly 3-deep (sometimes without cover out 4-wide) when 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in mid-division until 600 M out, a neck down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra, nice debut.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls behind in 12th at 1200 M, under pressure when 4-wide and 5Ls behind towards rear off final bend, didn't trouble leaders.
Sent on to be 3-wide without cover when 2Ls behind in 3rd at 1200 M, a neck down in 2nd at the final bend, swamped at the 200 M, wilted.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 4th on fence down backstretch, under pressure to hold this spot at 500 M, all out down the stretch but stuck on gamely and narrowly missed 2nd.
Head up and keen early on, 3-back the fence 4Ls behind in 6th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 5th or so at the home turn, brief lead 250 M out, headed about 100 M out, hung on for 2nd.
2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls behind in 5th or so until the 600 M, 2Ls behind on straightening, one-paced from then on and never looked likely.
2-wide and 8Ls behind and one from rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down and still in 13th when 4-wide off home turn, finished off moderately down centre of track.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L until home turn, headed at 250 M and no extra thereafter.
2-wide and 1L behind in 2nd from 1200 M to 600 M, 1L down in 3rd off home turn, weakened steadily inside final 300 M.
7Ls behind in 10th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 4Ls behind but still in 10th at final bend, kept on fairly past some tired rivals.
Always in rear and mostly detached at least 7Ls off the pace.
3-wide with cover 6Ls behind in 9th at 1200 M, 4-wide off home turn when 3Ls down in mid-division, quickened up well to lead at 100 M, drew away nicely.
Ridden to a forward position early stages. Shuffled back to midfield after being crowded at 900 M. Did not quicken in the straight.
Dropped back to trail field. Remained in a rearward position on straightening and only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Led briefly early stages. Kept a length behind the leader in a 2-wide position until the turn. Lost touch with leaders near 500 M and only one paced in the straight.
Ridden along in forward position before settling 2-wide at midfield. Quickened well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Ridden early to take the lead 1000 M. Held a length's advantage into the straight. Dug deep but failed to hold off winner inside final 100 M.

Jumped well and raced in a forward position early. Kept within a length behind the pace in a 3-wide position. Improved steadily after straightening to be alongside leader at 200 M and took over inside final 100 M.
Jumped well from widest draw but was outpaced and raced 3-wide in rear section. Raced wide in making the home turn but closed the race off well.
Jumped awkwardly. Ridden early stages and only managed to race behind midfield. Kept being ridden in a wide position rounding the home turn but lacked a response. Tired in the final 200 M.
Hard ridden to be in a forward position. Continued to be ridden to keep pace. Weakened shortly after straightening. (Lame.)
Slowly away and rear section early stages. Niggled along to be placed behind midfield at home turn. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Jumped well. Settled 4-wide at midfield until straightening. Kept on but unable to quicken to challenge closing stages.
Off slowly and soon settled in a rearward position. Responded well in the straight and made up some ground closing stages.
Disputed lead on fence until home straight, headed about 200 M out and weakened close home.
Raced 2-wide better than midfield within 2Ls or 3Ls of pace until home turn, quickened up well to lead at 200 M, grabbed about 50 M by winner, no extra.
Worse than midfield and 4Ls off pace with cover until home turn, held up for a run until switching into clear at 300 M, ran on well, nearest at finish.
Always well placed in midfield early had the run of the race 2Ls behind in 4th at 600 M and closer on straightening, failed to quicken up and swamped at the 200 M.
Always worse than midfield about 4Ls off pace but with cover, 4-wide off home turn and finished off tamely down centre of course.
Settled 7Ls off pace and one from rear at 1000 M, crept to be 3Ls down in midfield off home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, led final 50 M, readily.
Slowest away, 3-back on the fence and about 4Ls off pace in 9th until 600 M, closer on straightening and 2Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, could not sustain effort.
Best away, led out 2-wide by a neck 1000 M, disputed lead until top of home straight, one-paced when swallowed up at the 200 M.
Always very deep on the track, 5-wide without cover at 800 M when 2Ls down in 3rd, 5-wide off final bend when 2Ls down in midfield, soon beaten and steadily eased out.
Bounded at start, covered up about 3Ls behind leaders in midfield until home turn, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well but couldn't grab leaders.
Midfield about 2Ls off pace when 4-wide but with cover at 800 M, lost position on the circle and soon faded out in stretch.
Slowly away, detached about 10Ls adrift in rear at 800 M, made a little late headway through some rivals.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 3-wide when 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, led 300 M out but caught by winner at the 100 M and no extra.
3-back the fence 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, similar position entering straight but 2-wide, 1L down in 2nd at the 200 M, led 100 M out, pulled clear.
2-wide and 5Ls off speed in 10th at 1000 M, same when held up for run from top of home straight to 250 M out, kept on fairly but leading trio were in charge.
6Ls behind on fence 11Ls off pace at 1000 M, hung out 700 M out, 4Ls down on fence and held up for a run on straightening until about 300 M out, no impression when clear.
Head up and keen when disputing lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd on fence at the home turn, soon weakened.
7Ls behind when 3-wide with cover in 12th at 1000 M, still towards rear when 4-wide off home turn about 5Ls off pace, ran on well without looking likely to reach quinella pair.
2-wide and 4Ls behind in 6th at 1000 M, 5Ls behind and slightly further back on straightening, no impression.
Didn't break well, 8Ls behind and one from rear in 13th at 1000 M, 6Ls behind in rear off final bend, never a factor.
Keen early when 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1200 M, checked at 900 M, still 2Ls down in 4th at final bend, faded out soon after.
Sent on from widest gate to dispute lead out 4-wide without cover at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd (and still no cover) from 800 M to homestretch, swamped at 200 M and drifted back.
Had cover when 3-wide about 5Ls behind in 9th at 1000 M, still 9th but 4Ls down and 4-wide off home turn, dropped out tamely. (Lame.)
Disputed lead on fence at 1200 M, unbalanced at 900 M and 3Ls down in 5th on fence at 600 M and struggling to hold this spot at top of stretch, faded.
About 9Ls down in rear at 1000 M, 6Ls behind in rear off home turn, made some moderate late ground.
3-wide without cover when half a length down in 3rd at 1200 M, pressed on to lead by 1L out 2-wide at 600 M and entering straight, faded shortly after being headed 300 M out.
Towards rear. Modest progress inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Widest final turn. Weakened steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Improved to 7th early straight. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground to be in midfield on inside. Crept closer to 5th final turn. Ran on steadily without threatening the quinella pair.
Led field from a wide draw. Was headed approaching 200 M. Kept on well but failed to fight back.
In touch. Gave ground from final turn.
Soon in midfield. Crept closer to 4th on 3-wide final turn. Sustained effort to take lead approaching 200 M. Held on.
Soon prominent on inside. 2nd from 1200 M. 2Ls 3rd final turn. Found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. Kept on in straight but found no extra closing stages.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground 200 M out.
In touch. Advanced to 2nd final turn. Kept on but lost the 3rd place close home.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
In touch on inside. Gave ground to midfield final turn. Soon weakened.
Rear. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Towards rear. Made minor progress final 200 M.
Prominent. Gave ground to 5th 600 M. Pulled up soon after straightening. (Bled.)
Led field to the Rock. Remained 2nd to early straight. Kept on same pace final 250 M.
Prominent. Reached the front briefly 1000 M. Dropped back to 4th when raced 3-wide. Failed to quicken in straight.
Towards rear. Checked near 500 M. Recovered a little ground final turn. Stayed on moderately in straight.
In touch briefly, soon towards rear. Checked 250 M. No recovery.
Better than midfield. 4th final turn. Kept on steadily without threatening the quinella pair.
In touch early. Dropped to the rear after being severely checked approaching 1000 M. Never recovered.
Towards rear early. Gradually improved to midfield far side. Made further progress passing the Rock to be 3rd 500 M. Sustained effort in straight to take command inside 50 M.
Began awkwardly from widest draw, near rear. Soon moved up from outside to be in midfield. Made no show in straight. Wide throughout.
Midfield early, moved up to be prominent from 1000 M. Took lead at the Rock. Held on but failed to contain the winner closing stages.
Well back. Commenced run turning in and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts. Gained narrow advantage under pressure over 200 M out. Unable to fend off winner's late surge and collared close to home.
Attempted to make all. Came under pressure to resist challenges over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped nearing finish.
With leaders briefly. Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear. Saved ground on inside rails turning in. Made modest headway without threatening.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened gradually.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Kept on well.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Ran on nicely to take charge nearing finish.
Attempted to get to the front early but had to settle some 2Ls behind lead 2 to 3 wide. Weakened out of contention rounding home bend.
Never better than rear of midfield. Made some late impression closing stages.
Never seen with a chance.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield. Ran on steadily from 4th early straight but failed to catch the winner.
Brief lead early, then remained 2Ls behind lead on inside. Kept on in straight but lost 3rd close home.
Took lead approaching 1000 M and never headed.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Widest final turn. Kept on similar position in straight.
Last. Recovered some ground in straight.
Led briefly after start, soon raced in 4th. Moved up from 700 M to be 1L 2nd home bend. Kept on until failing to hold place 100 M.
Midfield or better. Found no extra closing stages.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Made ground on inside rail in straight to take 3rd near finish.
Towards rear. Found no clear run when trying to improve 250 M. Made up some ground when in clear 200 M out.
Midfield. Soon pulled to the 2nd far side. Dropped back from 400 M. Faded in straight. (Mucus.)
Around midfield on outside. Failed to improve when under pressure 200 M.
Well back. Never nearer.
Settled in rear midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Mostly in midfield. Made modest progress down straight without threatening.
Always in last few.
Led far side. Headed into straight. Weakened gradually.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled in rear. Took closer order rounding 1000 M bend. Made steady headway from rear of midfield into straight.
Waited with. Commenced move turning in. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Led early, then settled just off the pace. Regained lead under pressure turning in but unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.
Settled in midfield. Ran on quite well in straight without threatening.
Wide throughout. Midfield early. Made some headway far side. Soon weakened in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Dropped out. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled just behind leaders. Not much room early in straight. Quickened to hit front about 200 M out. Just held on to the line.
Ridden along to be box-seated behind the leader but was keen and had a tendency to hang out. Switched away from the rail on straightening and ran home strongly to win convincingly.
Broke with field from widest and soon eased to the back 2-wide through to straight. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Broke well and soon raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M but became one-paced inside final 100 M.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and dropped to a rearward position on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 250 M out.

Jumped awkwardly from wide gate and soon raced in a rearward position on inner to straight. Unable to see clear daylight in early to middle part of straight. Ran on well when clear running was obtained at 100 M to grab 3rd.

Began well from wide draw and hard ridden along in the early stages to take lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Kept on well in straight but was unable to match speed with winner inside final 200 M.
Tardy start from wide draw and soon eased to the back but obtained rail running. Remained in similar position to straight but was unable to show much running when asked 250 M out.

Began well and soon settled in a handy position 2-wide with cover through to straight. All out 200 M out and ran on fairly but was unable to fend off late challenge from 3rd placegetters to be overhauled on the line.

Broke with field and soon settled in midfield or better 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 250 M out and ran on fairly to miss the placings by a narrow margin.
Jumped well from an outside draw and soon eased to midfield or worse 2-wide. Made little headway from the outside rounding the home turn. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M.
Slightly outpaced in the early stages to be in midfield position on rail through to straight. Switched to the middle in straight and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2-wide. Ridden along at home turn to maintain position. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
3Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, left 4-wide without cover on the circle, 3Ls down and 4-wide (widest) in mid-division off home turn, no danger from then on.
Lost place early on and always at least 4Ls off pace from 800 M to home turn, never in the hunt.
Steadied at 800 M when over 3Ls behind and worse than midfield, 5Ls down in 11th on fence at final bend, never troubled leaders.
Awkwardly away and lost ground at start, detached 7Ls off the speed at 800 M, never a factor.
Under pressure when 6Ls behind in 11th on fence at 700 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, ran on well to nick a place on the line.
4-wide no cover at 700 M when 2Ls off speed in mid-division, gained cover from 600 M to entrance of home straight when 3-wide under pressure and 2Ls down in 4th, one-paced thereafter.
On fence and about 2Ls behind in midfield until 600 M, hung out on circle and 2Ls down in 5th and 2-wide entering straight with place prospects, always held by principals.
Had cover in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed until straightening up 3-wide, failed to kick, eased down final 200 M. (Bled.)
Best away, unbalanced at 800 M when 1L down in 4th, 4Ls behind in 9th when 2-wide off home turn, never threatened.
Away well but couldn't lead, 1L down in 2nd on fence at 600 M, 2Ls behind in 3rd at final bend, kept on at same pace and lost out on a place final strides.
Always close up, 2-wide and 1L down in 3rd at 600 M, 1L down in 2nd at home turn, ran on well but had no chance with winner.
Away well, crossed from widest gate to lead on fence at 600 M by 1L, same margin clear on straightening, always in command under hands and heels riding.
Raced mostly in the lead and held a length's advantage into home straight. Weakened steadily inside 300 M.
In a forward position early. Settled prominently behind the leader after 1600 M before angling out on straightening for its run. Quickened well and assumed the lead 300 M, kept on well to line.
Settled on fence at midfield. Shifted out to a 2-wide position at 800 M. Steadily made progress in the straight and kept on well to line.
Slowly away and raced along the fence near the back. Quickened well on straightening and closed the race off well.

Ridden out of the gates to take up a position behind leaders Settled 3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the pace early stages. Allowed to stride forward and took the lead 600 M. Failed to hold on and weakened on straightening.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Hampered and carried out to be widest making home turn. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Among leaders early but shuffled back slightly after crowding at 1900 M. Raced on fence and kept within 3Ls of the leader. Kept on without quickening in the straight.

Sluggish start and was hard ridden to keep position. Rear section early but steadily progressed to midfield 1200 M. Carried wider on straightening, rallied well and fell just short of catching winner.
Raced along the fence behind midfield until home straight. Ran on and made up a bit of ground in the closing stages.
Trailed field from the start and was last to enter home straight. Closed the race off well and made up ground in the straight.
Settled 2-wide in rear section. Lacked a response when ridden at 600 M and then weakened in the straight.
No more than a length off the lead in a 2-wide position early and middle stages. Ridden at home turn but unable to make any progress. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Crowded at start, 6Ls behind when 2-wide in 4th at 1100 M, pressed on to be 2Ls down in 2nd when 2-wide at 800 M and same entering straight, all out to be a neck 2nd at 200 M, weakened.
7Ls behind on fence in 5th at 1100 M, 4Ls behind in 5th from 800 M to home turn, over 2Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, no extra.
Settled in 10th about 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, 8Ls down and 3-wide (widest) on straightening, ran on strongly to claim a place close home.
Led early on, 2Ls behind on fence at 1100 M, keen with head up at 900 M and 2Ls behind in 3rd from 800 M to home straight when under pressure, faded out.
In 9th place on fence about 8Ls or 9Ls off the speed until home turn, making some good late ground when hindered 100 M out, nearest at the finish.
5Ls behind in 3rd on fence at 1100 M, 3Ls behind when 2-wide in 4th from 800 M to home straight, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, lost out on a place final strides.
Blundered at start, 9Ls behind in 7th on fence at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 7th off home turn, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on finding but winner had flown.
Crowded at start, 10Ls behind 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, 6Ls or 7Ls behind in 8th from 800 M to home turn, staying on only fairly in midfield when steadied 100 M out, ran on.
8Ls behind when 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 6th off home turn, quickened up very well to lead 150 M out, ran on strongly.
Switched from widest gate to fence upon exiting gates, always at least 7Ls off pace in last thereafter.
Pressed on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, just over 1L clear off home turn, headed 150 M out, unbalanced when swamped at 100 M, eased close home.
In touch to 250 M. Weakened steadily.
Towards rear. Made up good ground 200 M out, never recovered.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield or behind. Dropped back steadily from 400 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground to midfield 600 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Better than midfield. Kept on from 5th 600 M out. Found no extra closing stages.
Led field until headed approaching 200 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Near the rear. Checked 200 M while trying to make up some ground.
Never in contention.
Soon behind midfield and remained in similar position throughout.
Better than midfield. Failed to respond when under pressure 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
In touch, 1L 3rd course proper. Given reminders 300 M. Responded well to take command close home.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order to 6th 400 M. Ran on quite well inside 200 M to take 3rd final 50 M.
Began awkwardly but was soon prominent. Gained advantage approaching 200 M. Kept on well but failed to contain the winner close home.
Settled at the back. Produced good effort in straight. Did best work at finish.
Jumped slowly. Quickly recovered to prominent position. Faded under pressure 200 M out.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Made up good late ground in straight. Did best work at finish.
Stalked leader. Disputed lead into straight. Weakened under pressure over 200 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Soon took up running and led until joined early in straight. Overhauled passing 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Quickened well over 200 M out to hit front about 100 M out. Hung on well to finish.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground at the finish. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Ridden to 3rd close up behind pace. Came to challenge upon straightening holding some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Improved to hold some chance inside 200 M but outsprinted close to home.
Towards rear. Improving when switched off rail for a run 200 M out. Looked a danger briefly before coming one-paced nearing finish.
Well there to straight. Weakened upon straightening. (Mucus in trachea.)
Prominent far side. Gave ground from home bend.
Towards rear soon after start. Recovered ground from 1000 M to be 5th 750 M. Ran on steadily 300 M, doing best work closing stages to claim victory inside 50 M.
Was 4th before dropping to 6th 950 M. Still 3Ls behind lead early straight. Ran on well to snatch 2nd at finish.
Midfield. Weakened 200 M out.
Near rear, last from 1200 M. Made ground steadily from the final turn.
Settled 5th early. Moved up gradually to be 3rd 800 M. Hit front on 3-wide 500 M. Shared lead 250 M. Kept on but just lost a minor placing at finish.
Always at the back.
Behind midfield. Made no show final 250 M.
Pushed along to take lead from 1200 M. Was headed 500 M. Effort in straight to share lead 250 M. Kept on but failed to maintain position close home.
Towards rear. Recovered ground on outside passing 600 M. Faded in straight.
Lost ground at start, was last early. Soon recovered some ground to be 10th on rail. Remained there until making up good ground final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Prominent from widest draw. Was 1/2L behind lead until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Lost a bit of ground passing 1000 M. Remained in similar position before running on moderately final 200 M.
Near rear. Ran past some beaten horses closing stages. (Mucus.)
Held 3rd to 800 M. 2Ls 4th 400 M. Kept on without quickening inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Faded.
Jumped best and led far side. Settled behind leaders coming out of back straight. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Came under pressure approaching home turn and soon weakened.

Very unlucky in running, checked first time when prominent approaching home bend. Midfield into straight. Nowhere to go early and eventually hampered badly over 200 M out. Made some late impression closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Never a danger.
Settled towards rear. Quickened well to hold every chance in straight but unable to see it out at the finish.
Raced wide at the back to straight. Ran on well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Took closer order rounding home bend. Disputed lead into straight. Fought on gamely to assert authority closing stages.
Ridden in rear early. Took off passing 1000 M to circle field home bend, joining leaders into straight. Soon weakened after straightening.
Midfield. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Took up running coming out of back straight. Struggled under pressure turning for home and soon weakened.
Soon settled in a rearward position around 3 wide with cover. Switched to the widest on straightening to make its run but failed to quicken and further weakened inside final 150 M.
Jumped with field from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position closer to rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to make up any ground in straight.

Jumped well and soon settled in midfield or better 3 wide no cover. From around the 1200 M mark slowly moved forward to be 1L off pace on straightening. Only kept on same pace to the line when asked 400 M out.
Broke well and soon raced in handy position on rail through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M out and was able to fend off late charge from 4th placegetter to hold onto 3rd.

Jumped fairly and soon raced in better than midfield around 2 wide. Switched out and made steady headway rounding the home turn. Under pressure 350 M out and ran on fairly but became one-pace in the closing stages.

Jumped fairly from widest and niggled along to take lead on rail from around the 1400 M through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but was headed near the 200 M and steadily faded thereafter.

Broke well and steadily eased to midfield or worse 2 wide. Crept closer and steadily switched to the outside rounding the home turn. Responded well when asked 300 M out and kicked clear final 150 M to win convincingly.
Began awkwardly and raced in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Soon dropped to the tail around 3 wide with cover and hung out rounding home turn. Switched wide on straightening to obtain running but unable to show much impression in straight.

Tardy start from wide draw and ridden along in the early stages to race in a prominent position on inner. Under pressure 400 M out and responded well but unable to match speed with winner inside final 150 M to settle for 2nd.

Jumped well but was eased to the rear on rail through to straight. Responded quite well when asked 350 M out but was held up for some distance after the 200 M. Kept on fairly when running was obtained in final stages.

Began well from wide draw and soon settled in a handy position around 2 wide through to straight. Had trouble seeing clear daylight in early to middle part of straight. Ran on well inside final 200 M to miss 3rd narrowly.
Broke with field and raced in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but was unable to quicken and only kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and raced in midfield towards the outside with no cover. After the 1600 M commenced to over-race. Stayed in similar position to straight and steadily tailed out.
2-wide and 3Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, much the same off home turn, one-paced in the finish.
8Ls behind when 2-wide in 12th at 1200 M, 6Ls behind in same position off home turn, made some minor late ground.
9Ls last on fence at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when 8Ls last, no impression.
Always worse than midfield, 7Ls behind in 9th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 10th on straightening, faded out.
Had the box-seat run about 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Unbalanced when 9Ls behind in 13th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 7Ls behind off home turn when switching inside, made some late ground, nearest at finish.
Led by 1L on fence at 1400 M and same margin clear entering home straight, went 2Ls clear under hands and heels riding at 200 M, easily pulled further ahead.
6Ls behind in 10th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 8th when 3-wide off final bend, kept on fairly to secure a place close home.
Keen early on, 4Ls off pace in 6th on fence at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up at 700 M and hard ridden entering straight, faded out. (Mucus in trachea.)
Swerved and jockey very unbalanced at start, 3-wide with cover when 6Ls behind in 8th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 6th off home turn and at 200 M, weakened close home.
Always 3-wide without cover in 3rd or 4th about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, kept on gamely for 2nd.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 1L behind in 2nd from 1200 M to home turn, still in 2nd but 2Ls behind at 200 M but weakened close home.
Settled in midfield 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed through to home straight, never threatened to get much closer.
Ridden along at midfield and was shuffled back after being crowded at 1000 M. Turned out before straightening but was unable to quicken in the straight.
Took the lead shortly after start. Disputed lead into home straight. Kept on well for a minor placing.
Niggled along early stages and raced alongside the leader at 800 M. Took the lead briefly after 400 M but was swamped thereafter.
Pushed along to be in a forward position. Raced prominently behind the leader into the home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
Outpaced and raced at the back early. Improved along the outside to be at midfield 800 M. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Began fairly and niggled along at midfield. Lacked a response when ridden at 600 M and weakened in the straight.
Slowly away and raced along the rails near the back until home straight. Closed the race off with a strong rally.
Began fairly from widest draw and was taken back to race at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and made up good ground in the straight.
Jumped well but dropped steadily back to midfield. Fell further back after being crowded at 1000 M. 3-wide in rear section rounding home turn and closed the race off with a good rally.
Jumped awkwardly and got back. Improved steadily to midfield at 1000 M. Took some time to gather speed on straightening but closed the race off well inside final 200 M.
Best out from wide draw and was allowed to drift back to midfield. Remained wide rounding the turn and had nothing left in the straight.
Outpaced early stages and raced in rear section. Ridden along at home turn without making much ground. Ran on without threatening closing stages.
Closely behind the pace early stages. Dropped back slightly after being checked at 1000 M. Kept 2Ls off the pace in a 2-wide position home turn. Unable to quicken and kept one-paced in the straight.
Botched the start and was ridden forward to be within 3Ls of the pace at 800 M. Quickened well on straightening and drew clear inside final 200 M for an easy win.
Settled about 7Ls last and 2-wide down backstretch, 5-wide (widest of all) and 5Ls down in rear off home turn, quickened up very well to lead at 200 M, drew clear, impressive.
Slowly away, settled well on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace worse than midfield until home turn, crowded for room when about 3Ls down in 10th at 200 M, finished off well once clear.
Well placed with box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home turn, found very little off the bridle.
Crossed easily from wide gate to lead on fence by 1L at 1400 M, headed at 1000 M but led by 1L again at 800 M, narrow lead off final bend, headed 300 M out and faded steadily.
4Ls behind in 6th on fence at 1200 M, over 2Ls down in 5th when straightening up 2-wide, switched inside for room at 200 M but always outpaced by principals.
Keen early on, always about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield when 2-wide until 600 M out, picked up quite well to be 1L down in 5th at 200 M but lacked an extra kick.
Checked at 1200 M, 4Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M when 3-wide with cover, no cover at 800 M until stretch when 3Ls off pace in mid-division, half a length down in 4th at 200 M, found no extra.
Close up out 2-wide between 1L and 2Ls off the speed and either 2nd, 3rd or 4th until home straight, swamped at the 200 M and weakened.
6Ls off pace in 10th when 2-wide at the 1200 M, 4Ls towards rear and going well off home turn, quickened up to be a neck down in 3rd at 200 M, no chance with winner but held 2nd comfortably.
About 6Ls or 7Ls off pace in rear on fence down backstretch, 5Ls down into home straight, never had much clear running room, largely untested.
Keen at 1200 M and pressed on to lead at 1000 M out 3-deep no cover, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and a neck 2nd off final bend, led 350 M out and one-paced once headed at 200 M.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, 4Ls behind in 10th on straightening, held up at the 300 M for a run, switched out wider at 200 M, ran on well to grab a place close home.
Best away, led by a neck on fence at 1200 M, 1L clear at 800 M and 600 M headed at top of home straight and weak inside final 200 M.
Keen early, 5Ls behind when 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, held up when 3Ls down in mid-division off home turn, over 2Ls down in 9th at 200 M, burst through late and narrowly missed 2nd.
Slowly away, 12Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 13th off final bend, posed little threat. (Lame.)
Keen early, 3-wide but mostly with cover until home straight, 6Ls behind in 10th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 10th off home turn, always held by leaders but still a nice debut.
Slowly away, always in last pair, 10Ls off pace at 1100 M, 5-wide (widest) and under pressure on straightening, no danger.
Awkwardly away with rider unbalanced, 8Ls behind in 11th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 12th off final bend, always outpaced.
6Ls off pace on fence in 9th at 1100 M, 3Ls behind in 8th at home turn, closer but steadied at 200 M and switched inside, ran on strongly but narrowly missed a place.
4Ls off pace on fence in 7th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down in midfield off home turn, never likely to catch winner but still stayed on well to nick 2nd on the line.
Keen when 3-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 2Ls off pace in 5th entering home straight, just over 1L down in 6th at 200 M, no extra close home.
9Ls behind in 12th at 1200 M, 5Ls behind in 11th on fence at final bend, no impression.
1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide until the 800 M, led at top of home straight but headed about 150 M later, tended to hang in on the run-in.
Slowly away, had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1000 M to home straight, still well there at the 200 M but faded close home.
Raced prominently but freely early on, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace at 1200 M and 800 M, almost upsides leaders off home turn, led 250 M out, ran on well.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, 2Ls behind in midfield off final bend when hanging in, stayed on well but always held by principals.
Towards rear. Made up good ground on outside inside 250 M. Failed to threaten the winner.
In touch. 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Faded soon after straightening.
Prominent. Took lead from 1400 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Lost ground at start, rear to straight. Ran on steadily on outside until finding no extra close home.
Midfield. Ran on strongly from 6th 350 M to take control 200 M. Won readily.
In the last pair. Made up some ground final 200 M.
10th to straight. Recovered some ground 200 M out.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Crept a bit closer on inside final turn. One-paced.
In touch. 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened final 150 M.
Led early, 2nd from 1400 M. Kept on until fading out of contention final 250 M.
Midfield. Ran on steadily 250 M to claim 3rd closing stages.
Towards rear early, moved up to be 4th 1300 M. Dropped back a bit to 5th rounding home bend. Ran on early straight to be 2nd 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Mainly 3Ls 4th until finding no extra soon after straightening.
Settled behind midfield on inside. Crept closer order to 5th 300 M. Ran on well inside 200 M to take control passing 100 M.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Made progress from outside home bend. Ran on to take 3rd closing stages.
Well there, 2Ls 3rd far side. Moved up final turn to take lead 250 M. Kept on but failed to resist winner's challenges final 100 M.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground to be 5th on inside. Remained there before making good shift to 2nd 200 M. Failed to maintain position closing stages.
Led field to 200 M out. Faded.
Towards rear. Given reminders from final turn. Only made minor improvement in straight.
Always at the back.
Behind midfield. Was steadied and carried wider home turn. Made ground moderately inside 200 M while steadied close home.
Better than midfield. Gave a little ground rounding home bend. Kept on under pressure in straight.
In touch. Improved to 2nd passing winning post first time. Weakened out of contention on straightening.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Broke well. Tracked leader. Asserted authority inside 200 M. Won readily.
Never nearer.
Prominent early, dropping to midfield home bend. Lost further ground in straight.
Always thereabouts. One-paced under pressure final 200 M.
Well back. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield when steadied and lost some ground coming out of straight. Kept on steadily down home straight without quickening.
Raced wide in forward of midfield to straight. One-paced.
Attempted to make all. Swamped inside final 200 M.
Sluggish at start. Trailed the field to straight. Kept on steadily to beat one home.
Slightly slow out. Gradually picked up to midfield before home bend. Disputed 4th into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Towards rear. Made good progress passing 600 M to be 5th early straight. Kept on well but failed quicken to challenge close home.
Towards rear. Checked near 1400 M. 4-wide turning in. Ran on well to take 3rd closing stages.
Led field to 1250 M. Remained prominent to 650 M where he dropped back to 5th. Failed to quicken in straight.
Behind midfield. Moved up passing 800 M to be 3-wide 3rd 500 M. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit to behind midfield home bend. Recovered good ground final 250 M, just missed a minor placing.
Never in contention.
Settled at rear from widest draw. Widest turning into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent, 1L 2nd at 1000 M. Kept on until weakening out of contention passing 200 M.
Raced 4th or 5th before giving ground passing the Rock to 8th or 9th. Recovered some ground on inside final turn. Ran on 200 M through a narrow gap on the rail to take lead near 100 M. Just held on.
Never far off. 2Ls 4th rounding home bend. Improved steadily to take brief advantage at 150 M. Failed to fight back when headed at 100 M.
Midfield or slightly behind. Dropped back steadily from 400 M.
Took lead approaching 1200 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent. Quickened under pressure upon straightening. Held slight chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Attempted to make all. Caught in the shadows of the post.
Began awkwardly. Trailed the field most of way home.
Raced mostly 3-wide in prominent position to straight, then weakened.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened under pressure inside final 200 M.
Towards rear most of way. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Ran home one-paced.
Settled midfield. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move upon straightening. Gained upper hand final strides.
Jumped awkwardly and driven along to take lead on rail. Joined by another runner from 1000 M to home straight. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Broke with field from wide draw and soon eased to the rear on inner. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to make much impression in straight.
Soon settled in rearward position 2-wide through to straight. Failed to make up any ground when asked 250 M out.

Broke fairly and raced in better than midfield 3-wide without cover. Near the 1300 M was allowed to stride forward to race outside the leader to straight. No extra when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside final 150 M.

Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield or worse 2-wide with cover through to straight. All out 200 M out and responded fairly but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the 2nd placegetter to settle for 3rd.
Broke fairly and hard ridden in the early stages to race in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but just failed to match speed with the placegetters.
Began awkwardly and ridden along in the early stages to race in a rearward position on fence through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke with field from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or worse on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Ran on quite well when asked 200 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 3rd placegetter.
Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and responded well to take charge inside final 250 M.
Tardy start from widest and soon raced at back on inner through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but kept on evenly and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and steadily eased to midfield or better on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but was never in position to trouble the placegetters. (Lame left hind.)
Broke best and soon settled in a forward position on rail. Remained in similar position to home straight. All out 200 M out but unable to quicken and kept on same pace to the line.
Had the run of the race in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight, 1L down in 3rd and with every chance 300 M out, failed to pick up.
Soon led on fence, always tended to hang out, about half a length clear from 1200 M to home straight and same at 200 M, headed at 100 M, no extra.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 5th at 1200 M, left 3-wide without cover at 1000 M until turning for 4-wide and 3Ls down in 5th, soon faded out.
3-wide without cover when a neck down in 2nd at 1100 M, 2-wide and about half a length down from 1000 M to 200 M out, swamped close home.
Detached in rear on fence 13Ls off pace at 1200 M, 6Ls behind in 11th entering straight when 6-wide (widest), finished off strongly but never nearer.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls off pace in 10th on fence at 1100 M, 3-wide into home straight when 6Ls down in 10th, never had much room on the run-in and not fully tested, nearest at finish.
Keen early on, half a length 3rd out 2-wide at 1100 M, settled better 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M and into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
6Ls behind in 9th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 8th when 2-wide at 800 M, 4Ls behind off final bend, ran on well late to be nearest at finish.
Slow away, 4Ls behind in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 3-wide off final bend when 3Ls down in midfield, outpaced.
4Ls off pace on fence in 6th at 1200 M, 3Ls behind in 5th off home turn, quickened up to lead 100 M out, kept on.
8Ls off pace when one from rear and 2-wide at 1100 M, 3-wide into stretch when 5Ls down in 9th, made some late ground but never troubled principals.
6Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1100 M, shuffled back to 6Ls last off final bend, no kick whatsoever and eased final 300 M. (Lame.)
Outpaced early stages and settled behind midfield. Drifted further back after 800 M and among last few to enter home straight. Made up some ground closing stages.
Niggled along in a 3-wide position better than midfield. Found nothing in the home straight.
Took the lead at 1000 M and held a slight advantage into some straight. Kept on well until fading out of contention inside final 200 M.
Dropped back to a rearward position from widest draw. Trailed field and swung widest on straightening. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Slow to muster speed early stages and was held wide at midfield. Near the rear on straightening and kept on steadily to line.
Best out. Eased slightly and settled behind the leaders. No more than 2Ls behind the pace back straight. Quickened well on straightening and took control inside final 100 M.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. One-paced in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates to take an early lead. Lost the lead but kept alongside the leader in a 2-wide position in back straight. Weakened in the home straight.
Raced on fence and no more than 3Ls off the pace. Held a prominent position on straightening and took over the lead inside final 200 M. Failed to match strides with winner closing stages.
Slowly away and kept in a rearward position after checking at 1000 M. Made a bit of headway home turn. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Slowly away and raced behind midfield. Made up a bit of ground along the inside from 800 M and got to within 4Ls of the leader at 400 M. Closed the race off fairly.
Missed the kick and trailed field to 600 M. Remained near the back on straightening and kept on same pace to line.
9Ls last at 1100 M, 8Ls down and one from rear, never troubled leaders.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, led by 1L off home turn, headed 100 M out, faded late.
6Ls down on fence in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 9th off final bend, very one-paced.
Checked 1400 M out, 5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1100 M, only a little close on fence off final bend, quickened up well to lead 100 M out, just hung on.
