3Ls behind when 2-wide in 4th at 1100 M, hung in at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th off final bend, very weak inside final 200 M.
4Ls behind on fence in 6th at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, every chance at 200 M when half a length down in 2nd, couldn't follow through.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 7th entering home straight, one-paced from then on.
7Ls behind when 3-wide with cover in 11th at 1200 M, 9Ls behind in rear off final bend, jockey dropped whip 300 M out, no threat.
Had cover when 3-wide and 6Ls behind in 8th at 1100 M, same on straightening, moderate late headway while hanging in.
Keen with head up and hanging out when 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, still 1L down in 2nd when 2-wide at the 400 M, over 1L down in 3rd and one-paced at 200 M, faded.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, 7Ls down in 10th off home turn, 4Ls down in 7th at 200 M, finished off very strongly and only narrowly failed.
Awkwardly away, 4-wide without cover at 1300 M, 2-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M, 3-wide in same spot off final bend, faded tamely.
Ridden along from widest draw and led field on inner. Headed on straightening. Kept on for 2nd but lost a place close home.
Began awkwardly, was 2nd last when broke down at 1000 M.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
In touch. Dropped back steadily to 5th rounding home bend. Weakened in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3-wide 3rd 800 M. 2-wide final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to take 3rd close home.
Towards rear early. Soon moved up to be 2Ls 4th. Kept on same pace in straight.
Ridden early to be prominent and was 2-wide 2nd from 1100 M. Took lead on straightening and held on to the line.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Midfield or slightly behind. Hung out from 600 M. Ran on well from 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start, at rear throughout.
Settled midfield or slightly behind. Maintained similar position throughout.
Well there. Baulked behind leaders rounding home bend and early in straight. Ran home one-paced final 200 M.
Raced outside leader to straight. Weakened gradually.
Well there. Hit front into straight. Unable to sustain effort under pressure 200 M out. Soon swamped.
Ridden to lead early and held narrow advantage to straight. Weakened.
Always struggling at the back.
Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Sustained effort from towards rear into straight to hit front close to home.
Midfield early. Improved to prominent position approaching home bend. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Badly hampered and dropped towards rear approaching 1200 M. Made no impression in straight.
Settled mainly in prominent position. Inconvenienced upon straightening. Ran home one-paced.
In rear of midfield when badly hampered and lost ground. Not much room early in straight. Made modest progress final 200 M without threatening.
Soon dropped to the rear. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. Commenced run turning in when very wide. Hit front over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and caught close to home.
Mostly in midfield. No clear passage behind horses early in straight. Kept on well to the line.
Broke well. Settled towards rear, wide turning in. One-paced in straight.
In the front on the stands' rail. Held on well final 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped back 300 M out. (Bled.)
Never able to feature.
Towards the rear on the outside rail.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening.
Towards rear. Recovered a little late ground passing 200 M.
Well there to 200 M. Found no extra.
Prominent. Was in the front 400 M among the runners in the middle of the track. Every chance at 200 M but failed to match speed with the winner afterwards.
Began awkwardly, around midfield throughout.
Slowly away, always at the back.
Towards rear. Was steadied for a run at 400 M when 8th. Ran on quite well 300 M to take 3rd closing stages.
Well there. Dropped back steadily 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, soon picked up to be 5th on inside 600 M. Kept on steadily thereafter.
Settled in rear of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled around midfield 3 wide or wider. Responded well under reminders early in straight to hit front about 150 M out. Just held on.
Prominent. Hit front momentarily inside 200 M but soon swamped.
Well there. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Well there. Hit front briefly early in straight. Giving ground when badly squeezed inside 200 M.
Raced in midfield or behind. Dropped away quickly once into straight.
Never far off to straight. Found no room whatsoever before eventually checked 200 M out. No further impression thereafter.
Attempted to make all. Rallied in straight but overhauled passing 200 M.
Settled in forward of midfield. No clear passage early in straight before squeezing his way through 200 M out. Sustained progress closing stages without threatening.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground past beaten horses in straight.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Inconvenienced for a stride upon straightening. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Tried to switch out for a run upon straightening but a bit tight between runners. Produced some late effort closing stages.
Midfield early. Dropped to rear home bend.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon raced in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Began with field and soon settled in rearward position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and charged home inisde final 200 M to win convincingly.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in mid-division around 3 wide without cover through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 400 M out.
Jumped with field and ridden along to take up running on rail from 1100 M through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 400 M out and slightly weakened inside final 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and was quickly taken to the back on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made little impression inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race midfield or worse around 4 wide with cover through to straight. Took a while to respond when asked 400 M out but made good impression final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in a handy position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and faded steadily inside final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly from widest and was steadily eased to the back. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to show any running in the straight.
Began well and niggled along to be box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Baulked for a run for part of the straight and was not properly tested. (See Racing Incidents.)

Broke well and soon settled in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Baulked for a run in early part of straight. Responded when clear running was obtained around 250 M out but was in no position to trouble the placegetters.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken and only able to keep on same pace to the line.

Slow to begin and raced in midfield on rail. Near the 800 M hung out and steadied away from heels. Slightly held up in early part of straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M out and just failed to run down 2nd placegetter.
Broke with field and steadily eased to a rearward position around 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.

Tardy start and soon recovered to race in a handy position on rail. Switched away from the fence on straightening to make its run. Responded well in straight but failed to match speed with winner inside final 150 M.
Over-raced early on, 3Ls behind in 5th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn, soon faded out.
3-wide when 7Ls behind and one from rear at 1200 M, only slightly better placed off home turn when 4-wide, ran on well late for a place.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 3rd at 1200 M, similarly placed on straightening and at 200 M when all out, weakened close home.
Settled 7Ls or 8Ls off speed in rear from 1200 M to home straight, made some late ground, never nearer.
3Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1200 M, about 4Ls down in 7th from 800 M to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Led on fence by 1L at 1400 M, shuffled back to 3Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 4Ls down in mid-division at final bend, fell away.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 5Ls down in midfield at 1200 M, always maintained a similar distance from the front.
4-wide without cover when 6Ls behind in 11th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in midfield when 4-wide off final bend, stayed on well late but never troubled quinella pair.
5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 8th at 1200 M, shuffled back slightly entering home straight, retrieved minor late ground but never loomed a threat.
5Ls behind lead in 8th when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M and into straight, 1L down at 200 M in 2nd when first shifting in and then sharply back out, no extra.
6Ls behind on fence in 10th at 1200 M, 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, never looked likely to land a blow.
Bounded exiting gates and switched across to fence in rear, unbalanced at 1400 M and hung out at 1200 M, about 7Ls behind in rear pair until home straight, no danger.
Worse than midfield early but pressed on from 1200 M to dispute lead out 3-wide no cover at 900 M, finally got to fence over 1L clear off home turn, still 1L up at 200 M, kept on gamely.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, under pressure to hold this position 500 M out, dropped out rapidly from top of stretch.
Jumped well and led early. Lost the lead at 800 M and regained it 300 M. Responded well when challenged final 200 M and blew away rivals closing stages.
Slowly away and trailed field until inside final 400 M. Quickened and closed the race off nicely.
Always kept about a length behind the leader. Failed to keep up inside final 300 M and faded away.
Jumped awkwardly. Ridden along to take the lead at 800 M. Held onto the lead until 400 M and tired quickly thereafter.
Kept around midfield and 3Ls away from the pacesetter. Stayed on one-pace closing stages.

Slowly away and raced near the back. Commenced to make a rally at midway point and improved to within 1/2L of the winner at 200 M. Continued well closing stages but winner proved too strong to overcome.
Settled 4 to 5Ls behind the pace. Ridden after the halfway mark but failed to gain ground. Ran past a pair of beaten runners final stages.
3 back the fence 7Ls behind in 6th at 1400 M, 1L down in 4th off home turn and led over 200 M out, rallied under pressure final 100 M and lost only on a bob of heads.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 3rd at 1400 M, 4-wide off final bend when 2Ls behind in 5th, very weaken thereafter.
Always 3-wide without cover, 8Ls off pace in 7th at 1400 M, improved to be 5-wide off home turn and 1L behind in 3rd, no chance with principals but still plugged on fairly well.
8Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1400 M, 3Ls behind in midfield at 400 M and 200 M, no extra.
Dropped out 13Ls off pace one from rear at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 12th off final bend when without clear running, not much dash when clear.
Keen early on, pressed on to lead by a neck out 2-wide at 1400 M, disputed lead until 600 M out, under pressure to keep entering straight and quickly swamped. (Bled.)
Dropped out 14Ls last 1400 M out, 4-wide off home turn when 6Ls behind, finished off strongly, never nearer.
Very wide at first bend but pressed on to lead by 1L at 1600 M, headed to be a neck 2nd at 1400 M, vied for lead until home straight, swamped over 200 M out, faded.
11Ls behind in 11th when 2-wide at 1400 M, without clear room when 5Ls off pace in 13th and 4-wide off final bend, ran on strongly once clear 350 M out for a place, nearest at finish.
3-wide with cover when 10Ls behind in 9th at 1400 M, worse than midfield and 4-wide on straightening when 4Ls off pace, posed little threat.
6Ls behind leader in 5th when 2-wide at 1400 M, covered up in same position about 3Ls off pace entering home straight, one-paced from then on.
Awkward start, 13Ls off pace in 12th when 2-wide at 1400 M, improved to 3Ls off speed in midfield when 5-wide off final bend, a neck 2nd at 200 M and scraped home in bobbing finish.
On fence 4Ls down in 4th at 1400 M, pressed on to be a neck 2nd out 2-wide off home turn, brief lead 300 M out but soon headed and faded out steadily.
10Ls off pace in 10th on fence at 1400 M, 3Ls behind in mid-division on fence at final bend, failed to quicken up.
10Ls behind in rear on fence at 1200 M, still in rear when 4-wide and 6Ls down into home straight, kept finding more for pressure, nearest at the finish.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, under pressure to stay ahead at 500 M, faded right out from top of home straight.
Keen early on, in 2nd place 1L off pace out 2-wide at 1200 M, led at top of home straight and half a length clear at 200 M, swamped close home.
Always 4-wide without cover, pressed on from being 9Ls down in 13th at 1200 M to 1L down in 4th off final bend, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, kept on well for pressure.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 4th and still no cover at 800 M, 3-wide and 1L down in 5th off home turn, still there at 200 M but weakened closing stages.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover when 6Ls off speed in 8th at 1200 M, driven when 3-wide when 2Ls down in 7th off home turn, half a length 3rd at 200 M, led 50 M out, kept on well.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in mid-division still at top of home straight, shifted out for clear running at 300 M, tight for room close home but always held by leaders.
Checked at start, 7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in 12th, hadn't much room at 200 M when 3Ls down, not full extended final 100 M.
9Ls behind when 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in 10th or so, without much room at 200 M when 3Ls down, not full extended final 100 M.
Keen early on, had the run of the race in 3rd on fence 2Ls behind leader from 1200 M to home straight, had every chance 300 M out but held through final furlong.
Raced 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M and entering homestretch, stayed on well but couldn't reach principals.
5Ls behind in 6th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 4Ls behind in midfield at home turn, 2Ls down at 200 M when tight for room, slightly outpaced when steadied at 100 M, ran on.
9Ls off pace in 12th on fence at 1200 M, 3-wide into home straight when 6Ls down in rear, finished off very strongly for 2nd.
Never better than midfield at any stage, 8Ls behind in 10th on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 12th at 400 M, always outpaced.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly, towards rear early. Soon recovered ground on 3-wide to be 3rd 800 M. Kept on well to take 2nd 200 M but without threatening the winner.
Midfield to 200 M. Ran on for a 3rd closing stages.
Behind midfield on inside. Failed to quicken.
In touch. Dropped back steadily final 400 M.
Well there. Dropped back from 1st turn to be 5th or 6th. 2-1/2Ls 5th early straight, one-paced thereafter.
Soon prominent. Moved up to 2nd 1200 M. Still 1L behind lead final turn before taking over 300 M. Held on well to the line.
Towards rear. Checked at 800 M. 2nd last early straight. Ran on final 200 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Made short-lived effort 300 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Mainly 6th to final turn where he improved to 4th on 4-wide and was 2Ls behind lead. Kept on without quickening.
Held 5th early. Dropped back steadily before checked 800 M to become 9th. Kept on same pace in straight.
Slowly away, near rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Led field to 300 M. Faded.
Began awkwardly, near the rear. Severely checked at 800 M. Remained in the rear until making up some ground on outside final 300 M.
Midfield. Improved from final turn to be 4-wide 5th 400 M. Ran home well to be nearest at finish. (Dropped whip 250 M.)
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield on 4-wide. Improved to 3rd or 4th from 1200 M. Failed to quicken in straight. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Ridden early to be in touch. Gave a little ground to midfield far side. Remained in similar position until weakened 200 M.
Led field soon after start until near 1100 M. 2Ls 3rd turning into straight. Ran on steadily to just miss at finish.
Prominent. Took lead near 1100 M. With 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn, just able to hold off challenges at finish.
Towards rear. Failed to make any impression in straight.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 1000 M out. Kept on but found no extra inside 200 M.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield stable bend, behind midfield far side. 9th early straight. Stayed on to recover some ground closing stages.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Improved from stable bend to be 6th far side. Kept on without troubling the placegetters in straight.
Made no show.
Lost ground at start, never in contention.
Towards rear. Under pressure final turn. Only made moderate progress in straight.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground when given reminders early straight.
Midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Always in last few.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well inside final 250 M to grab victory over 100 M out.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Always prominent. One-paced in straight.
Jumped fairly. Ridden to close up position behind leaders before home bend. Remained same to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Towards rear most of way. (Blood in trachea.)
Began awkwardly losing ground. Trailed field into straight. Made up good late ground down centre of track.
Attempted to make all. Fought on doggedly to resist challenger early in straight but unable to sustain effort passing 200 M.
Always well there. Came to challenge joining leader turning in. Gained upper hand passing 200 M only to be swamped over 100 M out.
Moved up soon after start to be prominent. Gave ground from 500 M.
Well there from widest draw. 1-1/2Ls 3rd 600 M. 3-wide entering straight. Responded well to take command 200 M out. Held on well.
Prominent. Hit front rounding home bend. Lost advantage 200 M out. Kept on under pressure for a minor placing.
Lost ground at start. Wide in rear throughout. (Blood in trachea.)
Behind midfield. Shifted to inside final turn. Switched out 200 M to obtain clear run. Ran on without threatening.
Prominent. Gained slender advantage briefly 800 M. Sat outside leader final turn. Kept on but lost a minor placing close home.
Prominent. Gave ground to midfield passing 800 M. Ran on well in straight until one-paced close home. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly, near rear. Recovered good ground from outside in straight.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Progressed to 4th on inside final turn. Failed to response when asked 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order to 5th final turn. One-paced final 200 M.
Towards rear. Detached soon after straightening. (Blood in trachea.)
Slowly away, towards rear. Hung out badly 700 M. No recovery.
Contested early lead from wide draw. Joint leader round home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in last few. Widest runner turning in. Made up ground down centre of straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened. (Lame.)
Settled in last few. Quickened well inside final 300 M to win readily. Pushed out.
Midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Well there to 500 M. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M. Weakened.
Raced wide in midfield early. Lost position around home bend. Made modest progress in straight without threatening.
Forward of midfield. Kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Rear of midfield most of way. Found nothing in straight.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on well but found winner too strong.
Jumped in the air leaving gates losing many lengths. Well back to straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Lost touch from home bend. (Distressed.)
Settled behind midfield. Ran on down inner of straight to be nearest at finish but without threatening.

Broke with field and soon raced in midfield or better 2-wide. Crept closer to the lead at home turn and switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Found the line well when asked 350 M out to win convincingly.

Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Slightly baulked for a run in early part of straight, all out 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening.
Jumped very awkwardly and raced at the tail on rail through to straight. Made no impression when asked 350 M out and faded inside final 200 M.

Slow to begin from wide draw and soon recovered to race in midfield 2-wide to straight. Baulked for a run in early part of straight, all out 300 M out and closed the race off fairly but needed to stop riding final 20 M to avoid heels.
Unable to muster early speed to race in the rear section on rail. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to show much impression in the straight.
Broke with field and soon settled in the rear section 2-wide. Switched wide and crept closer rounding the home turn. Under pressure 350 M out and only kept on one-paced to the line.

Began fairly from wide draw and raced in a forward position out wide in the early stages. After the 1000 M went forward to race outside the lead to straight. No extra when asked 400 M out and dropped out final 200 M.

Best out from widest and hard ridden along to race in a forward position 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but failed to match speed with winner inside final 200 M and overhauled by 2nd placegetter.

Began well and niggled along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. From the 400 M to 200 M whilst running on well was able to find clear passage. Saw clear daylight after 200 M and grabbed 2nd on the line.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon raced in a forward position on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and slightly weakened inside final 200 M. (Bled.)
Broke with field and soon eased to a rearward position on inner through to straight. Made little impression inside final 200 M out to be closest at finish when asked 300 M out.
Began well and soon took up running on rail but near the 1000 M was joint by another runner to straight. Only kept on evenly when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Began well and steadily eased to midfield around 3-wide without cover. Made little headway from the outside rounding the home turn. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily settled in worse than midfield around 3-wide. Near 800 M whilst hanging out badly was awkwardly placed on heels. Plugged on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
6Ls behind when 3-wide with cover in 10th at 900 M, marginally closer when 4-wide off final bend, ran on okay out wide without ever looking like taking a hand in the finish.
Caught 4-deep no cover early but got in 3-wide with cover at 800 M when 4Ls behind in 8th, under pressure when 3-wide off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
2Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 4th at 900 M, bumped when still there on straightening, a little short of room at 300 M and at 200 M but always looked held from then on.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, still well there off final bend and at 200 M, one-paced close home.
Within 1L of speed out 3 and 4-wide in 3rd from 900 M to home straight, kept on gamely but winner was too strong, big effort nonetheless.

Squeezed out at start, 6Ls behind on fence in 11th at 1000 M, keen at 800 M, hung out until home turn, no clear run until the 300 M, switched inside at 200 M but still no clear passage, not fully tested.
8Ls behind when 3-wide with cover in 13th at 900 M, struggling when 5-wide (widest of all) off final bend, soon well behind.
3Ls behind on fence in 6th at 900 M, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, didn't have much room through final stages but still ran on well without threatening principals.
Badly checked at start, detached and laboured about 12Ls last until home straight, never a factor. (Lame.)
Keen in places, 8Ls off pace in 12th when 2-wide at 900 M, not much closer on the swing when under pressure, no impression.
Led by a neck out 2-wide at 1000 M and maintained narrow advantage until home straight, kept finding on the run-in and extended the lead close home.
4Ls behind in 7th when 2-wide at 900 M, a little closer off final bend, ran on well for a place late.
Led by a neck on fence early on, headed by a neck at 1000 M and same margin behind in 2nd on straightening, all out when 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, weakened inside final 100 M.
5Ls behind in 9th when 2-wide at 1000 M, no better off home turn when hard ridden, faded out further.
Kept within 3Ls of the leader until home straight. Weakened quickly inside final 200 M.
Better than midfield and no more than 4Ls off the pace. Kept on fairly over the concluding stages.
Settled 3-wide at midfield and was one-paced in the straight.
Niggled along early stages and kept alongside leader until final 400 M. Faded steadily thereafter.
Settled in rear section until straightening. Lacked a rally in the straight.
Outpaced early and settled on fence behind midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Taken back from wide draw and settled on fence in rear section. Rallied nicely over the final 400 M and got up in the final strides.
Jumped well and soon took the lead. Held a 1/2L advantage into the home straight. Kept on well in the straight despite drifting wide and was caught close to the finish.
Slowly away and was ridden up to race behind the leader. Unable to quicken and dropped out over the concluding stages.
Raced 3-wide near midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Off slowly and raced near the rear. Trailed field into the home straight and failed to quicken.
Raced 3-wide and within 2Ls of the leaders until 400 M. Stayed on well over the concluding stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Quickened steadily after 300 M and was closest at finish.
Dropped to the rear early stages. Remained at the rear and 9Ls off the lead at 400 M. Made a late rally and was closest at finish.
8Ls off pace when 2-wide in 12th at 800 M, still towards rear when 3-wide off home turn, hung out under pressure but could only plug on at same pace.
4Ls or 5Ls off pace towards inner in midfield until home straight, the gaps came and he quickened up nicely to lead at the 50 M, kept on well.
Checked and bumped at start and got well back, 10Ls last at 800 M, 4-wide in rear off final bend, never a factor.
Steadied at 900 M when 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in mid-division, a little closer when 4-wide off final bend, ran on okay but never likely to grab principals.
Very awkwardly away, 7Ls off pace and one from rear at 800 M, struggling entering straight, no danger.
On fence 4Ls behind in midfield at 900 M, similarly placed off home turn, no impression.
Half a length off pace in 2nd early, had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 900 M to home straight, weakened inside final 300 M.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in midfield at 900 M, hard-pressed to lie up on straightening, drifted further back.
Led out wide early on, crossed to fence to lead by 2Ls at 900 M, led by 1L at top of home straight when going well, headed 200 M out but always holding onto a place comfortably.
Caught wide early but got in 2-wide 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 900 M, 1L down in 2nd off final bend, led 200 M out but no extra when headed by winner 50 M out.
3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace in 9th at 900 M, hung in at 800 M and hung out at 600 M when 5-wide without cover, extremely wide (7-wide) off final bend, soon well beaten.
Blundered at start, caught 3-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 4th at 900 M, under pressure to hold this position entering straight, faded from 300 M out.
6Ls behind leader when 2-wide in 9th at 900 M, 4-wide with cover at 600 M, worse than midfield when 5-wide off final bend, outpaced when hindered at 300 M, posed little threat.
Began awkwardly, raced in midfield. Picked up steadily from 600 M. Came to tackle the winner 200 M out. Effort not sustained.
Began awkwardly, never able to feature.
Settled behind midfield. Moved up near course proper to reach 3rd 300 M out. Kept on without threatening the quinella pair.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield to halfway. Dropped back steadily.
Made all. Just managed to hold off challenges inside 200 M.
Near rear soon after start. Ran on from 2nd last 300 M out, never nearer.
Was 2nd soon after start. Failed to hold place after passing the 400 M.
Behind midfield. Made no show final 300 M.
Slowly away. Towards rear and hung out.
Always thereabout. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Lost ground at start, last to 400 M. Made up some ground until finding no extra closing stages.
Prominent before dropping back steadily to 6th near 250 M. One-paced thereafter.
In touch. Failed to respond when asked 200 M out.
Never nearer. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield. Steadied twice leaving back straight and early on home bend. Dropped out approaching home straight.
Began slowly. Soon picked up to rear of midfield. Made steady headway down straight without threatening.
Broke well. Raced keenly in the front to 400 M. Gradually overhauled after straightening.
Raced in forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Quickened well to take charge over 200 M out. Hung on well to the line.
Raced wide in midfield. Quickened to challenge early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Raced in last few. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Raced behind leaders. Baulked for a run early in straight until making some late impression closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader. Ran home one-paced under pressure without quickening.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well under pressure in straight to just fail to get up on line.
Began awkwardly but soon recovered to be prominent. Reached lead near 600 M. Found no extra when headed 300 M out.
Behind midfield. Slightly improved to midfield at course proper. Failed to make any impression thereafter.
In the last pair soon after start. Never a factor.
Checked soon after start, behind the main bunch. About halfway recovered some ground to be in midfield momentarily. Soon found no extra.
Began awkwardly, towards rear early. Improved to midfield halfway. Continued to progress but unable to threaten the quinella pair.
Better than midfield. Moved up to 3rd or 4th halfway. Failed to maintain position 200 M out.
Slightly slowly away, near rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Dropped back steadily final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Weakened from halfway.
Raced prominently alone on the inner rail. Weakened 200 M out.
Soon prominent. Shaken up 250 M. Just failed to catch the winner at finish.
In touch early, soon dropped back towards the rear. Recovered some ground passing 400 M but failed to pose threat to the placegetters.
Midfield or slightly behind. Ran on steadily 200 M out, never nearer.
Always there. Responded well passing course proper to hit front 300 M out. Held on to resist runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Led far side. Still close up turning in. Folded up quickly inside final 200 M.
Always struggling at the back.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Prominent to halfway. Gave ground from home bend.
Very awkward early. Trailed the field to straight. Only ran past beaten runners.
Settled towards rear. Took some time to obtain clear run early in straight. Improving when steadied inside 200 M. Sustained headway to finish.
Settled outside leader. 3rd rounding home bend. Quickened well in straight to take charge over 250 M out. Soon drew clear.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Prominent far side. Moved up to take lead coming out of back straight. Headed shortly after straightening. Faded gradually closing stages.
Settled at the back. Raced wide throughout. Widest runner turning in. Ran on well down grandstand side of straight without threatening winner.
Midfield. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Towards rear and wide early. Effort coming out of back straight and around home bend, gaining 5th into straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Rear of midfield early. Took closer order home bend. Made modest headway under pressure in straight.

Began well from a wide draw and niggled along to race in prominent position around 2 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Hard ridden along in the early stages to be in better than midfield 2 wide. Crept closer and switched out rounding the home bend. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on same pace to the line.

From a wide gate was quickly eased to the back but closer to the rail. In last place turning into straight, under pressure 400 M out and made up good ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Soon eased to a rearward position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace in straight and ran past several beaten runners inside final 250 M.

Broke best from widest and steadily settled in midfield around 3 wide with cover. Steadily switched to the outside on straightening to obtain clear running. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but without threatening.
Began fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position around 3 wide with cover through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Bounded in the air and lost ground. Niggled along to recover lost ground to be in midfield on fence. Switched away from the rail and made little headway at home bend. Ran on fairly in straight but became one-pace 150 M.

Crowded for room at start and ridden to race in a forward position. Steadied at 1200 M when closed to heels. Soon recovered to race 1L off pace 3 wide. Ran on well in straight but just failed to overhaul the winner.
From an outside draw was steadily eased to midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and was eased down near the 200 M. (Bled.)
Began fairly and ridden along to take lead on rail with around 1L advantage to straight. Soon headed shortly after the 400 M mark and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Ridden along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. No extra when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 250 M.
Broke with field from wide draw and steadily eased to the back closer to rail through to straight. Failed to make any impression when asked 350 M out.

Broke with field and soon settled in midfield or worse position on rail through to straight. Ran on quite well when asked 350 M out but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair to settle for 3rd place.
4-wide without cover at 1000 M when 2Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, same entering home straight, one-paced from then on.
Fractious in gates, very slowly away and immediately detached by about 6Ls, tacked on 7Ls last on straightening when 4-wide, made minor late ground.
Head up at 900 M and checked at 900 M to be 5Ls behind in 8th, under pressure off final bend to get closer, weakened.
Worse than midfield and 5Ls off pace at 800 M, 3-wide but with cover on circle, 4Ls down and 4-wide on straightening, tended to hang in when one-paced in the finish.
Bumped at start, about 3Ls off pace in 6th or so from back to home straight, no danger after that.
Led out 3-wide no cover at 1100 M, crossed to fence to lead by 1L at 800 M, all out when headed about 250 M out, faded.
Steadied at 1000 M and tight for room at 700 M when 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, same off home turn, one-paced from then on.
About 7Ls off pace in 13th on fence until the 600 M, slightly closer off final bend when 3-wide, made some late ground but never really threatened.
Always prominent, 1L down in 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn and at 200 M when all out, one-paced through concluding stages.
Bumped at start, checked at 900 M and left 6Ls off pace worse than midfield at 800 M, brushed rail at 700 M and unbalanced, checked entering straight when 7Ls behind, dropped out.
Awkwardly away, checked at 900 M and left 4Ls down in 7th at 800 M, same off final turn, lacked acceleration.
Crowded at 800 M when 3Ls down in 5th, 2Ls back in 4th off home turn, kept on gamely for a place.
Led early but settled into box-seat spot 2Ls behind in 3rd or 4th from 800 M to home straight, quickened up taking nice gap on fence at 300 M to lead 250 M out, always in charge thereafter.
Settled 2-wide towards rear about 7Ls off pace at 800 M, 3-wide and 5Ls behind in 10th at home turn, ran on well to take 2nd close home but no chance with winner.
Jumped well and steadily improved into the lead after 1200 M. Always maintained a slight advantage before being swamped inside final 300 M.

Ridden out of the gates from a wide draw and had the early lead. Took a sit after 1200 M and settled 4Ls behind the pace. Pushed along to keep pace 600 M and weakened shortly after straightening. (Lame.)

Strode steadily into a forward position behind the leaders early stages. Settled 3 to 4Ls behind the pace in 3rd place after 800 M and was in a prominent position on straightening. Kept on same pace to line.
Settled on fence at midfield. Held up in early part of the straight. Then closed the race off only fairly.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden hard to make up ground. Trailed field for the rest of the way after checking near 1100 M. Made no impression in the straight.
Slow out of the gates and raced towards the rear until straightening. Made up some ground over the concluding stages.
Slowly away and was ridden along in rear section early stages. Crowded at 800 M and remained in rear section rounding home turn. Failed to quicken in the straight.
In rear section early and then trailed field after checking at 1000 M. Remained near the rear rounding home turn. Recovered some ground in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Quickened well on straightening and contended for the lead at 200 M. Unable to find extra to challenge thereafter.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield until straightening. Kept on without threatening.

Settled wide at midfield. Steadily made progress around the home turn to be within a length of the leader on straightening. Kept on well and hit the lead briefly at 200 M. Unable to hold off charging rivals thereafter.
2-wide behind midfield. Ridden along 800 M to keep pace and was under the whip 600 M out. Picked up well 300 M and cleared rivals inside 200 M.
Raced wide without cover in rear section. Rallied well and kept pace with winner over the final 200 M.
Pushed along from the widest draw and kept alongside the leader until the final 300 M. Weakened thereafter.
In 12th about 8Ls behind when 2-wide at 1400 M, under pressure entering straight when 6Ls off pace in 13th, soon outpaced and detached at 200 M.
8Ls down when 2-wide in 11th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in midfield when 5-wide entering straight, briefly loomed a winning threat when 2Ls down in midfield at 300 M, no extra.
Had the run of the race 2Ls behind lead in 3rd or 4th from 1600 M to home turn, swamped about 200 M out and one-paced final stages.
Slowly away, 10Ls down on fence in 13th at 1400 M, travelled quietly when 5Ls down in 11th at final corner, ran on quite well, nearest at the finish.
Led at 1800 M and always 1L or so clear on fence until the home straight, headed over 250 M out and drifted back quickly.
Always 3-wide without cover, 5Ls down in 7th at 1500 M, 4Ls behind in mid-division at 800 M, 3-wide off final bend when 2Ls back in 4th, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, weakened close home.
Always at least 3-wide and sometimes without cover, 8Ls behind in 10th at 1400 M, 8Ls last and detached out 6-wide off final bend, dropped right out.
6Ls behind on fence in 8th at 1400 M, under pressure to take closer order at 600 M, 5Ls behind in 9th off home turn, one-paced.
5Ls behind when 2-wide in 6th at 1600 M, under pressure when 4Ls down in mid-division at final bend, faded out and very one-paced.
Pressed on out wide at 1800 M to go 1L behind in 2nd out 2-wide at 1600 M, under 1L down off final bend but weakened out from 300 M.
2-wide and 3Ls behind in 4th at 1600 M, under 2Ls behind in 3rd off final bend, disputing lead at 200 M and prevailed narrowly in a bobbing finish.
Slowly away losing 3Ls, detached 15Ls last at 1600 M, 5Ls down and 6-wide in 12th off final bend, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on well but couldn't grab quinella pair.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1400 M and at 800 M, under pressure when 3Ls off pace in midfield off final bend, well beaten over 200 M out.
Fractious in gates, 5Ls behind on fence in 5th at 1600 M, 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M and 3Ls behind in 6th off final bend, disputing lead at 200 M and just missed out in a bobbing finish.
Never got involved, 10Ls behind in 11th at 1200 M, 6Ls back in 12th at home turn when 3-wide, no impression.
7Ls behind when 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, 4Ls down and niggled slightly in mid-division at 600 M, picked up well from top of stretch to lead inside final 100 M, won going away.
Never had any cover, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd out wide at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th and toiling entering homestretch, gone 200 M out.
Always worse than midfield, 3-wide with cover when 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 5Ls back in 10th off final bend, one-paced.
5Ls off pace in mid-division on fence at 1200 M, same margin off lead in 9th entering straight, looked held when disappointed for running and steadied at 200 M, no late impression.
Led out 2-wide at 1600 M, clear by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, disputing lead at 400 M and 200 M, headed 150 M out but still stayed on gamely.
Head up at 1800 M, soon settled 3Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 5th off final bend, looked like being swamped at 200 M but battled back gamely closing stages for a place.
Didn't break well, keen early on with head up, 13Ls last at 1200 M, 3-wide off final bend when 7Ls down in 13th, made some minor late ground, never nearer.
5-wide at 1800 M but pressed on to be 2Ls off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at 1400 M, disputed lead entering home straight and all out when a neck 2nd at 200 M, faded markedly final 150 M.
Briefly 4-wide without cover at 1400 M but got in 2-wide with cover at 1200 M when 6Ls behind lead in 8th, 3Ls behind when 3-wide in 5th at final bend, always held by principals.
In 6th place 5Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 7th when 2-wide off home turn, failed to quicken up.
On fence 11Ls off pace in 12th at 1400 M, still towards rear when 4-wide into stretch and 6Ls down, ran on strongly and narrowly missed a place.
12Ls off pace and one from rear at 1400 M, went 4-wide without cover from 700 M to be 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight when 8Ls last, no threat.
Keen early but settled about 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd on fence from 1400 M to homestretch, every chance when taking up the lead 150 M out, soon headed, winner too good.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground final 200 M.
Better than midfield. About 3Ls 5th 400 M. Kept on without quickening.
In touch. Reached 2nd 1200 M. 2Ls behind lead final turn. Took advantage near 300 M. Won readily.
In the front early, dropped back steadily to midfield. Made no show in straight. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well inside 250 M but found winner too good.
Towards rear early, soon in midfield. Dropped back on straightening.
Led field from 1400 M. Held 2Ls advantage final turn. Weakened when headed 300 M.
Prominent from a wide draw. 4th passing 1200 M. 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Reached 2nd briefly early straight. Weakened closing stages.
Soon in touch. 1-1/2Ls 3rd 1200 M. 4th passing 600 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Soon 2nd last. Widest turning into straight. Made ground solidly 200 M out to be nearest at finish.
Last from widest draw. Ran past a couple of beaten horses inside 200 M.
Midfield. Slightly improved rounding home bend. Dropped back steadily from 5th or 6th early straight.
Towards rear. Ran on from 11th early straight to take 3rd passing 150 M.
Was 2nd before taking over 850 M. Still with 1L advantage 200 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Led field to 850 M. Raced in a close-up 2nd until weakening out of contention inside 150 M.
Slowly away, near rear. Ran on along inside early straight but was checked passing 200 M. Failed to recover.
Better than midfield. Kept on similar pace in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. One-paced.
Raced 4th on 3-wide. Weakened soon after straightening. (Lame.)
Slowly away, always at the back.
Towards rear. Ran on from 7th 200 M, just missed 2nd at finish.
Mainly held 3rd to 100 M. Steadied when weakened final 50 M.
Slightly slowly away, in midfield or better. Found some difficulties to find clear run 250 M. Recovered good ground when in clear inside 200 M.
Raced 8th to 400 M where he improved slightly on inside. Crept closer to 4th early straight. Ran on well 250 M to take control 100 M out.
Near rear from the widest draw. Recovered good ground on outside 100 M out.
Squeezed at start. Soon improved to forward of midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend gaining 3rd into straight. Ran on but unable to sustain effort 100 M out.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well in straight to take charge over 150 M out.
Prominent early, dropping to midfield far side. Lost further ground rounding home bend.
Close up to home bend. Dropped out.
Raced in rear of midfield to straight. Found nothing.
Soon dropped to last few.
Trailed field throughout. (Heart irregularity.)
Prominent to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Attempted to make all. Caught close home.
Settled towards rear. Commenced move rounding home bend. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Midfield early. Dropped to last few coming out of back straight. Made no further impression.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually weakened.
Led field to 1400 M. 2Ls 3rd 1000 M. Dropped back when checked 550 M. (Mucus.)
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from 9th early straight, never nearer.
Well there. Led field from 1400 M to 500 M. Faded. (Finished distressed.)
Settled 5th soon after start. 4th 1000 M. Moved up home bend to 2nd 400 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Mainly 6th or 7th throughout.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Improved steadily rounding home bend to be 3Ls 5th final turn. Stayed on well but just missed 2nd near finish.
Was 2nd last to 600 M where he started to make progress on outside to be 8th early straight. Ran on to take 2nd closing stages.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield. Made progress from outside passing the Rock to reach 2nd briefly home bend. Found no extra in straight.
In touch. 3Ls 5th 1000 M. Improved to 3rd 300 M. Failed to hold place inside 150 M.
In touch. 3rd from 1800 M. Improved to 2nd 1100 M. Took over passing 600 M and held on to finish.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Never better than midfield.
Always well there. Ran on to gain upper hand close to home.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Held up in rear. Made up some late ground in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on at the one pace in straight.
Settled towards rear. Ran on quite well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Trailed the field to straight. Ran on past beaten horses.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well on inner of straight to hit front momentarily inside 200 M only to be caught in the shadows of the post.
Forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.

From a wide draw was quickly eased to a rearward position but obtained rail running through to straight. Ran on well when asked 200 M out but near the 100 M steadied, shifted out to avoid heels and continued to go forward.
From the widest draw was soon settled at back closer to the rail through to straight. Unable to make much impression when asked 200 M out.

Broke fairly and pushed along to lead on rail. Shortly after the 1000 M was overtaken and settled in 2nd place through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Broke with field and steadily settled in midfield 2-wide. Pushed along at home bend to maintain position. Unable to show much running in the straight.

Slow to begin and raced in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Switched to the outside to obtain clear running, made up good ground inside final 200 M and just failed to run down the 2nd placegetter.

Disputed lead in the early stages before settling in a prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and steadily tailed out inside final 200 M. (High white blood cell count.)
Soon settled in a rearward position 2-wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running but only able to keep on evenly to the line.

Began well and soon raced in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Responded quite well when asked 250 M out, hit the front briefly near 100 M but was overhauled by the placegetters in the closing stages.

Broke well and steadily settled in midfield or better on rail. Switched to middle on straightening to find clear running. Hit the line well when clear running was obtained near the 200 M to take charge in the closing stages.

Broke with field and soon raced in midfield or worse 2-wide. Steadily switched out rounding the home bend to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish when asked 300 M out.

Broke well from wide draw and raced in a forward position 3-wide in the early stages. Went forward at 1100 M to take lead on rail from 900 M to straight. Kept on fairly but was headed near 100 M and slightly weakened thereafter.

Raced in a handy position before being crowded near the 1400 M. Shortly after that commenced to race keenly in better than midfield 2-wide. Switched out on straightening and ran on well in straight to snatch 2nd place on the line.
2-wide and about 1L behind leader in 2nd from 1100 M to straightening for home, plugged on at the one pace only.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls behind in 4th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 4th and under pressure turning for home, always well held.
Slowly away and checked at start, 4Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, forced 4-wide (widest of all) off home turn when 5Ls down and worse than midfield, one-paced.
Over-raced in places early and sometimes without cover, 7Ls off pace when 3-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 8Ls last off final bend, soon with no chance.
7Ls off pace in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 7th at final bend, ran on home at the same speed.
Slowly away, 11Ls last on fence at 1100 M, moved closer 7Ls down in 10th at 700 M, ran on well from home turn to be nearest at the finish.
Led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, 2Ls clear entering straight, extended the margin at 200 M, comfortably.
3-back on the fence 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, no chance with winner but still ran on well.
10Ls behind in 11th when 2-wide at 1100 M, still towards rear when 6Ls down entering straight, no impression.
Caught 3-deep with no cover when 2Ls down in 4th at 1100 M, under pressure to hold this position at 600 M, back-pedalling when checked entering homestretch, eased down late. (Mucus in trachea.)
Had the run of the race in 3rd on fence 2Ls off pace from 1100 M to home turn, failed to quicken up and weakened inside final 100 M.
Bounded at start, 4-back on the fence 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 8th off final bend, made some late ground without posing much of a threat.
Slowly away and settled 2-wide behind midfield. Held up at 200 M whilst making its run. Kept on fairly thereafter.
Jumped well and raced in a disputed lead. Took a length's advantage into the straight. Faded inside final 200 M.
Settled on fence at midfield. Quickened nicely on straightening and assumed command final 100 M.
Jumped fairly and dropped to the rear. Trailed field into home straight. Ran into some traffic early in the straight but closed the race off strongly thereafter.
Began well to be in a forward position. Checked 1100 M out and dropped back to be 3-wide midfield. Widest making home turn, kept on steadily in the straight to claim a minor placing.
Slowly away. Settled on fence in rear section until straightening. Rallied home strongly to be closest at finish.
Ridden along to be in a disputed lead 3-wide. 1/2L behind the pace home turn and weakened on straightening.
Raced 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader until home straight. Kept on one pace thereafter.
Kept within 2Ls of the leaders but raced wide and without cover. Stayed on same pace until weakening inside final 200 M.
3-wide in rear section throughout. Only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Eased back from wide draw to race near the rear. Made up a bit of ground in the straight despite being crowded final 150 M.
Among leaders early stages. Took a sit at 900 M and settled behind the leader until straightening. Kept on fairly to line.
3-wide without cover in places early, 4Ls down in 5th at 1100 M, covered up from 800 M and still 4Ls back 5th entering straight, ran on strongly late narrowly missing a place.
Fractious in gates, dwelt at start and lost about 8Ls, 11Ls last at 1100 M, 8Ls last off home turn, switched inside and bumped at 200 M, no impression. (Mucus in trachea.)
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1100 M and same at home turn, rallied well to lead 100 M out but grabbed by winner final strides.
Had the run of the race in 3rd on fence about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1100 M to home straight, all out to hold this spot at 200 M, faded a little close home.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1100 M, under pressure to take closer order from similar position at 500 M, didn't succeed.
Awkwardly away, 10Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at 1100 M, 3-wide with no cover from 800 M to home straight when 6Ls back in 9th, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1100 M, less than 2Ls down in 3rd off final bend, same at 200 M and one-paced through closing stages.
Led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, well rated to be 1L clear still at home turn and at 200 M, headed at 100 M and no extra close home.
Bumped at start, 4-back the fence 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, niggled on circle and still 6Ls down in 7th off home turn, ran on very strongly late to lead final strides.
3-back on fence 5Ls off speed in 6th at 1100 M, a little closer turning for home, ran on well late but found a few only marginally too good.
9Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1100 M, 8Ls behind in 11th off final bend, made a little late ground but always well held.
8Ls behind when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, keen at 1000 M, same margin behind off final bend, made some late ground but never troubled leaders.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield 800 M out. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Slowly away, in the rear. Made up good ground from outside final 250 M, just missed a minor placing.
Midfield. Lost ground 900 M. Never recovered.
Jumped well from widest draw and was in the front pair. Obtained 1L advantage 850 M out. Held on to the line.
Towards rear soon after start. Made ground moderately final 200 M.
Soon in the rear, last final turn. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Pushed along to be in the front pair. Was headed near 900 M. Failed to hold place from 3rd early straight.
Behind midfield. Forced to race wider near 800 M. Recovered some ground 250 M but found no extra closing stages.
Prominent early, soon raced 4th or 5th. Dropped out 300 M.
Towards rear on outside. Progressed to midfield early straight. Ran on under pressure final 200 M but failed to catch the winner.
Slowly away, towards rear. Improved from 1000 M to the midfield rounding home bend. Kept on in straight.
Better than midfield. 3Ls 5th 800 M. Kept on but found no extra final 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Dropped back steadily.
Midfield or better. Gradual progress from 1000 M to be 3rd home bend. 2nd 600 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Slightly slow into stride. Gradually improved to forward of midfield when wide far side. Still wide rounding home bend. Weakened into straight.
In last few to straight. Produced good impression down straight to do best work at the finish.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Mainly in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Inconvenienced at start. Quickly recovered to midfield, niggling along. Gradually faded after straightening.
Ridden for pace early. Raced in 2nd outside leader. With leaders when squeezed passing 300 M. No further impression thereafter.
Began well. Settled in close-up position. Quickened to hit front early in straight only to be collared by fast- finishing winner 50 M out.
Ridden to lead early. Made running to about 300 M. Weakened.
Mostly in midfield far side. Towards rear rounding home bend. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Travelled mainly in rear of midfield to straight. Very wide turning in. Made no show in the straight.
Soon dropped to tail-end and always struggling.
Prominent. Every chance when shifted in under pressure bumping others. Soon renewed effort and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield early. Took closer order coming out of back straight. Behind runners turning in and jostled over 250 M out. Responded well when asked. Asserted authority 50 M out to win readily.
Mostly in midfield. Dropped out tamely passing 300 M.
Midfield early. Dropped back towards the rear 800 M. Recovered some ground on inside in straight.
Checked soon after start, near rear throughout.
Soon last from the widest draw. Made ground moderately in straight.
Towards rear and was wide. Improved a bit when hanging out near 700 M. Towards rear final turn. Recovered a little ground final 250 M.
Set pace soon after start with 3Ls advantage home bend. Found no extra when headed final 50 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Improved from 800 M to be 3rd 600 M. Weakened out of contention 200 M out.
Around midfield to straight. Faded.
Around 2Ls 2nd to straight. Ran on steadily but failed to contain the winner close home.
Behind midfield. 5Ls 5th final turn. Ran on well inside 250 M to just get up near finish.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield. Recovered some ground final 200 M.
Ridden early to be 4th. Under pressure final 200 M. Just managed to obtain a minor placing narrowly at finish.
Lost ground at start, last early. Crept a bit closer early straight. Made no show final 200 M.
Towards rear early. Improved under reminders to midfield far side. Still under pressure rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Stalked leader early. Disputed lead over halfway out. Took over turning in but swamped by fast-finishing winner closing stages and lost 2nd placing late.
Travelled mainly in prominent position or in forward of midfield. Made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Towards rear most of way. (Blood in trachea.)
Set fast pace early. Joined for lead over halfway out. Eventually headed into straight. Dropped out tamely.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.

Midfield early. Made steady progress down back stretch to be prominent behind leaders rounding home bend. Only kept on steadily early in straight before making moderate late progress to claim 2nd late.
Never far off. Tightened and lost position early in straight. Kept on steadily to the finish.
Towards rear early. Made steady headway far side to forward of midfield rounding home bend. Quickened well in straight to take charge over 200 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Trailed field most of way to straight. Ran past a few beaten runners.
Caught wide from poor draw early. Midfield rounding stables bend before improving down far side to share pace with leaders over halfway out. Weakened gradually approaching home turn.
In last few. Dropped to tail-end into straight. No further impression.
Close up to 200 M. Weakened.
Began fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield or better 4 wide without cover. Commenced to give ground shortly after the 600 M and tailed out in straight.

Began quite well but was soon eased to the back around 3 wide. Made some headway from the outside rounding the home turn. Kept on same pace in straight and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 250 M.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 250 M.
Tardy start and ridden along to race in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
From the widest draw was soon eased to the rear closer to the rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running, only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
From a wide draw was soon eased to a rearward position but closer to the rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up steady ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly and hard ridden along in the early stages to race outside the leader through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but unable to quicken and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward position on rail. Lost its position near the 800 M when tight for room. Failed to make any impression in the straight.

Broke with field and niggled along to take up running on fence with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Ran on quite well when asked 400 M out but failed to match speed with winner in final 100 M and just held onto 2nd.
Slowly away and soon recovered to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and dropped out steadily inside final 300 M.
Began well and soon raced in a forward position 3 wide with some cover through to straight. Responded quite well when asked 350 M out but just failed to run down the 2nd place- getter.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to worse than midfield 3 wide with cover through to straight. Ran home well inside final 200 M whilst hanging in when asked 350 M out to take charge inside final 100 M.

Began well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield 3 wide with cover. Pushed along at home bend and made little headway. All out 350 M out and ran on steadily to miss the placings by a narrow margin.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in a handy position 2 wide through to straight. Unable to find an extra gear when asked 350 M out and kept on some pace to the line.
Disputed lead out wide early, about a neck 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn, half a length 3rd at 200 M, weakened thereafter.
10Ls off pace in 12th when 2-wide at 1000 M, in rear when 5-wide off home turn and 8Ls off pace, finished off very strongly, especially through final 200 M, only missed by a neck.
3Ls off the speed on fence in 4th at 1000 M, similarly placed turning for home, very one-paced from then on.
Over-raced early on, 7Ls behind when 2-wide in 8th at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 10th off final bend, one-paced.
Lost ground at start, 8Ls behind in 9th on fence at 1000 M, improved to be 4Ls behind in 6th off home turn, stayed on well without seriously troubling principals.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls back in 10th at 1000 M when 2-wide, worse than midfield and 4-wide off final bend when 6Ls off pace, made no headway.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 900 M, tended to lay out at 800 M and 4Ls down when 3-wide in midfield off home turn, no acceleration when required. (Lame.)
Disputed lead or held narrow advantage on fence from 1000 M to home turn, headed 200 M out and kept on at same pace nearer line.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 6Ls down in 7th at 1000 M, 4-wide entering home straight when 4Ls off pace in mid- division, failed to quicken.
Slowest away and lost ground at start, 12Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls back in rear on fence at home turn, no impression.
Awkwardly away, 10Ls behind in 13th on fence at 1000 M, 5Ls behind in midfield on straightening, kept finding, nearest at finish.
8Ls behind speed when 3-wide with cover in 11th at 1000 M, 4-wide without cover at 600 M and 5-wide off final bend when 6Ls down in 12th, no chance 200 M out.
Keen at 1000 M in 3rd when 2Ls off pace and 2-wide, a neck down in 3rd when 3-wide off final bend, led by a neck 200 M out, headed at 100 M, no extra close home.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls behind in 5th on fence at 900 M, 2Ls down in 4th at top of stretch, led 100 M out, hung on.
Raced along the rails behind the leaders early stages. Remained racing better than midfield after 800 M and was within 3Ls of the leader on straightening. Kept on well over the final stages.
Awkwardly out of the gates and raced near the back. Among last pair to enter home straight and made no impression thereafter.
2-wide behind the leaders early stages. Drifted back slightly midway through back straight but remained better than midfield. Kept strides with winner over the final stages and just missed.
Slowly away. Settled 2-wide behind midfield until drifting back slightly after 800 M. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Led until 1000 M. Niggled along to keep pace behind the leaders after 800 M. Kept on steadily over the concluding stages.
Ridden along early to raced 3-wide and behind the leaders. Maintained close to the pace but dropped out steadily after 600 M. Weakened in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield until home straight. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Outpaced early and raced in rear section. Ridden along at home turn but unable to make progress. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Outpaced from start and trailed field until home straight. Ran past a few beaten runners in the straight. (Mucus.)
Broke well from widest draw and raced wide in a forward position early. Led or disputed lead from 1100 M until straightening. Had a length's advantage at 200 M and hung on gamely for a minor placing.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Switched wide at home turn to improve. Made a good rally in the straight and got up close to the line.
Knuckled on jumping. Settled behind midfield. Switched out to improve 600 M and was widest rounding home turn. Continued well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Settled in rear section early and middle stages. Swung out on straightening and made up some ground in the straight. (Lame.)

Jumped well from wide draw but was caught wide entering first turn. Allowed to stride forward in back straight to join the lead after 800 M. Disputed lead on straightening and kept on fairly over the final stages.
3-wide without cover when 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 900 M, same off final bend when under pressure, swamped at 200 M.
Mostly 4-wide without cover down backstretch, 6Ls behind in 9th at 1200 M and 5Ls back in 9th at 800 M, under pressure 4-wide off final bend when 3Ls down in 7th, soon faded.
Slowly away, pressed on from 4-wide without cover in 8th when 5Ls off pace to be 3Ls down when 3-wide no cover at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, faded out steadily.
2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence from 1200 M to home straight where not clear until 300 M out when rider re-adjusted foot in iron, led over 200 M out, headed right on the wire.
7Ls behind on fence in 10th at 1200 M, about 4Ls worse than midfield when short of running room entering straight, eased out into the clear final 250 M and finished well, never nearer.
Slowly away, 9Ls off pace in 12th when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, improved to 4-wide off home turn when 4Ls down in 10th, every chance when 1L back in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
3Ls behind leader when 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, in midfield when still 3Ls down off home turn, 1L back in 5th at 200 M, ran on gamely to lead on line.
10Ls last at 1200 M, 6Ls down in rear off final bend, made some minor late ground past beaten rivals.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, bunched in midfield and short of room about 3Ls off pace entering home straight, clipped heels and nearly fell at 300 M, soon eased down.
Awkward break, 8Ls behind when 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, 3-wide off home turn when 5Ls back and one from rear, made a little late ground.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 4th at 1200 M, 2Ls back in 5th straightening for home, kept on fairly despite being outpaced by principals.
4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M when on the fence, 3Ls down in midfield off final bend, 2Ls down in midfield when short of room at 200 M, no extra.
Led by 1L on fence from 1200 M to home straight, headed over 200 M out, weakened.
Always very deep on the track, 6Ls behind in 9th when 5-wide without cover, hung out 7-wide (widest) off final bend when about 5Ls back in midfield, one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, 9Ls off pace in 13th at 1000 M, still towards rear when 6Ls off pace and 4-wide, ran on well late to be nearest at the finish.
2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd at 1000 M, lost position on circle and 4Ls down in 5th on fence entering straight, weakened.
3Ls behind on fence in 4th at 1000 M, keen when 3Ls back in 5th at 800 M, 3Ls back in 4th at final bend, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, kept on well but found winner too strong.
10Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls last when 4-wide entering straight, finished off very strongly on stands' rail to nick a place on the line.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, hung out at 800 M, 5Ls down in mid-division off final turn, went inside at 200 M when 3Ls back in 5th, ran on well late without threatening principals.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 5Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 4Ls back in 6th at final bend, kept on well to lead inside final 100 M.
Keen at 1000 M when 6Ls behind in 8th and 3-wide, 4-wide off home turn when 5Ls behind and worse than midfield, failed to quicken up.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, about 2Ls back in 2nd at final bend, soon outpaced. (Mucus.)
3-wide no cover when 4Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 1L behind in 3rd at 800 M and still no cover, ridden along when 2Ls down in 3rd at home turn, faded out.
7Ls off pace in 10th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 10th at 800 M and much the same into home straight, no impression.
Switched from wide gate to 8Ls off pace on fence in 11th at 1000 M, steadied entering straight when 5Ls back in 11th, no clear run at 300 M and at 200 M when switched out, ran on well late.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, 7Ls behind and one from rear when 5-wide off final bend, no danger.
Best away, led on fence by 2Ls at 1000 M, nearly same margin clear at final bend, no extra when headed at 100 M and lost out on a place on the line.
Mainly 2-1/2Ls 4th to 400 M. Responded well to take lead 150 M. Failed to resist winner's late challenges closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily from 7th early straight to take 3rd inside 100 M.
Took lead soon after start. Faded rapidly when headed 300 M. (Heart irregularity.)
Sat outside leader before taking over 300 M out. Failed to quicken when headed 150 M.
Towards rear. Made ground moderately final 200 M.
Midfield early, soon gave ground towards the rear. No improvement in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Settled midfield from widest draw. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away, picked up steadily to be better than midfield. Kept on well early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Rear and wide throughout.
Around midfield. Found no extra in straight.
Near rear soon after start. Made ground gradually final 400 M, just missed a minor placing.
Prominent on inside. 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Ran on from 8th early straight to take control closing stages, doing best work final 50 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back steadily 250 M.
Towards rear. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to midfield early straight. Soon weakened.
Near rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield. One-paced.
Always at the back.
Led field early stages, then raced 2Ls 3rd to straight. Kept on well to gain 2nd inside 150 M but unable to threaten the winner.
Settled midfield or slightly behind. Ran on along rail in straight but steadied for a run near 100 M. Just missed a minor placing.
Towards rear from widest draw. Widest final turn. Only made some moderate progress final 200 M.
Checked soon after start, remained in the rear group. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Ridden along to take lead approaching 1000 M. Held 1L advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Mainly 3Ls 4th to straight. Kept on same pace throughout.
Was 2nd early stages, then raced 5th to 300 M. Ran on to gain 3rd briefly 100 M. Failed to hold place closing stages.
Moved up from midfield to reach 2nd in 2-wide passing 1000 M. Ran on steadily 400 M to take lead 250 M. Held on well.
Well there. Took up running rounding home bend. Headed into straight and soon weakened.
Always thereabouts. Ran home one-paced without quickening.
Well there. Lost touch under pressure upon straightening.
Led far side. Ceded advantage rounding home bend. Regained lead turning in, going 2Ls clear over 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort and swamped about 100 M out.
Began awkwardly. Trailed the field most of way to straight. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Held up in forward of midfield. No clear run early in straight. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Never far off to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly in midfield. Ran on quite well to hit front about 100 M out.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Midfield far side. Effort rounding home bend to be just behind leaders turning in. Faded gradually in straight.
Made no show. (Lame.)
In last few to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Within 1L behind leaders until finding no extra final 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace when under pressure inside 200 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Responded well when given reminders 200 M out. Took 2nd close home.
Always at the back.
Well there on inside rail. Was half length behind leader before taking over 250 M out. Kept on well to the line.
In touch. Held 4th before failing quicken to challenge closing stages.
Lost ground at start, soon recovered to be in touch. Found no extra when giving ground from 5th 300 M.
Midfield. Kept on final 200 M.
Made no show.
Towards rear. Pushed along 200 M out. Made up some ground but just missed a minor placing.
Well there. Took lead from 700 M until headed 250 M. Held on for a minor placing.
Around midfield throughout. Found no extra close home.
Always struggling at the back. (Heart irregularity.)
Given reminders to muster speed when wide in midfield early. Moved up to join leaders when still wide coming out of back straight. Weakened out of contention upon straightening.
Reared moments before gate opened. Jumped okay. Towards rear early before racing keenly onto midfield approaching home bend. Made modest headway down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Tended to hang in outside leader early in straight. Hit front 200 M out. Won confidently.
Prominent early. Dropped to midfield into straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Never threatening.
Midfield into straight. Dropped out under pressure. (Bled and heart irregularity.)
Prominent. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly. Raced in last few to straight.
Led field. Joined early in straight and eventually headed 200 M out. Lost 2nd to fast-finishing runner-up final strides.
Never better than midfield. Faded into straight.
Always prominent. One-paced under pressure closing stages.
Last to straight. Produced good late impression to be nearest at finish.
Broke fairly and pushed along to race outside the leader through to straight. Gained lead near the 400 M but was headed near the 200 M and steadily weakened thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly and soon eased to the rear section on inner through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and ran on quite well but near the 200 M was steadied when unable to improve. Continued to improve fairly when in clear 150 M.
Began well from widest and hard ridden along to race in a forward position 4 to 5 wide without cover to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but slightly weakened in the final stages.
Soon eased to the rear on rail and prior to straightening was steadied to avoid heels. Made up steady ground from the outside to be closest at finish when asked 300 M out.
Broke fairly and ridden along to take a slender lead on rail through to straight. Headed near 400 M and dropped out steadily thereafter.

Broke fairly and soon raced in a forward position 3 wide no cover. Near the 1000 M steadily eased back to better than midfield with cover. Ran on fairly in straight but needed to steady several times to avoid heels.
Jumped well from wide draw and pushed along to race in a forward position 3 wide no cover through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from a wide gate and raced in midfield or worse around 4 wide without cover when made headway from the outside at home turn. Under pressure 400 M out and plugged on gamely to the line without threatening.

Shortly after the start checked when crowded for room. Raced in rear section around 3 wide, steadily switched to the widest from 600 M to obtain clear running in home straight. Made good impression inside final 250 M.
Soon raced in a handy position 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but only kept on same pace and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began well from wide draw and soon eased to a rearward position closer to the rail. From 1000 M made steady improvement to be in midfield on straightening. All out 200 M out and ran on well but without threatening.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield or better around 3 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but was unable to show much running in straight.
