Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield or better 3 wide whilst pulling hard in the early to middle stages. Ran on quite well when asked 350 M out but just failed to figure in the placing. (Lame left fore.)
Tardy start and soon recovered to race in a handy position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and surged to the front near the 200 M mark to win convincingly.
Over-raced to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, swished tail in places and always tended to hang out, headed at top of home straight, very weak final 200 M.
12Ls off pace in 12th on fence at 1200 M, 7Ls behind in 13th off final bend when 3-wide, no danger.
9Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 10th at 1200 M, 5-wide off final bend in 10th and 5Ls off pace, one-paced and eased final 200 M.
8Ls off pace in 6th on fence at 1200 M, under pressure to lie up when 5Ls down in midfield off final bend, well beaten when eased final 200 M.
Led by 1L on fence at 1600 M, headed at 1400 M and 2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, led again at top of home straight but headed again at 200 M, faded out rapidly.
On fence 9Ls back in 11th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in same position at home turn, never loomed a threat.
3-wide without cover in 7th at 1200 M when 8Ls off pace, 3Ls down in 4th off final bend, all out when half a length 2nd at 200 M, weakened.
Fractious and lost minor ground at start, always swishing tail about 12Ls off pace in 13th down back straight, unbalanced and bumped rail when 9Ls last off final bend, no threat.
3Ls down in 3rd on fence at 1400 M, 5Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, under pressure 2Ls down in 3rd when 2-wide off final bend, narrow lead 200 M out but headed 100 M later, faded final 50 M.
14Ls last and 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, left 4-wide no cover from 900 M to be 7-wide (widest) and 4Ls down in 6th off final bend, every chance a neck 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
9Ls back in 8th place when 2-wide at 1200 M, improved to be 4Ls down in 5th off final bend, led 100 M out, kept on for pressure.
13Ls off pace in 12th when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, forced 6-wide on straightening when 6Ls behind in 12th, never troubled leaders.
Keen when 8Ls behind lead in 5th and 2-wide at 1200 M, 4-wide off home turn when 4Ls down in 5th, 1L down in 6th at 200 M, one-paced from then on.
12Ls off pace in 13th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 6-wide off home turn when 5Ls behind in mid-division, every chance when a head down in 2nd at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort close home.
Niggled along and hit the front at 1400 M. Held a comfortable lead until being put under pressure final 300 M. Fought on gamely and held on to deny challengers.
Settled on fence at midfield. Made a ground saving trip around the home turn but never quickened in the straight.
Niggled along early stages and kept a length off the lead through to home straight. Kept on fairly but couldn't find extra final stages.
Never travelled better than midfield. Lacked a response and stayed on one pace in the straight.
Dropped back from wide draw and raced in rear section. Ran on well in the straight and steadily made up ground. Ran into traffic over the final stages.
Reared and sat down as the gates opened and lost significant ground at the start. Detached throughout and was never in contention.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Made a nice rally in the straight to be closest at finish.
2-wide and kept within 4Ls of the leader through to home straight. Kept on well despite not getting a clear path in the straight.
3-wide behind midfield until straightening. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear. Improved along the fence at home turn. Closed the race off well despite racing tight over the concluding stages.
Jumped well and kept within 4Ls of the leader early stages. Raced prominently behind the leader home turn but failed to keep pace after 300 M. Weakened closing stages.
Slowly away and taken back to race in a rearward position. Swung out on straightening and made up some ground in the straight.
Raced 3-wide without cover in a forward position. Steadily made up ground in the straight and just missed.
4-wide behind midfield early stages. Drifted further back after 1200 M and was 8Ls down at 400 M. Closed the race off fairly.
Settled on fence 6Ls behind in 8th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 7th off home turn, narrow lead 200 M out, driven out.
Soon led on fence, clear by about 1L from 1200 M to home turn, swamped over 200 M out, faded.
Always towards rear, never closer than 6Ls off pace at any stage.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls off pace in 9th at 800 M, 4-wide off home turn when 6Ls off pace in 9th, picked up well while hanging out to be 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, no extra.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, swamped about 200 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, 4Ls off pace on fence in 5th at 1200 M, same off home turn, outpaced.
4Ls behind lead when 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th off final bend, narrow 2nd at 200 M, ran on well but winner was too strong.
Within 1L of the pace out 2-wide from 1200 M to home straight, swamped about 200 M out, no extra.
About 12Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls down and 5-wide off final bend, ran on well late without threatening principals.
About 10Ls off pace towards rear with cover down back-stretch, 5-wide (widest) of all entering straight, made some nice late ground, never nearer.
Slowly away, about 2nd last over 10Ls off pace down the back, 8Ls down on fence entering straight, some headway to be 4Ls down in 11th at 200 M, weakened out.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, similar margin off the lead but in 9th at home entrance, one-paced.
3-wide without for cover for much of backstretch, 9Ls off pace in 11th at 800 M, similarly placed on straightening, ran on very strongly final 400 M for a place.
Keen early, 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1200 M, over 3Ls back in 4th at 800 M and entering home straight, over 1L down in 6th at 200 M, kept on well but lost a place close home.
Settled worse than midfield with cover 7Ls off pace at 800 M, 5Ls down in midfield off final bend, no chance with winner but just about ran on best of the rest.
Best away, settled 3Ls back in 2nd on fence at 800 M, closer on straightening, eased to the front at 300 M, drew away, easily.
2 and 3-wide without cover in 4th place about 5Ls off pace from 900 M to 600 M, 3Ls down in 4th at entrance to home straight, outpaced.
Always in rear or one from rear, never better than 8Ls off pace at any stage, under pressure into home straight, became further detached.
Better than midfield on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed through to homestretch, found little off the bridle.
Slowest away, 10Ls last at 800 M and only marginally closer on straightening for home, ran on very strongly late and only narrowly missed out on the quinella.
Shot 3Ls clear to lead on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls to the good entering home straight, headed 300 M out and soon wilted.
Bumped 3 times at start, on fence in about 8th place and 6Ls or 7Ls off pace until home turn, 4Ls down in midfield when steadied twice at around 200 M, ran on only fairly late.
About 8Ls off speed towards rear until straightening for home out 4-wide and under pressure, no impression.
Crowded at start, had cover when 7Ls behind in midfield at 800 M, 3-wide no cover at 600 M and 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
Worse than midfield about 8Ls off pace down backstretch, only slightly closer on straightening, made some minor late ground.
About 6Ls off pace in midfield down backstretch, 5Ls down in mid-division off home turn, stayed on fairly well without looming a threat.
Between 3Ls and 4Ls off pace in 3rd from 800 M to home straight, swamped about 200 M out.
3-wide with cover down backstretch when about 7Ls off pace in 9th, a little closer on straightening, making some late ground when 4Ls down in mid-division at 200 M, no extra.
Towards rear on 3-wide. Widest final turn. Made some moderate progress final 150 M.
Towards rear early, then recovered some ground to midfield 1200 M. Crept closer order to 4th 400 M. Responded well to hit front briefly 250 M. Soon found no extra.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit inside 250 M. Never nearer.
Towards rear. 9th rounding home bend. Made ground from 400 M to be 4th 200 M. Kept on but failed to ride out when no room on inside closing stages.
In touch. 3Ls 4th rounding 1st turn. Remained similar to 400 M where he ran on well to take command 200 M out.
Slightly behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
In the leading pair to 1200 M, was 2Ls 2nd before reaching the lead early straight. Kept on but failed to match speed with winner inside 200 M.
Soon last from the widest draw. Recovered good ground from the outside to be nearest at finish.
In the front pair before taking clear lead 1200 M out. Held 2Ls advantage until fading out of contention 250 M out.
Near rear. Crept closer on inside final turn to reach midfield early straight. Run ended 200 M out.
Midfield. Improved gradually to 2Ls 3rd 1200 M. Hung out from 800 M but was still there until finding no extra final 200 M.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Made ground steadily inside 300 M.
Midfield. Weakened passing 200 M.
Behind midfield, still in 10th final turn. Ran on under pressure in straight to just obtain a minor placing.
Midfield. Improved to 5th 1100 M. Quickened well 250 M to obtain a minor placing near 100 M.
Slightly slow to begin, soon moved up to be 3rd. Was 3Ls 4th 1000 M out, kept on until finding no extra in straight.
Always in the rear.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground steadily when under pressure in straight.
Checked when squeezed soon after start, 2nd last to 550 M where he improved slightly to 9th. Widest turning in. Made ground steadily until one-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. 4-wide 8th on straightening. Ran on well to take command 150 M out.
Led. Only one-paced when headed passing 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped to midfield far side. Weakened from home bend.
Towards rear. No response when given reminders final turn. Only made up moderate ground closing stages.
In touch on inside. 2Ls 3rd far side. Kept on well in straight to take 2nd inside 200 M. Failed to threaten the winner.
Ridden forward from widest draw to be outside leader. 1L behind lead far side. Kept on until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Midfield or slightly better. Improved a bit passing 600 M to be 4th or 5th rounding home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
Settled in midfield. Wide into straight. Responded wide under pressure inside final 200 M to narrowly miss 2nd place.
Quickly rushed up to close up position from poor draw. Chased leader to straight. Weakened noticeably.
Well back to straight. Made moderate progress past beaten horses in straight.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow out. Settled at the back. Ran on well between runners on inner of straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Prominent to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Well there. Quickened to hit front narrowly upon straightening. Headed passing 50 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and ran on well to take charge close to home.
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran on to hold every chance the length of straight but found winner too good.
Settled towards rear. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran home one pace without threatening.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Slowly away, last to 300 M. Ran on a bit thereafter.
Prominent on 3-wide. 1L behind lead from 1250 M. 2-1/2Ls 2nd early straight. Kept on but found no extra 200 M out.
Raced 10th on inside. Shifted out 1000 M to improve quickly from outside, reaching the lead 700 M out. With more than 2Ls advantage final turn, kept on well to further extend the margin inside 200 M.
In touch. Raced 4th and 5th before dropping to midfield home bend. Failed to improve in straight.
Midfield. Ridden along to take lead approaching 1200 M. Headed 700 M and was 4th final turn. Faded badly 200 M out. (Lame.)
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Crept closer on inside final turn and improved steadily in straight.
Led field to 1200 M. Dropped back steadily to 4th far side and was 6th rounding home bend. Kept on in straight to take 3rd 200 M.
Midfield. Gave some ground passing 800 M to be 9th 650 M. Recovered some late ground inside 200 M.
In touch early, soon in midfield on rail. Gave a little ground to 9th near 900 M. Shifted to outside to improve rounding home bend. Obtained 2nd 200 M but never able to get close to the winner.
Behind midfield. Made progress from 700 M to reach 2nd 400 M. Weakened badly from 3rd soon after straightening.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Never a factor.
Prominent. Dropped to 5th 1200 M. Midfield far side, found no extra from 7th at 400 M.
Ridden for speed early, then attempted to make all. Kicked some 2Ls clear turning for home but swamped close to home.
Prominent to home bend. Gradually weakened.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run shortly after straightening. Finished off race strongly despite inconveniencing rider hanging in.
Towards rear. Very wide turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Weakened in straight.
Tracked leaders. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Gained upper hand close to home.
Rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Well there. Lost touch 400 M out.
Raced wide in midfield. Went wider turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Always prominent. Ran on stoutly under pressure in straight to narrowly miss 2nd place.
Trailed field throughout.
Settled towards rear. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in a handy position around 3-wide without cover to straight. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out and just missed out in a tight finish for 3rd place.

Broke with field and ridden along to race outside the leader through to straight. Ran on strongly when asked 300 M out whilst hanging in over the final 200 M to grab the winner spot in a close finish.
Broke fairly but was unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position on rail to straight. Unable to make much impression when asked 250 M out.
Jumped fairly but soon outpaced towards rear and out wide without cover through to straight. Failed to show any running in home straight.

Broke fairly and soon settled in midfield or better 2-wide through to straight. Near the 250 M steadied and shifted out to avoid heels. All out 200 M out and made steady ground to grab 3rd on the line.
Unable to muster early speed and raced at the back around 3-wide to straight. Made no impression in home straight. (Lame.)
Steadily eased from a wide draw to the rear but closer to the rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made little impression in the closing stages to be closest at finish.
Began well and pushed along to take lead on rail with around 1/2L advantage through to straight. All out 250 M and responded well but was unable to fend off challenge from winner inside final 100 M.
Tardy start from wide draw and soon raced in midfield around 4-wide without cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away and soon recovered to be in midfield on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but over the final 100 M was awkwardly placed on heels and was not fully tested.
Slow to begin and hard ridden along to race in a handy position on rail to straight. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.
Jumped fairly from a wide draw and steadily settled in midfield 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running, under pressure 300 M out and ran on fairly to be closest at finish.
About 4Ls or 5Ls behind and worse than midfield until 400 M, soon outpaced.
Switched from wide gate to fence, 7Ls last on fence at 1200 M, 5-wide (widest of all) entering stretch when 6Ls last, hung in badly while finishing off strongly to take 2nd close home.
With cover about 5Ls off pace worse than midfield until final bend, very one-paced thereafter.
3-wide without cover as early as 1800 M and could never get in, within 2Ls of pace in 4th until home turn, soon beaten.
Soon led on fence, clear by about 1L through to final bend, still clear at 200 M, swamped close home.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls behind lead on fence through to home straight, failed to quicken up.
Slowest away, 3Ls or 4Ls behind in midfield with cover from 1600 M to home straight, picked up well to lead 150 M out, pushed out.
3Ls off speed when 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, under pressure at 500 M, all out to be 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, weakened final stages.
Always towards rear about 6Ls off speed until final bend, stayed on well on fence to be nearest at finish.
3 back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, stayed on well for a place.
2-wide and 1L behind in 2nd from 1600 M to 600 M when under pressure to stay in touch, weakened off final bend.
Jumped well and soon led. Kept a length's advantage all the way into home straight. Stayed on well over the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. Ran into traffic at 200 M whilst closing off fairly.
Raced 3-wide in rear section. Kept same pace in the straight.
Niggled along to a forward position. Never more than a length off the lead in back straight. Kept on well in the home straight but unable to find extra to get past winner in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Ridden along rounding home turn with little response. Never quickened in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. No more than 4Ls off the pace back straight. Switched out on straightening and kept on steadily to line.
Eased back to the rear. Trailed field until home straight and made up some ground over the final stages.

In front early but took a sit behind the leader 1400 M. Settled in a prominent position behind the pace until home straight. Ridden along but failed to keep pace 400 M and faded steadily over final stages.
Slightly slow to begin. Settled 2-wide at midfield. Ridden from 500 M but lacked a response, then weakened in the straight.
Jumped well. Kept within 4Ls of the leader in a 2-wide position back straight. Ridden along 600 M but only managed to keep on same pace to the end.
Soon raced in rear section. Remained near the back at home turn and swung wide on straightening. Made a nice rally in the straight to be closest at finish.
Slowly away and raced on fence behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip around the home turn and ran on well in the closing stages.
Keen out 3-deep when disputing early lead, settled 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th from 600 M to home turn, failed to quicken up and beaten 150 M out.
Planted at start. Took no part. (Impaired vision.)
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off speed on fence in about 4th until final bend, finished strongly and only just failed.
Disputed lead out 2-wide early on, a neck 2nd on fence on straightening, stayed on well but no extra final 50 M.
Slowly away, about 5Ls or 6Ls last on fence until home turn, made a little late ground.
Bumped at start, with cover about 4Ls off pace towards rear, 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Crowded at start, 5Ls behind in 11th when 2-wide at 600 M, made some fair late ground without threatening leaders.
3 back on the fence 4Ls off pace in 9th or so until home turn, finishing well when 1L down in 5th when bumped at 100 M, no extra close home.
Keen in midfield when checked at 800 M, 3Ls back and 2-wide in 7th at 600 M, closer but still in mid-division when bumped and checked about 100 M out.
Always without cover, 3-wide no cover when 2Ls down in 4th at 600 M, closer off final bend and all out to be a head down in 3rd at 200 M, faded final 100 M.
Led out 4-wide without cover at 900 M and a neck clear out 2-wide off home turn, headed 200 M out but battled back well and only caught by quinella pair final 50 M.
About 6th when 3-wide with cover within 2Ls of pace until home turn, picked up to well 50 M out, just hung on.
Prominent. Was 2nd or 3rd until finding no extra 200 M out.
2Ls 6th to 400 M. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd near 100 M. Unable to threaten the winner.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, soon picked up to be prominent. Kept on 2nd until failing to hold place inside 300 M.
Mainly 5th before making progress passing 400 M to be 2nd 200 M out. Lost 2nd when one-paced inside 100 M.
In touch to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Lost ground at start, near rear throughout.
Made all. Kept on well final 200 M to win convincingly.
Raced 7th to 250 M. Made ground steadily thereafter.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Weakened badly into straight.
Travelled in midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on down inner of straight, despite inconvenienced over 200 M out, to be nearest at finish.
Well there far side. Dropped out from home bend. (Heart irregularity.)
Wide in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled at the back. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Well back early. Improved to rear of midfield coming out of back straight. Found nothing in the run home.
Settled at the back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Rear. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Soon took up running and led until tiring badly over 300 M out.
Settled just behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front over 200 M out. Just held on to the line.
Always well there. Came to tackle leader upon straightening but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Prominent and wide to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Behind midfield. Made some progress halfway to be better than midfield. Soon one-paced.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace when given reminders 200 M.
Always at the back.
In touch. Quickened well inside 100 M to snatch 2nd close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Ran on well final 400 M to hit front inside 200 M. Kept on.
Always prominent. Took lead passing 250 M. Failed to resist challenges from the quinella pair final 100 M.
Well there. Hit front briefly course proper. Found no extra 250 M out.
Towards rear. Dropped out inside 200 M.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Made ground steadily to midfield 400 M. Ran on to 4th 200 M out. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Midfield. Found no extra closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Weakened final 400 M. (Bled.)
Held slender advantage until passing 250 M. Kept on 2nd or 3rd until finding no extra close home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Continued to make ground in straight but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Settled in last few. Did not find much room in straight. Made no impression inside final 200 M.
Settled wide in close-up position from poor draw. Gradually weakened under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Finished off race well under pressure.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always struggling at the back.
Attempted to make all, holding clear advantage until overhauled closing stages.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Well there early, settling in forward of midfield rounding home bend. Did not find much room final 300 M.
Midfield. Not much room early in straight. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well inside final 250 M to hit front final strides.
Well back. Produced good late impression past beaten horses in straight.
Wide in midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily on rails in straight without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to race in a handy position on rail through to straight. All out 300 M out and ran on well to overhaul the 2nd placegetter in ding-dong finish.

From the widest draw was immediately eased to a rearward position out wide without cover. Made little headway rounding the home bend to be in mid-division on straigh- tening. No extra in straight and steadily dropped out.

Unable to muster early speed to race in a rearward position. Near the 800 M was checked to avoid heels. Was unable to see clear daylight in early to middle part of straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Near the 200 M whilst plugging on fairly was steadied when closed to heels, continued to plug on fairly to the line thereafter.
Broke with field and soon settled in a rearward position on rail. Near the 800 M lost ground when awkwardly placed on heels. Unable to show much impression in the straight.

Jumped well from wide draw and settled in midfield or worse around 3 wide with cover. Made little headway from a 4 wide position rounding the home turn. Under pressure 350 M out and plugged on gamely to the line.

Broke fairly and soon settled in better than midfield on rail. Near the 700 M was awkwardly placed on heels whilst hanging out. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Broke with field from wide draw and pushed along to race in a prominent position 2 wide to straight. All out 300 M out and kept on fairly to the line without threatening.

Slowly away and raced at the back. Steadily switched to the outside rounding the home turn to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish when asked 350 M out.

Broke with field and soon settled in a rearward position 3 wide with cover. Near the 800 M was steadied to avoid heels and became unbalanced on straightening after being bumped. Kept on fairly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Began well and steadily settled in midfield around 2 wide. Near the 800 M was steadied when awkwardly placed and dropped to a rearward position. Failed to show any running in straight.

Jumped well and hard ridden along in the early stages to take lead on rail. Pulled clear from the rest rounding the home turn. Kept on same pace in straight, headed near the 300 M and steadily faded thereafter.

Began awkwardly and soon settled in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and responded quite well but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair to settle for 3rd.

Broke fairly from wide gate and niggled along to race in a handy position around 3 wide without cover to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M and held slender lead from 200 M out but was unable to fend off late challenge.
8Ls last when 2-wide down back straight, detached in rear entering straight, soon beaten.
Over-raced early on, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd off home turn, one-paced when 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well late to hang onto 4th.
Settled 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, picked up nicely to lead at 200 M, driven out.
Always without cover towards rear about 6Ls off pace, 6-wide (widest of all) entering home straight when 5Ls back in 12th, never troubled leaders.
3 back the fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, held up a little entering straight when 3Ls down in 5th, faded steadily.
Switched from wide gate to fence 8Ls off pace in 12th for most of backstretch, 5Ls down in 10th off home turn, made some small late ground on fence.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence from 1200 M to 600 M when niggled along to stay in touch, very weak in the homestretch.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until home turn, headed 200 M out, kept on well for 2nd.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace down backstretch, 5Ls down off final bend, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
3-wide without cover when 4Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, 5-wide entering home straight when 4Ls behind in about 10th, failed to quicken up.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1400 M to home straight, weakened from 250 M out.
Had cover when 3-wide about 5Ls off pace in about 8th or so until 800 M, 4-wide and 3Ls down in mid-division off home turn, ran on fairly but never looked like filling the quinella.
6Ls behind in 9th on fence at 1200 M, about 4Ls back entering stretch in 8th and 3Ls down in 6th at 200 M, no extra close home.
Raced in a forward position early stages. Kept within 3Ls of the leader home turn but weakened in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Gradually eased back to race in rear section. Wide making home turn and unable to quicken in the straight.
Began well and raced in a forward position. Settled in a prominent position behind the leader from 1500 M onwards. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Outpaced early stages and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and swung out for its run. Rallied impressively in the straight but ran out of ground to catch winner.

Travelled 3-wide at midfield. Made up ground in a wide position rounding home turn and was carried out further before straightening. Hit the front at 400 M but failed to hold off top pair inside final 200 M.
Raced just off the pace early stages. Niggled up to be alongside the leader after 1200 M. Moved into a disputed lead on straightening but unable quicken thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden along to make up ground early stages. Settled at midfield middle stages but commenced to lose touch rounding home turn. Made no impression in the straight.

Sluggish start and settled in a rearward position. Saved ground along the rails rounding home turn. Held up for some distance after straightening and closed the race off well after getting a clear run.
Settled behind midfield. Improved in 4-wide position rounding home turn and was within 2Ls of the leader on straightening. Quickened well and ran down the leader inside 200 M to claim victory.
Dropped steadily back to rear section. 3-wide making home turn and ran on same pace in the straight.
Niggled along into the lead and kept in front until straightening. Weakened thereafter.
Raced along the rails at midfield until straightening. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
6Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls down in midfield entering straight, always held.
3 back the fence about 4Ls or so off pace better than midfield through to home straight, stayed on quite late without troubling leaders.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd from 1600 M to home straight, ran on well late but never likely to reel in winner.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1400 M to home straight, outpaced when 3Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, missed out on a place on line.
Slowest away, settled about 10Ls last at 1400 M and often without cover, 9Ls last entering straight, never a factor.
3-wide no cover when 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1600 M, no cover and 4Ls down from 800 M to home turn, no chance with quinella pair but stayed on gamely for 3rd.
8Ls off pace in 10th for most of backstretch, forced 4-wide when still 8Ls down towards rear off final bend, made up some nice late ground, never nearer.
Led by 1L on fence at 1800 M, same margin clear until home turn, kicked well and nearly two lengths in front at 200 M, driven out and always in command.
10Ls off pace in 13th at 1600 M, 8Ls behind off final bend, no impression.
4Ls behind leader in 6th when 2-wide at 1000 M, a little closer entering home straight, ran on fairly well without threatening.
6Ls behind when 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, same margin behind when 4-wide turning for home, lacked the dash.
Awkwardly away, over-raced early on, 8Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1400 M, forced 5-wide entering straight when 7Ls down in 10th or so, no danger.
2-wide and 3Ls behind leader in 4th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover on the circle but still 3Ls back in 4th on straightening, soon outpaced.
Slowly away, 7Ls off pace in 9th on fence at 1200 M, same entering straight, soon weakened.
3 back on fence when 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, slightly worse off entering straight, soon well beaten, eased final 200 M.
Worse than midfield when 3-deep with cover and 5Ls off pace until the 800 M, 4-wide without cover on the circle and 5-wide off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
Keen early on, 3-wide and 2Ls behind in 5th at 800 M, niggled along to maintain prominent position at 600 M, plugged at the one pace.
Slowly away but soon had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home straight, no chance with winner but finished off best of the rest.
Settled about 8Ls off pace in rear down the back, 4-wide and under pressure entering straight when 6Ls off pace in rear, no impression.
Always 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th down the backstretch, 2Ls down in 3rd off final bend, weakened noticeably final 200 M.
Fractious in gates, sometimes out 4-wide with no cover in places down back straight when about 4Ls off pace in mid- division, closer entering straight but soon outpaced.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight when assuming the lead, skipped 3Ls clear at 200 M, very easily.
In midfield 3-wide with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until the home turn, failed to quicken up.
Settled in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace until entering home straight when 5-wide, ran on quite well late for a place.
4 back on the fence in 11th about 6Ls off pace down backstretch, held up at 300 M, clear 200 M, finished off at the same pace.
10Ls behind when 2-wide and 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, still towards rear off final bend, no impression. (Bled.)
Soon led on fence, about 1L clear through to home straight, soon headed and dropped away very tamely.
Towards rear. Stayed on closing stages.
Settled 5th. Dropped back a bit to 7th 300 M. Renewed effort final 200 M to be 4th closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Ran on well passing 400 M, came to tackle the winner final 100 M, effort not sustained.
Tardy start, last to straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
About 4Ls 6th to straight. Ran on solidly to take 3rd closing stages.
Prominent. Weakened from 3rd early straight.
Was 3rd early, became 4th 1000 M. Still 2-1/2Ls behind lead 400 M, ran on well to take lead 200 M. Just held off runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Never a factor.
Jumped well and took lead to 200 M. Found no extra.
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
In touch. Moved up to take 2nd passing 1000 M. 1L behind lead final turn, kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Found not much room early straight. Stayed on when in clear.
Towards rear. 5-wide final turn. Made ground steadily 250 M, never nearer.
Settled in midfield. Did not find much room in straight.
Soon took up running and led to straight. Weakened under pressure passing 200 M.
Soon dropped to last few.
Settled mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield. Shaken up upon straightening. Gained upper hand about 100 M out.
Well back. Ran on between runners down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled at the back. Ran on quite well in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure. (Lame.)
Always well there. Hit front momentarily over 100 M out but found winner too strong.
Never far off. Held up for a run the length of the straight. Not fully tested.
Disputed lead. Hit front upon straightening but swamped over 100 M out.
Travelled well in forward of midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. No further impression closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight.
Led field to 700 M. Was 2nd before regaining advantage 450 M. Faded when headed 200 M.
Lost ground at start, last to home bend. Crept a bit closer early straight. Was checked 200 M and found no clear run 100 M. Not tested.
Slowly away, at the back to 250 M. Made up significant ground on outside to be nearest at finish.
Slightly behind midfield. Gradual progress from 800 M to be 4th passing the Rock. Ran on steadily in straight to claim victory final 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground final 200 M.
Pushed along to be 2nd soon after start. Took over near 700 M to 450 M. Kept on 2nd until regaining advantage at 200 M. Was headed 100 M. Lost 2nd at finish.
Around midfield throughout.
Behind midfield. Improved to 6th 800 M. Made further progress on outside to be 3rd 400 M. Kept on until finding no extra inside 150 M.
Raced 10th to 700 M where he started to improve steadily. Kept on well from 6th final turn to snatch 2nd at finish.
Raced ungenerously in midfield. Gave a little ground to behind midfield rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd to final turn where he dropped back a bit. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage rounding home bend. Fought on well to resist challenge but outsprinted by winner final strides.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled in midfield. Made modest progress down straight without threatening.
Forward of midfield most of way. One-paced in straight.
Well there to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Sluggish at start. Well back to straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Never seen with a chance.
Ridden to lead early. Narrowly headed rounding home bend. Fought on determinedly under pressure in straight without threatening.
Chased leaders from poor draw. One-paced in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Finished off race strongly inside final 250 M to snatch victory short of line. (Bled.)
Well back. Ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon 2nd last. Stayed on to recover some ground inside 150 M.
Better than midfield. Within 3Ls behind lead far side. Stayed in similar position to straight. Weakened steadily.
Well there. Sat outside leader until failing to hold place 200 M out.
Never a factor.
Settled towards rear on inside from a wide draw. Improved to midfield 1200 M. Remained in similar position until running on well final 200 M to assert authority closing stages.
Well there. Held 3rd on 3-wide without cover. Weakened on straightening.
In touch. 2-1/2Ls 4th far side. Stayed on along inside rail in straight until finding no extra closing stages.
Took lead soon after start. Maintained 1L advantage to straight. Stayed on well until headed closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Wide on straightening. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd close home.
In touch early, soon in midfield or slightly behind. Gave some response when whipped near 150 M.
Never far off. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear throughout. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Took closer order after Rock. Shared 4th into straight but ran home one-paced.
Trailed field most of way. Never nearer.
Behind midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Made modest progress under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Led early. Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge under pressure in straight but unable to draw level throughout.
Jumped slowly. Settled at the back. Wide rounding home bend. Closed on leaders in straight. Never nearer.
Well there. Took up running far side. Hung on well under pressure in straight.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.

Slow to behind and settled in a rearward position on rail. Switched out and made little headway rounding the home turn. Under pressure 300 M out and responded well but failed to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.
Slowly away from widest and ridden along to take up running on rail from around 1300 M. Soon headed after straightening and steadily faded thereafter.
Jumped well and was soon box-seated behind the leader. Switched away from the rail on straightening to obtain clear running. All out 250 M and found the line well to take charge inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly and steadily settled in midfield or worse around 2-wide whilst hanging out. Rounding the home turn hung out badly and ran off the track. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Best out and soon settled in a forward position around 2-wide. Went forward to race outside the leader at home bend. Hit the front on straightening but was headed near the 200 M and became one-paced thereafter.
Broke fairly from wide draw and soon raced in midfield around 3-wide. Pushed along and made little headway at home turn. No extra when asked 300 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Checked shortly after the start and dropped to the rear on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Shortly after the jump was checked and dropped to a rearward position around 2-wide. Was carried significant wider by another runner rounding the home turn. Made no impression in straight.

Broke with field from wide draw and steadily eased to the rear but closer to the rail. Ridden along at home turn and made little headway from the outside. Made steady impression in straight, just missed a minor placing.
Soon raced in a handy position around 2-wide through to straight. Only kept on evenly when asked 300 M out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Soon raced in a prominent position around 3-wide. Commenced to give ground at 600 M and tailed out in straight.

Slowly away and niggled along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Near the 200 M whilst closing the race off well was checked when disappointed for running. Continued to run on well when in running 150 M.
Over 2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 1100 M, 1L down in 3rd at final bend, very weak thereafter.
10Ls off pace in 11th on fence at 1200 M, about 6Ls down in 10th off home turn, made some late ground on fence without threatening principals.
Tended to hang in throughout, 10Ls off pace when 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 11th entering straight, made some late ground but held up and not ridden out fully final 50 M.
7Ls behind when 2-wide in 7th at 1100 M, 3Ls behind and 2-wide in 6th on straightening, over 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on fairly for 3rd.
8Ls behind on fence in 8th at 1100 M, held up at 400 M and 5-wide entering straight when 4Ls down in 8th, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, kept finding but line came too soon.
11Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls off pace in rear at home turn, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
Soon led on fence, nearly 3Ls clear at 1000 M, headed and faded very fast from top of home straight.
8Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1100 M, forced 6-wide (widest of all) off final bend when 4Ls down in 8th, kept on at same pace only to narrowly miss out on 3rd place.
4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence in 4th from 1200 M to 500 M, 3-wide and 1L down in 4th off home turn, led 250 M out, driven out.
5Ls off speed in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 5th when 4-wide off final bend, soon faded.
Over 3Ls behind in 3rd when 2-wide at 1100 M, a neck down in 2nd at final bend, failed to pick up and very weak through final 200 M.
7Ls off pace 3-back on the fence in 6th from 1200 M to 600 M, 3Ls down in midfield entering straight, very one-paced final 200 M.

Behind leaders and hung out badly early stages. Raced along the fence at midfield in back straight. Made a ground saving trip rounding home turn and contested for the lead at 200 M. Faded out of contention but kept on well to line.
Jumped well and took a sit behind the leaders 1200 M and kept within 3Ls of leader back straight. Ridden along 600 M. Switched out on straightening, quickened and took the lead final 200 M.
Niggled to the front and held a narrow lead through to home turn. Remained in contention until fading out inside final 200 M.
Missed the kick and raced in rear section. Dropped out after 600 M and finished tailed out. (Lame.)
3-wide better than midfield early stages. Kept within 4Ls of the leader back straight. Made no impression in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. In rear section rounding home turn and lacked a rally in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced along the fence at midfield early stages. Dropped back slightly after 1200 M to race behind midfield. Picked up well on straightening and claimed a minor placing.
Settled on fence in a rearward position. Remained near the back on straightening and steadily made up ground along the inside in the home straight.
Off slowly and trailed field for majority of the race. Only ran past a pair of weakening runners.
Settled 2-wide and never got better than midfield. 4Ls behind the leader at 400 M. Kept on without threatening in the straight.
Raced wide and without cover behind midfield early stages. Remained racing wide in rear section throughout back straight. Swung wide on straightening and rallied well to be closest at finish.
Soon raced in a forward position. Kept alongside the leader through to home turn. Weakened after 400 M.
6Ls behind and 2-wide in 7th at 1100 M, about 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, picked up well despite hanging in to lead inside final 100 M, ran on strongly.
6Ls off pace in 6th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 6th at home turn, over 2Ls back in 6th 150 M out when clipping heels and nearly fell, ran on again late.
On fence 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off lead from 800 M to homestretch, led 200 M out but no extra when headed inside final 100 M.
4Ls down and 2-wide in 5th at 1100 M, about 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
Always worse than midfield about 8Ls off pace at 1100 M, niggled along at 800 M and never travelled well, well held in the homestretch.
8Ls behind in 10th on fence from 1100 M to home turn, 5Ls behind in 7th at 200 M, kept on quite well late and nearest at finish.
4Ls behind in 4th on fence at 1100 M, same turning for home, made some good late ground but always held by quinella pair.
Switched from wide gate to fence to be 9Ls off pace in 11th at 1100 M, last entering straight, made minor late ground without threatening.
Always 3-wide without cover, 6Ls off pace in 8th from 1100 M to home straight, posed little threat.
2-wide and 1L down in 3rd at 1100 M, a neck down in 2nd from 800 M to home straight, all out to be a neck down in 3rd at 200 M, faded out late.
Always either last or one from last, never closer than 7Ls to the speed at any stage.
Soon led on fence, 1L clear at 1200 M but only a neck in front from 800 M to home turn, headed at 200 M and dropped away quickly.
Behind midfield. Faded 200 M out.
Raced 4th early. Dropped back to 6th rounding first turn. Recovered ground to 4th passing 400 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Raced in the rear to final turn. Ran on steadily from 12th 400 M, never nearer.
Midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Led field soon after start. Held 2Ls advantage 250 M. Kept on until headed closing stages.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made some minor recovery 200 M out.
Moved up from 5th far side to 2nd briefly passing 800 M. Dropped back to 5th 400 M. Soon weakened.
Always prominent. 2Ls 2nd early straight. Kept on but failed to match speed with winner closing stages.
Bounded at start, losing ground. Near rear until passing some beaten horses in straight.
Midfield and was wide without cover throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer to 8th turning in. Continued to make ground to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Kept on final 200 M.
Settled 4th on the rail. 2Ls 3rd final turn. Ran on steadily to take command closing stages.
Broke well. Settled in midfield. Quickened well to take charge inside 200 M. Won confidently.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Broke well. Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily. Made steady headway inside final 300 M.
Always prominent. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Weakened into straight.
Soon took up running and led until joined far side. Dropped out upon straightening.
Towards rear. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Disputed lead rounding home bend and early in straight. Soon dropped out.
Well there. Driven to lead over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Badly baulked passing 300 M. One-paced closing stages.
Ridden along early to be in touch. 2Ls 3rd 800 M. 5th turning in. Ran on 200 M out without threatening.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back upon straightening. Wide throughout.
Was 2nd from a wide draw. 2-1/2Ls behind lead final turn. Weakened inside 150 M. (Bled.)
Better than midfield. Gave a little ground to 8th 800 M. Crept closer to 6th turning in. Ran on strongly final 250 M to assert authority close home.
2Ls 4th to 400 M. Soon weakened.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from outside in straight.
Slowly away, was last until recovering some ground in straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to 7th final turn. Failed to quicken in straight.
Soon led. Still with 3Ls advantage passing 200 M. Unable to resist winner's challenges closing stages.
Held 5th on inside. Improved to 3rd 500 M. Weakened inside 300 M.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. Responded well when asked and quickened to lead 200 M out. Won readily.
Well there. Took up running rounding home bend. Narrowly headed into straight. Plodded on for 3rd.
Crossed to rail gingerly from middle draw. Led until headed coming out of back straight. Regained narrow advantage turning in but soon swamped passing 200 M.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled in last few. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Well there, racing keenly early. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Wide in forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily down centre of track without threatening.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Midfield to straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield. Faded into straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
On jumping stood flat-footed and lost a considerable amount of ground. Trailed the field throughout and finished tailed out.
Soon raced in handy position 2 wide, commenced to give ground steadily rounding the home bend and tailed out in straight.

Began well and pushed along to race outside the leader. Eased back to race in 3rd place down back straight. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but only ran on evenly and further weakened inside final 200 M.

From the widest draw was soon settled in worse than midfield around 3 wide with cover. Went forward from the outside at home bend to be 2Ls off pace on straightening. Responded well when asked 350 M out but without threatening.

Jumped well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or worse on rail. Switched out on straightening to find clear running but didn't see clear daylight in early part of straight. Made good impression inside final 200 M.
Unable to muster early speed to race at the back on inner. Switched wide and hard ridden along at home bend to keep in touch. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly and steadily settled in midfield around 3 wide. Near the 800 M made little headway to be 2Ls off pace on straightening. Ran on fairly in straight but was no match for 1st pair and was overhauled by 3rd and 4th placegetters.

From a wide draw was soon settled in a rearward position but closer to rail. Pushed along at home bend and made headway from the outside. Ran on quite well when asked 350 M out but just lost out to 3rd placegetter in a tight finish.
Soon raced in midfield or better on rail, commenced to give ground rounding the home turn and failed to show any running in straight.

Jumped fairly and ridden along to race in a handy position around 3 wide. Near the 900 M was allowed to stride forward steadily to join leaders on straightening. Hit the front shortly after the 400 M but was headed near the 200 M.

Broke well from wide draw and niggled along to race in a forward position 3 wide no cover. Near the 1100 M went forward to race outside the leader to straight. No extra when asked 350 M out and steadily faded inside final 250 M.

Broke with field from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position around 4 wide. Made steady headway from the outside rounding home turn. Responded well when asked 350 M out and kicked clear from the rest inside final 150 M.
Ridden along to take up running on rail with no more than 1/2L advantage through to straight. Headed shortly after the 400 M and gave ground steadily thereafter.
Began well and hard ridden along in the early stages to be box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Crowded at start, always prominent, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd from 800 M and led at top of homestretch, always in command.
Pressed on to lead or dispute lead out 2-wide from 1000 M to home straight when headed by winner, faded out tamely.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide around midfield until 600 M, 3-wide off final bend when 1L down in 3rd, 2Ls down at 200 M when all out, no extra.
Best away but settled about 1L off speed in 4th from 1000 M to homestretch, no chance with winner but battled on well late to nick 2nd.
Disputed lead out 4-wide without cover early on, lost position on the circle when 5-wide and 5Ls off pace, dropped out further.
About 3Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in mid-division until 600 M, 4-wide entering homestretch, lacked any kind of kick.
3-back on the fence about 3Ls off pace around midfield until 600 M, closer entering straight, always held by winner and lost 2nd close home.
Didn't break well, one from rear and driven along about 5Ls off pace down backstretch, 4Ls down in 8th on straightening, one-paced.
With cover about 4Ls off pace and worse than midfield until home straight when under pressure, one-paced thereafter.
Slowest away and switched to fence in rear from widest gate, always in rear and under pressure.
Always extremely wide and without cover, never better than 5-wide at any stage and in midfield or worse about 4Ls off pace, forced 7-wide on straightening, no impression.
Disputed early lead out 3-wide with cover, tended to hang out on the circle, 6-wide entering straight when 3Ls back in midfield, soon well beaten.
Raced comfortably in a disputed lead. Quickened when challenged 200 M and cruised to victory.
Hit the front early. Remained in a disputed lead until 400 M and was outpaced in the final stages.
Stayed within a length of the pace early stages. Weakened and dropped out midway through. (Bled.)
Settled in a rearward position. Quickened well when asked at the 400 M. Unable to sustain effort final 100 M.
Raced in a rearward position. Responded well when asked at 400 M. Kept on steadily to line.
Sluggish start and trailed field until 400 M. Only ran past a few beaten runners.
Near midfield early stages. Kept on fairly over the concluding stages for a minor placing.
Raced at midfield early stages. Lacked a response when asked after 500 M and weakened thereafter. (Mucus.)
Midfield early stages. Improved steadily to be within striking distance 200 M. Kept on well but unable to draw closer to winner final stages.
Moved steadily towards the outside and raced in rear section. Unable to quicken at the halfway mark and weakened.
Kept within 2Ls of the leaders but was outpaced inside final 400 M.
In midfield about 3Ls off pace on fence until 800 M, didn't have to round a single rival to lead at top of home straight, 1L clear at 200 M, headed final strides.
Towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace through to 600 M, 6-wide turning for home, one-paced thereafter.
4Ls or 5Ls behind and worse than midfield with cover through to home straight, 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, stayed on well but only just outpaced by principals.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield or so until the 600 M, 4-wide entering straight when 3Ls down in 7th, over 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, forced to shift left late but still finished off well.
On fence and about 4Ls off pace in midfield or worse until the 600 M, 3Ls down in 2nd on straightening, hung out left when 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, kept hanging but got up to lead late.
4Ls or 5Ls behind and worse than midfield with cover through to home straight when 4-wide, made a little late ground but never troubled leaders.
Disputed lead early but 2-wide (when free to move to rail) down backstretch and 1L down in 3rd at 800 M, still fairly close up off final bend but soon weakened right out.
Niggled along when 4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 6th at 800 M, 3Ls down in midfield at 400 M and at 200 M when checked, eased down late.
Slowest away, 10Ls behind in rear on fence at 1200 M, one from rear and 5Ls down when 5-wide, ran on very strongly late and wasn't far away.
Within 1L of the pace and with cover until the 900 M when left 4-wide without cover, 2-wide from 800 M and within a neck of pace until the home straight, swamped at 300 M.
Settled about 8Ls off pace in rear down the back, 6-wide entering straight when 5Ls down in rear, ran on very well nearer stands' rail and just missed a place.
Led 4-wide without cover at 1200 M before crossing to lead by 1L on fence at 900 M, moved off fence when headed at top of home straight, soon faded.
1L off pace in 3rd when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down in 5th, beaten when bumped at 200 M, eased late.
Always worse than midfield and no closer than 6Ls to the pace at any stage.
Soon led on fence, never much more than 1L clear until home turn, headed at top of home straight, weakened.
8Ls down towards rear down backstretch, 7Ls down entering straight, 5Ls down at 200 M and kept on well to only narrowly miss out on the quinella.
9Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M on fence, 5Ls down in 9th or so off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
A neck 2nd out 3-wide no cover at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M when 2-wide, led at top of home straight, 2Ls clear at 200 M, hung on for pressure.
Had a nice run on fence about 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, all out to keep within 2Ls of the winner at 200 M, unbalanced when beaten 100 M out.
5Ls off pace in 6th on fence at 1200 M, over 3Ls down off home turn, stayed on well late for the quinella but not in time to grab the winner.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, dropped out tamely.
Dropped out 10Ls off pace in rear down the back, 9Ls last entering straight and tacked towards cenre of track, made minor late ground to be nearest at the finish.
Always 3-wide without cover in 3rd or 4th within 2Ls of the pace until home straight, soon faded out.
Checked at start, 6Ls off pace in midfield when 2-wide at 1200 M, 5Ls down off home mid-division when awkwardly placed, weakened out.
Bounded and lost ground at start, 3Ls off pace in 4th on fence at 1200 M, same entering straight, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, 5Ls down and 4-wide off final bend when still worse than midfield off home turn, no impression.
Checked at 1400 M, never travelled well when worse than midfield, changed legs throughout and warranted the hard riding received, eased through final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch on inside. 2Ls 4th final turn. Kept on well but just lost a minor placing at finish.
Led briefly early. 3rd from 1200 M. Dropped back steadily from 4th soon after straightening.
Took lead passing 1200 M. Held 2Ls advantage final turn. Held on until headed 200 M.
Always at the back.
Midfield or slightly better. Improved to 4th passing 400 M. Kept on well to just obtain a minor placing at finish.
Settled midfield. Kept on quite well early straight but found no extra inside 200 M.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Ran on well from outside passing 400 M to assert authority final 100 M.
Last to straight. Just ran past a few beaten horses.
Mainly 5th. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. One-paced.
Held 2nd before taking over 200 M out. Failed to resist winner's challenges when headed near 100 M.
Led briefly early, then settled better than midfield on 3-wide. 4-wide turning in, failed to quicken in straight.
Led field soon after start. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
In touch on inside. 2-1/2Ls 5th passing the Rock. Kept on well to be 2nd 250 M. One-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Steady progress early straight. Ran on well 200 M out to take command 100 M. Just held on.
Towards rear. Clipped heels and fell passing 200 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend but was held up final turn. Still found no clear run early straight, ran on well when in clear 200 M.
Settled in 2nd last from the widest draw. Made up significant ground on outside final 200 M, just missed narrowly.
Prominent to straight. Dislodged rider passing 200 M.
1L behind lead soon after start. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Began awkwardly, last to 650 M. Gradual progress to be 8th 400 M. Kept on final 200 M, never nearer.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Weakened in straight.
Towards rear. Tailed off in straight.
Settled in rear. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M to snatch victory near finish.
Never far off. Hit front inside 200 M. Collared close to home.
Slow out. Trailed the field throughout.
Towards rear. Finished off race strongly down inner of straight to fail narrowly.
Settled in midfield. Did not find much room in straight until inside 150 M. Kept on to the line.
Settled in midfield from wide draw. Kept on well but hung in and rider had to stop riding closing stages.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled over 100 M out.
Settled in forward of midfield. Steadied for a run over 200 M out. Sustained progress to the line.
Well there. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never nearer.
Behind midfield. Kept on closing stages.
Midfield to home bend. Dropped back steadily.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily from 8th 300 M, never nearer.
Midfield. Ran on from 6th 300 M to assert authority closing stages.
Led briefly after start, became 3rd passing 800 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Failed to quicken in straight.
Ridden along from widest draw to be 2nd approaching 800 M. Weakened out of contention passing 200 M.
Never a factor.
Well there, took lead approaching 1000 M. With 3Ls advantage early straight, found no extra when headed closing stages.
Always at the back.
Mainly 9th throughout.
In touch. 4Ls 4th far side. Kept on steadily in straight.
Prominent to straight. Found nothing when asked.
Wide and never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly in midfield. No clear run early in straight. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Made most. Hung on well under pressure in straight.
Jumped slow. Never in contention.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well there. Fought on doggedly under pressure in straight but just failed to get up on line.
Jumped behind midfield. Rapid progress between runners to forward of midfield. Swung wide and took 4th into straight. Soon weakened under pressure.
Sluggish at start. Ridden to midfield when wide far side. Weakened into home straight.
Well there with brief lead early. Dropped out in straight.
Raced keenly in midfield. Steadied for a stride over 400 M out. Steadied again over 200 M out. Kept on same pace to finish.
Broke well and pushed along to be box-seated behind the leader through to straight. Kept on well when asked 300 M out but was unable to match speed with the 1st pair inside final 150 M.

Tardy start and soon settled in midfield or worse on rail. Ridden along to maintain position rounding the home turn. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke with field from widest and steadily eased to a rearward position but closer to the rail through to straight. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 250 M out.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Kept on quite well when asked 300 M out and just failed to run down the 3rd placegetter.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced in a rearward position 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and kept on fairly but without threatening the placegetters.
Slow to begin and soon recovered to race in midfield or better 2-wide. Ridden along to maintain position at home turn. Failed to quicken when asked 300 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in a prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and responded well but just lost out to the winner in a ding dong finish.
Broke with field from wide draw and soon raced in the rear section around 2-wide to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well from wide draw and niggled along to race in a handy position 3-wide without cover. Commenced to give ground rounding the home turn and tailed out in straight.

Broke with field and ridden along to take up running on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. Ran on well when asked 250 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Slowly away from wide draw and soon raced at the back on rail through to straight. Unable to show much running when asked 250 M out.
Broke fairly and soon settled in midfield around 3-wide with cover through to straight. All out 200 M out but failed to make any impression.
5Ls behind when 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, one-paced.
6Ls off pace with cover when 3-wide at 1100 M, left without cover at 700 M, 4Ls down worse than midfield when 6-wide into home straight, beaten at 300 M.
7Ls behind on fence in rear at 1200 M, under pressure in rear at 500 M, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
Slow away, 2-wide and 1L off pace at 1100 M, wider at 600 M when under pressure, 3Ls down in 6th at home bend, faded out.
Had the run of the race in 3rd from 1200 M to 500 M when 2Ls off speed on fence, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd on straightening, every chance but failed to quicken up.
4-wide without cover at 1300 M, 5Ls behind when 3-wide with cover at 1100 M, 5-wide and under pressure entering straight when 5Ls down in rear, soon well beaten.
3-wide no cover 4Ls back in 4th at 1100 M, under pressure to keep up at 600 M, no impression in straight.
Slow start, 4Ls behind when 2-wide in 5th at 1100 M, 3-wide off home turn, ran on fairly for a place.
4Ls back on fence in 6th at 1100 M, travelled well 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, ran on for pressure to lead on line.
Led on fence at 1200 M by 1L, 2Ls clear at 800 M, 1L clear off home turn and at 200 M, grabbed right on the line.
Slowly away, 5Ls off pace in 9th on fence at 1100 M, 3Ls back in 6th off home turn, made steady late ground without troubling principals.
Always widest (4-wide) on the track about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, gone 300 M out.
Missed the start and trailed field. Moved past a few fading runners home turn and switched out wide on straightening. Closed the race off fairly and made up ground in the closing stages.
Out in a forward position early. Steadily dropped back and raced 3-wide at midfield back straight. Faded after 600 M and tailed out.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward spot. Improved to race at midfield back straight. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Caught wide entering 1000 M turn. Remained racing wide and without cover in a rearward position until home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Outpaced early stages and settled in a rearward position. Trailed field rounding home turn and ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped fairly and settled in a prominent position behind the leader. Ridden along to keep pace 600 M and switched out on straightening. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped well. No more than a length off the pace. Improved to race alongside the leader after 800 M and kept pace into home straight. Weakened final 300 M.

Dropped back from widest draw. Shifted to the fence after entering back straight and settled behind midfield. Saved ground at home turn and reached within 3Ls of the leader at 400 M. Kept on well to be closest at finish.
Hard ridden out of the gates to a forward position. Checked at 1000 M and remained within a length of the leader back straight. Lacked a response on straightening and weakened.

Ridden along out of the gates but was outpaced. Settled at midfield back straight. Made the home turn in a 4-wide position and closed to within 3Ls of the leader at 400 M. Found no extra in home straight.
Best out and raced into the lead. Maintained a slight advantage on straightening. Shook off rival when pressured 300 M and held onto a comfortable margin to the finish.
3 back on fence 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 5th from 1100 M to home turn, failed to kick and always held.
Keen early, 2-wide and 8Ls last at 1100 M, toiling in rear entering straight, no chance.
5Ls behind and 3-wide without cover in 8th at 1100 M, no cover down backstretch when worse than midfield, struggling turning for home, soon eased down.
2-wide and 1L behind in 2nd from 1100 M to 500 M, 2Ls back in 4th off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
Box-seated on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1100 M to home straight, quickened up to lead 150 M out, pushed out.
Bounded at start and lost ground, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 3-wide no cover at 600 M and 1L down in 2nd at home turn, stayed on fairly and narrowly missed 2nd.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield when 2-wide through to home straight, very one-paced from then on.

3-wide without cover when 6Ls off pace worse than midfield at 1100 M, 4-wide no cover down the back, 7-wide (widest) and all out entering straight when well behind, soon eased down. (Significant back pain.)
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, wider at 600 M and 4-wide into homestretch when 5Ls back in 7th, made some late headway without looking like winning.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L until home straight, headed at 150 M, all out to cling onto 2nd.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls behind on fence towards rear at 1000 M, 5Ls down but 6-wide on straightening, ran on fairly well late, never nearer.
Didn't break well, 6Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1100 M, 5Ls behind off home turn, made some good late ground on fence and only just missed the frame.
Last. Made up some late ground closing stages.
In the front halfway. Dropped back steadily final 400 M.
Behind midfield. No progress.
Began awkwardly, soon picked up to a prominent position. Joined the lead 400 M out. Kept on well to take command closing stages.
In touch to 400 M. Weakened.
About 6th to 400 M where he improved a bit to 5th. Weakened inside 200 M.
Well there. Was in the leading pair 400 M out. Held on but failed to contain the winner closing stages.
Raced 9th to 350 M. Stayed on to take 5th but found no extra closing stages.
Began awkwardly, raced in midfield early. Improved steadily to 3rd halfway. Unable to match speed with the first pair for a remote 3rd.
Mainly 7th. Made ground while hanging in 400 M. Obtained 4th near 200 M.
Well there. Hit front into straight. Swamped over 200 M out.
Always struggling at the back.
Mainly in prominent position. 3rd behind leaders entering straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Midfield to straight. Weakened. (Lame.)
Close up. Hit front over 200 M out. Held on under pressure to the line.
Raced wide throughout. Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never far off to straight. Weakened.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Made some impression down inner of straight. (Blood in trachea.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Given reminders to muster pace early, improving steadily to midfield rounding home bend. Sustained steady headway to the line to be nearest at finish.
Led to straight. Weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield on outside. 3-wide final turn. Stayed on a bit final 300 M.
In touch early. Dropped back steadily from 3rd 1200 M to midfield on straightening. Weakened.
2nd last. Ran past a couple of beaten runners in straight.
Towards rear soon after start. Made ground on outside from early straight. One-paced closing stages.
In touch but wide. 3-wide final turn. Faded.
Midfield or better. Made some progress home bend to be 5th 400 M. Kept on steadily in straight.
Led field soon after start. Had 2Ls advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made ground on inside in straight, just missed 2nd narrowly.
Always behind midfield.
Towards rear early, improved steadily on inside to be 5th. 2.5Ls 3rd 400 M, responded well to take control 200 M. Won going away.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Within 2Ls behind final turn. Kept on but failed to match speed with the winner final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Last to straight. Made up good ground on outside passing 300 M. (Lame.) (Mucus.)
Prominent. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled in rear of midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily down centre of track to just get up on line.
Settled in midfield. Made moderate headway in straight without threatening.
Midfield. Dropped out rounding home bend.
Well back. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Settled just off the pace. Behind leader turning in. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Well there to straight. Gradually weakened.
Close up and caught wide from poor draw early. Taken back to last few before home bend. Made up good ground under pressure in straight.
Held slender advantage in the centre of back straight. Crossed to rails approaching home bend. Kicked some 2.5Ls clear inside 200 M but collared close to home.
Towards rear most of way. Made no show in straight.
In last few. No room behind runners upon straightening. Ran home one pace. (Saddle shifted.)
Close up early. Dropped back to forward of midfield coming out of back straight. Weakened further in straight.
Wide throughout. Midfield far side. Widest runner turning in and dropped towards rear. Soon renewed effort and ran on steadily to the line.
Slow to begin and dropped to the back on inner. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish when asked 400 M out.

Broke fairly and soon raced in handy position 3 wide. Near 1600 M was steadied and dropped to better than midfield 2 wide. Pushed along to maintain position at home turn and only ran on evenly in straight.

Soon raced in a forward position whilst proving very difficult to settle. Shortly after the 1000 M strided forward to join the leader. Stayed one pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Broke best from widest and pushed along to race outside the leader. Near the 1000 M dropped back to 3rd place and stayed there till straightening. Failed to respond when asked 400 M out and steadily faded therafter.
Soon raced in forward position on rail whilst proving difficult to settle and near the 1700 M was crowded for room. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and faded steadily inside final 200 M.

Broke well from wide gate and niggled along to race in a forward position 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and plugged on gamely but just missed out on the placing by a short margin.
Broke with field and pushed along to take narrow lead on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but was headed shortly after the 200 M and just failed to hold onto 3rd.

Jumped well from wide draw and soon raced in a handy position 3 to 4 wide without cover through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out to take lead after 200 M and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter.
Broke with field and steadily settled midfield around 2 wide. Near the 700 M steadied when close to heels. Under pressure 350 M out but was unable to quicken and kept on same pace to the line.
Soon eased to the rear section around 2 wide. Made little headway from the outside rounding the home turn. Unable to show much impression in home straight.

Broke fairly and soon settled in a rearward position 2 wide. Steadily switched to the outside at home turn to obtain clear running. Ran on well when asked 400 M out but just failed to run down the winner.

Soon settled in midfield or worse position. After passing the winning post first time was steadied when crowded for room. Stayed in similar position to home straight, only ran on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Slowly away and soon raced in a rearward position on rail. Switched out and made little headway rounding the home bend. Responded quite well when asked 350 M out to grab 3rd place near the line.

Soon raced in midfield or better on rail whilst racing keenly and near the 1600 M was checked away from heels. Stayed in similar position to straight but failed to show any impression when asked 400 M out.
3-back the fence 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, 2-wide and same margin back in midfield off home turn, quickened up nicely to lead 150 M out, pushed out.
8Ls behind when 2-wide in 13th at 1200 M, still towards rear when 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening, posed no danger to principals.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight entrance, soon faded.
7Ls behind when 2-wide at 1200 M, worse than midfield still when 4-wide entering straight, very weak thereafter.
Slowly away, 8Ls behind in 12th on fence at 1200 M, under pressure when 3-wide and 6Ls last entering homestretch, always outpaced.
2-wide and between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in 4th or 5th from 1200 M to home turn, very one-paced from then on.
4Ls off speed in 8th at 1200 M, no better off making home turn, ran on fairly well late for a place.
Very ungainly action while box-seating on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, hard pressed to hold this position at final bend, weakened right out.
Led out 2-wide by a neck at 1200 M, same margin clear turning for home, headed by winner at 150 M, comfortably held onto 2nd.
3-wide without cover when a neck behind in 2nd at 1200 M, 2-wide and about half a length 2nd from 800 M to home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, weakened close home.
6Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M when 2-wide, a little closer turning for home and 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, one- paced closing stages.
5Ls off speed when 3-wide in 9th at 1200 M, 4-wide no cover from 800 M to home straight when 3Ls down in midfield, all out when 3Ls back in 5th at 200 M, dropped away quickly.
