3-wide with cover when 4Ls behind in 7th at 1200 M, similarly placed off home turn but held up until 150 M out when switching inside into clear running, closed off okay but much too late.
Began very awkwardly and lost significant ground. Detached throughout and was never in contention. (Blood in trachea.)
Began fairly and dropped steadily back to rear section. Switched wide on straightening and steadily made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Niggled along and kept within 3Ls of the pace. Unable to quicken in the straight and stayed on same pace to line.
Outpaced at the start and settled wide at midfield. Dropped further back after 800 M. Caught widest home turn and made no impression in the straight.
Niggled along and took the lead 1000 M. Maintained a narrow advantage near 200 M but unable to sustain effort to line.
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position until home straight. Made a nice rally to be closest at finish.
Settled at midfield. Closed to within 2Ls of the leaders on straightening. Quickened to challenge for the lead at 200 M. Drew clear in the final 100 M.
Outpaced early, raced in rear section and was niggled along to keep pace. Remained near the back on straightening and finished off with a good rally.
Best out from widest draw and led in the early stages. Lost the lead after 1000 M but kept alongside the leader until home straight. Disputed lead 300 M but weakened final stages.
Missed the jump and raced in rear section. Behind midfield at the home turn and was 4 to 5Ls down on straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
Wide without cover midfield early, then was ridden forward to settle behind the pace. Started to lose ground on straightening and finished tailed out. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced along the fence at midfield. Kept on well in the straight.
Jumped well and raced among leaders early. Took a sit and settled behind the leaders 1200 M. Quickened on straigh- tening and fought for the lead at 200 M. Unable to match winner's pace final stages.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Unable to pick up in the straight and weakened final 200 M.
2Ls behind when 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and same entering straight, led 200 M out, headed close home by winner and joined for 2nd on line.
Slowest away, switched to fence from wide gate and 6Ls behind in 9th at 1100 M, steadied at 600 M and 4Ls back in midfield on straightening, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
8Ls off pace when 2-wide in rear at 1100 M, 5-wide (widest of all) when 6Ls last, ran on past some tired rivals late, nearest at finish.
Led by 1L on fence from 1200 M to home straight, headed at 200 M but rallied well and only just missed out on a place.
6-wide passing post for 1st time, 3-wide and 6Ls behind in 10th at 1100 M, 4-wide entering straight when 5Ls behind and worse than midfield, no impression.
8Ls last on fence at 1000 M, driven along to take closer order from 800 M to home straight when 5Ls back in mid- division, soon faded.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide back in 7th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in midfield taking home turn, one-paced thereafter.
5Ls back in 9th when 2-wide at 1100 M, in rear when 6Ls behind entering straight, made some moderate late headway.
Always 4-wide without cover, about 3Ls back in 5th at 1100 M, same entering straight but still wide, beaten over 300 M out.
3-back the fence when 4Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 5th entering home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well to get up close home.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, closer when 3-wide in 3rd turning for home, quickly dropped out. (Lame.)
7Ls behind when 2-wide in 11th at 1100 M, 5Ls behind towards rear entering straight, made some minor late ground.
2Ls behind on fence in box-seat position in 3rd or so through to home straight, stayed on well on fence to get up for joint-second on the line.
3Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 6th at 1100 M, lost position on the circle and over 5Ls behind into homestretch, faded out further.
About 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence in midfield from 1000 M to home straight, one-paced on the run-in.
7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, 3-wide on straightening when 5Ls behind towards rear, failed to quicken up.
3-wide without cover when 1L off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, 2-wide from 600 M and under 1L behind entering home straight, weakened inside final 200 M.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1000 M to homestretch and same at 200 M, couldn't quicken up late on.
Half a length down in 2nd out 2-wide at 1000 M, led just before the entrance to home straight, 1L clear at 200 M, stayed on well for pressure to hang on by a head on the line.
Pressed on to lead by 1L at 1200 M, headed before home turn and swamped at top of home straight.
4Ls off speed in midfield when 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, closer entering home straight, always held by principals.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls behind in 12th at 1000 M, hung out on circle and 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 4Ls down worse than midfield, no impression.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th from 1000 M to home straight, soon faded out.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1000 M, 4Ls back in midfield entering straight, kept on at same pace thereafter.
Checked when 8Ls off speed on fence in 11th at 1000 M, 6Ls behind in last off home turn, never dangerous.
3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 4-wide turning for home when over 2Ls down in midfield, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Slowest away, 9Ls off pace in rear on fence at 1000 M, 4-wide on straightening when 4Ls down and worse than midfield, ran on very strongly but post came a shade too soon.
Slowly away, 6Ls behind on fence in 8th at 1000 M, 5Ls down towards rear turning for home, never troubled leaders.
Towards rear. Made up good ground on outside passing 300 M.
Towards rear. Improved a bit to just behind midfield home bend. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Took lead passing 1600 M. Held 1L advantage to 100 M. Failed to resist winner's challenge closing stages.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Improved a bit halfway to be just behind midfield. Found no clear run passing 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Towards rear early, improved steadily to be 3rd 1500 M. Kept on until failing to hold place final 250 M.
Jumped well and in the front briefly, remained prominent. 1L 2nd from 1200 M. Ran on well inside 200 M to prevail near finish.
Better than midfield. 3Ls 5th rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Stayed on closing stages.
In touch. 3Ls 4th from 1200 M. Weakened steadily soon after straightening.
Always at the back. (Mucus.)
2nd last to 250 M. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Made some minor progress inside 200 M.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be in touch. Dropped back to 6th from 1200 M. Weakened 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Midfield. Kept on quite well inside 250 M.
3-wide behind midfield. Made no show in straight. (Mucus.)
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Pushed along on inside to become 3rd approaching 800 M. Kept on steadily in straight.
Bounded and lost ground at start, soon picked up some ground in midfield. Kept on but found no extra inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Improved a bit to 4th passing the Rock. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Was 2nd last before recovering some ground inside 150 M.
Led briefly from widest draw, then sat outside leader (winner) but failed quicken to challenge final 200 M.
Led field soon after start. Kept on well to win readily.
Ridden along to be better than midfield. 5th passing the Rock. One-paced after.
Always at the back.
Towards rear. Ran on well past beaten horses closing stages.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to narrowly miss 2nd.
Always at the back.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Slowly away. Trailed the field before taking closer order halfway out. Ran on steadily from towards rear into straight without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Midfield to halfway. Towards rear rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Broke well. Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to reach 2nd inside 200 M.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Gradually took up running from poor draw. Went clear upon straightening to win unchallenged.
Towards rear early. Effort far side. Weakened from midfield into straight.
Soon 2nd from widest draw. Within 1L behind lead before joining near 350 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Towards rear soon after start.
In touch early, dropped back to 6th when checked passing winning post first time. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Prominent, 2Ls 3rd 1200 M. Was steadied twice when crowded after straightening. Kept on when in clear inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to 6th final turn. Made ground steadily in straight.
Prominent. 3Ls 4th far side. Ran on in straight to take lead near 100 M. Just beaten narrowly near finish.
Slowly away, never in contention.
2nd last to 600 M where he became the last. Made up good ground inside 150 M.
Behind midfield and always 3-wide. Weakened on straightening.
Soon led. Was headed early straight. Faded from 3rd final 150 M.
Slowly away, soon in midfield. 5Ls 5th 1200 M. Remained in similar position until running on steadily passing 200 M to grab victory near finish.
Midfield. Gave some ground towards the rear 1200 M. Made ground moderately in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on well down inner of straight to fail narrowly.
Never better than midfield. Ran on one-paced.
Midfield to straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Well back, with short-lived effort turning in.
Chased leader to straight. Faded gradually under pressure.
Jumped best and quickly crossed to rails to lead. Just held on under pressure closing stages.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Midfield to straight. Made modest late headway under pressure closing stages.
Always in last few.
Tailed off throughout. (Irregular heart beat.)
Always thereabouts. Failed to quicken under pressure to challenge in straight.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out and just missed the placing by a narrow margin.

Best out and pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail to straight. Near the 250 M whilst running on quite well was checked when disappointed for running. Continued to run on fairly when running was obtained at 200 M.
Raced towards the rear around 2-wide through to straight. Failed to show any running when asked 250 M out.

Checked shortly after the start when crowded for room. Dropped to the rear position on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out but over the final 100 M was not able to see clear daylight.

Broke with field from wide draw and soon raced around 1/2L off leader. Pushed along and gained slender lead rounding the home turn. Kept on fairly in straight but was headed near 200 M and overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.
Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and plugged on fairly to the line without threatening.

Tardy start from wide draw and soon settled at the rear section on inner through to straight. Switched to the outside in the straight and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 3rd on the line.
Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield or worse around 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M but the winning post come too soon.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better around 2-wide. Hung in at home turn and switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Only ran on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Broke well and pushed along to take up running on rail with around 1/2L advantage. Headed near the 450 M, found nothing in straight and dropped out inside final 200 M.

Jumped with field from widest and soon settled in the rear section 3-wide without cover. Went forward down back straight to be 1/2L off leader on straightening. Ran on well in home straight to win convincingly.
Began fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2-wide. Pushed along to maintain position at home bend, no extra in straight and faded steadily inside final 200 M.
Hindered slightly at 1300 M, 7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in midfield when 3-wide on straightening, no acceleration.
Inconvenienced at 1300 M, 5Ls off speed when 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, 4Ls back in 6th on straightening, didn't trouble leaders.
Unbalanced early and checked when bumped at 1300 M, 5Ls off pace on fence at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 5th at home turn when under pressure, rider lost whip at 300 M but never dangerous.
In 2nd out 2-wide and 1L off pace from 1200 M to home straight, outpaced when over a length 3rd but rallied well to claim 2nd on line.
Bounded exiting gates and slow away, 8Ls behind when 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 6Ls behind in same position entering stretch out 3-deep, never likely.
Slow away and switched to fence in rear between 8Ls and 10Ls off pace until final bend, made a little late ground past beaten rivals.
7Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 7th entering straight, ran on strongly late without troubling principals.
10Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, pressed on out 3-wide without cover at 700 M to be 4-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 6Ls down in 9th, no impression and eased final 200 M.
Had the run of the race on fence 1L off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, every chance when half a length 2nd at 200 M, failed to follow through.
8Ls back 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, 7Ls down one from rear off home turn, eased close home when well beaten.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 4th off home turn, always held.
Soon led on fence, clear by 1L from 1200 M to home straight entrance, half a length to the good at 200 M, all out to hang on.
3-wide and no more than 3Ls off the leaders. Carried wider making the home turn and weakened on straightening.
Began well and steadily dropped back to race behind midfield. Made up some ground in the straight.
Jumped a bit slow and was niggled along to be at midfield. 3Ls down at the 400 M and continued well in the straight. Ran into traffic at 200 M but stayed on well thereafter.
Jumped well and maintained a narrow lead until the 600 M. Stayed within a length of the leader home turn but dropped out shortly after straightening.

Raced into a forward position and was never more than 1/2L off the lead. Moved into the lead at 600 M and took a length's advantage into the straight. Stayed on well but failed to hold off principals final 100 M.

Ridden along at midfield early stages. Checked at 800 M and dropped to a rearward position. Made a ground saving trip along the rails at home turn to reach within 4Ls of the lead on straightening. Stayed on same pace thereafter.
Settled in a rearward position. Near the back on entering home straight. Ran on fairly thereafter.
Raced 3-wide in a rearward position. Ridden along in a wide position at the home turn and made a bit of ground. Closed the race off fairly.
Raced in a rearward position and trailed field into the straight. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners in the straight.
Settled at midfield until home straight. Switched out on straightening, quickened and opened a clear advantage final 100 M.
Missed the kick slightly and was pushed along to be close to the pace. Prominent position behind the leader home turn and kept on well closing stages to grab a minor placing.
Ridden along out of the gates and raced behind the leaders in 3rd place. Contended for the lead at 200 M but failed to match winner's pace final 100 M.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th from 1100 M to home straight when under strong pressure, bumped when beaten 300 M out.
9Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, under pressure and only marginally better-placed turning for home, no threat.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 6th and 4-wide (widest of all) on straightening, no impression.
Jumped very slowly and sideways, didn't want to know about the race, never a factor.
3-back the fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 4th at home turn, every chance at 300 M but no extra inside final 200 M.
Box-seated on fence in 3Ls about 2Ls off speed until home straight, picked up nicely to hit front 250 M out, always in charge.
Soon led, never clear by more than half a length and joined from 500 M to home straight, headed 250 M out and faded fast.
3-wide without cover when 8Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M, still worse than midfield when 6Ls behind at final bend, made some minor ground.
6Ls off pace in 7th on fence at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn when 3-wide, soon outpaced.
9Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1100 M, 5Ls back in 7th at home turn when slightly held up, switched inside and ran on well for 2nd though never likely to catch winner.
7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, niggled along to lie up 7Ls off speed at 700 M, never a factor.
About half a length behind in 2nd from 1200 M to 500 M when disputing lead, headed about 250 M out and faded out.
Towards rear. Made up good ground on outside final 400 M.
Soon last. 2nd last rounding home bend until early straight. Made up some ground inside 400 M.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on until failing to hold place 250 M out.
Well there early from widest draw, soon in 6th. Moved up from 3-wide without cover at 1000 M to be 1L 2nd 800 M. Kept on until faded out of contention 300 M.
Midfield. Made slight progress turning for home. Found not much room early straight. Kept on moderately when in clear 250 M.
Slightly behind midfield and was 4-wide but with cover. Kept on well in straight to just miss 2nd at finish.
Midfield and then behind. Failed to respond when given reminders early straight.
Better than midfield. 3Ls 5th to 500 M. Made good progress final turn to be 2nd early straight. One-paced inside 200 M.
Pushed along early to soon be 3rd. Weakened steadily passing 300 M.
Led field to 100 M. Failed to match speed with winner but just held on for 2nd.
Towards rear. Slightly hampered final turn. Ran on well from 8th 400 M to assert authority final 100 M. Won well.
Slow into stride, then ridden along to be in touch. Dropped back to midfield rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Near rear, last approaching 1000 M. Recovered some ground on outside final 200 M.
Midfield throughout. Just kept on at the one pace in straight.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in forward of midfield. Did not find much room from 5th on rails into straight. One-paced when obtained clear run final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Ran on down centre of straight, doing best work at finish.
Well there. Took up running coming out of back straight. Caught when no extra nearing finish.
Restrained mainly just off the pace. Gradually weakened from 2nd into straight.
Wide in midfield to halfway. Weakened.
Settled towards rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Steadied for a stride shortly after straightening. Produced some late impression final 200 M.
Never far off. Gained upper hand inside final 100 M.
Close up far side. Yielded ground from home bend.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled wide in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Never in contention. Dropped out rounding home bend.
Near rear, last from 400 M. Made up good ground 200 M out to just miss a minor placing.
Pushed along from outside to take lead near 900 M. Weakened when headed 100 M.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Ran on well from outside, just failing to catch the winner.
Led field to 900 M, then remained within 2Ls behind lead to 150 M. Found no extra.
Slightly behind midfield. Weakened in straight.
Towards rear to 400 M. Ran on while shifting in passing 200 M to cause interference. Took lead 100 M. Kept on but shifted out closing stages.
In touch. Failed to quicken from 5th early straight.
Midfield to 350 M. Faded.
Towards rear. Made ground from 9th 400 M but met interference near 100 M. Kept on without threatening thereafter.
Held 3rd to 200 M out. Kept on without quickening.
Mainly 4th or 5th. Kept on early straight but found no extra inside 200 M.
Settled within striking distance. Hit front shortly after straightening. Hung on well under pressure.
Always towards rear.
Settled wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow out. Settled in rear 3-wide. Attempted to circle field home bend. Made steady headway from last into straight without threatening.
Led field to straight. Swamped for a placing over 200 M out.
Settled in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Began well. Crossed to lead from high draw gradually. Settled just off the pace rounding home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened to hold some chance early in straight, but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Never been with a chance. (Mildly distressed.)
Began awkwardly. Settled in rear. Taken to wide position turning in. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Never nearer. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Never far off. Made some headway under pressure early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Found nothing.
Settled in midfield. Ran on between runners down straight to be nearest at finish.
Crowded for room shortly after the jump and raced towards the rear 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but was only able to run on evenly to the line.
Broke with field and soon raced in midfield or worse around 2 wide through to straight. Obtained clear running near the 250 m and charged home to snatch victory over the concluding stages.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in a handy position around 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and ran on well but was unable to fend off late challenge from winner to settle for 2nd.
Ridden along to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Dropped out very quickly shortly after the 400 M.

Slowly away from wide draw and raced at the back around 3 wide with cover. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Best out from wide draw but unable to muster speed to race in a rearward position. Near the 800 M become unbalanced and blundered when crowded for room. Failed to show any running in straight.
Slowly away and raced at the rear section on rail through to straight. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to miss 3rd place by a narrow margin.
Jumped with field and soon raced in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and steadily faded over the final 200 M.
Began well from wide draw and pushed along to race in midfield or worse around 4 wide without cover to straight. All out 350 M out but only able to plug on evenly to the line.
Began well and steadily settled in midfield around 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-paced inside final 100 M.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Unable to show much impression when asked 400 M out.
Broke well from wide draw and ridden along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and slightly weakened inside final 200 M.

Jumped well from widest and ridden along to take up running on rail from 1100 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Plugged on fairly when asked 400 M out but was headed near the 200 M and became one-pace thereafter.

Shortly after the start was crowded for room and raced at the rear section 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 250 M to grab 3rd place near the line.
3Ls down in 6th when 3-wide with cover at 800 M, keen at 700 M and 4-wide into straight when 3Ls down in midfield, faded out.
Had the box-seat run 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th or so from 1000 M to home turn, failed to quicken up.
Switched from widest gate to fence early, about 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield until straightening for home, never loomed a threat.
3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, held up from 400 M to 200 M, much too late once clear.
Slow away and scrubbed along when 8Ls last at 1100 M, 5Ls off pace in 13th when 4-wide taking home turn, made some minor late ground.
Slowly away, niggled along at 1000 M when 8Ls off pace in rear, never got much closer.
Disputed early lead out 2-wide, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, under pressure to remain 2Ls down in 2nd at home turn, faded out.
Led by a neck on fence at 1000 M, 1L clear at 800 M and about 2Ls ahead off home turn, grabbed by winner 50 M out, no extra.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield with cover until 700 M when 4-deep without cover, 5-wide (widest) of all on straigh- tening, ran on fairly well but didn't trouble leaders.
Worse than midfield when 6Ls off pace with cover at 800 M, 4-wide and 4Ls down in 10th entering straight, ran on well but never likely to match quinella pair.
Prominent but 5-wide without cover early, 3-wide without cover from 1000 M to home straight when about 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th, no impression from top of home straight.
2-wide about 3Ls off pace in 5th through to home straight, held up from 400 M to 200 M when bumped, failed to kick when clear 150 M out but too late in any case.
Slowly away, about 4Ls off pace in midfield with cover from 800 M to home straight, stayed on fairly well without troubling principals.
With cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace slightly worse than midfield until turning for home out 3-wide, picked up well to lead at 50 M, ran on strongly.
Off slowly and trailed field until straightening. Made a nice rally in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and settled within 3Ls of the pace in 3rd at 1200 M. Closed to within a length of the leader on straightening and easily opened up a clear advantage at 200 M.
Raced behind leaders early stages. Settled 2-wide at midfield after 1200 M. Made up a bit of ground home turn but only kept on same pace in the straight.
Sluggish start and was ridden hard to make up ground. Settled on fence at midfield after 1200 M. Commenced to weaken at the home turn and finished tailed out.
Had the early lead. Stayed a length off the lead in 2-wide position middle stages. Prominent position behind leader into home straight but unable to find extra thereafter.
Took the lead at 1300 M and held a 2L advantage into home straight. Unable to sustain effort and was swamped inside 300 M.
Dropped back to race 3-wide in a rearward position and maintained similar position into home straight. Closed the race off fairly.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Crept a bit closer at home turn. Continued steadily in the straight before being held up for some distance after 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Jumped well and was allowed to drop back and settle in a rearward position. Checked and remained near the back on straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Slowly away and settled on fence behind midfield. Carried back by a weakening runner 600 M and was checked and near the back on straightening. Closed the race off with a strong rally.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Niggled along in a 3-wide position home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Led by 1L on fence at 1400 M, never clear by more than 1L down backstretch and only a neck clear at home straight entrance, no extra when headed at 300 M and lost a place home.
Checked at 1700 M, 7Ls off pace in 11th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 3-wide into straight when 5Ls down in 11th, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no chance with winner but still stayed on well.
Caught 4-wide without cover 1800 M out, pressed on to lie 1L off pace out 2-wide from 1300 M to 500 M out, a neck down in 2nd at home straight entrance, faded steadily inside final 300 M.
Keen early, 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, hard pressed to lie up when over 2Ls down in 4th turning for home, soon beaten.
Checked at 1600 M, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1300 M, steadied at 600 M and under pressure when 2-wide into home straight and 2Ls down in 5th, soon swamped.
Checked at 1400 M and 4-back the fence 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 2-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in midfield, didn't trouble leaders but still stayed on fairly.
8Ls off pace in 13th when 2-wide at 1200 M, driven along to take closer order at 500 M, 6Ls down in 12th when 4-wide off home turn, no threat and eased late.
3-back on fence when 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, similarly placed entering straight, no impression thereafter.
Settled 6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, always had cover, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls off pace in midfield, failed to pick up and always well held by principals.
Checked at 1400 M and 2-wide in 8th about 5Ls off speed at 1200 M, bumped twice into straight when 3Ls down in midfield, stayed on well to nick a place close home.
Always worse than midfield, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1200 M when on fence, 7Ls down in 13th entering straight, no impression.
Settled 4Ls off pace in 6th when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, pressed on from 600 M to be 1L down in 3rd out 4-wide into stretch, led 300 M out, pulled clear, always in command.
Never better than midfield, slowly away and 9Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 7Ls down in rear off home turn, made some minor late ground past beaten rivals down centre of track.
Led early on, had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off pace at 1300 M, struggling to hold this position at 600 M, faded from top of home straight.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, forced 4-wide entering straight when over 2Ls down in midfield, soon no danger.
3-wide without cover 1L off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, still 1L down in 3rd on straightening and all out when 2Ls back in 4th at 200 M, weakened close home.
6Ls off pace 4-back on fence in 10th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 10th entering straight, burst from pack at 300 M to run on well for 2nd, had little hope with winner, however.
Had the run of the race in 4th about 2Ls off speed on fence from 1200 M to home straight, always outpaced from then on.
Crowded at start, 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, 3-wide on straightening when over 2Ls down in midfield, one-paced on the run-in.
2-wide and 1L behind pace in 2nd from 1200 M to 500 M, led over 300 M out, headed at 200 M and weakened close home, much improved.
Soon led on fence but tended to hang in early, never clear by more than 1L until 500 M, headed at top of home straight and one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, under pressure entering straight when 5Ls down in 12th, posing little threat to principals when checked at 100 M.
Slowly away, 4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, 3Ls off pace and 3-wide in midfield taking final bend, failed to quicken up.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover when 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, challenging when 4-wide and 3Ls off pace in 8th entering straight, 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, no extra.
7Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 12th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 12th entering straight when 4-wide, finished off tamely down centre of track.
Slowest away, 10Ls last at 1200 M, still in rear and 8Ls off pace off home turn, no impression down centre of track and eased close home.
Dropped out 8Ls off pace one from rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down and 2-wide in 13th on straightening, ran on very strongly down centre of track for a place close home, vastly improved.
Settled 3-back the fence 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 5th entering straight, picked up well to lead at 200 M, ran on well, comfortably.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress inside 300 M.
Prominent from widest draw, soon settled in midfield. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. 5-wide home turn. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Near rear. Made ground moderately in straight.
Lost ground at start, soon recovered to be in touch. 3rd from 800 M. Found no extra final 200 M.
Last. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 5th 1000 M. Weakened steadily 300 M out.
In touch early, dropped back steadily towards the rear. Made ground moderately 250 M out.
Led field soon after start. Held on very well final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made progress final turn to be 8th 400 M. Continued to make ground while momentarily steadied passing 200 M. Kept on.
Behind midfield. Faded in straight. (Right fore fetlock inflammed.)
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back steadily on straightening.
Soon prominent. 1L 2nd 1200 M. Attempted to tackle the winner early straight. Failed quicken to challenge final 200 M.
In touch. 2Ls 3rd approaching 1000 M. 4th 800 M. Kept on under pressure until one-paced final 200 M.
Sat outside leader (winner) and was 2Ls behind final turn. Lost 2nd close home.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on same pace throughout.
Near rear from a wide draw. Made up some ground in straight.
Prominent briefly, soon in midfield or behind. Failed to quicken from 7th final turn.
Towards rear throughout.
Made all. Won going away.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from 9th at 400 M.
Never a factor.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Dropped out final 250 M.
Slowly away, ridden forward to be 3rd approaching 1000 M. Kept on when under pressure from home turn. Found no extra final 200 M.
Better than midfield. 4Ls 4th final turn. Kept on steadily but just lost a minor placing.
Slowly away, rear early. Soon recovered some ground to be midfield. 5th final turn. Kept on steadily to claim 2nd close home.
Virtually make all. Went clear in straight to win unchallenged.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Found nothing.
In forward of midfield when stumbled and lost position 1200 M out. Towards rear rounding home bend and into straight. Kept on same pace.
Wide in prominent position to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled outside leader. Held every chance upon straightening but soon found nothing.
Towards rear. Inconvenienced 1200 M out. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Wide towards rear. Found nothing in straight. (Mucus in trachea.)
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Very slowly away. Trailed the field throughout.
Always prominent. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Made steady headway without threatening.
Slow out. Soon picked up to rear of midfield, but badly hampered 1200 M out. Kept on same pace from rear of midfield into straight.
Led. Was taken over from 1000 M to 800 M where he regained some advantage. Led or in the leading pair until gaining clear advantage inside 200 M.
Near rear. Made up some ground inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon last. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
In touch. 3rd 1000 M. Dropped back a bit to 5th passing 800 M. 4th final turn. Failed to quicken.
Near rear. Crept closer to 8th final turn. Ran on well final 200 M for a minor placing.
In touch. 2Ls 3rd 400 M. Ran on steadily but failed to threaten the winner.
2nd early. Took over 1000 M to 800 M where he was again in 2nd. Joined the leader (winner) near 500 M until finding no extra 250 M out.
Unbalanced from start, near rear early. Moved up to become midfield and remained in similar position before finding no extra 200 M out.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back steadily from home bend.
Midfield early from widest draw, soon moved up to be 3rd near 800 M. Dropped back steadily from 5th 400 M.
Never better than midfield. Went past beaten horses closing stages.
With leaders far side. Commenced to give ground coming out of back straight. Dropped out from midfield after turning home.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Midfield early, dropping out to rear of field approaching home bend. (Blood in trachea.)
Behind midfield to straight. Made up good ground along rails down straight to do best work at finish.
Prominent into straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Well there. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out. Hung on well under pressure.
Disputed lead far side. Well there turning in. Soon dropped out under pressure.
Led or disputed lead. Kicked 1L clear under pressure upon straightening. Overhauled over 200 M out.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Settled in midfield. Not much room early in straight. Ran on steadily inside final 300 M without threatening.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.

Broke with field and steadily settled in worse than midfield 2-wide. Steadily switched to obtain clear running on straightening. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish when asked 400 M out.
Broke well and soon settled in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to worse than midfield on inner through to straight. Kept on fairly to the line without threatening when asked 400 M.
Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield 3-wide. Ridden along to maintain position rounding the home bend. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Slowly away and raced at the tail on rail through to straight. Steadily switched to the outside to obtain clear running. All out 300 M out and crashed home inside final 200 M to win impressively.

Jumped well from wide gate and pushed along to race in better than midfield 3-wide without cover through to straight. Only kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and slightly weakened inside final 200 M.

Broke well from widest and ridden along to take a narrow lead 2-wide through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but was headed near the 250 M and outpaced by placegetters inside final 200 M.

From a wide draw steadily eased to the rear section closer to the rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and only ran past several beaten runners.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out but failed to match speed with the winner inside final 100 M to settle for 2nd.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. Edged closer to the leaders rounding the home turn. Ran on well when asked 350 M out but just lost out to 2nd placegetter in a close finish.
Began fairly and pushed along to race around 1/2L off leader on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and gave ground steadily inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in a handy position 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but was unable to quicken and only kept on evenly to the line.
Tardy start and ridden along to race in midfield around 3-wide with cover to straight. Unable to go up a gear when asked 350 M out and only kept on same pace to the line.
From a wide draw was soon eased to a rearward position around 3-wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Slowest away, 10Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 9th entering straight, kept on fairly to nick a place close home.
Switched from wide gate to be 8Ls off pace and 2-wide towards rear at 1200 M, improved steadily to be 4Ls back in 5th on straightening, kept on well to lead final strides.
Awkwardly away, pressed on from wide gate to lead out 2-wide by a neck at 1000 M, never clear by more than 1L, headed at 300 M, one-paced and lost a place close home.
7Ls back in 10th with cover at 1000 M, never got much closer.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 3rd at 1000 M, 1L back in 2nd entering straight, led 300 M out, looked the winner at 200 M, tired and caught final strides.
3Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 1000 M and niggled along, same position and hard ridden turning for home, always outpaced.
Always at least 4-wide no cover in midfield and 5Ls off pace in midfield, further back and labouring turning for home, no impression.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, struggling to hold this position on circle, very weak thereafter.
Always under pressure, 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, struggling to hold this position on circle, gone 300 M out.
Mostly 3-wide no cover, 5Ls off pace in midfield down backstretch, 4-wide on straightening, soon faded.
2-wide and 6Ls worse than midfield at 1000 M, a little closer at home turn in midfield, never looked likely.
Led early on fence, headed at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd entering straight when under pressure, faded markedly.
Fractious in gates, slow away, 9Ls off pace in 13th at 1000 M, plugged on at the one-paced and never the remotest threat.
7Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1000 M, never better than midfield.
Outpaced early stages and trailed field until 500 M. Ran on well in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and stayed 4Ls off the pace in 2nd. Commenced lose touch on straightening and weakened closing stages.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Raced in a 2-wide position behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Ridden along to take the lead at 1000 M. Continued to increase its lead and held a 5Ls advantage on straightening. Faded final 200 M.
Settled towards the rear until straightening. Made up ground steadily until final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden along to race behind midfield. Kept on one pace in the straight.
Settled 3 to 4-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when pressured 500 M and did not quicken in the straight.
Forward position early. 3-wide and 4Ls behind the pace in 4th at 800 M. Switched out on straightening, picked up well and edged clear inside final 200 M.
Allowed to drop back to rear section from widest draw. Last to enter home straight and made no impression thereafter.
Best out and raced in a forward position. Took a sit and settled 3 to 4Ls behind the pace in 3rd at 800 M. Kept on well when pressured but unable to match winner's pace closing stages.

Jumped fairly, outpaced early and settled on fence at midfield early stages. Checked at 800 M and dropped back slightly. Saved ground making the turn and improved steadily in the straight to claim a minor placing.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, always prominent and led 300 M out, hung on gamely.
8Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, 3Ls off pace in 7th when 3-wide entering straight, every chance when 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
Run of the race in 3rd on fence 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, still placed on straightening, folded.
Fractious in gates, tended to hang in, 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, similar position and under pressure entering home straight, no threat.
Had no luck, severely checked at 1200 M back to 7Ls off pace, 6Ls down in 10th entering straight and making progress when checked again at 200 M, eased late.
Slowest away, 9Ls last on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls off pace in 9th turning for home, picked up nicely to be 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well but narrowly missed quinella pair.
Always towards rear and never better than 6Ls off pace.
Soon led, always about 1L clear until home straight, grabbed at 300 M and faded steadily.
4Ls off pace when 3-wide in 5th at 1200m, all out to lie up around home bend, went backwards after turning home.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, every chance but failed to quicken up and swamped 200 M out. (Blood in trachea.)
6Ls back in 7th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 6th on the swing, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, faded close home.
Slowly away, moved up to be just behind midfield. Kept on steadily from 6th 400 M.
Midfield or behind. Shifted out abruptly near 650 M and became badly unbalanced. 7th turning into straight. Kept on final 200 M.
Mainly 4th on inside. Found no extra inside 300 M.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Made some minor recovery from 11th home bend.
Near rear. Moved up steadily from outside to be 6th 800 M. Was bumped and carried wider 650 M. Dropped back there- after.
Made no show.
Better than midfield early, soon raced in behind. 8th final turn, kept on moderately in straight.
In touch. Improved to 3rd passing 1000 M. 1L outside leader final turn. Gained advantage briefly 200 M. Effort not sustained while one-paced closing stages.
Led until raced 2nd or 3rd passing 1000 M. Was 2-1/2Ls 3rd final turn. Kept on well to regain advantage 150 M and won solidly.
Ridden along early from a wide draw to take lead at 1000 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
In touch early, then gave a little ground to race in 5th near 800 M. Ran on well from 350 M to take 2nd closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon ridden to lead. Swamped under pressure over 200 M out. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Settled towards rear. Baulked early in straight. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. Kept on same pace inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran out of room briefly early in straight. Kept on steadily to the line.
Raced wide in midfield. Faded in straight.
Settled towards rear. Baulked for a run early in straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Close up 3-wide. Ran home one-paced inside final 200 M.
Well there. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out. Swamped close to home.
Well back. Finished off race strongly down centre of straight. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Slightly sluggish at start. Soon picked up to midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to claim victory close to home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to narrowly miss first two.
Prominent to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Raced wide in last few. Ran on well down centre of straight to just fail to get up on line.
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly behind midfield. Improved a bit to midfield rounding home bend. One-paced.
Moved up steadily to be better than midfield. Gave some ground to behind midfield home bend. Failed to quicken in straight.
Mainly 4th to straight. 2nd 300 M. Kept on but just failed to obtain a minor placing.
Midfield. Improved on outside to take lead 1000 M. Faded steadily when headed early straight.
Towards rear. 2nd last on inside final turn. Made up good ground 200 M out.
Well there to 1000 M. Dropped back a bit to 5th rounding home bend. Kept on but found no extra passing 200 M.
In touch. Lost ground to behind midfield when checked 1200 M. Recovered some ground on outside rounding home bend. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Midfield from widest draw. Soon dropped back to the rear. Ran on well from outside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field to 1000 M. 2Ls 4th rounding home bend. Regained advantage early straight. Looked like winner but failed to resist winner's late burst when headed close home.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Improved to 2nd 800 M. 4-wide final turn, kept on without quickening.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield early straight. Still 3Ls behind lead 200 M. Ran home strongly to win convincingly close home.
Midfield or slightly better. Weakened in straight.
Led early. Weakening when tightened and unseated rider over 200 M out. (Lame.)
Well back early. Made moderate late progress closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on stoutly under pressure to get up on line.
Never better than midfield.
Soon dropped to the rear.
Well there. Lost touch passing 400 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never far off. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out. Pipped at post.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Always thereabouts. Ran on steadily to hold some chance inside 200 M but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Mainly in forward of midfield to 200 M. Weakened.
Towards rear most of way.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.

Began well from wide draw and pushed along to race around 2Ls off leader on rail. Crept closer to leader at home bend, took lead shortly after 400 M and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Broke with field and steadily settled in midfield or worse around 2 wide. Hung out quite badly at home turn, all out 250 M out and made up ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Slowly away and soon recovered to race in midfield on rail. Switched out rounding the home turn to obtain clear running, unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly from wide draw and pushed along to take lead on rail with a fair margin from the rest. Headed shortly after the 400 M and only able to run on evenly thereafter.
Tardy start from wide gate and ridden along to race in midfield or worse wide without cover in the early stages. Obtained cover down back straight. Kept on same pace to the line.
Ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail. Commenced to give ground rounding the home turn and steadily faded in straight.
On jumping bounded in the air and raced in a rearward position around 3 wide. Hard ridden along at home turn to maintain position, made up steady ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in worse than midfield on rail. Commenced to give ground rounding the home turn and tailed out in straight.
Ridden along to race in midfield around 3 wide without cover through to straight. Unable to show any running when asked 350 M out.

Broke with field and raced in midfield or better around 2 wide. Made steady headway rounding the home turn, ran on well when asked 300 M out but just failed to run down the winner in a ding dong finish.
Soon settled in a rearward position on rail. Near the 1400 M was checked to avoid heels and dropped to the tail. Failed to show much impression in straight.
From the widest draw was immediately eased to the rear but closer to the rail. Pushed along at home bend and made little headway. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in a handy position on inner through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but was unable to fend off challenge by 3rd place- getter to be overhauled in the closing stages.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in a rearward position around 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home straight, still 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, made some late ground.
3-back the fence in mid-division, about 4Ls back home straight, drifted further back.
Prominent about 3Ls back in 5th but without cover until home straight, weakened.
Prominent within 2Ls of speed until 600 M, under pressure to lie up turning for home, faded steadily.
With cover and slightly worse than midfield about 5Ls behind leader through to home turn, made some good late ground, never nearer.
Always in rear or one from rear before home straight, made some minor late ground.
Slowly away, settled about 5Ls off pace in rear group down backstretch and entering straight when momentarily held up for a run, clear over 300 M and ran on strongly, post came too soon.
Always slightly worse than midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls behind leader, no improvement in straight.
Always within about 1L of pace in 2nd until home straight when hanging out a bit, kicked over 1L clear at 200 M, stayed on well for pressure to hang on.
Better than midfield and within 3Ls of pace until home straight, outpaced thereafter.
Very keen and without cover in midfield down backstretch, 4Ls back on straightening, no threat from then on.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L until home straight, soon headed and one-paced final 200 M.
About 6Ls off pace in rear until find bend, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
Sluggish start, failed to gather speed and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and made up some ground in the straight.
Dropped back to race towards the rear. 3-wide making the turn and only ran past a few beaten ones in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and steadily made up ground.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at midfield. Raced along the rails home turn but was only one-paced in the straight.
Jumped well. Led or disputed lead before taking a sit off the pace 1000 M. 2Ls behind leader on straightening, took some time to gather speed but closed the race off strongly once quickened.
Jumped well from wide draw and dropped back to rear section. Made up some ground rounding home turn from a 4-wide position. Ran on steadily in the straight.
In rear section throughout and made no impression in the straight.
Jumped well and was steadily taken back to race at midfield. 3-wide in making the turn and closed the race off strongly.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily worked its way up to join the leaders after 1000 M. Took over the lead home turn but weakened on straightening.
Wide at midfield early stages. Steadily improved to keep within a length of the leader at home turn. Had the lead briefly at 300 M but was unable to hold off late charging rivals.
Ridden along early and took the lead at 1200 M. Lost the lead at 800 M but remained just off the pace home turn. Unable to pick up on straightening and stayed on same pace to line.
Better than midfield. 4Ls off the pace at 800 M. Advanced from a 3-wide position home turn and reached within 2Ls of the leader on straightening. Quickened nicely and drew clear final 200 M.
Missed the kick but was hard ridden to be behind the leaders. Raced along the fence home turn and was 2Ls behind the leader. Failed to pick up on straightening and weakened closing stages.
Settled on fence in rear section. Ran on briefly in the straight but weakened inside final 200 M.
About 5Ls off pace in midfield down the back, a little closer entering home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M but no extra close home when tending to carry head awkwardly.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls down in 3rd on fence at 1000 M, struggling on circle and beaten at top of home straight.
About 6Ls back on fence down backstretch, 5Ls down in 7th when 2-wide on straightening, staying on well when dis- appointed for running at 100 M and switched out, ran on.
Dropped out in rear early and 4-wide on straightening when 7Ls last, picked up very well to lead 150 M out, ran on strongly.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence in 5th until home straight, 2Ls off pace and one of many chances at 200 M, failed to follow through.
Worse than midfield down backstretch when 8Ls off pace, over 5Ls down in 7th entering straight, 2Ls off pace in 5th and closing off well at 200 M, no answer to winner's kick, however.
Slowly away, about 9Ls off pace near rear until 800 M, 7Ls last entering straight, never dangerous.
About 4Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 3Ls down in 3rd at final bend, steadied when swamped at 150 M, weakened further.
Settled towards rear about 8Ls off pace until 600 M, always outpaced from top of home straight.
Prominent about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd until home straight, kept on to lead 300 M out, headed about 150 M out, just hung on for a place.
Soon led on fence, over 2Ls clear at 1000 M and same entering homestretch, faded once headed 300 M out.
Awkwardly away, settled in midfield about 5Ls off pace down the back, 2Ls down in 4th out 4-wide on straightening, every chance when disputing lead at 200 M, hung in late and no extra.
Keen early on, 4Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, closer on straightening, lacked acceleration.
3Ls off pace in 4th on fence until 600 M out, soon well behind.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls back in 12th at the 1000 M, 5Ls down in 12th entering straight, didn't threaten.
About 5Ls off pace 3-back on fence until 800 M, closer 3Ls off pace in midfield on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
Led for most of backstretch, never clear by more than 1L, headed at top of home straight, faded out steadily.
4-wide without cover down the back in midfield when 5Ls off speed, forced 5-wide into stretch when 1L off pace in 6th, every chance when a head 3rd at 200 M, no extra final 100 M.
1L down in 2nd on fence down backstretch, closer in 2nd off final bend, failed to dash and one-paced final 200 M.
3Ls off pace in 5th at the 800 M, 1L off pace in 4th out 3-wide at final bend, kept on well but could never head quinella pair.
Keen early on worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace, 3Ls back in 9th off home turn, always held by principals.
Switched from wide gate to fence 8Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, 6Ls last entering straight, only ran on past a few tired ones late.
Travelled well 2Ls off pace out 2-wide until 600 M, disputing lead from top of home straight to 200 M, kept on gamely for pressure to maintain narrow margin final 100 M.
Always worse than midfield and never better than 5Ls off pace at any point.
Switched from wide gate towards fence on jumping, 7Ls off pace in 13th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 11th at home turn, no impression.
Midfield. Improved gradually to 4th rounding home bend. 2Ls 4th 400 M. Ran on steadily on inside to assert authority closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M to share a minor placing.
In touch early, soon dropped back slightly and was 7th 400 M. Renewed effort in straight for a dead-heated 3rd at finish.
Midfield. Improved a bit final turn to 3Ls 5th 400 M. Kept on but found no extra inside 100 M.
Near rear from widest draw. Widest final turn. Recovered a little ground in straight.
Took lead from 1200 M. Faded when headed early straight.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Widest turning in. Weakened 250 M out.
Midfield. Kept on well early straight to be within striking distance from 200 M. Failed to quicken close home.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress 250 M until one-paced closing stages.
Soon last. Ran on well 300 M out to be nearest at finish.
Led field to 1200 M. Held 2nd until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield from final turn. Weakened 150 M.
Lost ground at start, towards rear throughout.
Always prominent. 2-1/2Ls 3rd rounding the turn. Moved up to take slender advantage early straight. Headed closing stages.
Soon led. With 2Ls advantage early straight. Kept on but failed to contain the winner close home.
Behind midfield throughout.
In touch. 3Ls 4th rounding home bend. Failed to quicken when asked 300 M out.
Midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield in 3-wide. Made no show in straight.
Began awkwardly, trailed the field throughout.
Ridden from outside draw to be prominent. Came to join lead 800 M. 2Ls 2nd final turn, kept on same pace thereafter.
Towards rear early, soon moved up to be 5th 900 M. Ran on steadily in straight to claim 3rd final 150 M.
Was 2Ls 4th to 600 M where he improved to 3rd. Ran on well inside 200 M to assert authority close home.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Steadied at start. Quickly recovered to midfield. 5th turning in and ran home one-paced.
Never far off. Ran on to gain narrow advantage 200 M out. Hung on under pressure to the line.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily down straight without quickening.
Squeezed out to last jumping out. Improving along rails when hampered 600 M out. Made up ground from last into straight to be nearest at finish.
Knuckled at start. Settled wide towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Broke well. Quickly crossed to inside settling outside leader. Weakened over 200 M out.
Jumped best. Led field to 300 M. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Made some late headway closing stages.
Hampered at start and dropped to last few. Wide turning in. Made modest headway without threatening.
Midfield. Last position coming off Rock. Dropped out into straight.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to hold every chance on rails shortly after straightening. Unable to draw level throughout closing stages.
In touch early, moved up to take lead approaching 1200 M. Held on having 1L advantage to the line.
Well there on inside. 2Ls 3rd or 4th from 1200 M. Dropped back steadily 650 M out. (Blood in trachea).
Among the front runners, 2nd from 1200 M. Given reminders 600 M. Kept on until one-paced inside 150 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer. (Mucus.)
Towards rear throughout.
Among the front runners early. Dropped back to midfield passing 1200 M. Recovered ground final 300 M to take 3rd closing stages.
Among the front runners early, then mainly raced 3-wide 5th from 1100 M. Made no show in straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear early. Soon recovered some ground on inside to be midfield. Progressed from 600 M to be 4th 400 M. Ran on without threatening.
Behind midfield. Widest final turn. Kept on steadily in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch and wide early. Made progress from 1200 M to be 5th far side. Advanced to 3rd 600 M out. Under pressure final turn but found no extra final 300 M.
Slowly away, soon last. Kept on to run past a few beaten horses in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace in straight.
Made all. Kicked clear in straight to win unchallenged.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Prominent to straight. Gradually faded.
Never nearer.
Never Nearer.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to reach 3rd late.
Chased leader throughout. Kept on one pace.
Well back to straight. Made up late ground past beaten horses closing stages.
Tardy start from wide draw and soon raced in a rearward position around 2-wide. Commenced to give ground at home turn and tailed out in straight.
Jumped along and soon raced in midfield or better 2-wide. Switched out and crept closer to the leader rounding the home turn. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.
Pushed along to race in midfield on rail whilst hanging out for majority of the race and checked at 600 M to avoid heels. Unable to show much running in home straight.
Unable to muster early speed to race at the tail on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Stood flat-footed at the start and dropped to the rear around 2-wide. Raced 3-wide without cover running down back straight. Made no impression in home straight.
Broke fairly from widest and ridden along to race in midfield around 2-wide. Under pressure at home turn to maintain position. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and ridden along to take lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Ran on fairly but was headed near the 200 M and became one-paced in the final stages.
Broke fairly and pushed along to race 1/2L down outside the leader. Ridden along to maintain position at home turn. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and only kept on same pace to the line.
Broke with field and pushed along to race in a handy position on rail through to straight. All out 200 M and plugged on fairly without threatening the placegetters.

Began well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or worse around 2-wide. Made steady headway from the outside at home turn. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but just failed to run down the 3rd placegetter.

Began well and pushed along to take up a box-seat position behind leader through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and ran on strongly to pull away from the rest inside final 200 M for an easy victory.
Broke with field and soon settled in worse than midfield on rail. Switched out and made little headway at home turn. Ran on well when asked 250 M out but was not in position to trouble the winner.
Always towards rear and never better than 8Ls off pace at any stage, making some minor ground late when steadied at 200 M, eased late.
Never better than 7Ls or 8Ls off pace and worse than midfield on fence until final 200 M, made some minor late headway.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at final turn and 200 M, one-paced close home and lost out on a place.
Steadied 1200 M out, about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 4th on fence from 800 M to final bend, no impression.
Always 4-back the fence about 6Ls off pace in mid-division through to homestretch, made some late ground without threatening.
Caught 3-wide without cover until 1000 M, got into fence 3Ls off pace in 2nd from 800 M to 500 M, 3Ls down in 3rd entering home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, always in or around midfield about 7Ls off pace, never really threatened.
In rear no better than 10Ls off pace until final bend when forced 4-wide, ran on strongly final 300 M for a place.
Slowly away and lost ground when crowded at start, about 6Ls off pace in 7th when 2-wide through to homestretch, failed to kick.
In rear no better than 8Ls off pace until final bend, ran on very strongly final 300 M to take 2nd place.
Raced 2-wide in 5th about 5Ls or so behind leader before turning for home under strong pressure, gave ground from 300 M out. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Soon led on fence, always at least 2Ls clear until home turn, kicked on and always looked like hanging on despite tiring through final 100 M.
Slow out of the gates and trailed field into the straight. Closed the race off well.

Hard driven from widest draw and raced wide in a forward position. Ridden along in a 3-wide position home turn and was a length down on straightening. Stayed on well closing stages and lost the nod on the line.
Settled at midfield. 3-wide making home turn and weakened on straightening.
Ridden along from the start and was within 2Ls of the leaders at 700 M. Kept on steadily in the straight and edged out a rival for a minor placing.
Ridden out of the gates. Disputed lead until gaining sole lead after 600 M. Opened up a 2Ls advantage at 200 M but was swamped by principals few strides before the post.
Ridden out of the gates and was in a disputed lead until 600 M. Remained a length behind the leader on straightening then weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped well, among leaders early but dropped back steadily to race at midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Settled behind the leaders. Dug in gamely while between rivals in the straight and got the nod after a hard drive.
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position. Near the back on straightening and made a late dash closing stages.
Jumped well but blundered and lost ground. Settled on fence at midfield and was ridden along home turn. Made up steady ground in the straight.
Settled on fence at rear section until straightening. Ran on steadily in the straight.
Outpaced early stages and raced towards the back. Kept being niggled home turn to keep pace and finished the race off strongly.
Couldn't lead, tended to lay in when caught 3-wide 1400 M out, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, disputing lead entering straight but soon petered out.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace on fence until 700 M out, improved to be 2Ls down in midfield and 3-wide on straightening, well outpaced by quinella pair but ran on best of rest.
2-wide and within 3Ls of the speed in 5th or so until the 600 M, pressed on to be 3-wide about a neck down in 4th entering straight, soon back-pedalling.
Caught 3-wide without cover until 1000 M, 5Ls down in 9th when 2-wide at 800 M, forced 6-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 2Ls behind speed, kept on one-paced.
Disputed lead from 1400 M to 700 M, hard pressed to lie up at 600 M, gave ground through field and gone before home turn.
Settled about 10Ls last and niggled along in stages until 600 M, improved on circle and turned for home 5-wide and 3Ls down, ran on strongly to lead inside final 50 M.
2-wide and about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in midfield until 600 M when pressing on 4-wide without cover and disputing lead entering straight, soon swamped and faded.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in 8th or so until 600 M, off fence on circle and 3-wide on straightening 1L behind, led 300 M out and kicked clear, caught by winner inside final 50 M.
3-back the fence 4Ls off pace in midfield through to 600 M, steadied at 500 M, over 2Ls down but in 9th entering straight, no impression.
Disputed lead on fence through to home straight, soon faded.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so until the 600 M, under 1L off pace but in 6th turning for home, outpaced thereafter.
Midfield. Struck heels and fell near 300 M.
Near rear. Made up some late ground final 150 M.
Midfield or behind. Shifted in 300 M and caused inter- ference. Quickened well to take command 250 M. Kept on.
Ridden along to be in touch. 3Ls 4th 1000 M. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Held 2nd to 900 M where he was 2Ls 3rd on inside. Lacked of daylight 400 M to 300 M. Kept on well but was one-paced closing stages.
Led field soon after start. Held 1L or 2Ls advantage to straight. Weakened when headed 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Led briefly early from the widest draw. Raced 4th until advancing to 2nd passing 1000 M. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Slowly away, soon picked up some ground to be in midfield. Held up for some distance early straight. Kept on 250 M out.
Towards rear. Moderate progress final turn to be 8th 400 M. Made ground on inside until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Never in contention.
Jumped well from a wide draw, soon settled near rear. Ran on steadily 400 M but failed to catch the winner.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Mostly 5th to 400 M. Lacked of galloping room early straight until 200 M. Ran on when in clear.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Wide in prominent position to straight. One-paced.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled behind midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Not clear run early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Tailed-off throughout.
Always prominent. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening holding some chance 200 M out. Ran home one- paced.
Mainly in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to get up on line.
Ridden to close up position early. Lost position rounding home bend. Weakened further in straight.
Always thereabouts. One-paced closing stages.
Towards rear and wide. Made modest headway early in straight before coming one-paced close to home.
Attempted to make all, only to be caught closing stages.
In touch early, soon dropped back steadily to behind midfield. Ran on moderately in straight.
Towards rear. Dropped to the last near 600 M. Made up some late ground inside 100 M.
Midfield from widest draw. Raced 5th on 3 to 4 wide rounding home bend. Kept on for 2nd 200 M but without threatening.
Midfield. Made steady progress from 400 M. Just missed 2nd at finish.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Prominent. 2Ls 4th 800 M. Faded steadily 300 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit to 8th or 9th final turn. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Behind midfield. Widest final turn. No progress.
Led field to 1200 M. Remained prominent and was 2Ls 2nd final turn. Found no extra 200 M out.
Near rear throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
Improved steadily on inside to take lead passing 1200 M. Never threatened.
Checked soon after start, losing ground towards the rear. Crept closer on inside to midfield final turn. Made ground steadily while steadied at 300 M and again at 200 M.
Prominent. 2Ls 4th on 3-wide before progressing to 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened 250 M out.
Well there to 200 M. Found nothing inside final 200 M.
Midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Well back. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Towards rear throughout.
Sluggish at start. Trailed the field throughout.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Disputed lead early. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend. Ceded advantage under pressure 200 M out. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent. Gained upper hand under pressure close to home.
Led far side. Restrained in narrow 2nd inside leader rounding home bend. Hit front inside 200 M only to be swamped close to home.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled mainly in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to claim 3rd position late.
Never better than mid-division.

Checked after start and soon recovered to race near midfield. After the 1000 M forward to race outside the leaders. Ran on well in straight and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd and 3rd to win narrowly.
On jumping bounded in the air and raced at the back on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Did not see clear daylight in straight but still kept on fairly to the line.
Broke with field and steadily settled in midfield on rail. Shuffled back to rearward position from 1000 M. Kept on same pace in straight and ran past several beaten runners.
Began well and soon raced in front of midfield on inner through to straight. Unable to find an extra gear when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.

Broke fairly from wide draw and niggled along to lead. After the 1400 M was eased back to 2nd place. Was steadily shuffled back to a rearward position at home turn. No impression in straight. (Saddle shifted left.)
Shortly after the start checked and dropped to the rear 2 wide. Steadily switched to the outside at home bend to obtain clear running but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Broke with field and soon settled in behind midfield on inner. Made steady headway from the outside rounding the home turn. All out 350 M out and responded well but just lost out to the winner in a close finish.

Checked after start and raced in a rearward position 2 wide. Switched out and crept forward at home turn. Responded well when asked 350 M out but just failed to run down the 1st pair in a ding dong finish.

Soon settled in a rearward position on rail. Steadily switched out rounding the home turn to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.

Broke well from widest and soon raced in a prominent position 2 wide. Near 1000 M went forward to take lead on rail. Plugged on gamely when asked 400 M out but was headed near 200 M and one-paced thereafter.

Pushed along to race in better than midfield 3 wide in the early stages. Around the 1500 M went forward to take lead on rail. Shortly after the 1000 M commenced to give ground and tailed out in straight.
Best out and soon settled in a prominent position on rail. Went forward to race outside the leader at home bend. Kept on same pace in straight and weakened slightly inside final 150 M.
Away well and had box-seat run on fence 2Ls behind lead in 4th at 1000 M, off fence but still 2Ls back in 4th off final bend, soon outpaced.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed through to home straight when 3-wide, ran on well late to be nearest at the finish.
Slowest away, always either 2nd last or last, detached entering straight, never a factor.
3-back the fence 4Ls off pace at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight and at 200 M, faded markedly close home.
3-wide without cover when a neck 2nd at 1000 M, crossed to 2-wide and a half-length 2nd from 800 M to home turn, every chance when a head 2nd at 200 M but failed to quicken up.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in mid-division through to home straight, briefly without cover on circle, one-paced when over 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, faded further.
Led on fence by half a length from 1000 M to home turn, headed 100 M out, no extra thereafter and only just hung on for a place.
Never better than midfield though 4Ls off pace at 800 M, further behind and struggling to lie up on fence entering home straight, faded out.
2-wide and about 5Ls off pace in mid-division until 600 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down in 9th off final bend, picked up well to lead 50 M out, ran on.
Settled about 7Ls off pace in rear group until home turn, stayed on only fairly late and never likely to figure in the finish.
About 8Ls last down the back, no closer entering home straight, made some very minor late ground past beaten rivals.
About 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 6th through to 600 M, under strong pressure to hold this position turning for home, weakened.
Niggled along when 6Ls behind in 10th at 1000 M, worse off turning for home, no impression. (Blood and mucus in trachea.)
2Ls off pace in 4th when niggled along to hold position at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd when 3-wide on straightening for home, brief lead at 100 M but headed 50 M out, no extra.
Off slowly and in rear section. Widest making home turn and trailed field into the straight. Found nothing thereafter.
Raced just off-pace in 3rd until home straight. Stayed on well in the straight and hit the lead final 100 M. Just failed to hold off winner.
Jumped well but was out-paced early stages. Settled 2-wide at midfield until final 300 M. Charged home strongly and snatched victory close to the line.
Jumped fairly but steadily dropped back to rear section. Unable to quicken in the straight. (Finished distressed.)
Niggled along to be 4Ls off the pace in 4th at 1000 M. Made up some ground home turn, but failed to respond and weakened on straightening.
Ridden along to be at midfield. Ran along the fence and continued to be niggled along at home turn. Never picked up in the straight.
Pressed forward and took the lead. Maintained a slight advantage into the home straight and faded out of contention final 300 M.
Jumped well from widest draw. Allowed to drop back and settled 3-wide at midfield. Ran on steadily in the straight.
Soon settled behind midfield. Kept on without threatening in the straight.
Slow out of the gates and trailed field. Last few to enter home straight but made up good ground in the straight.
Tracked leader into home straight. Assumed the lead final 300 M but failed to hold off the top pair in the closing stages.
Outpaced and settled in a rearward position. Ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Awkward jump and slowest away, crossed to rail from wide gate, keen early and 6Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, over 4Ls down in rear on straightening, soon outpaced.
Pressed on 3-wide without cover early on, gained cover from 1000 M and 1L down and 2-wide turning for home, quickly faded.
Within 1L of the speed and with cover until entering home straight 3-wide, led 250 M out, grabbed by winner about 150 M out but still ran on well.
Always towards rear about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed until straightening for home out 3-wide, failed to dash.
