Bounded at start, switched to fence from wide gate, 8Ls last at 1400 M, 4-wide without cover from 800 M to be 5-wide (widest) and 3Ls down in 7th into straight, one-paced from then on.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th until home straight when with every chance, failed to quicken up and one-paced final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Always about 3Ls or so off pace and 2-wide in midfield until home straight, picked up well to lead 150 M out and stayed on strongly.
Best away and led on fence 1500 M out, never more than 1L clear and disputing advantage at 800 M, headed 250 M out but plugged on well for a place.
In or around midfield and mostly about 3Ls off pace and 3-wide but with cover until home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, about 7Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, pressed on out 5-wide to dispute lead 900 M out, struggling to lie up at 600 M, well beaten before turning for home.
Always tended to hang out from fence, worse than midfield about 4Ls behind lead through to home straight, made some minor late progress without threatening principals.
Always tended to hang out, worse than midfield and 5Ls off pace at 800 M, same margin behind and 4-wide turning for home, made some minor late ground.
Pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 900 M, half a length clear entering straight, always holding a narrow margin on fence until home straight.
Awkwardly away, keen early and 4-wide without cover at 600 M when 2Ls off pace in 4th and same entering straight, ran on well despite awkward head carriage and hanging in, just failed.
Always wide and worse than midfield, 6-wide no cover 600 M out when about 5Ls off pace in 10th or so, struggling when 5-wide into stretch, soon beaten.
3-wide with cover and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, struggling to maintain prominent pitch at 600 M, well beaten over 200 M out.
Within 2Ls of pace in 5th or so towards inside until 600 M out, outpaced from top of home straight.
No worse than 3Ls off pace in midfield with cover until home straight, stayed on well, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, a neck down in 2nd entering home straight, stayed on well but only lost out on a quinella spot close home.
Bumped at start, 6Ls down in rear with cover at 800 M, 5Ls down and one from rear entering straight, ran on fairly late without threatening principals.
Led early on, crossed and steadied 900 M out, 2Ls down in 4th on fence at home turn, kept on at the same pace inside final 200 M.
Fractious in gates, 6Ls off pace in rear on fence at 800 M, 5Ls down in 12th entering straight, always outpaced.
Very wide (5-wide) at 600 M when over 4Ls off pace and worse than midfield, widest of all (7-wide) into stretch, no impression.
Slowest away losing about 3Ls, keen at 800 M when 5Ls off pace towards rear, 6-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in midfield, no response under pressure.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield with cover until home straight, kept on finding, nearest at the finish.
Last to 400 M. Recovered ground moderately in straight.
Behind midfield. Made ground from 10th 400 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Made up some ground when under pressure 250 M
Led field to 1600 M where he became 2nd. Sat outside leader before regaining advantage 400 M. Held on well and never threatened.
Ridden forward soon after start and took lead from 1600 M. Held on until headed 400 M. Weakened.
Better than midfield. Improved steadily from 600 M to be 2nd 250 M. Kept on but failed to maintain position closing stages.
Towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Improved to midfield early straight. Ran on but found not much room near 300 M. Soon found no extra.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd far side. 4th 1100 M. Held on until finding no extra passing 200 M.
Midfield. Faded on straightening.
In touch. About 3Ls 5th 400 M. Soon faded.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Remained 2nd last to 400 M. Recovered good ground when under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Raced 5th on inside rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight but failed to pose a threat.
About 3Ls behind lead at the back. Kept on moderately final 300 M.
Prominent to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Began awkwardly, soon raced 4th. Reached lead passing 600 M. Kept on when headed approaching 200 M.
Prominent. Dropped back passing 400 M.
Around midfield. Found no extra 250 M out. (Mucus.)
In touch. Moved up halfway and was in the front passing 200 M. Failed to contain the winner final 100 M.
Slowly away, near rear but never far away. Improved steadily to 5th course proper. Ran on well 250 M out to take command inside 100 M.
Always prominent. Hit front briefly approaching 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Settled in forward of midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Obtained split over 200 M out. Quickened to lead closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Jostled between runners and unbalanced upon straightening. Gradually faded.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Well back. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Ridden for lead from poor draw. Crossed to rails when some 2Ls clear over 1300 M out. Slowed down and joined rounding home bend and eventually headed under pressure passing 400 M. Soon weakened.
Prominent. Faded out of contention inside final 200 M.
Wide towards rear early. Made swift progress coming out of back straight to join leader rounding home bend. Disputed lead turning in but soon weakened.
Settled towards rear. Found no room behind runners upon straightening. Switched out for a run and finished off race well to miss narrowly.
Tracked leader. Improved to hit front shortly after straightening. Unable to sustain effort and swamped about 100 M out.
Midfield far side. Dropped out home bend. (Irregular heart beat.)
Never a factor.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to hold some chance passing 200 M. Not match pace of first two close to home.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Dropped out 250 M.
Soon prominent. Improved to 2nd 1000 M. Gave a little ground to 4th rounding home bend. Failed to quicken in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground on outside final 250 M.
Towards rear. 12th final turn and was held up a while on straightening. Made up good ground final 300 M.
Midfield. Made progress from 1000 M to be 2nd passing 800 M. Kept on until finding no extra final 150 M.
Midfield early from a wide draw, soon ridden out to take lead passing 1000 M. With 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn, held on well to the line.
Never in contention.
Prominent early, dropped back to midfield 850 M. 4-wide final turn. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Gradual progress rounding home bend to be 6th 400 M. Ran on quite well in straight but failed to catch the winner.
Slightly better than midfield. Gave ground near 900 M to race towards the rear. Made some minor recovery closing stages.
Flat-footed at start, losing significant ground. Was last to final turn. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Always there. 4Ls 3rd 400 M. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field early, then raced 5th to final turn. Weakened from 4th early straight.
Always thereabouts. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Weakened under pressure in straight.
Never travelling well and hanging out wide towards rear. Went off rounding home bend.
Attempted to make all. Narrowly headed inside 200 M. Fought on under pressure but unable to peg back first two.
Well there to 500 M. Broke down.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Towards rear and wide. Came to challenge upon straightening gaining some ground early in straight. One-paced under pressure closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move turning for home. Ran on gamely under pressure on rails to just get up on line.
Behind midfield. Gave ground steadily coming out of back straight.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Close up to straight. Dropped out quickly.
Travelled 4-wide in prominent position. Quickened to hit front over 100 M out but pipped at post.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
From a wide draw was soon eased to the rear section closer to the rail. Made little headway from the outside at home bend. Made little impression inside final 200 M when asked 400 M out.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Plugged on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-pace over the concluding stages.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Jumped well from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position closer to the rail with cover. Made little headway from the outside at home bend. Ran on well in straight and just failed to run down the 2nd placegetter.
Began well from wide draw and soon eased to the rear section on rail through to straight. Kept on evenly when asked 350 M out and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 250 M.
Broke with field and pushed along to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
On jumping stood flat-footed and raced at the tail to straight. Failed to show any running when asked 350 M out.
Began fairly from widest and pushed along to take lead on rail with around 1L advantage to straight. Near the 200 M was headed and steadily faded thereafter.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and soon recovered to race in midfield on rail through to straight. No extra when asked 400 M out and dropped out steadily thereafter.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield 3 wide with cover through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to go up a gear and ran on evenly to the line.

Crowded for room shortly after the start and soon recovered to race in midfield or better 2 wide to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and ran on fairly whilst hanging out. Just failed to figure in the placings.
Soon raced in midfield on rail but near the 1500 M was checked when crowded for room. Dropped to a rearward position on rail to straight. Ran on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Soon raced in a forward position around 3 wide without cover through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and responded well but was unable to match speed with the winner over the final 200 M.

Began well and settled in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Whilst travelling well had no clear running in early straight. Ran home strongly when clear running was obtained 200 M out to win convincingly.
About 5Ls off pace in midfield down backstretch, 3Ls behind in mid-division off home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, failed to sustain effort late.
Prominent or disputing lead on fence until homestretch, beaten over 200 M out.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th or so until 800 M when bumping rail, still well there entering straight, soon beaten.
With cover within 4Ls of lead in midfield until 800 M and caught 3-wide no cover until home straight when 2Ls down in 5th, all out to be a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until straightening for home, dropped away tamely.
Slow away, 4-wide without cover at 1200 M when 7Ls off pace towards rear, 6Ls off pace and 5-wide off final bend, hanging out when bumped at 300 M, never dangerous.
Worse than midfield at least 6Ls off pace until 600 M out, improved to be 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, weakened close home.
About 10Ls last down back straight, 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, faded close home.
Always 3-back the fence about 4Ls off speed in mid-division until home turn, one-paced on the run-in.
Towards rear on fence about 8Ls off pace until the 800 M, niggled along to take close order on circle, making a little late ground when steadied at 300 M, no danger late.
Lost ground at start, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, short of room entering straight when still 3Ls down in 5th, bumped when switched out at 200 M, always held.
4-wide without cover on pace early, pressed on to lead by a neck out 2-wide at 800 M, disputing lead entering stretch, beaten over 200 M out. (Blood in trachea.)
Worse than midfield with cover about 6Ls off pace down back straight, closer turning for home and eased impressively to lead 250 M out, ran on strongly.
Slowly away, in rear bunch no better than 6Ls off speed until home straight, no chance with winner but still picked up very well to go 2nd at the 100 M, stayed on.
Settled 3 to 4Ls off the leaders in a 3-wide position. Steadily made up ground rounding home turn and was a length down on straightening. Wore down leader at 300 M.
Jumped well and kept alongside leader until home straight. Gradually faded inside final 200 M.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear. Wide making the turn and was never able to pick up in the straight.
Dropped back to rear section. Quickened at 300 M and made up ground in the straight.
Quickest out and led briefly. Settled behind the leaders from 1000 M onwards. Failed to keep pace on straightening and faded out.
Settled in rear section and made the turn awkwardly. Made no impression in the straight.
Outpaced and trailed field. Swung wide on straightening and closed the race off with a strong run.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Quickened at 400 M and made up good ground in the straight.
Slow out of the gates and was ridden up to keep pace behind the leaders. Tracked leader into the straight but was held up at 200 M. Switched out and kept on well to line.
Raced along the inside around midfield. Ran on without quickening in the straight.
Settled at midfield. Recovered well after being crowded on straightening and was closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and hit the front shortly after the start. Kept the lead until 300 M and faded out of contention.
Jumped well and dropped back to settle 3 to 4Ls behind the pace. Angled out on straightening and made a strong closing run.
Jumped fairly and settled wide at midfield. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Awkwardly away and bumped at start, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, a neck down in 2nd entering straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, same entering straight, held when checked at 300 M, no danger.
Led by 1L on fence at 900 M, a neck clear off final bend before kicking 1L clear again at 200 M, stayed on well for hands and heels riding.
Bumped at start, 5Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, 4-wide entering straight when 3Ls down in midfield, picked up to be 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well but never likely to grab winner.
No speed early, raced about 8Ls near last and 3 or 4-wide but with cover, never a factor.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, bumped wider at 700 M, 3-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in 6th, soon outpaced.
Niggled along when 7Ls off pace towards rear at 800 M, not much closer on straightening, stayed on past a few tired rivals on fence late.
Slowly away, 3-back the fence and about 4Ls off pace in midfield until stretch, no impression.
In rear about 7Ls off pace and 2-wide through to home straight, never threatened.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover and about 5Ls off pace in 9th or so at 1000 M, hard pressed to lie up entering straight, soon well beaten.
8Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, niggled along to lie up on the circle and under strong pressure turning for home when 6Ls down, ran on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 2Ls off pace early but went 2-wide at 800 M when 3Ls back in 4th, all out to be 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no extra close home. (Blood in trachea.)
Always 4-wide without cover about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until homestretch, soon beaten.
Head up and keen at 900 M when 2Ls off pace on fence, same turning for home, steadily outpaced thereafter.
3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in 6th until turning for home, failed to quicken up and never looked like bettering midfield spot.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1400 M to top of home straight, every chance when disputing lead at 250 M out, no extra close home and narrowly missed a place.
2-wide and 3Ls behind lead in 5th through to home straight, picked up well to lead 150 M out, stayed on strongly.
Over-raced in place when 3-wide without cover 2Ls behind in 4th at 1000 M, pressed on to be 3-wide into straight and 1L down in 2nd, a neck 3rd at 200 M, one-paced close home.
Slow away, worse than midfield and 3-wide with cover about 6Ls off speed until home turn, never looked likely to improve.
Slowly away, towards rear 6Ls off pace with cover at 1000 M, closer 3-wide on straightening, down centre of track when over 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, nicked a place on the line.
Settled near rear on fence about 7Ls off pace, drifted to last at top of home straight, posed no threat.
Always 2-wide and 4Ls down in mid-division until turning for home, stayed on quite well for pressure late.
6Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, a little one-paced close home.
Pressed on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, ridden along to be 1L clear off home turn, headed 300 M out, faded sharply and eased close home.
Always in rear 3-wide with cover and 8Ls off pace until the 600 M, 3-wide and 6Ls down in 13th on straightening, no impression.
Switched to fence in rear down backstretch about 8Ls off pace, stayed on past a few tired rivals but always one- paced.
4-back the fence about 6Ls off pace in 9th until straightening, always outpaced.
2-wide and 1L off lead in 2nd until 500 M, hard pressed to lie up turning for home, soon beaten.
Midfield to 200 M. Faded.
Better than midfield. Dropped out steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Found not much room early straight. No improvement.
Well there. Sat outside leader (winner) and was mainly 1L behind. Kept on until finding no extra final 100 M.
At the back. Made ground while hanging in in the straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Mainly midfield to 200 M. Weakened.
Was 2Ls 4th soon after start. 3rd from 1000 M. Kept on well in straight but just lost 2nd narrowly at finish.
Towards rear. Made up good ground passing 300 M, never nearer.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground when 6-wide early straight but found no extra closing stages.
At the back from widest draw. Recovered good ground on outside final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground when under pressure early straight.
Prominent 3rd. Dropped back a bit to 4th when blundered 1000 M out. Remained in similar position until weakened final 150 M.
Never better than midfield.
Led field soon after start and never headed. Won comfortably.
Within 2Ls in 3rd to final turn. Responded well when asked to take command passing 150 M. Kept on well.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Dropped to second last when checked 800 M. Only made very minor recovery closing stages.
Midfield early, gradually improved to 4th at the Rock. 3Ls behind lead early straight, kept on for a 3rd closing stages.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Improved slightly to behind midfield before severely checked and lost position 600 M. Recovered a little ground in straight.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield final turn. One-paced.
Ridden along from widest draw to join the leader passing 800 M. Still there until finding no extra passing 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Led field until joined passing 800 M. Was in the leading pair but failed to match speed with winner inside 150 M.
Always at the back.
Better than midfield. 5th final turn. Stayed on final 150 M.
Never better than midfield.
Always thereabout. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Lacked early pace. Travelled behind midfield in 7th into straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Began slowly. Never seen with a chance.
Settled just off the pace. Switched one off rails for clear run over 200 M cut. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Broke well. Led to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Never on terms.
Well there. Hit front shortly after straightening. Held on well under pressure.
In the rear. Was hampered and forced to raced wider home turn. Made up significant ground on outside 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Kept closer to 6th 300 M. Ran on well 200 M out to take control closing stages.
Towards rear. Improved a bit from 400 M. Made ground from 7th near 250 M, just missed a minor placing at finish.
In touch. Dropped to midfield when checked 1000 M. Lost further ground when unbalanced turning for home. Faded.
Jumped well and led field early. 2Ls behind in 2nd or 3rd to final turn. Ran on to regain advantage 200 M. Failed to contain the fast finishing winner closing stages.
Midfield. Shifted to inside and improved to 5th early straight. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Soon prominent. 2Ls 2nd or 3rd to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Behind midfield early, moved along to be in touch far side. Widest (4-wide) rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Took lead from 1000 M and mainly held 2Ls advantage to straight. Faded when headed 200 M.
In touch, 2-1/2Ls 4th far side. Under pressure early straight and improved to 3rd 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Rear. Recovered some ground 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Blundered and clipped heels when shifted out home turn. Ran on a bit final 200 M. (Lame.)
Led to 500 M. Weakened out of contention.
Mainly wide in prominent position to straight. Ran home one-paced. (Soft palate displacement.)
Never better than midfield.
Rear to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear. Took closer order passing 700 M. Ran on to hold some chance early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Well there. Took over running rounding home bend. Unable to sustain effort under pressure and swamped 100 M out.
Well there. Inconvenienced by weakening runner rounding home bend. Renewed effort to be 2Ls back early in straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on dourly under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Improved to hold some chance early in straight. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Waited with. Made significant progress down centre of straight to take charge close to home.
Remained in last few. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish despite slightly baulked 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Held some chance in straight but failed to threaten under strong driving closing stages.
Broke fairly from an outside draw and niggled along to be box-seated behind the leader to straight. All out 200 M and responded well to snatch victory in a ding-dong finish.

Began fairly and raced in midfield around 3 wide. After the 1300 M was bumped and near 1100 M was steadied to avoid heels. Pushed along at home turn to maintain position, failed to make any impression in straight.
Soon settled in a rearward position on rail and near the 1000 M was steadied when closed to heels. Baulked for a run at 250 M but only able to run on evenly when clear running was obtained at 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and soon settled at back closer to the rail. Made little headway from the outside at home turn. Under pressure 300 M out and made little impression inside final 200 M.
Best out and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Responded quite well when asked 250 M out but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Began fairly and soon raced in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Kept on evenly when asked 250 M out and faded slightly inside final 200 M.

Jumped with field from widest and niggled along to take lead on rail from 1300 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Plugged on well when asked 250 M out but was overhauled by the winner on the line.
Broke with field and soon settled in a rearward position on inner through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 250 M out and slightly weakened over the final stages.
Began fairly and ridden along to race in a forward position 3 wide without cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and ran on evenly to the line.

Slightly slow to the jump and ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail. Near the 1000 M was checked and dropped to midfield. Under pressure 300 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and raced in midfield or better around 3 wide. Commenced to lose ground at home bend and tailed out in straight.

Bounded in the air on jumping and dropped to the tail on rail. Near the 1000 M was checked and blundered. Made up little ground from the outside at home turn. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Checked at start, raced in 8th place about 7Ls off pace through to final bend, never dangerous.
Soon 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, under pressure to maintain this position 500 M out, faded badly in the stretch.
Awkwardly away and lost ground at start, always in rear bunch at least 9Ls off pace until 600 M, 5-wide (widest of all) and 7Ls down in 10th entering straight, one-paced.
3-wide without cover until getting 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace entering straight, little chance with winner but comfortably held 2nd.
Steadied at 1200 M when 10Ls off pace in rear, niggled along to get closer on circle, didn't succeed.
Soon led, never clear by more than 2Ls until home straight, headed 300 M out and faded markedly.
Driven along early to hold worse than midfield position about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace, similarly placed on straightening, stayed on fairly well for a place.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence until home turn, led 300 M out, unchallenged.
4-back on the fence about 6Ls off speed in midfield until final bend, kept on moderately, nearest at finish.
Switched from widest gate to fence on exiting, always in rear and never closer than 10Ls off speed at any stage.
2-wide in midfield about 6Ls off pace through to home straight, 3-wide on straightening, stayed on at same pace, nearest at finish.
Settled 3-back the fence about 4Ls behind leader in 4th or 5th through to home straight, failed to quicken up.
Slowly away and raced towards the rear. Made up ground in the straight despite running into traffic in the closing stages.
Took a sit off the pace at 1000 M. Remained racing behind the leaders in a 2-wide position until home straight. Kept pace until fading out final 200 M.
Just behind leaders early. Kept within 2Ls of the leader before gradually dropping back to midfield after 800 M. Remained towards midfield at the turn and had nothing left in the straight.
Began fairly and gradually dropped back to the rear. Trailed field throughout and made no impression in the straight.
Niggled along to be alongside the leader. Kept on well but unable to draw closer final stages.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear until home straight. Never quickened in the closing stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield early stages. On fence and 2Ls behind the pace making home turn. Kept same pace to line.
Jumped well and soon led. Held a length's advantage into home straight. Stayed on well but failed to hold off the winner final 50 M.
Jumped well and took a sit behind the leader. Stayed prominently behind the pace home turn and ran down the leader final 50 M.
2Ls behind the leader and wide into the first turn. No worse than midfield but wide and without cover throughout. Never quickened on straightening.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Lost ground but soon recovered after being crowded at 600 M. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Taken back from widest draw. Moved up to race behind midfield after the 1000 M turn. Quickened on straightening and was closest at finish.
Box-seat position 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd until home straight, switched out to lead 100 M out, ran on.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 1L behind in 2nd at 1100 M, niggled along to maintain this spot at 600 M and hard ridden into straight, faded out tamely.
5Ls off pace 4-back the fence in 7th at 1100 M, steadied entering straight when 4Ls down in 8th, made some minor late ground while hanging out.
Over-raced when 7Ls behind lead on fence in 9th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 10th entering home straight, no impression.
Slowly away, 5Ls off pace in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, a little closer turning for home, no impression.
Dropped out 12Ls last at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover down backstretch when 10Ls down, 7Ls last on straightening, moderate late headway.
Soon led, always about 1L clear on fence until homestretch, headed 100 M out, outstayed.
Crowded at start, about 3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th or so from 1200 M to home straight, dropped out quickly.
3-back the fence about 3Ls off pace in 5th until final bend, stayed on at same pace for a place.
Always well behind, 10Ls back and one from rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 10th and 4-wide on straightening, no impression.
Always 3-wide without cover from 1300 M out, no cover and between 2Ls and 3Ls off speed in 4th or 5th from 1200 M to home straight, no impression thereafter.
Bounded at start losing some ground, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 5-wide turning for home under pressure when 3Ls down in 7th, failed to quicken up.
Led field soon after start. Raced 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Ran on early straight to regain advantage inside 200 M. Held on.
Lost ground at start, soon recovered some ground to be 9th. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Kept on under pressure until one-paced closing stages.
Led briefly at start, then raced 2nd approaching 1000 M. Was in the leading pair 300 M but failed to contain the winner inside 200 M.
Near rear. Made up some ground from 9th at 400 M.
Tardy start, near rear. Recovered some early ground but wide. Dropped back 600 M out.
Always at the back.
Mainly 4th or 5th to straight. Weakened steadily passing 300 M.
Better than midfield. Made no show 250 M out.
In touch early, soon in midfield or behind. 5-wide turning in. One-paced.
Ridden along from the widest draw and took lead approaching 800 M. Maintained advantage until headed 200 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Improved to 4th final turn. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Soon dropped to last few. (Lame.)
Wide in midfield. Weakened in straight.
Never nearer.
Steadied in last few early. Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Made up some ground in straight.
Began awkwardly, losing many lengths. Remained last to 400 M. Made steady headway down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Sluggish at start. Settled in midfield. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Made modest progress on rails without threatening.
Made all, holding clear advantage most of way.
Settled behind midfield. Made modest headway down straight without threatening.
Never far off. Produced some late impression inside final 200 M without threatening.
Chased leader to 200 M. Weakened.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Wide towards rear to straight. Made some headway down centre of track without threatening.
Towards rear. Made some progress to 8th 400 M. Ran on steadily under pressure to snatch 2nd at finish.
Midfield early. Improved gradually on inside to reach the front final turn. Was headed early straight, then one- paced.
Towards rear early, ridden along on outside to be 5th 1000 M out. Progressed to 3rd rounding home bend. Sustained effort in straight to take command closing stages.
Towards rear. Checked 800 M. Never a factor.
Towards rear. Last from 900 M. Ran past a few beaten horses final 400 M.
Prominent. Dropped back to 5th home bend when raced ungenerously. Faded 200 M out. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Improved to 6th from first turn. 2Ls behind lead in 4th 400 M. Kept on.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily early straight. Soon found no extra.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Recovered some ground on outside rounding home bend to be 9th 400 M. No extra.
Stumbled soon after start, losing ground to the rear. Shifted to the outside 250 M. Made up some ground there- after.
Midfield to final turn. Dropped out.
Led field until joined at 600 M. Kept on well to regain clear lead early straight. Headed closing stages, lost 2nd narrowly final stride.
Midfield or better. Moved up to reach 4th early straight. Faded inside 200 M.
Midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Wide in forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never on terms.
In last few to straight. Made up some ground late.
Settled in midfield. Improving under pressure when forced to steady 200 M out. Quickly renewed effort but hampered again nearing finish.
Wide towards rear. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Midfield far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. Made no impression from towards rear turning in.
Wide in midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Prominent. Quickened to challenge early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Gradually took up running from poor draw. Challenged for lead early in straight but soon drew clear passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Produced good late impression final 200 M.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Chased leaders to straight. Weakened out of contention.
Always thereabouts. One-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Best out and ridden along to race 1/2L off leader through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 250 M.
Pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail. Near the 450 M commenced to give ground and tailed out in straight. (Bled.)
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better 3 wide with cover through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but was unable to quicken and only run on evenly to the line.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Crept closer to the leader rounding the home bend. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.
Broke well from widest but was unable to muster early speed to race towards the rear 4 wide without cover. Went forward from the outside at home bend. Only able to run on evenly at home straight.
Broke with field and steadily eased to the back on rail through to straight. Made up steady ground inside final 250 M to snatch 3rd on the line.
Pushed along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Ran on well when asked 400 M out but was unable to find an extra gear to run down the winner.

Jumped fairly from wide draw steadily settled in a rearward position around 3 wide with cover. Made some headway from the outside at home turn. Made some impression inside final 200 M to miss the placings by a short margin.

Broke well and pushed along to take up running on rail with no more than 1/2L advantage to straight. Plugged on fairly when asked 400 M out but was headed near the 200 M and became one-pace thereafter.
Tardy start and soon raced in the rear section on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to make any impression in straight.

Broke well from wide draw and soon raced in midfield or worse around 3 wide with cover. Switched wide on straigh- tening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.

Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and raced in a rearward position 2 wide. Switched to the middle on straightening to find clear running but was baulked for a run in early straight. Made little impression inside final 200 M.
Broke with field from wide draw and ridden along to race in a prominent position 3 wide without cover. Made the home turn awkwardly and gave ground steadily in straight.
Slightly slow away and ridden along to race in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 400 M out and took charge shortly after the 200 M to win convincingly.
10Ls off pace in last at 1600 M, one from rear 9Ls behind at 800 M and entering straight, ran on only fairly late without threatening.
2-wide and niggled along when 4Ls off pace at 900 M, 3Ls down in midfield entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
Keen when 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, shuffled back 4Ls behind in midfield from 800 M to home straight, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on well late without reaching principals.
Disputed lead early on, 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, under pressure to hold this prominent spot from 700 M to top of home straight, faded steadily thereafter.
Slowest away, on fence between 8Ls and 10Ls last until the 800 M, 6Ls down in 9th at top of home straight, kept on strongly on fence late, not beaten far at all.
2-wide with cover in mid-division 5Ls down the back, improved out 3-wide no cover from 800 M to be 2Ls down under pressure into stretch, led 200 M out, headed 100 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until the 800 M, closer entering straight but outpaced through final 300 M.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace through first half, same when 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, made some late ground but never seriously troubled leaders.
Always towards rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace until the 800 M, shuffled back 700 M out and still 7Ls down into home straight, without racing room from 200 M to 100 M, never nearer.
3-back the fence in 6th when 4Ls off pace at 1400 M, struggling when 7Ls down near the rear entering straight, soon well beaten and eased close home.
Pressed on out 3-wide no cover to dispute lead at 1400 M, led on fence at 1200 M and clear by 1L until headed at top of home straight, rallied well inside final 50 M. (Lame.)
Pressed on out 3-wide no cover from midfield to go 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, led at top of home straight, headed 200 M out, kept on well for 2nd.
Disputed lead out 2-wide early on, 3Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M and same entering straight, failed to quicken up.
Ridden along from widest draw and travelled 3-wide amongst leaders from 900 M. Commenced to fade before straightening and weakened out in the straight.
Settled 3-wide at midfield until home straight. Ran on without threatening in the closing stages.
Settled on fence at midfield. 2Ls down on straightening, improved steadily in the straight but unable to threatening winner.
Settled in rear section and made the home turn in a 3-wide position. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Ridden along to race in a forward position. Raced 2-wide amongst leaders in making the turn. Dropped out steadily inside 300 M.
Dropped to the rear shortly after start and trailed field into the straight. Lacked a response in the closing stages. (Lame.)
Quickest on jumping but dropped back to race behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and made up ground in the straight.
Led briefly before dropping back to 3-wide in front of midfield. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and then settled in a 2-wide position behind front runners. Quickened and charged to the lead at 200 M.
Settled on fence behind the leaders. Held up in a box seat for some distance after straightening. Kept on steadily in the closing stages to make the frame.
Ridden early and raced in the lead or disputed lead until home straight. Remained in front until fading out in the final 200 M.
Missed the jump and raced towards the back. Made the turn along the rails and switched out on straightening. Rallied home nicely for a minor placing.
3-back the fence 4Ls behind lead in 5th at 800 M, 2-wide on straightening when 2Ls down in 4th, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well to lead final strides only to be done on the line.
In midfield about 5Ls off pace down the back, under pressure when 2Ls down in 5th entering straight, failed to quicken and weakened right out close home. (Blood in trachea.)
Slowly away, unbalanced at 800 M when 8Ls off pace towards rear, improved for pressure on the bend to be 4Ls down, no clear passage at 200 M, kept on fairly late.
11Ls last at 1000 M, 8Ls down entering straight in rear, never a factor.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls back in 4th at 800 M, wider at 700 M, 3-wide entering straight when 2Ls down in 6th, no extra and beaten over 200 M out.
Prominent on fence early, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M and 1L down in 3rd off home turn, outpaced by leading quartet inside 300 M but stayed on best of the rest.
Soon led, headed 1000 M out and 2Ls down in 3rd on fence at 800 M, improved to lead at top of home straight and 1L clear at 200 M, outpaced inside final 50 M.
Slow away and switched from wide gate to fence, about 10Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, always well behind.
Worked hard out 3-wide no cover at 1000 M, led by 2Ls on fence at 700 M, headed at top of home straight and one-paced thereafter.
5Ls off pace in midfield on fence down the back, 3-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in midfield, all out when 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, no extra.
Held up towards rear about 8Ls off pace down back stretch, 4Ls down into home straight, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, ran on very strongly late to lead on line.
2-wide and 6Ls behind in 8th at 800 M, improved out 4-wide (widest of all) entering straight when 3Ls down in midfield, every chance 1L down at 200 M, kept finding, just failed.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace at 800 M, 4Ls down when 3-wide turning for home, always outpaced by principals.
Never better than midfield, one from rear and 10Ls off pace down backstretch, 7Ls down in 12th entering straight, never involved.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in midfield down backstretch, struggling to hold this position at top of stretch, no impression.
On fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace worse than midfield until home straight, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on without threatening.
Held up towards rear about 9Ls off pace at 800 M, checked at 700 M, 6Ls down in 12th off home turn, without a clear run from 300 M to 100 M, ran on once clear, nearest at finish.
Disputed lead early on, settled 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at 800 M, 1L down in 3rd entering straight, led over 200 M out, hung on gamely under pressure.
Unbalanced at start, always worse than midfield, about 6Ls behind through to home straight when 3-wide, made some minor late ground.
Bumped at start, keen early, 3-wide without cover when 6Ls off pace in 8th or so, improved 3-wide and 4Ls down in 7th into straight, stayed on fairly without posing a serious threat.
Slowly away, about 8Ls last early on, checked at 700 M, 3-wide and 6Ls down in rear turning for home, always held.
Bumped at start, led at 1000 M, disputed lead out 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, no extra after being headed 250 M out.
Head up at 900 M and tended to over-race, 7Ls down early on, 4-wide (widest of all) when 5Ls behind in 10th on straightening, no extra and soon well beaten.
Box-seat run on 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, bumped when short of room 350 M out, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on finding but post came too soon.
Soon led, headed briefly before disputing lead from 800 M to top of home straight, soon swamped and faded sharply inside final 200 M.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls behind in mid-division down the back and same into home straight, not much room at 200 M when 2Ls down in midfield, ran on without being fully tested.
4Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 3-wide when 3Ls down in 5th into home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well late but couldn't head quinella pair.
3-back the fence within 3Ls of the pace in 5th until 800 M, about 2Ls down in 5th at top of stretch, 1L down in 4th at the 200 M, held when short of room late.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3Ls 4th 800 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Near rear. Short-lived effort on outside final turn. Made no show in straight.
Soon prominent. 2-1/2Ls 3rd from 1600 M. 1L 2nd rounding home bend. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Was held up when found no room 350 M. Not fully tested.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Soon recovered some ground to be in touch. 4Ls 5th rounding home bend. Kept on but found no extra passing 200 M.
Slowly away, always at the back.
Settled midfield. Ran on from 6th 400 M to take control final 100 M. Kept on well.
Well there. 2nd to 800 M where he became 3rd. Failed to quicken when held up on the inside rail in straight.
Towards rear. Just behind midfield final turn. Made ground strongly but winner was too good.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on steadily final 200 M.
Led. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Near rear. Made up some ground on outside inside 300 M.
Never better than midfield.
Near rear. Ran on strongly final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Only made minor progress when asked 250 M out.
Jumped well to be in the front early. Raced 2Ls 3rd from 1000 M. 4th rounding home bend. Sustained effort in straight to take control passing 150 M.
Led field soon after start. Held 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on well from 8th 250 M to take 2nd close home.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to just behind midfield 400 M. Ran on in straight to just miss a minor placing.
In touch early, soon just behind midfield. Dropped back steadily while hanging out home bend.
Moved up from widest draw to be 4th 800 M. Improved to 2nd 450 M. Faded steadily soon after straightening. Wide throughout.
Raced 6th to early straight. Weakened 200 M.
Last to final turn. Made up some ground in straight.
Mainly 3Ls behind lead in 5th throughout.
Sat outside leader to home bend. 2Ls 4th turning in. Kept on but found no extra inside 150 M.
Always well back.
Well there. Shifted out under pressure in straight. Kept on one pace to the line.
Never far off to straight. Soon lost touch.
Never better than midfield.
Ridden for speed early. Settled in 5th in forward of midfield. Took closer order turning in. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Well there. Dropped out rounding home bend. (Lame.)
Virtually made all. Held on well to the line.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Never nearer.
Soon dropped to last few.
With leaders early. Steadied to midfield around Rock. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Sat outside leader until finding no extra inside 150 M.
Midfield. Improved to 4th approaching 1000 M. 3Ls behind lead far side. Weakened 200 M out.
Slightly behind midfield. Improved slightly to 5th far side. Kept on well in straight but was one-paced close home. (Bled.)
Led. Kept on but failed to resist winner's challenges when headed near 100 M.
In touch early. Dropped to the rear group from 1200 M. No progress. Tailed off in straight.
Behind midfield. Progressed slightly to 6th rounding home bend. Ran on steadily to share a minor placing at finish.
Slowly away, shifted to the rail in the rear. Recovered some ground 600 M out to be 6th final turn. Ran on when clear run was obtained passing 150 M. Stopped riding just before finish to avoid heels.
Towards rear. Made some progress to 8th 400 M. Failed to quicken when asked in straight.
Ridden early to be in touch. Midfield 1100 M. Dropped out rounding home bend. (Roarer.)
In touch on inside. 2Ls 3rd from 1200 M to 200 M where he ran on well to take command inside 100 M.
Last to 800 M. Slightly improved to 9th turning in. Made ground along rail in straight. Severely checked 50 M while running on.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back passing 1200 M. Tailed off in straight.
Close up 3-wide. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Never a danger.
Ridden to lead from widest draw. Crossed to rails coming out of home straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on quite well inside final 200 M but outsprinted by winner.
Settled behind leaders. Did not find much room on rails the length of straight.
Settled in midfield. Came to challenge under pressure when tight between runners early in straight. Made no impression closing stages.
Always well there. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled mainly better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Waited with. Obtained clear passage 200 M out. Finished off race well to get up on line.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent to 400 M. Weakened.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Responded well when asked 250 M out but was unable to match speed with winner to settle for 2nd.

Broke well and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Made steady impression inside final 200 M and missed 3rd placegetter by a short margin.
Broke with field and niggled along to race in handy position on inner through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out and weakened slightly over the concluding stages.
Slowly away and then trailed the field throughout the race.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in a forward position 3-wide in the early stages. Took lead on rail near the 1000 M to straight. Headed near the 200 M and steadily faded thereafter.
Soon raced in the rear section 3-wide without cover through to straight. Failed to show any running when asked 250 M out.

Best out from widest and driven along to take lead on rail. Around the 1100 M eased back to be in 2nd to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 200 M out but unable to match speed with 1st pair inside final 100 M.
Broke fairly and pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and charged home inside final 100 M to win convincingly.
Broke with field and raced towards the rear 2-wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Kept on fairly to the line when asked 200 M.
From a wide draw was immediately eased to the rear section but closer to the rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.

Tardy start from wide draw and niggled along to race in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Slightly baulked for a run in early part of straight. Plugged on fairly to the line when running was obtained at 200 M.
Broke fairly and soon settled in the rear section on rail through to straight. Failed to make any impression when asked 200 M out.
1L off pace in 3rd out 2-wide at 1100 M, 3Ls back in 4th at 800 M, closer entering straight and 1L down in 4th at 200 M, little chance with winner.
6Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 7th on straightening, kept on at same pace.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off speed in 9th at 1100 M, hard-pressed to improve from same position entering straight, didn't.
Over-raced early on, 3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 5th or 6th from 1100 M to homestretch, always held thereafter.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home straight, switched out to lead 200 M out, quickened away, comfortably.
8Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, always in rear group and never got any closer to the leaders.
Slowly away, one from rear when 9Ls off pace at 1100 M and hard ridden in similar position at 400 M, made some minor late ground.
Slowly away, keen early, 9Ls last when 2-wide at 1200 M, under strong pressure at 500 M and 10Ls last on the swing, never a factor.
Soon led on fence, always less than 1L clear until home straight, no extra after being headed 200 M out.
Keen early and pressed on 3-wide no cover until getting in 2-wide less than 1L down in 2nd from 1000 M. Remained same to 250 M out when under strong pressure, faded through final furlong.
4Ls off pace on fence in 6th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight, ran on fairly well for a place, only just missing quinella spot.
Bumped at start, 5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 7th at 1100 M, similarly placed off home turn, never troubled principals.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight before being crowded at 100 M. Kept on thereafter.
Missed the jump and raced at the rear. Improved a bit after 600 M but failed to sustain effort shortly after.
Dropped back to race on fence in rear section. Switched out on straightening and closed the race off with a nice rally.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past a few weakening runners.
Took the lead early and held a length's advantage into the home straight. Weakened and was swamped inside final 200 M.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken in the home straight.
2-wide in rear section. Made a move from a wide position after 500 M to reach within 2Ls of the leader on straightening. Contended for the lead at 200 M but unable sustain effort closing stages.
Jumped well. Tracked leader in a 2-wide position. Kept pace after straightening before fading inside 200 M.
Botched the start and then niggled to be in a prominent position behind the leader. Remained behind the leader on straightening and weakened near 200 M. (Mucus.)
Ridden to a forward position. Settled 2-wide and 3Ls off the leader back straight. Dashed to the front inside 200 M but failed to hold off placegetters closing stages.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Swung out on straightening, quickened under pressure and got up close to the line.
Niggled along early and then settled on fence at midfield after 1300 M. 4Ls off the lead at 800 M. Improved steadily in the straight and kept on well to line for a minor placing.
Switched from wide gate to fence to be 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, keen in places, 7Ls down in 10th entering home straight, never looked likely.
Had the box seat run on fence in 3rd 2Ls off speed until home turn, every chance when 1L down at 300 M, kept on well but never able to poke head in front.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, hard pressed to lie up turning for home, weakened.
4Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 5Ls down in midfield off final bend, always outpaced.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L until home turn, still 1L clear at 200 M, reeled in by winner close home.
3-back the fence when 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 4th entering straight, faded out quickly thereafter.
Slowly away, 11Ls last at 1100 M, 4-wide without cover at 600 M and 6-wide (widest of all) when taking final bend 8Ls last, no impression.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1100 M, closer turning for home, failed to quicken up inside final 300 M.
9Ls off pace and one from rear at halfway, not much better off turning into stretch, made some minor late ground.
Settled 7Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1100 M, hooked out to improve 4-wide no cover at 450 M but failed to make much impression in the stretch.
Always 3-wide without cover, 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1100 M, improved 3Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, struggling to keep this spot on the circle and beaten before home turn.
4-back the fence about 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, 5Ls down entering straight in 6th, 4Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, ran on strongly to lead final strides.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on quite well final 200 M. (Roarer.)
In the middle to halfway where he made ground steadily to just miss 2nd narrowly.
Tardy start, always at the back.
Held slender advantage until headed 400 M. Failed to match speed with winner final 200 M. Just held on for 2nd. Hung in.
Prominent. Weakened steadily from 3rd 400 M.
Towards rear throughout.
2nd last to 400 M. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always well there. Took clear lead passing 400 M. Kept on very well final 200 M.
Soon dropped to the rear.
Prominent to 300 M. Dropped out under pressure.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made up late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Well there to 300 M. Found no extra under pressure.
Never better than midfield.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Made modest progress final 200 M without threatening.
With leaders early. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Well there. Moved up to the front 200 M out. Won impressively.
Mostly in midfield. No extra inside final 200 M.
Soon dropped to rear.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Led field from 1000 M. Held on well final 200 M to win readily.
Ridden along to 4th 1000 M. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Towards rear soon after start. Made ground moderately closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on without threatening 250 M.
Led briefly early, raced 3rd 1000 M out. Kept on until one-paced final 300 M.
Always 2nd. Attempted to tackle the winner early straight but effort not sustained.
Slowly away, towards rear early. Made up some ground to 7th 800 M. Ran on steadily 400 M to just miss 2nd.
Midfield from widest draw. Failed to quicken in straight.
Prominent briefly after start, then dropped towards the rear. Made no show.
Near rear. Made some minor recovery inside 200 M.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Never far off to straight. No extra under pressure.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in midfield. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Always in last few. (Mucus in trachea.)
Virtually made all. Fought on well under pressure to the line.
Never seen with a chance.
Well there. Disputed lead turning in. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Towards rear early. Short-lived effort rounding home bend. No further impression in straight.
Broke fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position 4 wide without cover. Near the 800 M commenced to give ground and tailed out in straight.
Broke well and soon raced in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M but became one-pace inside the final 150 M.
Broke with field from wide draw and steadily settled in a rearward position 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but failed to show much running in straight.
Unable to muster early speed to race behind midfield 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but was overhauled by 3rd and 4th placegetters in the closing stages.

Slowly away from wide draw and soon raced at the rear closer to the rail. Made little headway rounding home turn. Baulked for run in early to middle part of straight. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and settled in a rearward position 3 wide with cover. Made little headway from the widest at home turn. Failed to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly from widest and ridden along to race in midfield out wide no cover. Obtained cover running down back straight. Commenced to give ground at home turn and faded out in straight.

Broke fairly and raced in rearward position on rail. Made up little ground at home bend. Switched to the middle in straight to obtain clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to miss 3rd place narrowly.

Jumped awkwardly and ridden along to race in midfield on rail. Made little headway and switched to the outside at home turn. Near the 200 M was inconvenienced whilst running on evenly and faded thereafter.
Slow to begin and raced at the tail on rail through to straight. Unable to show any impression when asked 350 M out.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in a forward position 3 wide without cover through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and plugged on fairly without threatening the principals.
Began well and raced in a forward position 2 wide. Crept closer to the leader at home bend. Responded well when asked 300 M out and took charge inside final 100 M.
Broke well and ridden along to take lead on rail. Around the 900 M was headed and placed under pressure to maintain a forward position at home turn. Steadily dropped out in home straight.

Jumped with field and pushed along to race 1/2L off leader whilst hanging out. Near the 900 M went forward to take lead to straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M out but was unable to match speed with winner inside final 100 M.
4Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M on fence, struggling to hold this position entering home straight, faded out.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 10th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover down backstretch and only 3Ls down in midfield entering straight, picked up well to lead at 100 M, kept on.
Led out 2-wide by less than 1L from 1200 M to home straight, all out when headed at 200 M, faded final 100 M.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, left 3-wide with no cover at 800 M when 2Ls down in 4th, 1L down in 2nd at 400 M and disputing lead at 200 M, no extra close home.
Settled 9Ls last at 1200 M, 7Ls back in 12th at 800 M, 3-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, ran on well into the money close home.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield at final bend, always a shade outpaced by principals.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide no cover 1L down in 3rd at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd with cover at 800 M, about 1L down in 3rd when hindered and clipping heels at 200 M, swamped late.
Slowly away, 2-wide when 7Ls off speed in 12th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover on circle and 4Ls down in 8th entering straight, made some minor late ground.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in rear entering home straight, didn't have much room in stretch but ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Keen early on when prominent on fence, no worse than 2Ls back in 5th until 600 M, hung out and awkward entering straight, never had much room on fence late, eased close home.
5Ls behind in 9th on fence at 1200 M, still towards rear on straightening, held up from 300 M to 200 M, main group had flown once clear late, hardly tested at all.
On fence 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, same entering straight, swamped at 200 M.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, unbalanced at 700 M, 5Ls down in 9th into home straight, never troubled leaders.
On fence and kept within 3Ls of the leader in 4th back- straight. Steadily closed in on the leader rounding home turn. Took the lead near 200 M but was soon headed by the charging winner.

Jumped well to a forward position but caught 4-wide into first turn. Gradually dropped back to settle at midfield after 1200 M. 4-wide making home turn and steadily gain ground on straightening. Effort not sustained.
Checked after start and trailed field early stages. Kept in rear section throughout backstraight and among last few to enter home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Behind midfield in a 3-wide position. Ridden along making the home turn in a wide position but failed to advance. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Jumped well from wide draw and dropped back to the rear. Trailed field backstraight and swung widest on straigh- tening. Made up some ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Soon in front. Held a length's advantage into home straight and was swamped inside final 100 M. (Bled.)
Settled on fence at midfield. Reached within 3Ls of the leader on straightening. Stayed on until tiring inside 200 M. (Bled.)
Ridden early and caught widest at midfield entering first turn. Raced 2-wide in front of midfield backstraight. Pressured to keep pace at 500 M and weakened final 300 M.
Settled comfortably in a 2-wide position behind midfield. Taken to the outside on straightening and quickened nicely. Swept past rivals in the straight for an easy win.
Checked shortly after start and settled no better than midfield. Saved ground along the fence at home turn and steadily made up ground in the home straight.
Ridden forward and was in a disputed lead early stages. Tracked leader in the backstraight. Remained in the hunt early straight but unable to find extra to contend in closing stages.
Dropped to the back at the start and remained in a rearward position until home straight. Closed the race off well to make the frame.
Ridden out of the gates to a forward position. 3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leader backstraight. Continued to be wide making home turn and weakened on straightening.
Outpaced early stages and raced in rear section. Niggled along to keep pace 1200 M. 3-wide making the turn and was last few to enter home straight. Rallied well from behind for a minor placing.
Best away, had box-seat run about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 800 M to home straight, led at 200 M, headed by winner at 50 M and lost 2nd on line.
Never on terms, detached and 10Ls last entering home straight, got no closer.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th entering straight, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, no chance with winner but stayed on well to grab 2nd on line.
6Ls off pace and worse than midfield when 3-wide with cover at 900 M, 4Ls down in 7th entering straight, one-paced thereafter.
Worse than midfield and 6Ls off pace at 800 M, hung out on the circle, always outpaced and continued to hang out badly in stretch, finished closer to stands' rail.
Slowly away, on fence no better than midfield and 5Ls off pace until home straight, no threat.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield until the 600 M, 3Ls down in 6th entering straight, picked up well to lead 50 M out, ran on.
Hung out horribly throughout, 4-wide no cover when 3Ls off pace at 800 M, continued to hang out and further behind when 5-wide (widest) entering straight, intractable.
Slowest away and never better than midfield, always at least 6Ls off pace.
Led at 1000 M, clear by 1L at 800 M, headed at top of home straight and faded out very quickly.
2-wide and 1L off speed in 2nd at 1000 M, led at top of home straight, headed at 200 M, weakened markedly late on.
Prominent. Faded gradually in straight.
1L off pace in 3rd when 2-wide at 800 M, severely hampered at 600 M and forced 6-wide (widest) entering straight when 7Ls last, no impression and eased close home.
Crowded at start, always worse than midfield on fence at least 5Ls off pace until home straight, further outpaced thereafter.
Slowest away, 3Ls off pace in 6th when 2-wide at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, weakened markedly final 200 M.
3-back the fence and 4Ls off pace in mid-division at 800 M, over 2Ls down in 4th entering straight and still 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well to lead close home.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, closer entering straight, ran on well final stages, nearest at finish.
Slowly away, 8Ls last at the 800 M, 6Ls down entering straight, made some late ground without bothering principals.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, severely hampered and carried right out at 700 M, well behind and eased down from top of home straight.
Pressed on to dispute lead out 2-wide at 800 M, broke down about 600 M out, soon dismounted, euthanized.
Soon led on fence by 1L, same margin clear entering straight, headed at 200 M, no extra close home.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 800 M to 600 M, 1L down in 2nd at top of home straight, led at 200 M, headed close home and lost 2nd on line.
Over-raced down backstretch with head-up, hung out at 700 M when 4Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 8th or 9th, 5- wide entering straight and 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on, never nearer.
5Ls off pace in 9th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th when 3-wide entering straight, ran on strongly to take 2nd on line.
Never better than midfield.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace throughout.
Towards rear. Made short-lived effort early straight but soon found no extra.
Towards rear. Improved rounding home bend. Widest final turn. Weakened from 7th 200 M out.
In touch. Held 3Ls 4th before progressing to 3rd final turn. Ran on solidly to just beaten marginally in a ding- dong battle closing stages.
2nd last to straight. Only made some minor recovery inside 250 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Soon well there. 1-1/2Ls 2nd far side. Held on until weakening out of contention 300 M.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered some ground far side to 8th or 9th. Crept closer on inside to 5th 400 M. Ran on solidly to just get up in a ding-dong battle closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered good ground final 250 M.
Prominent. 2nd or 3rd rounding home bend. Faded on straightening.
Led field soon after start. Held 2Ls advantage 400 M. Kept on but found no extra where asked when headed closing stages.
Slowly away, near rear. Soon recovered ground to stay in midfield or slightly better. Kept on steadily in straight to take 3rd close home.
Last from 1000 M. No response when asked early straight.
Mainly 10th to 300 M. Made some minor recovery inside 200 M.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield. Made ground from outside to be 4th on 4-wide rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Jumped well from widest draw, prominent early. Soon raced in 5th or 6th. Kept on same pace in straight.
Made all. Won unchallenged.
In touch. 2Ls 4th from 1000 M, 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on under pressure but failed to threaten the winner.
In touch. 2nd 900 M out. Held on until weakening out of contention final 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Mainly 9th to final turn. Recovered ground steadily thereafter.
Midfield or slightly better. Improved to 4th turning in. 3rd 150 M. Failed to hold place when one-paced closing stages.
Began awkwardly, soon moved up to be just behind midfield. Picked up steadily early straight but found no extra while hanging in 100 M.
Midfield. Crept closer on inside to 5th early straight. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Well back. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Unable to sustain effort when forced to switch ground behind runners inside final 200 M.
Always well there. Swamped for a placing closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Settled in last few. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran home one-paced under pressure from midfield into straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure down straight without threatening.
Took up running around stables bend and led field until swamped close to home.
Settled mainly in midfield. Ran on dourly under pressure inside final 200 M to get up near finish.
Never on terms.
Settled in rear of midfield. Did not find much room over 200 M out. One-paced closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Rear. Made ground on outside to midfield far side. Widest final turn. Made no show in straight.
Midfield. Crept closer to 5th final turn. Found no extra 200 M out.
Never able to feature.
Mostly 4th on inside rails. Improved to 3rd final turn. Kept on in straight.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 250 M, never nearer.
At the back. Made ground steadily on outside inside 300 M.
About 2Ls to 3Ls behind lead. Failed to catch the winner while under pressure closing stages.
Slightly slowly away, soon moved up to raced in 3rd. Remained there until becoming 4th 400 M. Held on without quickening in straight. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Mainly 5th before dropping back steadily to behind midfield far side. Unable to quicken in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Made all. Held on under pressure final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move turning for home. Sustained progress on rails in straight despite rider lost whip 200 M out. Just denied.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well to have every chance throughout closing stages but pipped at post.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Quickened well to hit front over 100 M out. Just held on to the line.
Settled behind midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and ran on well to do best work at finish despite tight between runners.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend 4-wide. Soon weakened in straight.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground in straight.
Chased leader to 400 M. Found nothing under pressure.
Settled in forward of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Raced 3-wide throughout. Ridden to close-up position early, settling in midfield. Short-lived effort coming off Rock before dropped out approaching home turn.
Jumped best. Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200 M.
Slowly away from wide draw and ridden along to race in a forward position 4-wide without cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position 3-wide. Near the 1000 M was checked to avoid heels. Unable to show much running in home straight.

Broke well but unable to muster early speed and raced in midfield on rail. Near 1000 M was checked when closed to heels. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish when asked 300 M out.
Soon eased to a rearward position towards the outside in the early stages. Found clear going down back straight. All out 200 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Began well and ridden along to race in a rearward position around 3-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside final 150 M.

Jumped well from wide draw and pushed along to race in midfield around 3-wide to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M but just failed to catch the 2nd placegetter.
Began well and soon raced 1L off pace 2-wide. Niggled along at home bend to race outside the leader. Responded well when asked 300 M out and pulled away from the rest inside final 150 M.
Failed to muster early speed to race towards the rear 2-wide. Near the 1000 M was checked to avoid heels. Ridden along at home bend to maintain position but failed to make any impression in straight.

Broke with field from widest and pushed along to take lead on rail from 1000 M to straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M out but was unable to match speed with the winner inside final 200 M and held onto 2nd.

Broke well and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail. Near the 1000 M was checked badly when crowded for room. Soon recovered to race 2Ls off pace to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out but without threatening.

Sluggish start and pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Near 1000 M checked when closed to heels and dropped to a rearward position to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Broke with field from wide draw and settled in midfield or worse out wide without cover whilst proving difficult to settle. Tailed out in straight.
5Ls off speed in 4th on fence at 1100 M, 3Ls down entering straight, all out when 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, lacked an extra kick.
7Ls behind on fence in 6th at 1100 M, hindered at 600 M and 5Ls down in mid-division entering straight, always outpaced. (Lame.)
Checked at start and one from rear at 1100 M when 11Ls off pace, 5-wide on straightening when 6Ls off pace in 11th, kept on fairly late, nearest at finish.
2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd at 1100 M, unbalanced at 600 M when brushing rail, 2Ls down in 3rd off final bend, faded rapidly.
9Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1100 M, still towards rear when 6Ls off pace at 1100 M, no threat.
Switched from widest gate to fence to be 12Ls last 1100 M out, improved out 5-wide no cover from 500 M and 6-wide (widest of all) entering straight when 6Ls last, ran on well, never nearer.
In 10th place on fence about 10Ls off speed at 1100 M, 6Ls down when held up on fence in rear on straightening, made some minor late ground.
Bumped at start, 8Ls off pace in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 6th when 3-wide on straightening, picked up nicely to lead at 100 M, ran on well.
10Ls behind in 9th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 4-wide entering homestretch when 5Ls off pace in 9th or so, one-paced in the finish.
Led at 200 M, 5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 3rd at 1100 M, 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 600 M, led about 250 M out, headed at 100 M, faded slightly close home.
Crowded and bumped at start, 7Ls off pace in 5th when 2-wide at 1100 M, over 2Ls down in 4th turning for home, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Soon led by 2Ls on fence, always over-racing and hanging out, headed at top of home straight and faded out.
Slowly away and was ridden along early stages. Kept within 3Ls of the leader in 2-wide position until straightening. Held up near 200 M and unable to pick up once in the clear.
Jumped well and contested for the early lead. Dropped to midfield after 800 M but was 3-wide. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Niggled along to be 3-wide in a forward position. Continued to be 3-wide and a length off the lead rounding the turn. Kept pace in the straight but unable to draw closer final stages.

Dropped to rear section from a wide draw. Ridden along to keep pace rounding home turn and was among last few to enter home straight. Swung to the outside for a run and close the race off with a strong rally.
Outpaced early stages and raced in a rearward position. Saved ground making home turn and was among last few to enter home straight. Made up some ground in the closing stages.
Sluggish start and trailed field. Last to enter home straight and never quickened.
Jumped fairly and was ridden to take the lead. Opened up a 2Ls advantage final 200 M but was headed by winner at 50 M.
Broke sharply and tracked leader until home straight. Kept on well over the concluding stages to make the frame.
Niggled along among leaders before settling on fence and within 3Ls of the pace. Kept on well in the straight and ran down the early leader final 50 M.
Off slowly. On fence and no better than midfield until home turn. Kept on in the straight before checking at 200 M. Unable to recover thereafter.
Jumped well, failed to match pace with leaders and dropped back to settle near midfield. Improved steadily in the straight but was held up in traffic over the last 150 M.
Caught racing wide and without cover at midfield. Tired in the closing stages.
6Ls off pace in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 5Ls off pace in 8th entering straight, short of room at 300 M and not much room in stretch, not fully tested.
4-wide no cover at 1300 M, pressed on to dispute lead out 2-wide from 1100 M to 500 M out, faded out steadily from top of home straight.
Always in rear and never better than 8Ls off pace until home straight, made some minor late ground.
7Ls off pace in 9th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in 9th entering straight, always one-paced.
Best away, 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1100 M, 3-wide on home turn when 2Ls down in 3rd, soon outpaced.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, over 1L down in 2nd at 200 M but failed to sustain effort.
One from rear when 9Ls off pace in 11th at 1100 M, 6Ls down in rear turning for home, ran on well, never nearer.
Always on fence about 4Ls or so off pace in 5th or 6th until the home turn, switched inside off home turn to lead 100 M out, ran on strongly.
