Always 3-wide without cover and prominent in 4th or so and 2Ls off pace until 500 M out, drifting back when 3-wide entering straight.
8Ls behind lead when 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 7Ls off pace on straightening, ran on well late to place.
Fractious in gates, 8Ls off pace in 7th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 6th off home turn, all out to hold this spot at 200 M, faded.
Soon led, disputing lead on fence from 1100 M to home straight, over 1L clear at 200 M but no extra once headed at the 100 M.
Slightly behind midfield. 7th early straight. Ran on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. 1L 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on but failed quicken to challenge final 200 M.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Never far off. 2Ls 4th final turn. Responded well 300 M to just miss narrowly at finish.
Near rear throughout.
Prominent 2nd early. Dropped to 4th 800 M. Weakened steadily inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on moderately closing stages.
Towards rear. Kept on to make some minor recovery 200 M out.
Jumped well from widest draw. Joined the lead approaching 800 M. 1L 2nd final turn. Faded 250 M.
Towards rear. Made ground under pressure final 150 M.
Led field soon after start. Was joined near 800 M but regained 1L advantage final turn. Kept on but was one-paced when headed inside 100 M.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Towards rear to straight. Failed to recover when found no clear passage 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch early, dropped back gradually to midfield 800 M. Ran on well along rail from 6th 400 M to hit front inside 100 M. Just held on.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back a bit when wide rounding home bend. Unable to improve in straight.
Travelled in midfield along rails. Ran on down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never a danger.
Well back. Made up some late ground past beaten horses in straight.
Jumped in air at start. Remained well back and never seen with a chance.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Ran on down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
In similar position throughout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Jumped best to lead. Narrowly headed 200 M out. Fought on under pressure but swamped for a placing late.
Midfield to straight. Faded gradually. (Swollen RF hock.)
Settled just off the pace. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out for a run early in straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader. Gained narrow advantage 200 M out. Held on well to the line.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Towards rear. Made some progress rounding home bend to be 7th early straight. One-paced.
Midfield on outside. Hung out badly home turn.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Dropped back steadily home bend.
Towards rear. Gradual progress to midfield 800 M. Kept on.
Made all. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Mainly 5th to straight. Found no extra.
Slowly away, never a factor. (Bled.)
In touch. Advanced to 3rd approaching 100 M. 2-1/2Ls 4th early straight. Ran on solidly inside 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Towards rear throughout. (Mucus.)
Raced 2nd from 1400 M and was mainly 1L behind. Kept on well until finding no extra close home.
Prominent from widest draw, settling 3rd. 3Ls 4th near 1000 M. Was 3rd early straight when under pressure. Kept on well.
Better than midfield. Crept a bit closer to 5th 600 M. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Always at the back.
Towards rear. Crept a bit closer to 7th final turn. One-paced.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Broke well and led early. Close up rounding home bend. Weakened gradually inside final 300 M.
Wide in midfield to straight. Kept on same pace without threatening.
Soon took up running. Went 2Ls clear upon straightening. Unable to sustain effort closing stages and headed close home.
Settled in midfield. Steadied early in straight. Made no impression inside final 200 M.
Tightened shortly after start. Remained in last few throughout.
Settled in last few. Took closer order approaching home turn but not much room turning in. Made up some ground late.
Midfield early. Towards rear rounding home bend. Made moderate progress down centre of straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Quickened quite well inside final 200 M to snatch victory close to home.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish despite steadied inside 200 M.
Ridden early. Travelled 3-wide just off the pace to straight. No extra.
Raced wide behind midfield. Kept on same pace down centre of straight. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Broke fairly and soon settled in better than midfield 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. All out 300 M out and ran on fairly but became one-pace in the closing stages.
Jumped fairly from wide gate and soon eased to the rear around 3 wide to straight. Near the 100 M whilst closing the race off fairly was steadied when crowded for room and became one-pace thereafter.
Broke with field and raced in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out and did best work over the concluding stages.

Broke fairly and pushed along to race beside the leader. Shortly after the 1000 M went forward to take lead on rail to straight. Responded strongly when asked 350 M and pulled away from the rest inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to a rear- ward position closer to rail. Switched wide on straigh- tening to obtain clear running. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to snatch 2nd place on the line.
Best out from an outside draw and steadily settled in worse than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken.
Began well from wide gate and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Stayed one- pace when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Broke with field and niggled along to take narrow lead on fence. After the 1000 M was headed and raced in 2nd place to straight. Responded quite well when asked 350 M but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter on the line.
Began awkwardly and niggled along to race in midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Unable to show much impression when asked 400 M out.
Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and ran on fairly but was never in position to trouble the principals.
From the widest gate was immediately steadied to the rear but on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and ran past couple of beaten runners in the closing stages.

Tardy start and soon settled in worse than midfield 2 wide. Whilst running on fairly was baulked for a run near the 200 M and continue to close the race off fairly when running was obtained around the 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield 3 wide without cover. Made headway from the out- side at home turn to be 2Ls off pace on straightening. Kept on fairly to the line when asked 350 M out.
5Ls off pace in 6th at 1400 M, crept 2Ls off pace in 4th at top of home straight, picked up well to lead 200 M out, finished strongly.
3-wide with cover when 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1400 m, broke down at 1000 M and soon dismounted.
Slowly away, 9Ls off pace on fence in 11th at 1400 M, 6Ls down in midfield entering home straight, always held.
Checked at start, 10Ls behind in 12th at 1400 M, still towards rear when 6Ls off pace off final bend, made some minor late ground while hanging in.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 4th at 1400 M, 3Ls back in 4th at 800 M, 3-wide entering straight when under 1L down in 3rd, led at 300 M but headed at 200 M, no chance with winner but hung on for 2nd.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence until the 800 M, under pressure to lie up at 600 M, faded out from top of home straight, tailed off.
3-wide no cover 1L off pace in 2nd at 1600 M, over 1L down in 2nd when 2-wide at 800 M, hung out turning for home when disputing lead, still there at 200 M, lost a place on line.
Led by 1L on fence at 1600 M, 2Ls clear at 800 M, headed at top of home straight, well beaten at 200 M.
Switched from widest gate to fence and 12Ls last at 1400 M, 8Ls last entering home straight, no impression.
Slowly away, 7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in midfield turning for home, no impression thereafter.
2-wide and 5Ls behind in 7th from 1400 M to 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th entering home straight, always outpaced by principals.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 5th at 1400 M, 3-wide without cover in places, 3-wide into home straight when 2Ls down in 5th, same margin behind at 200 M, failed to quicken.
11Ls off pace one from rear at 1400 M, 6Ls down in 13th off final bend, no danger.
8Ls off pace in 10th when 2-wide at 1400 M, 4-wide on straightening when 5Ls down in midfield, ran on well to nick a place on the line.
Took charge from the start and set the pace. Held a length's advantage into the straight. Shook loose after 400 M under a steady hand ride and cruised home unchallenged.

Dropped back to race in rear section. Kept to the inside rounding home turn and was among last few to enter home straight. Steadied and shifted out at 400 M to make its run. Made up ground in the closing stages.
On fence and was 3Ls behind the leader 1000 M. Ridden along to keep pace home bend and made no impression in the straight.
Slowly away and raced at the rear. Swung out on straigh- tening for a rally. Kept on strongly until final 100 M.
Behind leaders early. Dropped back slight to settle 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace after 1000 M. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
3-wide in a forward position. Stayed within 2Ls of the leader but 3-wide rounding home turn. Kept pace before weakening inside 400 M.
Slow out of the gates and was ridden hard to be within 2Ls of the pace. 3-wide and 3Ls down making home turn. Brief dash on straightening but tired inside 200 M. (Lame.)
Jumped fairly and raced at midfield. Dropped slightly back after being crowded at 1200 M. Held up in traffic whilst commencing to make a run after 400 M. Closed the race off strongly once cleared.
Dropped back to settle in rear section. Only ran past a few weakening runners in the straight.
Settled no better than 3-wide at midfield. 6Ls down on straightening and charged home well to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and was niggled along to keep pace with leader. Hard ridden but failed to keep up after 600 M. Weakened on straightening.
Crowded at start but got in well 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M, 3-wide and 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, failed to quicken up and gone 200 M out.
6Ls off pace in 7th at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 6th when 2-wide at final bend, 1L down in 4th and every chance of a place at 200 M, lost a place on line.
Slowest away, 12Ls down and one from rear in 12th at 1400 M, 6Ls behind in rear group entering straight, never landed a blow.
Checked at start, 10Ls off pace when 2-wide in 11th at 1400 M, worse than midfield and 6Ls down when 4-wide entering straight, ran on strongly to nick a place in final strides. (Tendon injury.)
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 400 M to home straight, didn't have much room until the 200 M but well outpaced close home.
9Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1400 M, 6Ls down towards rear entering home straight, not enough dash.
13Ls last at 1400 M, 8Ls last entering straight, made some good late ground without troubling principals.
Keen at 1600 M and 4Ls behind lead when 2-wide in 6th at 1400 M, 4-wide entering straight when 4Ls back in midfield, beaten at 200 M.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1600 M, same entering straight when under pressure, a neck 2nd when all out at the 200 M, no extra.
Widest at 1700 M but got in 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1400 M, 4Ls down in midfield at top of stretch when hindered, 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on at same pace thereafter.
8Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1400 M, pressed on 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight when 5Ls down in midfield, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well but couldn't over- haul winner.
4Ls off pace in 5th at 1400 M and niggled along slightly in same position at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th at top of stretch, quickened up well to lead at 200 M, stayed on strongly.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L from 1600 M to home turn, headed 300 M and faded fast.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 10th at 1000 M, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls off pace in 9th or so, stayed on well for a place but never likely to figure in quinella.
Slowest away, 8Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, mostly without cover in rear, gained cover from 800 M, 6Ls down in rear entering straight, finished off down centre of track, never dangerous.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, niggled along at 600 M and 2Ls down in 4th entering straight, one-paced from then on.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls down in 7th at 1200 M, 4-wide entering straight when about 2Ls down in 4th, quickened up to lead 250 M out, stayed on well.
4-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 5-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in 8th, outpaced.
Led by a neck on fence at 1200 M, still in front turning for home, headed 250 M out, one-paced close home.
4Ls off speed in 9th at 1000 M, 3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 9th entering homestretch, always held.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, held up when 2Ls down in midfield from 400 M to 200 M, baulked twice, ran on.
7Ls off pace in 12th at 1200 M on fence, 5Ls down in 11th on inner off home turn, kept on fairly, nearest at finish.
Settled 5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 11th at 1000 M, 5-wide entering straight when 4Ls off the speed, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well but too late to grab winner.
Keen early on, 3-wide with cover when 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd when 3-wide at top of stretch, all out when 2Ls down at 200 M, faded late on.
A neck 2nd when 3-wide no cover at 1200 M, 1L 2nd at 800 M and niggled along to lie up at 600 M, swamped 350 M out, eased down late.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 7th entering straight, very one-paced there- after.
Midfield or slight behind. Dropped to the rear group early straight. Ran on to make up some ground final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield to straight. Checked when found no clear run near 150 M. Inconvenienced 100 M. Unable to recover.
Prominent. Severely hampered near 100 M. Run ended.
Slowly away, near rear. Responded well from 9th early straight to take 2nd final 100 M.
Slightly better than midfield. 4-wide final turn. Responded well to reach 2nd momentarily 200 M. Kept on one-paced thereafter.
Prominent. Dropped to 6th final turn. Weakened in straight.
In touch. Severely checked and nearly fell near 100 M. Run ended.
Prominent from widest draw. Hit front approaching 200 M. Broke down near 100 M.
At the back. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground from outside closing stages.
Well there. In the leading pair rounding home bend. Found no extra when headed approaching 200 M.
Towards rear. Kept on in straight before severely checked near 100 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on well from outside in straight to assert authority final 100 M.
Remained 5th to straight where he failed to quicken.
In touch. Moved up from outside near 900 M to join the lead rounding home bend and took over early straight. Kept on but failed to contain the winner closing stages.
Ridden along to take lead approaching 1200 M. Was joined near 900 M. Kept on when headed early straight. Just lost a minor placing near finish.
Behind midfield on inside. Found no extra in straight.
Never a factor.
Near rear. Last from 600 M.
Always well there. Sat outside leader to 850 M where he became 1-1/2Ls 3rd. Ran on steadily in straight to gain upper hand closing stages.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 4th 950 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Near rear. Made up some ground from 8th at 200 M.
Began awkwardly and was at the back. Recovered some ground while hanging out home bend. Stayed on well from 6th 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Virtually made all. Hung on well under pressure to defy runner-up's strong challenge.
Prominent to 400 M. Weakened.
Soon dropped to rear.
Prominent. Weakened passing 400 M. (Lame.)
Never far off. Kept on same pace without quickening under pressure.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Prominent. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Always well there. Broke clear with leader passing 200 M, but unable to draw level throughout closing stages.
Midfield early. Dropped out onto course proper.
Never far off. Failed to quicken to challenge inside final 200 M.
Well there early. Dropped out onto course proper.
Quickly shifted out from widest draw to grandstand rails, racing alone in a position near rear of midfield of main group on inner of straight. Finished off race well to snatch 3rd place.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Produced some late impression inside final 200 M.
In touch. Progressed to 3rd passing 800 M. Failed to hold place when weakened inside 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. 3Ls 5th 400 M. Ran on under pressure to just prevail at finish.
Towards rear soon after start. Widest turning into straight. Kept on to make up some ground final 200 M.
Near rear. Made very minor progress in straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Ran on while hanging in in straight.
Led early. Dropped back a little to 4th 800 M. 2Ls behind lead 400 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Ran on steadily from 8th early straight to just obtain a minor placing.
Better than midfield. Gave a little ground to midfield home bend. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. Gave a little ground passing 100 M and was 5th 800 M. Dropped out in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Tardy start, at the back. Only ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon in touch. Moved up from 1st turn to be 2nd rounding home bend. Within 1L outside leader final turn. Kept on until weakening out of contention 250 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear passing 600 M. Given reminders from 400 M. Recovered some ground 250 M out.
Well there. Led field from 1200 M. Held 2Ls advantage 300 M. Kept on but just failed to resist challenges from winner close home.
Niggled along in prominent position. 3rd turning in. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening early in straight.
Inconvenienced at start. Soon picked up to midfield on rails. Dropped out upon straightening.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Obtained split 300 M out and ran on well to gain upper hand final strides.
Well there. Dropped out from approaching home turn. (Mucus in trachea.)
Never seen with a chance.
Raced keenly with leader far side. Hit front early in straight and went 1L clear 200 M out. Overhauled closing stages.
Settled towards the rear. Finished off race strongly down centre of straight to just fail to peg back winner.
Midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Held narrow advantage off rails to 350 M. Faded gradually.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Always in rear.
Forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Broke fairly and raced in midfield around 4 wide without cover. Made headway down back straight to be 2Ls off pace on straightening. No extra in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
From a wide gate was immediately eased to worse than midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M but without threatening at all.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in a forward position 2 wide with cover through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and responded fairly but was never in position to trouble the principals.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Ran on strongly when asked 400 M out and fought off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter inside final 200 M to win narrowly.

Jumped awkwardly from wide gate and pushed along to take lead on rail from around the 1600 M. Disputed lead down back straight to home straight. Kept on evenly when asked 400 M and weakened slightly after 200 M.
Broke well and led briefly on rail before settling in a forward position from around 1600 M to straight. All out 400 M and found the line well but was unable to up a gear to overhaul the winner.
Tardy start and soon raced at the rear section on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but was only able to run on evenly to the line.
Began well from widest and steadily settled in a rearward position around 3 wide with cover through to straight. Unable to show much running when asked 400 M out.
Tardy start from wide draw and soon settled in the rear section around 2 wide. Switched to the widest and made little headway at home bend but failed to run on in the straight.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and closed the race off well but was unable to match speed with first pair in the final stages.
Soon raced in midfield around 2 wide. Steadily shifted out at home bend to obtain clear running but was only able to keep on same pace to the line.

Slowly away from wide draw and soon raced in a rearward position 2 wide with cover. Around the 600 M switched out and ridden along to go forward. Ran on fairly without threatening when asked 400 M out.

Broke with field and soon settled in midfield or worse around 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to find clear running but near the 450 M was checked when crowded for room. Made up little ground inside final 250 M.
Slightly slow away and pushed along to race in midfield 2 wide. Around the 1300 M shifted out and went forward to join the leader to straight. Plugged on gamely to the line.
Prominent with run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M, led briefly at 250 M, outpaced by quinella pair.
2-wide and about 2Ls off pace in 4th down backstretch, labouring when 2Ls down in 4th at top of home straight, beaten at 300 M.
Tended to hang early, 4-wide no cover at 1000 M 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, 6-wide (widest of all) in rear on straightening, no danger.
Prominent, 3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 900 M, 3Ls down off home turn in mid-division, quite one-paced in straight.
Led early, crossed to fence at 900 M, headed 250 M out and weakened.
Mostly midfield 3-wide with cover down the back, 4-wide and under pressure on straightening when 3Ls off pace, no extra final 200 M.
Switched from wide gate to fence, towards rear about 6Ls off pace at 800 M, a little closer at 400 M, outpaced, never troubled leaders.
3-wide no cover 1L off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, disputing 2nd place when 2Ls off speed on straightening, weakened final 200 M. (Lame.)
Slow away, worse than midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed down the back, 5-wide into straight when 3Ls off pace, hung in final 300 M, led briefly at 200 M, bumped winner at 100 M, no extra.
Awkwardly away, towards rear at 600 M about 7Ls off pace, 5-wide on straightening, never dangerous.
Awkward break and pretty keen early, mostly midfield and 2-wide about 4Ls off pace down the back, failed to quicken off home turn and soon beaten.
2-wide in mid-division about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home straight when held up and hindered, also checked at 800 M, no acceleration.
Settled in rear, 8Ls last at 600 M, 4Ls down in 11th into straight, picked up very well to lead at 150 M, hung in late, full value for winning margin.
Fractious in gates, 4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, 3Ls back in mid-division at top of stretch, outpaced final 200 M.
Niggled along in rear section. Swung out on straightening and rallied home to be closest at finish.
Slowly away. Crowded shortly after start and raced near the back. Checked again at 900 M and trailed field. Under the whip to keep pace rounding home turn and made no impression in the straight.
Steadily dropped back to be 3-wide in rear section. Among last few to enter home straight and only ran past a few beaten runners in closing stages.
On fence and disputed lead until making the turn. A length down rounding home turn and regained lead on straightening. Kept on same pace and was swamped inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from widest draw and was niggled along. Kept within 3Ls of the leaders in 4th from 1000 M onwards. Dropped out soon after straightening. (Lame.)
Jumped awkwardly and was taken back from wide draw. Niggled along on fence behind midfield after 900 M. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield until home straight. Quickened and swept to the lead final 100 M.
Raced along the fence at midfield until home straight. Steadily made up ground in the closing stages.
Among leaders early. Dropped back after 1000 M and settled within 2Ls of the leaders in 3rd. Kept on fairly in the home straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled 2-wide at midfield until home straight. Quickened on straightening and charged to the lead near 200 M. Kept on but unable to hold off the top pair closing stages.
Ridden along out of the gates and raced in a disputed lead. Maintained a length's advantage in a 2-wide position rounding home turn but dropped out soon after straightening.
Led on fence at 1400 M, soon headed and 3Ls down in 4th on fence at 800 M, struggling to keep up entering home straight, tired final 300 M.
Checked at start, 7Ls back in rear group at 800 M, no clear run from top of stretch when 6Ls down to 200 M, ran on nicely, never nearer.
Switched to fence from wide gate, towards rear when 6Ls off pace at 800 M, finishing off only fairly when steadied at 300 M and 200 M, held late.
8Ls last at 1000 M, steadied at 500 M, 7Ls down in rear off home turn, widest on track in stretch and nearest at finish.
Slow break but recovered with run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, 3-back the fence 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, lost position on circle and struggling entering straight, eased late.
A neck 2nd out 2-wide at 1400 M, led on fence at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, 2Ls down in second on straightening and all out 1L back in 2nd at 200 M, found no more.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide without cover when 4Ls in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 3rd from 800 M to homestretch, all out when 2Ls down at 200 M, faded late.
Blundered and almost fell at start, 3-wide 2Ls off pace midfield at 1200 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide on straigh- tening when 3Ls down in 4th, no extra gears.
Midfield or better until homestretch, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 5th at 600 M, always held.
5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover at 800 M, 4-wide no cover at 600 M and same on straightening, beaten 200 M out.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, no better on straightening, slightly held up at 200 M but never likely to figure in the finish.
3-wide with cover but worse than midfield 6Ls off speed at 800 M, 5Ls down into straight, picked up tidily to lead at 100 M, ran on well despite hanging slightly.
Hindered at start, 3-wide no cover disputing 3rd at 1300 M, disputing lead out 2-wide at 1100 M, led by 1L or 2Ls at 900 M through to being headed by winner at 100 M, no extra.
Very keen early in rear, 8Ls last at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when 5Ls down in 10th, kept on at the same pace thereafter.
2Ls off pace in 3rd when 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd off final bend, ran on well but always held by quinella pair.
Towards rear 7Ls off pace at 800 M, one from the back and 6Ls down on straightening, made some fair late ground from behind, the only one to do so.
Always well there, 2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd at 1100 M, kept on to lead at 300 M, stayed on strongly.
Bounded at start losing 3Ls, 8Ls last at 800 M, 5Ls last at top of stretch, same when no clear run from 200 M to line and not fully tested but never likely to take a hand in the finish.
Very keen early, about 5Ls off speed on fence at 800 M, marginally closer at top of stretch but back-peddaled soon after.
4Ls down in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th into home straight, outpaced by leading trio.
5Ls off pace in 6th when wide at 800 M, wide no cover when improving on circle and 5-wide on straightening, very one- paced thereafter.
With cover worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace at 800 M, not much better off final bend, always well held thereafter.
Keen early and 4-wide without cover throughout, 6Ls off speed at 900 M, 5Ls down in mid-division entering straight, soon faded right out.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, headed 300 M out, kept on well enough for 2nd.
Always worse than midfield no better than 5Ls behind the speed until the home turn, no impression.
In rear bunch with cover about 7Ls off speed at 800 M, not a great deal closer when 4-wide off final bend, finished off only fairly widest off all down centre of track.
3Ls off pace 3-back on fence in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls back in 5th off home turn, not much response thereafter.
Bounded at start, worse than midfield and 2-wide 6Ls off speed at 800 M, caught flat-footed from top of stretch and finishing only plainly when steadied at 100 M, no danger at any stage. (Mucus.)
Soon joined the leaders briefly, then settled better than midfield. Faded from 400 M.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress to midfield halfway. Kept on until finding no extra 200 M out.
Settled midfield from a wide draw and was always 3 to 4- wide. Improved to 3rd 350 M. Ran on well to take charge passing 150 M. Won well.
Led briefly early, then dropped back to 6th. Renewed effort first turn to be 2Ls 3rd 800 M. Weakened in straight. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Recovered ground home bend to be 6th turning in. Kept on steadily but without threatening.
Prominent. Joined lead approaching 1000 M. 2Ls 2nd 900 M. Ran on in straight to reach front briefly 200 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Led field approaching 1200 M. Kept on but found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Very slowly away, losing much ground. Remained at the back to early straight. Ran on strongly under pressure to 2nd near finish.
Towards rear. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Gave a little ground 800 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back to 9th early straight. One-paced. (Roarer.)
Began awkwardly, near rear. Widest final turn. Made up good ground 250 M out.
Towards rear. Became last early straight.
Led field soon after start. Always maintained 3Ls advantage in straight.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground in straight. Lost a minor placing narrowly on the line.
Slowly away, at the back. Recovered a little ground early straight but failed to make further progress closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Faded steadily final 400 M.
Picked up gradually from midfield to be 2nd passing 600 M. Kept on but never able to trouble the winner.
Prominent. Held a remote 3rd to 150 M. Weakened.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd far side. Dropped to 4th 800 M. Found no extra in straight.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made no show from home bend.
At the back. Widest (4-wide) turning in. Recovered some ground in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Crept closer to 6th final turn. Kept on while hanging out badly final 200 M. Just able to obtain a minor placing at finish.
Slowly away, towards rear. Soon made ground to be in midfield. Kept on to obtain the 3rd place passing 200 M. Just failed to maintain the position near finish.
Slightly behind midfield from widest draw. Dropped to the rear final turn.
Prominent to straight. (Weakened.)
Towards rear at start. Soon moved up to prominent position approaching home bend. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Tailed off far side. Picked up to join rear of field entering straight. Sustained headway to run past well beaten horses.
Well there. Hit front over 200 M out. Soon drew clear.
Mostly in midfield far side. Weakened from home bend.
Always in last few.
Always prominent. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on at the one pace in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Attempted to make all. Headed over 200 M out but hung on for 2nd.
Jumped well but taken back to behind midfield. Made up good ground on outside in straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, soon picked up on inside to be in midfield. Switched out passing 300 M, kept on well to obtain a 3rd place at finish.
Near rear. Only able to make moderate progress 200 M out.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch. 3Ls 5th to early straight. Faded. (Lame.)
Took led from widest draw. Held 1L advantage final turn. Kept on while headed inside 150 M. Just lost a minor placing at finish.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered some ground to be midfield passing 1000 M. Made no show in straight.
Slowly away, soon recovered to just behind midfield. Dropped back steadily final 400 M.
Towards rear early, moved up to be 2nd 1200 M. 1-1/2Ls 3rd final turn. Weakened passing 300 M.
Always there. 2-1/2Ls 4th from 1000 M. Responded well when under pressure 250 M. Only beaten narrowly on the line.
Towards rear. Made ground on inside early straight. Ran on well final 200 M to just prevail at finish.
Began awkwardly, remained at rear. Made up significant ground 250 M out, never nearer.
Soon in touch. Raced 2Ls 3rd on 3-wide. Ran on steadily to join lead 200 M out. Found no extra final 50 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Well there to halfway. Faded gradually.
Never a factor.
Always prominent. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent early. Weakened halfway out.
Began awkwardly. Always towards rear.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled behind leaders. Cantered to lead over 300 M out. Easily. (Lame.)
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Held narrow advantage onto course proper. Ran home one-paced.
Raced alone on rails in prominent position early. Dropped out onto course proper.
Disputed lead. Overhauled by fast finishing winner over 300 M out. Kept on same pace.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened.
Tightened at start. Soon recovered to midfield. Ran on doggedly under pressure to reach 3rd late.
Bounded in the air at the start and niggled along to race in midfield around 3-wide with cover through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly from widest and niggled along to race outside the leader. Near the 500 M was checked whilst giving ground and dropped out in straight.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 2-wide. Ridden along and made little headway rounding the home bend. Unable to find an extra gear in straight and plugged on evenly to the line.

Broke well from wide draw and niggled along to race in a prominent position on rail. Held up behind weakening runner rounding the home bend. Responded well when asked 400 M out and overhauled 3rd placegetter in the closing stages.

Ridden along to race in mid-division on rail in the early stages. Near the 1200 M was checked when crowded for room and dropped to a rearward position. Gave ground at home turn and tailed out in straight.
From a wide gate was steadily eased to the rear but closer to the rail through to straight. Ran on evenly when asked 350 M out and only ran past several beaten runners.

Jumped awkwardly and raced in the rear section around 2-wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Best out and soon raced in a prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Began with field and soon settled in a rearward position around 3-wide with cover. Under pressure to maintain position rounding the home bend and failed to make any impression in straight.

Jumped well and niggled along to race in midfield or better on rail. Switched out and made little headway rounding the home turn. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-paced in the concluding stages.
Jumped with field and soon settled in a rearward position around 2-wide. Switched out and ridden along to improve position at home bend. Unable to show much running in home straight.

Broke with field and raced in midfield or better 3-wide without cover. Went forward to race outside leader down back straight. Took up running on rail at home bend. Plugged on to the line. (Lame left fore.)
Jumped fairly and ridden along to take a narrow lead on rail. Headed near the 600 M whilst being ridden along to maintain position. Gave ground quickly in the straight.

Broke well and soon raced in better than midfield around 3-wide with cover, made steady headway at home turn to be 1L off pace on straightening. Under pressure 400 M out and charged home to win comfortably.
5Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, lost position on circle and weakened right out in stretch.
Awkwardly away, hindered at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover when 7Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, never got much closer thereafter.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off speed on fence until the 800 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at the 400 M, led 300 M out but no extra once headed at 100 M.
Over-raced early in places, 6Ls off pace and worse than midfield at 1000 M, same entering homestretch, outpaced.
Towards rear about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, improved out 4-wide no cover on circle to be 4-wide entering straight when 5Ls down in midfield, ran on well to lead final strides.
Slowly away, 10Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls down in rear entering home straight, making some fair late ground when forced to switch out wider at 100 M, always well held.
Awkwardly away, always towards rear and at least 7Ls off pace.
4-back the fence 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in midfield on straightening, stayed on fairly, nearest at finish.
Widest at first bend, disputed lead early, pressed on to lead by 1L at 900 M on fence, 2Ls clear entering straight, swamped 200 M out.
Well placed 2Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th from 1200 M to 600 M, one-paced thereafter.
Disputed lead early, 2Ls down in 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M, struggling to hold this position entering straight, faded.
Fractious beforehand and slowest away, 8Ls behind speed and one from rear at 1000 M, pressed on without cover to be 4Ls down in 5th entering straight, always held. (Lame.)
3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th until 800 M, 3Ls down in 4th off final bend, kept on well to lead 100 M out, headed by winner in final bounds.
Worse than midfield on fence about 7Ls or more off pace until the home straight, made up some late ground without troubling principals.
Broke well. Drifted back to race on fence at midfield. Unable to get a run until final 250 M. Quickened once cleared and made a late charge to be closest at finish.
2-wide at midfield. Moved out and ridden along after 500 M to tackle leaders. Kept in contention before fading inside final 200 M.
Niggled along at midfield and was wide and without cover. Hung out and remained wide making home turn. Weakened in the straight.
Niggled along from widest draw and took the lead after 1000 M. Held a length's advantage into the straight. Headed 200 M but stayed on for a minor placing.
Off slowly and raced in rear section. 2-wide making home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Ridden along to be at midfield. 3-wide making home turn. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Slowly away and raced at the rear after being checked at the start. Made progress along the fence home turn and closed to within 4Ls of the leader at 400 M. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Outpaced early stages and raced on fence near the back. Last few to enter home straight and closed the race off well.
Behind midfield. Hung out badly and ran off rounding home turn. Made no impression thereafter. (Lame.)
Slowly away. Outpaced despite being pressured and became detached at home turn. Finished tailed out.
Ridden to a forward position. 2-wide and tracked leader until home straight. Wore down leader at 200 M and stayed on well to the line.
Settled behind the leader from 1100 M until home straight. Only stayed on same pace closing stages.
Niggled along to lie up at 800 M when worse than midfield and 6Ls off pace, never on terms.
Slowly away, checked in rear at 1200 M, 7Ls back in 12th at 800 M, never a factor. (Blood in trachea.)
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight, picked up well to lead 150 M out, kept on for pressure.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover when 5Ls back in 9th at 800 M, no closer when 3-wide on straightening, no impression.
Settled 1L off pace out 2-wide in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, faded steadily.
Settled in 3rd or 4th out 2-wide within 2Ls or 3Ls of the speed until home turn, every chance at the 200 M when upsides, winner a shade too strong on the run-in.
4Ls down in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M, under pressure to hold this position at 600 M, tailed off in stretch.
Checked at 1200 M, 5Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Slowest away losing 2Ls, always in rear at least 8Ls off the speed.
5Ls behind lead in 6th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th entering straight, weakened through final 200 M.
Led on fence 1400 M out, always about 1L clear until home straight, headed 200 M out, tired close home but hung on for a place.
Always 3-wide without cover in midfield about 5Ls off pace until homestretch, soon beaten.
Steadied at 1200 M, always worse than midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until home straight, made some minor late headway.
Held narrow lead to passing 400 M. Kept on but lost 3rd place when found no extra closing stages.
Raced 5th. Failed to quicken when given reminders 400 M. Weakened 200 M out.
At the back. Made progress passing course proper to be 4th near 250 M. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Prominent. Took lead passing 400 M. Held on well to win unchallenged.
Behind midfield. Held 5th to 300 M. Ran on well to take 2nd closing stages.
Always prominent. Kept on without quickening inside 200 M.
In the middle. Dropped back steadily passing 400 M.
Prominent to straight. Weakened. (Bled.)
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Well there. No extra passing 200 M.
Midfield far side. Dropped to last few coming out of back straight. No further impression.
Soon dropped to last few.
Midfield briefly. Dropped to well back approaching home turn.
Midfield early. Improved to lead 1200 M out. Went some 2Ls clear shortly after straightening. Hung on well.
Midfield when steadied for run 400 M out. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well there early. Settled wide in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Wide in midfield far side. Dropped out from home bend. (Bled.)
Mainly in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in last few. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Led field to 1000 M. 2Ls 3rd 400 M. Weakened steadily final 300 M.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground when 3-wide with cover rounding home bend. 7th 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Midfield on the rail. Ran on from 6th 400 M to assert authority closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily from 7th passing 400 M, never nearer.
Better than midfield. Slightly improved to 4th final turn. Kept on same pace in straight.
Began awkwardly, remained in the rear. Made up some ground in the middle of the track in the straight.
Prominent. 2nd rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening when 3rd from 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Never in contention. Hung out throughout, especially on turns.
Mainly 4th to 400 M where he was 3Ls behind the pace. Kept on until finding no extra inside 250 M.
Took lead from 1000 M. Kept on well on the rail in straight but just failed to hold off challenges from the winner.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no show from home turn. Wide throughout.
Never nearer.
Never better than midfield.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Soon dropped to last few.
Settled towards rear. Obtained split about 300 M out. Ran on without threatening.
Well there. Came to challenge the length of straight but unable to peg back winner throughout.
Made all. Hung on well under pressure to defy runner-up's challenge the length of straight.
Never better than midfield.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Very slowly away. Soon picked up to midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Raced awkwardly in midfield far side. Remained same into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never seen with a chance.

Broke fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in forward position 3 wide in the early stages. After the 1400 M steadily eased back to 3rd place 2 wide to straight. Plugged on fairly to the line without threatening.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily settled in the rear section 3 wide with cover to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but was unable to make much impression.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in a worse than midfield position on rail through to straight. All out 350 M out and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Raced in a rearward position around 4 wide without cover through to straight. Made no impression when asked 400 M out.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 400 M out but was outpaced by the 1st pair inside final 150 M.
Jumped with field and niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made little impression inside the final 200 M.

Broke with field and soon settled in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Responded strongly when asked 400 M out to take lead near 200 M and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Broke fairly from wide draw and raced in midfield or better around 3 wide without cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Broke well from widest and pushed along to dispute lead on rail. Near the 800 M settled back in 2nd place to straight. No extra when asked 350 M out and dropped out steadily.
Began well and ridden along to dispute lead 2 wide. Near the 800 M was pressed forward to take outright lead to straight. Headed near the 200 M and gave ground steadily thereafter.
Slowly away and shortly after that was crowded for room. Raced at the back on rail to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish.
Soon settled in a rearward position round 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but only able to run on evenly to the line.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and ran on well but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner to settle for 2nd.
Began fairly and steadily settled towards the rear around 3 wide with cover through to straight. Unable to show any running when asked 400 M out.
Keen at 1200 M and 1000 M when 5Ls off pace in midfield, 3Ls down in mid-division at top of stretch, outpaced.
3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace in midfield or worse until the 800 M; 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in midfield; picked up well to lead inside final 100 M; pushed out.
Slowest away and switched to fence towards rear, 5Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M and 3Ls down in same position at top of stretch, kept on well late, never nearer.
Keen at 1400 M, always in rear group, 6Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M, 5Ls down in 13th at top of stretch, always held.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls or 3Ls behind lead in 4th or so from 1200 M to home straight, stayed on strongly final 200 M, nearest at finish.
Bounded at start, mostly 3-wide without cover in midfield about 5Ls off pace until the 1000 M, improved out 4-wide no cover on circle when 2Ls down in 6th, soon faded.
Awkwardly away losing a little ground, settled in rear group 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 12th when 4-wide entering straight, made some fair late headway.
Slowly away and in rear when checked at 1700 M, 8Ls last at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 5Ls down in rear, no impression.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd when 3-wide on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed at 800 M, 3Ls closer in same position on straightening, took some to get clear and balance but stayed on quite well late.
On fence no worse than 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield until final bend, held up badly until the 100 M at least, was hardly tested late.
3-wide no cover at 1200 M, pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 800 M, headed at top of stretch, faded out.
Soon led on fence but headed at 1100 M and under pressure when 2Ls down in 4th swinging for home, held up until the 300 M, stayed on at same pace late.
Always prominent in 2nd or 3rd about 1L off pace out 2-wide until taking up the running at the top of homestretch; 1L clear at 200 M and no extra once headed inside final 100 M.
Off a bit slow and settled in a rearward position. Trailed field throughout back straight and last to enter home straight. Never quickened.
Dropped to a rearward position early stages. 2-wide behind midfield in the back straight. Urged from 500 M out but only stayed on same pace to line.

Settled along the rails in 4th and within 3Ls of the leader early stages. Better than midfield back straight and stayed within 4Ls of the pace home turn. Interrupted run early straight and kept on steadily to line.
On fence behind midfield. Got shuffled back near 800 M. Switched out for a run on straightening but was held up briefly at 400 M. Ran on without quickening.
Broke sharply and led briefly. Tracked leader from 1800 M onwards. Kept on well in the straight and held on for 2nd place.
Took the lead shortly after start. Controlled the pace throughout and took a length's advantage into home straight. Quickened away on straightening and kept a comfortable lead to the finish.
Settled no worse than midfield in a 2-wide position. Stayed within 3Ls of the leader rounding home turn. Gained steady ground in the straight.
Settled 2-wide in 3rd and was 2 to 3Ls off the pace. Moved up and raced within a length of the lead at 1200 M. Kept pace until fading off in home straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled 2-wide at midfield. Remained at midfield and was 6Ls off pace at home turn. Kept good pace in the straight and made up some ground closing stages.
Dropped to a rearward position and remained near the back throughout back straight. Moved towards outside on straigh- tening and made up some late ground closing stages.
Trailed field early stages. Switched out 3-wide on entering back straight and advanced to be near midfield after 1000 M. Placed under pressure 500 M and ran on without threatening in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. 4Ls down on straightening, ran on well in the straight but unable to gain serious ground closing stages.
Settled behind midfield early. Dropped further back after crowded 2000 M. Hard to settle in rearward position back straight. Among last pair to enter home straight. Made no impression final stages.
Checked at 800 M when 2Ls off pace in 4th on fence, unbalanced at 700 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight, took a while to balance, poked head in front final strides.
Bumped at start, always worse than midfield and never better than 6Ls off speed from the 1000 M.
6Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, got no closer, struggling in rear entering straight.
Bumped at start and hindered at 800 M when 4Ls off pace in 8th out 2-wide, similar margin behind leader thereafter.
Always towards rear, never better than 6Ls off the speed at any stage.
Slowest away by 2Ls, hindered at 800 M when 4Ls down in 7th, same position turning for home, always outpaced.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 900 M and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, over 2Ls down in 4th and struggling entering straight, soon faded out.
Prominent within 2Ls of the speed in 2nd or 3rd from 800 M to stretch, 3Ls down and fading in 4th at 200 M, weakened further.
Always about 8Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight, made up some late ground but never troubled leaders.
Hindered at 800 M when 3Ls down in 6th, same position when short of room entering straight, clear at 300 M, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, claimed 3rd close home despite carrying head awkwardly.
Hindered at 800 M when over 2Ls off pace in 5th, 4-wide on straightening when over 2Ls down in 5th, all out when 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close and lost out on a place.
Led by 2Ls on fence from 900 M to home straight, 1L clear at 200 M, caught final strides.
Slowly away, 2-wide and within 3Ls or so in 5th until the homestretch, outpaced thereafter.
Slowly away, niggled along at 1000 M when 3-wide with cover in midfield, 6Ls off pace when 5-wide on straightening in 11th or so, never on terms thereafter.
3-wide with cover in rear when about 8Ls off pace until straightening for home, soon left further behind.
Most intractable throughout, 4-wide no cover and hanging at 800 M when 6Ls off speed in 9th at 800 M, hung out wider on circle and 6-wide (widest of all) entering straight, soon beaten.
Prominent but mostly 3-wide no cover about 4Ls off pace in 6th down the back, 4-wide and losing position on straigh- tening, faded.
Within 1L of the speed on fence in 2nd from 1000 M to 600 M when under pressure to keep up, faded out from top of home- stretch.
Towards rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace until homestretch, kept on well without troubling principals late on.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, stayed on fairly well late, never nearer.
Best away, 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 3rd, kept on to dispute lead at top of stretch and a neck clear at 200 M, headed at 100 M and tired only just hanging on for 3rd.
Soon led out 2-wide but couldn't cross to fence, clear by a neck down backstretch, 1L clear at 500 M but headed at top of stretch, a neck 2nd at 200 M, lost out on a place close home.
Switched from widest gate to fence, 9Ls last at 800 M, 8Ls down in 13th at final bend, steadied and switched out at 300 M, ran on well late (defying track bias) to be nearest at finish.
3-back the fence about 5Ls off speed in midfield until the home turn, drifted further back.
Held up worse than midfield when 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5Ls down in mid-division off final bend, very nice acceleration (defying track bias) to lead 100 M out, impressive.
Box-seat run on fence 3Ls off pace in 4th until the 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd on home corner, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well but had little chance with winner's kick.
Midfield or slightly behind. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Was 2Ls 3rd before improving a bit to 2nd 400 M. Responded well to take control 250 M. Won readily.
Near rear. Crept closer on inside final turn. Continued to recover some ground final 400 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Shared lead early, took over passing 1200 M. Held 2Ls advantage to final turn. Failed to contain the winner when headed 250 M but kept on for 2nd.
Better than midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group and made no impression.
Towards rear. Steadied for a run near 300 M. Made some moderate progress thereafter.
In touch to early straight. Dropped out.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on steadily from 6th early straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on well from outside 200 M out for a minor placing near finish.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground on inside to be 5th. Kept on well from home turn to be 3rd 150 M. Just lost the minor placing near finish.
Shared lead early, 2nd from 1200 M. 2Ls 3rd early straight before weakening out of contention final 150 M.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Made short-lived effort passing 400 M and ended 200 M out.
Towards rear. Last and widest final turn. Only ran past a few tiring horses in straight.
Pushed along to be in touch. Improved to 3rd at the Rock. Ran on steadily in straight but found the winner too good.
Around midfield throughout.
In touch. 2Ls 4th final turn. Kept on under pressure in straight.
Mainly 5th until he ran on to obtain a minor placing closing stages.
Soon led. Was joined passing 600 M. Held on until headed 200 M. Weakened closing stages.
Was last soon after start.
Lost ground at start, near rear. Was making ground when steadied near 50 M. Failed to ride out.
Jumped well from a wide draw and was within 1L behind leader. Came to join the lead passing 600 M, gained slender advantage 200 M until headed 100 M out. No extra.
Never better than midfield. Hung in in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Improved a bit to 7th rounding home bend. Ran on well from outside while shifting in 200 M. Took lead 100 M out and won readily.
Was checked soon after start. Towards rear throughout.
Never seen with a chance.
Jumped in air and lost rider at the start.
Shared pace on the rails. Kicked some 2Ls clear upon straightening. Hung on well to win readily.
Well there to straight. Faded gradually.
Raced wide in last few. Ran home one-paced.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily to snatch 3rd late.
Towards rear throughout.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Soon dropped to tail-end. Never seen with a chance.
Around midfield. Gave ground rounding home bend.
Ridden for speed but couldn't get to the rail. Disputed lead throughout back straight before taken to 3rd behind leaders approaching home bend. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Made moderate progress down inner of straight.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly 3rd before improving rounding home bend to take lead from final turn. Held on until headed closing stages.
Began awkwardly from widest draw, towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield turning in. Kept on same pace in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved from 400 M to be 3rd turning in. Ran on solidly to assert authority closing stages.
Led field to final turn. Weakened.
Tracked leader to final turn. Faded.
Raced 5th or 6th throughout. One-paced.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made some minor improvement in straight.
Began awkwardly, always at the back.
In touch from a wide draw and was soon 4th on 2-wide. Kept on quite well in straight but failed to catch the winner when 2nd closing stages.
Midfield to halfway. Dropped out.
Bounded at start, towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on steadily but without reaching the trio.
Travelled in last few. Made up some ground down centre of straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well into straight to take charge inside 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Made moderate progress under pressure in straight.
Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge upon straightening. Found nothing under pressure.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Prominent to 450 M. Dropped out. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field to straight. Improving when steadied for a run 250 M out. Made some late recovery closing stages.
Midfield to home bend. Faded.
Settled in last few. Ran on down straight without threatening.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Broke with field and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and ran on fairly but never headed in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Slowly away and raced at the back 2-wide with cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M and only kept on one-pace to the finish.
Jumped awkwardly and ridden along to share lead on rail in the early stages. Took outright lead near 1000 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M out to win convincingly.
Broke well and ridden along to dispute lead in the early stages. Settled in 2nd place down the back straight. Commenced to give ground going up the Rock and tailed out in straight.

Broke fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in a forward position 3-wide without clear whilst hanging out. Crept closer to the pace at home turn, responded quite well in straight but was unable to match speed with winner.
Slowly away and raced in the rear section on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M but only able to keep on same pace to the line. (Lame.)
Broke fairly and ridden along to race in a midfield or better 2-wide. Under pressure at home turn to maintain position and faded out in home straight.
Jumped well and steady eased to a rearward position around 3-wide with cover through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped with lead and soon raced in midfield or better on fence through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but failed to quicken and only ran on evenly to the line.

Began fairly from widest and niggled along to race in midfield around 3-wide with cover. Made little headway going up the Rock to be 2Ls off pace on straightening. Only ran on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Jumped with field and niggled along to race towards the rear 2-wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running but unable to make any impression when asked 300 M out.
Broke fairly from wide gate and niggled along to race in midfield 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running and was only able to plug on evenly to the post.
Checked at start, 2-wide and 6Ls back in 8th at 1100 M, 3-wide turning for home when 4Ls down in 8th, never dangerous.
5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in 7th at 1100 M, closer at 800 M in midfield, 6-wide (widest of all) when 3Ls behind in midfield turning in, no impression.
Always in rear couple, never better than 7Ls off pace at any stage.
4Ls back when 2-wide in 5th at 1100 M and slightly closer entering homestretch, soon outpaced.
Switched from wide gate to fence 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, 4-wide taking final bend when about 5Ls down in 10th, ran on well to take 2nd final strides.
2-wide and 1L down in 3rd at 1100 M, 2Ls back in 3rd at final bend, dropped out swiftly. (Lame.)
7Ls off pace 4-back on fence in 9th at 1100 M, on and off the bridle until swinging for home 5Ls down in 9th, nice turn of foot to lead about 200 M, ran on despite hanging slightly.
4Ls off pace when 3-back the fence in 6th at 1100 M, closer entering home straight and improved to 2Ls down in 4th on fence at 200 M, no extra close home and lost 2nd final strides.
Keen when box-seating in 4th place on fence 2Ls off speed at 1100 M, settled from 1000 M, just over 1L down in 2nd at final bend, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide no cover when 1L down in 2nd at 1100 M, always deep on the track and struggling to keep up when 3Ls down in midfield at final bend, dropped out.
Soon led on fence, held 1L advantage from 1200 M to home straight, faded after being headed about 200 M.
Switched to fence from widest gate, 11Ls last at 1100 M, 6Ls or 7Ls down and one from rear from 800 M to home straight, steadied at 100 M when making fair late headway, no extra.
2-wide at midfield. Shuffled back slightly near 800 M and raced 5 to 6Ls off the lead until home straight. Kept on without threatening.
Settled 2-wide in rear section. Swung out on straightening and steadily made up ground.

Checked shortly after start and then settled on fence in rear section. Shifted out to improve wide on the track after 1000 M. 4-wide and within 2Ls of the leader home turn. Tired in the home straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Responded well when asked on straightening and was closest at finish.

Ridden forward from wide draw and took the lead before 1st turn. Niggled along to keep its lead near 400 M and held a slight advantage into home straight. Faded out of contention inside 200 M and was checked at 100 M.
Raced along the rails behind midfield until home straight. Never had a clear run until final 50 M. Dashed home strongly over last few strides.

Niggled along to a forward position. Settled along the rails and no more than 3Ls off the lead middle stages. Raced prominently behind the leader home turn. Kept on gamely in the straight and took charge final 50 M.

Outpaced early and caught wide at midfield into 1st turn. 3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leader from 800 M. Disputed lead on straightening and improved into the lead 200 M. Unable to hold off winner final stages.
3-wide and no better than midfield early and middle stages. 3-wide and urged along making the turn near 500 M. Swung widest on straightening and kept on fairly in the straight.

Among leaders early. Settled behind the pace in 2-wide position back straight. Improved to be alongside leader after 600 M and took the lead on straightening. Remained in contention before fading inside 100 M.
Best out and led briefly. Settled 2-wide and within 3Ls of the lead in back straight. Pressured near 400 M but unable to pick up speed in the straight.
Dropped to the back from widest draw. Trailed field into home straight and made up some ground closing stages.
Always in rear at least 7Ls off the speed, hung out 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening, faded further.
Awkwardly away and no better than 8Ls off speed in rear until homestretch, ran on strongly for a place on the line.
4-wide no cover when 6Ls down in 9th at 800 M, no better off on straightening, never a factor.
Pressed on early out 3-wide no cover but couldn't cross to lead, got in 2-wide disputing lead at 700 M, a neck down in 2nd at final bend and 200 M, faded close home.
Checked at start, always about 5Ls off pace in midfield on fence, always outpaced.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, same turning for home, one-paced final 200 M.
About 5Ls off pace in midfield when 2-wide until final bend, always held by principals.
Awkwardly away, about 3Ls off pace in 5th or so until being left 3-wide no cover at 700 M, 3Ls down in 4th off home turn and 2Ls down at 200 M, no extra.
Within 4Ls of pace in 6th until home straight, finished off well, never nearer.
Slowly away and checked at start, unbalanced when 7Ls off pace worse than midfield at 600 M, no running room at 200 M and not fully tested in straight, never nearer.
Away well and led by under 1L or disputed on fence from 1000 M to home straight, a neck clear at 200 M, stayed on well late to extend the margin.
1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 4th on fence from 800 M to final bend, always struggling to keep tabs with leaders. (Blood and mucus in trachea.)
Made all. Held on well to the line.
Midfield early. Improved gradually to reach 2nd near 400 M. Kept on without threatening.
Around midfield. One-paced.
Towards rear. Steadied when crowded for room 600 M. Recovered steady ground 300 M out to just miss a minor placing.
In touch to halfway. Found no extra.
Always in touch. Ran on steadily to take 3rd closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Never able to feature.
Slowly away, always at the back.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Towards rear to 600 M where he started to make up some ground. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Prominent early, then raced in midfield. Made no show 200 M out.
In touch. Improved to 3rd course proper. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground to midfield halfway. Soon found no extra.
Towards rear. Dropped to the last when steadied near 600 M. Made some minor recovery 400 M.
Midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Always in rear.
Broke well and led early. Settled just off the pace to straight. Switched out to challenge upon straightening but only ran home one-paced.
Soon took up running and led to 300 M. Folded up quickly.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Midfield early. Took closer order rounding home bend. Not much room behind runners early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never nearer.
Never far off. Quickened under pressure to lead 300 M out only to be caught final strides.
Always towards rear.
Midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well, settling better than midfield. Improved well between runners down inner of straight to take charge close to home.
Never better than midfield. Made up some late ground in straight.
Rear early. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Produced late impression final 200 M.
Made all. Held on well to the line.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress closing stages.
Behind midfield. Soon dropped to the rear group. (Lame.)
Towards rear throughout.
Soon last. Ran past some beaten horses closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily final 400 M.
Never a factor.
Always there. Improved to 2nd 400 M. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield or behind. Made ground steadily 400 M but just failed to obtain a minor placing.
Held 2nd to 300 M. Weakened steadily.
Slowly away, last early. Remained towards the rear throughout.
Midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
Midfield or better. Ran on quite well 200 M out to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear early, soon improved to midfield. Kept on.
Settled around midfield. Ran on down straight without threatening.
Settled around midfield. Did not find much room early in straight and steadied for a run passing 200 M. No further impression thereafter.
Took up running passing 1400 M. Led till joined early in straight. Overhauled over 200 M out.
Settled towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Began awkwardly. Midfield early stages. Improved to settle outside leader coming out of back straight. Hit front briefly early in straight but soon overhauled.
Midfield into straight. One-paced.
Prominent to straight. Ram home one-paced under pressure.
Settled at the back. Ran on well between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never on terms.
Close up. Lost touch turning in.
Wide in midfield early. Effort rounding home bend. Soon found nothing from prominent position into straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Steadied for a few strides early in straight. Sustained steady progress to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well to hit front over 200 M out. Hung on under pressure to the line.

Broke well and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail. Switched away from the fence on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and ran on fairly but without threatening the 1st pair.
Jumped well from wide gate and steadily settled in a rearward position 3-wide with cover through to straight. Unable to find clear passage in early straight, made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Jumped with field and soon settled in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. All out 350 M and made up steady ground inside final 250 M out to miss 3rd placegetter by a narrow margin.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in worse than midfield around 2-wide. Made headway from the outside at home turn. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Soon raced in a rearward position on inner, commenced to give ground at home bend and tailed out in straight.
Began awkwardly and raced in the rear section on rail. Steadily switched to the outside at home turn to obtain clear running, made good impression inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Slowly away and failed to muster speed to be detached from the field throughout the race.

Jumped well from widest and ridden along to take up running on rail. Near the 100 M eased back to 2nd place to straight. Ran on well when asked 400 M out but unable to match speed with winner inside final 100 M.

Began with field from wide draw and niggled along to race in a forward position 2-wide. Crept closer to lead from the outside at home turn. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and slightly weakened in the closing stages.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and raced in a forward position wide without cover in the early stages. Near the 1000 M went forward to take lead on rail to straight. Headed near 350 M and steadily faded thereafter.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in midfield or better 3-wide with limited cover to straight. No extra when asked 350 M out and steadily dropped out thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and slow to muster speed to race in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position 4-wide with cover through to straight. Ran on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.
Began well and soon settled in better than midfield on fence through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and showed good turn of foot inside final 200 M to take charge near the 100 M.
Soon led on fence, always about 1L clear until home straight and same at 200 M, stayed on well but headed final strides.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 800 M and same entering straight, always outpaced by principals.
Midfield until the 600 M about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed, soon well outpaced, eased about 200 M out.
About 10Ls last down backstretch, 7Ls back in 12th into home straight, ran on strongly late, never nearer.
Slowly away, unbalanced at 1200 M when 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield, niggled along at 800 M, never on terms.
Settled towards rear at least 8Ls off pace down back- stretch on fence, 5Ls down in midfield entering straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on strongly to lead final strides.
Slowly away, pressed on 4-wide without cover to sit 1L off pace in 3rd and still wide at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd entering straight, soon beaten.
Settled about 9Ls off pace one from rear down backstretch, always well held by principals.
Box seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through to home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, faded a little through final 100 M.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed through to home straight when 4-wide (widest of all), faded.
3-wide no cover when 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd from 900 M to home straight, faded steadily thereafter.
Prominent early on 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, better than midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed until final bend, soon dropped out.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed down backstretch, 4Ls down in midfield at final bend, every chance at 200 M when 1L down in 2nd, no extra close home.
Off slowly. Settled on fence at midfield and kept within 4Ls of the leader rounding home turn. Stayed on same pace to line.

Off slowly and was shifted in to race on fence near the back. Checked at 1300 M whilst being ridden to make up ground and remained near the back until home straight. Made a late push inside final 200 M.
Ridden along to the lead. Controlled the pace and led by a narrow margin into the straight. Headed 300 M but kept on for a minor placing.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Steered clear near 200 M and closed the race off strongly.
Broke well from a wide draw and was dropped to the rear. Trailed field into home straight. Kept on fairly in the straight.
2-wide and no better than midfield. 3-wide making home turn and got within 3Ls of leader on straightening. Ran on well in the straight. (Dropped whip 100 M.)
Tracked leader into home straight. Faded steadily in the closing stages.
Near the back early stages and remained in rear section until straightening. Ran on without threatening. (Lame.)
Dropped back steadily and to be 3-wide in rear section. Reached within 4Ls of the leader on straightening but stayed on same pace thereafter.
Better than midfield. 2-wide and was within 3Ls of the leader at 800 M. Kept on well over the concluding stages to make the frame.
Outpaced early stages and settled wide without cover in rear section. Improved to midfield but was widest making the turn. Lacked the needed rally in the straight.

Wide at midfield early stages. 3-wide midfield and was 5Ls off the pace at 1000 M. Improved steadily rounding the turn and contended for the lead on straightening. Faded out of contention final 200 M.
2Ls behind the leader in 3rd at 1200 M. Steadily improved rounding home turn to be alongside the leader on straightening. Quickened from rivals 300 M.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield from back straight to home turn, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, outpaced when checked at 50 M.
Bumped at start losing ground, 4Ls off pace in midfield entering straight, failed to quicken up.
A neck down in 2nd when 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down from 800 M to home stretch, steadily outpaced.
Awkwardly away losing ground, keen at 1100 M, 4-wide with cover when 4Ls off pace at 800 M, under pressure when 5-wide on straightening for home, no impression thereafter.
6-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, pressed on forward 4-wide on straightening when 2Ls down in 4th at final bend, 2Ls down at 200 M, weakened late.
Soon led, crossed to fence at 900 M to lead by 1L until home straight, headed 250 M out, weakened a little final 100 M.
Settled towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed until final bend when 4-wide, never landed a blow.
Settled in rear about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 11th on fence at final bend, briefly without clear run at 200 M when 4Ls down, impressive acceleration once clear to lead 20 M out.
5-wide but with cover when 3Ls off pace at 800 M in 6th, 6-wide (widest of all) entering home stretch, beaten 300 M out.
Keen at 1200 M and 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd at final bend and led narrowly 250 M out, hung out under pressure and headed close home.
Awkwardly placed on fence when keen at 1200 M, towards rear when 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, struggling to lie up entering straight, faded.
Had the run of the race 3Ls on fence in 5th or 6th from back to home straight, weakened quickly. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
2-wide and about 3Ls off pace better than midfield until final bend, still near enough at 200 M but weakened sharply thereafter.
Awkwardly away, always towards rear until home straight about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, kept on well, nearest at finish.
Towards rear when 3-wide and 7Ls off pace down back stretch, 4-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 7Ls off pace, no impression.
2-wide in rear about 8Ls late at 1000 M, same entering home straight, kept on, never nearer.
Hindered at 1500 M and 3-back the fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield from 1200 M to home stretch, finishing well when forced wider final 50 M.
Settled 2nd racing 2-wide and 1L off pace from 1200 to 600 M, over 2Ls down in 2nd entering straight, dropped away tamely.
Always 3-wide no cover, 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, all out when over 2Ls down in 3rd entering straight and at 200 M, faded out late.
4-wide no cover in places down back until gaining cover 3-wide at 900 M to home stretch when 4Ls off pace in midfield, ran on well late, never nearer.
