Slowly away, 2-wide and about 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 6Ls down and losing ground on straightening, drifted further back.
With cover worse than midfield at least 6Ls off speed until home straight, kept on at same pace, closest at finish.
Keen when 4-wide no cover early on, got in 3-wide with cover at 900 M when 5Ls behind in 9th, same entering straight, ran on fairly for pressure, nearest at finish.
Soon led on fence, 1L clear down back stretch, 2Ls clear turning for home and further ahead at 200 M, grabbed by winner on the line.
Keen early on and awkwardly placed at 1400 M, relaxed 3Ls down in 5th out 2-wide at 800 M, 4Ls behind entering straight, over 2Ls back in 2nd at 200 M, ran on strongly to lead on line.
Run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace when 3rd or 4th down back stretch, bumped entering straight when 3Ls down in 4th, one-paced thereafter.
Switched from widest gate to fence, about 7Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight in rear, making some headway on fence when steadied at 200 M, ran on again late.
Worse than midfield 4-back on fence about 6Ls off speed until home turn, ran on fairly well late, nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Slowly away, near rear. Made up good ground along rail 400 M. Found not much room inside 200 M.
Led field to 100 M out. No extra.
In touch. 5th 400 M. Failed to quicken in straight.
Last. Recovered good ground final 350 M.
Midfield to 200 M out. Dropped back steadily.
Tardy start, soon recovered to be 1-1/2Ls 2nd. Kept on until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
In touch. 2Ls 3rd to straight. Ran on steadily to take command 100 M out.
Behind midfield from the widest draw. Made progress rounding home bend to be 4th final turn. Kept on.
Towards rear. 2nd last final turn. Recovered some ground closing stages.
2nd last to home bend where he improved on outside to be 8th 400 M. Continued to make ground in straight, just lost 2nd at finish.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back steadily passing 600 M.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, towards rear. Progressed on 3-wide without cover to be 5th 700 M. Failed to quicken final 250 M.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd far side. 4th final turn. Weakened 200 M.
Prominent. 2-wide 2nd 1200m. 2Ls behind leader final turn. Ran on well final 200 M to assert authority inside 100 M.
Always 7th. One-paced when widest in straight.
Midfield or better. Improved gradually rounding home bend to be 2nd on straightening. Kept on under pressure but lost the 3rd place final stride.
Slowly away, mainly 2nd last to straight. Only ran past a couple of beaten horses.
4th early, dropped back a bit to midfield far side. Only kept on the same pace in straight.
Began awkwardly, recovered ground on inside to soon be 5th. Gave ground passing 1200 M towards the rear. Steadied 300 M and 200 M when trying to improve. No recovery.
Took lead until headed inside final 100 M. Just held on for 2nd.
Last from widest draw. Made ground under pressure on inside final 250 M to get a minor placing at finish.
Raced mainly in midfield and three off the fence. Sustained progress down straight to reach 3rd late.
Slightly slow out. Raced towards rear throughout.
Slow out. Trailed the field to 400 M. Made up good late ground in straight.
Raced keenly most of way in 4th down back straight. Held same into home straight but found nothing under pressure.
Midfield. Made short-lived effort early in straight, then ran home one-paced.
Towards rear throughout.
Always thereabouts. Lost 3rd late when one-paced.
Soon dropped to last few. Faded out to tail-end into straight.
Jumped well, in front early. Settled just off the pace. Shaken up upon straightening. Hit front under pressure over 100 M out.
Soon took up running. Drifted out in straight and swamped over 100 M out.
Niggled along in midfield. Yielded ground from home turn.
Wide in midfield throughout. One-paced in the run home.
Well there. Gained 1L advantage 800 M. Given reminders final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M out.
Near rear. Last from 1200 M. Only ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Midfield to 400 M. Ran on quite well to take 2nd inside 100 M.
Lost ground at start, behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Always thereabout. One-paced.
Soon prominent. 2-1/2Ls 3rd far side. 2nd passing 400 M. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled towards rear. Moved up quickly on outside rounding home bend to be 3-wide 3rd final turn. Responded well in straight to take control 200 M out. Won readily.
Around midfield from widest draw. Gave some ground rounding home bend. Was checked and badly unbalanced final turn. No recovery.
Well there. Took lead from 1200 M to 800 M. Faded from 450 M. Tailed off in straight. (Lame.)
Tardy start, near rear. Made some progress on outside passing 400 M. Kept on steadily for a remote 4th.
Near rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Made no show 400 M out.
Did not jump well from poor draw. Quickly rushed up to prominent position by 1000 M bend. Gave ground from 400 M.
Settled in midfield. Finished off race well inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Well there. Unable to sustain effort and weakened passing 200 M.
Prominent to 600 M. Gradually faded.
Held slender lead. Fought on under pressure to shake off stalkers inside 200 M and just hold off runner-up's late challenge.
Never far off. Just kept on at the one pace under pressure in straight.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight where jockey reported restricted vision disadvantaging his riding.
Towards rear throughout.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened gradually.
Never in contention.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to home straight. Under pressure 300 M out but unable to go up a gear and only kept on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly and was unable to muster early speed to race at the rear on rail through to straight. Failed to make any impression when asked 250 M out.
Soon settled in a rearward position 3-wide and near the 1000 M was eased out of the race.
Best out from wide draw and niggled along to race in a forward position 2-wide. Commenced to give ground rounding the home turn and tailed out in straight.

Began fairly from widest and pushed along to race in a prominent position around 2-wide. Went forward to join leader at home turn, responded quite well when asked 250 M out but was unable to match speed with winner final 100 M.

Jumped with field and soon settled in midfield or worse position 2-wide. Near the 400 M was steadied to avoid a weakening runner, ran on steadily when asked 250 M out but never in position to trouble the 1st pair.

Broke with field from wide gate and soon settled in midfield on rail. Switched away from the rail on straightening to obtain clear running. All out 250 M out and found the line well to take control inside final 100 M.

Began well and niggled along to take up running on rail with around 1L advantage. Headed shortly after turning into home straight, only kept on same pace when asked 250 M out and slightly weakened in final stages.

Broke with field and settled in midfield or worse on rail. Near the 1600 M steadied when closed to heels. Ridden along to maintain position round the home bend, unable to show much running in home straight.
Slowly away and raced in a rearward position 2-wide. Pushed along and made little headway from the outside at home bend. Plugged on fairly to the line when asked 300 M out.
2-wide and 3Ls behind speed in 5th at 1100 M, marginally closer in 4th taking home turn, found nothing.
4-wide without cover when 9Ls last at 1100 M, always niggled along, made some headway out 4-wide from 600 M to be 5-wide into straight and 5Ls off pace in 9th, kept on at same pace, never nearer.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1100 M, about 5Ls down in 8th place entering straight, no impression.
Slowest away, in rear bunch 8Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover at 1100 M, 5Ls down in midfield and 4-wide on straightening for home, ran on well late, narrowly missed a place.
Switched from wide gate to fence and settled 8Ls last at 1100 M, 6Ls last entering home straight, ran on strongly to take quinella spot in final strides.
6Ls back in 7th on fence at 1100 M, struggling to hold this position turning for home, kept struggling.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, picked up the lead at 200 M, kept on well.
On fence 4Ls off speed in 6th at 1100 M, same turning for home when under strong pressure, soon beaten.
Soon led, on fence about 1L clear from 1200 M to home straight, headed at 200 M, tired late and only just hung on for a place.
Settled in rear group about 8Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1100 M, 5Ls off pace in 11th at final bend, ran on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Always 3-wide no cover, 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, failed to kick.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off the speed in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home turn, folded tamely.
Urged forward to race behind the leader. Kept within 2Ls of the pace in back straight. Lacked a response when asked on straightening and weakened.
Outpaced and raced 2-wide near the back. Urged along to keep pace in back straight and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past a few weakening runners.
Settled 2-wide and no worse than midfield. 3Ls behind the leader at 800 M but started to lose ground after 600 M despite being pressured. Near the back on straightening and found nothing thereafter.
Crowded on jumping and then raced at midfield. 4Ls behind the leader on straightening and was held up for some distance after the 400 M. Kept on well over the final stages.
Niggled along to keep pace with early leader. Assumed the lead at 900 M and held a 2Ls advantage on straightening. Continued to lead by 3Ls at 200 M but was headed by winner close to the line.
Off slowly and caught 3-wide behind midfield into first turn. Continued in same position in back straight and was ridden along rounding home turn. Made no impression in the straight.
Trailed field until 800 M. Remained near the back at the home turn. Swung out on straightening and rallied nicely to gun down the leader before the line.
Hard ridden from wide draw and was caught wide at midfield 1st turn. Improved to be a length off the pace in back straight but remained 3-wide. Stayed on same pace in the straight.

On fence and near the back early stages. Improved a bit in back straight to be behind midfield and within 5Ls of the pace at 600 M. Continued to make up ground rounding home turn but kept same pace to line.
Caught wide into 1st turn. Settled 3-wide without cover and within 3Ls of the pace in back straight. Continued to be wide making home turn and ran on well in the straight.
Niggled to the front and led until the 900 M. Remained just off the lead in the back straight and weakened from 600 M. (Lame.)
Settled 2-wide behind midfield until home straight. Never picked up when pressured in the straight.
Always in midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed until making some minor late ground through final 200 M.
3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in 6th until home straight, stayed on well late only narrowly missing the quinella.
Worse than midfield 4-back the fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace through to home straight, stayed on well late on fence and only narrowly missed a place.
Best away, settled 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, same on straightening, stayed on at same pace to line.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace 3-wide with cover until the 600 M, 4-wide on straightening, always outpaced.
Didn't break well, two from rear about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, never dangerous.
Away well, soon led, always clear by about 1L until home straight, quickened away, comfortably.
2-wide and within 2Ls of the pace in 4th until home straight, had little chance with winner but stayed on gamely for 2nd.
Fractious in gates and checked at start, 3-wide no cover when 3Ls back in 5th at 800 M, unbalanced on the circle and struggling 5Ls off pace entering stretch, soon beaten and eased.
Disputed lead out 3-wide at 1000 M, 2-wide and disputing lead from 900 M to 600 M when a neck 2nd, under pressure when 1L down in 2nd at final bend, faded out fast.
Always outpaced in rear at least 9Ls off speed until home straight, moderate late headway past two very tired rivals.
Stumbled exiting gates, 8Ls off pace in 11th out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn, made some moderate late ground.
Slightly behind midfield. Made progress on 3-wide home turn. Kept on without quickening for a remote 4th.
In touch. Made progress on outside rounding home bend to be in the leading pair early straight. Sustained effort to gain upper hand inside 200 M.
Led field to 400 M. Found no extra when whipped early straight. Dropped out.
Never a factor.
Ridden along from widest draw to soon be 2nd. In the leading pair 400 M. Failed to match speed with winner when under pressure final 200 M.
Near rear. Last passing 600 M.
Soon last. 10th final turn. Only made some minor recovery in straight.
In touch. Gave a little ground to 6th when steadied approaching 1000 M. 5th 400 M, then one-paced.
Prominent. 1-1/2Ls 3rd 800 M. 2Ls 4th final turn. Kept on without threatening in straight. (Dropped whip after 200 M.)
Better than midfield. Weakened from final turn.
Slowly away, near rear early. Raced 9th 800 M out. Made ground early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield. Kept on same pace throughout.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Broke well. Disputed lead to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Never better than midfield. Faded out of contention into straight.
Settled in last few. Did not find much room 200 M out. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Attempted to make all. Swamped close to home.
Very slowly away. Quickly picked up to be just behind midfield. Gradually weakened upon straightening.
Settled in rear. Wide into straight. Ran on steadily down centre without threatening.
Settled midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to reach 3rd late.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Quickened to challenge passing 200 M. Asserted authority close to home.
Forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Better than midfield when ridden along. Improved to 3rd 400 M. Kept on but failed to hold place final 300 M.
Took lead soon after start until headed on straightening. Kept on to re-gain advantage approaching 200 M. Was captured 150 M by the fast finishing winner.
Midfield on the widest. Very wide and dropped to the rear group home turn.
Better than midfield. Kept on steadily for a minor placing in straight.
Midfield early. Dropped towards the rear group soon after.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground early straight but was one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on same pace when under pressure in straight.
In touch on 3-wide. Dropped back steadily 300 M out.
Last from widest draw and shifted to the inside. Made up some ground rounding home bend. Found no extra in straight.
Led briefly after start, soon raced in 3rd. Gradually improved to 1L 2nd passing 1000 M. Came to tackle leader final turn, taking lead 400 M out. Failed to quicken when headed 200 M.
Behind midfield early, improved to midfield near 800 M. Ran on from 5th 400 M to take control 150 M. Won going away.
Last from 1100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear throughout.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made some minor progress early straight. Soon found no extra.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Settled in last few. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Always in last few.
Mainly in midfield. Weakened into straight.
Settled behind midfild. Commenced run turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Never far off. Commenced run turning in. Quickened well to take charge over 150 M out.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Always in rear. Dropped out into straight. (Lame.)
Forward of midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Prominent. Dropped out approaching home turn.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Soon took up running. Came under pressure when 2Ls in front turning in. Collared over 150 M out.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in better than midfield 3 wide without cover. Commenced to give ground at home turn and steadily faded in home straight. (Lost right front plate.)
From the widest draw was immediately eased to the tail but closer to the rail. Made little headway from the outside at home turn under pressure 400 M out and ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to take a narrow lead on rail through to straight. Ran on well when asked 350 M out but was unable to fend off late challenge from winner to settle for 2nd.
Hampered at the start and pushed along to race in midfield or worse around 4 wide without cover to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and ridden along to race in worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and plugged on fairly to the line.

Slightly slow away and pushed along to race in midfield around 3 wide with cover. Held up rounding home turn and near the 400 M steadied away from heels. Made up steady ground when asked 350 M out but without threatening.
On jumping was hampered and raced in a rearward position around 3 wide with cover through to straight. All out 350 M out but was unable to show any running.
Hampered at the start and raced in a rearward position on inner. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly and hard ridden in the early stages to race outside the leader through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-paced inside final 200 M.

Hard ridden along in the early stages to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Crept closer to leaders rounding the home turn. Plugged on fairly when asked 350 M out but failed to match speed with principals inside final 100 M.
Best out and steadily settled in midfield 2 wide through to straight. No extra when asked 400 M out and dropped out rapidly thereafter. (Irregular heart beat.)

Slowly away and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Didn't see clear daylight in early to middle part of straight. Ran on quite well inside final 200 M to miss 2nd narrowly.
Broke with field and soon settled in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and responded well to overhaul 2nd placegetter over the concluding stages.
Broke fairly from wide draw and raced in a rearward position around 5 wide without cover through to straight. Made no impression at all when asked 400 M out.
Well back to straight. Made up some late ground past beaten horses in straight.
Never in contention.
Broke well to make all. Hung on well under pressure.
Midfield. Dropped out from home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily on rails to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never better than rear of midfield.
Always well back. (Lame.)
Chased leaders to 200 M. No extra.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Ridden to midfield briefly. Dropped out rounding home bend.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Towards rear. Took closer order on rails turning in. Sustained progress down straight to grab 2nd inside 200 M.
Taken back from widest draw. Settled 3-wide at the back and was ridden from 500 M. Swung widest on straightening and only ran past a few beaten runners.
Dueled for the early lead. Opened up a length's advantage 1000 M and held it until final 200 M. Faded thereafter.
Dueled for the lead early stages. Raced alongside leader making home turn. Kept pace until weakening final 200 M.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Only ran past weakening runners in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field early stages. Settled on fence in rear section until straightening. Gradually shifted out in the straight and kept on same pace.
Settled on fence at midfield in 5th. 5Ls down on straigh- tening and moved steadily into the lead near 100 M. Failed to hold off the top pair closing stages.
Slowly away and settled on fence behind midfield. Made a nice run along the rails in straight to be closest at finish. (Lame.)
Off slowly and was hard ridden to stay behind the leaders. A length down on straightening and kept pace until 200 M. Found no extra in the closing stages.
Began well and steadily dropped back to settle behind midfield. Lacked a closing run on straightening.
Jumped well. Settled in 4th and was 5Ls off the pace at 800 M. Steadily closed in onto the leaders in the straight and ran down the early leaders 100 M. Kept on well to deny rivals final stages.
Off slowly and raced in rear section. Trailed field into home straight and made up good ground in the straight.
Settled 2-wide in rear section and among last few to enter home straight. Made a late rally to be closest at finish.
Midfield. Commenced to give ground coming out of back straight.
Disputed lead most of way to 200 M. No extra.
Settled in forward of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening. Gained upper hand over 100 M out.
Settled towards rear. Commenced run upon straightening. Improving when forced to check over 100 M out. Sustained progress to the line.
Led to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Prominent to straight. Soon dropped out.
Never a factor.
Settled just off the pace. Commenced move turning in. Hit front briefly over 200 M out and soon overhauled.
Wide in midfield. Faded out of contention from home bend.
Prominent to straight. Gradually faded.
Settled around midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Tardy start, never a factor.
Checked soon after start, towards rear throughout.
Well there. Came to join the leader halfway. Held on until headed close home.
Near rear throughout.
Prominent. Failed to quicken final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Crept closer to 4th passing 400 M. Still 3Ls behind lead in 3rd 200 M. Ran on strongly to just get up near finish.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 400 M until one-paced closing stages.
Soon behind midfield. No improvement.
Midfield or better. Kept on while hanging in 400 M.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily inside 300 M.
Towards rear. Last 400 M out.
Led early. Was joined at course proper. Kept under pressure in the leading pair and was able to prevail close home. Failed to contain the fast finishing winner at finish.
Towards rear. Moderate progress final 300 M.
Midfield or better. Improved to 4th 400 M. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Mainly 5th to 600 M where he dropped out rapidly. (Heart irregularity.)
Midfield. Ran on a bit from 7th 200 M.
Always prominent. Advanced to 2nd 200 M out. Failed to threaten the winner.
Lost ground at start, last to final turn. Recovered some ground on inside final 200 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. No progress.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Continued to make ground in straight to just miss a minor placing.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on while hanging in final 300 M. (Dropped whip 300 M.)
In touch. 2Ls 3rd on 3-wide final turn. Soon weakened.
Jumped well and led briefly early. Sat 1L behind leader before taking over on straightening. Held on well.
Toards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Never better than midfield.
Led field soon after start. Found no extra when headed on straightening.
Slightly behind midfield on inside. Crept closer order to 4th early straight. Found no extra 200 M out.
Slightly behind midfield. Made slight progress to 6th final turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Led field soon after start. Looked like winner when still holding more than 1L advantage 200 M. Kept on but failed to contain the winner close home.
Better than midfield. Weakened from 250 M.
Well there. Within 2Ls 3rd to 200 M where he ran on strongly to take command close home.
Tardy start, never in contention.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made ground steadily when pushed along in straight.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Found no extra while hanging out final turn and in straight.
In touch. 2Ls 4th from 800 M. Kept on quite well in straight to take 3rd passing 200 M.
Last from 850 M.
Lost ground soon after start and became last. Made up considerable ground when under pressure on inside rail final 400 M.
Towards rear and was wide throughout.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Prominent. Around 1L behind lead rounding home bend. Failed to hold place 200 M out.
Took up running coming out of back straight, going 2Ls clear rounding home bend only to be caught final strides.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Well back. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Well back. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Produced good late impression in straight.
Midfield briefly. Soon dropped towards rear.
Settled in midfield. Ran on dourly down straight to gain upper hand close to home.
Prominent to straight. Weakened. (Bled.)
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Sluggish at start. Never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield. Made steady headway in the run home.
Broke well from low draw. Led briefly before settling behind winner. Just kept on at the same pace in straight.
Prominent to straight, then dropped away quickly.
Midfield from widest draw. Made progress on outside to be 4th briefly final turn. Faded in straight.
Behind midfield. Kept on to make up some ground 200 M out.
Slow into stride and dropped to the last. Recovered significant ground 250 M out, just failed to obtain a minor placing.
Midfield. Made no show final 400 M.
Never in contention.
Midfield the best. Weakened in straight.
Raced keenly early stages in better than midfield. Weakened passing 300 M.
Near rear. Ran on a bit on outside closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Widest (5-wide) turning in. Recovered some ground in straight.
Prominent. Took lead from 1000 M. Held on well to win readily.
Prominent. 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on but failed to hold place closing stages.
Near rear. Ran on a bit from 400 M until one-paced closing stages.
Well there. Sat outside leader (winner) rounding the turns. Given reminders 250 M but failed quicken to challenge.
Led briefly early, dropped back a bit along rail to be around 2Ls behind leader in 5th to straight. Kept on to take 2nd close home.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace without threatening.
Chased leader to straight. Ran on one-paced under pressure.
Always thereabouts, racing keenly without cover. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield far side. Remained same turning in. Kept on well in straight.
Soon took up running, setting slow pace. Kicked some 2Ls clear upon straightening and held on well to the line.
Towards rear. Not much room 200 M out. Kept on steadily to the line.
Never seen with a chance.
Very slowly away, losing considerable ground. Joined rear of field 1200 M out. Dropped out upon straightening.
Behind leaders. Weakened upon straightening.
Never a factor.
Wide in midfield far side. Effort rounding home bend. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Made moderate progress under pressure in straight.
Broke fairly and soon eased to the tail on rail through to straight. From 400 M to 200 M was held up, made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Bounded in the air at the start and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Near the 700 M was unable to maintain position and lost ground. Made no impression in straight.
Began fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield 2 wide. Near the 700 M was checked to avoid heels. Failed to show any running in the straight.
Tardy start and ridden along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on same pace to the line.

Began fairly and pushed along to race in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to see clear daylight in early to middle part of straight. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 2nd place near the line.
Began well and ridden along to race in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 350 M out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped well from wide draw and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. All out 350 M and kept on fairly without threatening.
Jumped with field and niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide. Crept closer to lead rounding the home turn. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and slightly weakened inside final 200 M.

Jumped awkwardly and raced in the rear section 2 wide. Ridden along at home bend and made headway from the outside. Under pressure 400 M out and plugged on fairly to the line. (Lost right front plate.)
Jumped well from widest and ridden along to race 1/2L off leader through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one-pace over the concluding stages.

Jumped well from wide draw and ridden along to race in a prominent position 3 wide without cover through to straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M out but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter near the line.

Slowly away from wide gate and pushed along to race in worse than midfield 3 wide with cover. Made little headway from the outside at home turn. Under pressure 400 M out and cruised home to win comfortably.
Jumped well and pushed along to take up running on rail with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Headed soon after the 400 M and steadily dropped out thereafter.

Unable to muster early speed and raced in the rear section on rail. Switched wide on straightening to obtain running whilst closing off the race fairly was steadied near the 1000 M to avoid heels and kept on same pace thereafter.
Settled about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in 7th until the 800 M, improved out 4-wide on circle to be 4Ls down in 5th on straightening, dug in to lead 100 M out, stayed on well.
In midfield or slightly worse about 5Ls off pace until final bend, failed to kick.
4-back the fence 6Ls behind in 8th at the 1200 M, never likely to take a hand.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 4th when 3-wide turning for home, one-paced.
Pressed on to lead at 2000 M, never clear by more than 2Ls, tended to over-race in places, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra and lost 2nd soon after.
Led early but handed up at 2000 M, box-seated 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd until the 500 M, flat-footed from top of stretch, beaten 200 M out.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1600 M, 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, under pressure to lie up at 600 M, gone turning for home. (Lame.)
3-back on fence about 3Ls off the speed in 5th or so until the 800 M, 3Ls down in 3rd when 2-wide entering straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, failed to match winner but still ran on very well.
Settled at least 8Ls last until turning for home, made some late ground for 4th place but never troubled principals. (Lame.)
Settled in rear section. 2-wide and was 6Ls off the lead at 1200 M. Steadily moved out on straightening and ran on without threatening in the closing stages.

Niggled along from outside draw to race alongside leader until 1200 M. Settled a length off the lead in 2-wide position until straightening. Picked up well and led briefly near 200 M. Failed to hold off winner final stages.

Settled in a rearward position early stages. 3-wide behind midfield 1000 M and was 5 to 6Ls off the lead. Improved steadily from a wide position making the turn. Easily swept past rivals in the straight.
Tracked leader early stages. Settled prominently on fence behind the pacesetter from 1200 M onwards. Quickened on straightening and contended for the lead 300 M. Failed to keep pace closing stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the leader at 1000 M. Quickened on straightening and stayed in contention until 200 M. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Soon took the lead and kept a length's advantage into the home straight. Remained in contention 200 M but unable to hold off the top pair thereafter.
Settled on fence behind midfield and was within 5Ls of the lead at 1000 M. Steadily shifted out for clear running after 400 M and made a late push to be closest at finish.
Trailed field until straightening. Pressured from 600 M and ran on fairly in the straight.
3-wide and without cover at midfield and within 3Ls of the leader at 1200 M. Continued to be 3-wide making home turn and improved to within a length on straightening. Weakened final 200 M.
No speed early, 7Ls last at 800 M, always struggling in rear.
Always in rear bunch at least 5Ls behind leader until final bend, made some minor late ground down centre of track.
3-wide with cover when about 3Ls off pace in mid-division until 600 M, 4-wide on straightening for home, always held.
Slowly away, niggled along in 12th at 800 M when 5Ls down on fence, never dangerous from top of stretch.
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, joined by winner at top of straight and narrowly headed at 350 M out, failed to redress the margin but battled gamely on the run-in.
Didn't break well, 2Ls off pace when 3-wide no cover in 4th at 1000 M, back-pedalling entering straight and beaten when checked at 300 M.
Slowly away, 2-wide and about 4Ls off the speed in midfield until home turn, checked when short of running at 200 M, held thereafter.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, upsides entering stretch and led by a head 350 M out, always held a narrow margin thereafter, gamely.
About 3Ls off pace on fence in midfield through to final bend, stayed on fairly well without threatening principals.
Slowest away, always in rear bunch at least 6Ls behind leader until final bend, made some minor late ground.
3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace in 9th at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening and stayed on best of the chasing pack, never nearer.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, all out to pick up entering straight, failed to do so.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, over 2Ls down in 4th entering home straight, faded out fast.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace and 2-wide until final bend, improved to be 2Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, no extra.
Always 4-wide no cover in midfield when 3Ls off pace down backstretch, no impression in home straight.
4-back the fence worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace until home straight, plugged on home only fairly.
3-back the fence racing keenly in places when about 4Ls off pace in midfield until the 600 M, well beaten in stretch.
With cover about 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, under pressure to lie up entering straight, faded out steadily.
Awkward break, 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, still out wide and 1L down in 2nd entering straight, one-paced final 200 M but still hung on for a place.
Always towards rear, about 6Ls off pace at 800 M, under pressure entering straight, faded further.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from the 1200 M to homestretch when hemmed in on fence, only managed to burst clear 100 M out, led close home.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace with cover until home straight, made some nice late ground, the only one to do so from chasing pack.
Half a length back in 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd at top of homestretch, all out when over 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Soon led on fence, always under 1L clear until straightening for home, still ahead at 200 M, headed by winner close home.
Checked at start, 7Ls last at 800 M, same margin behind when checked turning for home, no impression.
Raced 3 and 4-wide with cover towards rear when about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, detached from top of home straight.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover in midfield about 3Ls off pace down the back, retreated from top of homestretch.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield or behind. Made up some ground from 8th at 400 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield throughout.
Towards rear throughout. (Irregular heart beat.)
Slowly away, always at the back.
Never a factor.
Around midfield throughout.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered a little late ground 200 M out.
Slightly behind midfield. Midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well from 6th early straight to take control 100 M out.
Led field from widest draw until headed near 900 M. Remained prominent until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Prominent. Took slender advantage near 300 M until headed 100 M out. Lost 2nd close home.
Slightly better than midfield. Made good progress on 3-wide from 1100 M to reach front 900 M. Held on until headed near 300 M. No extra.
In touch. Mainly kept on 4th or 5th until running on well to take 2nd closing stages.
Prominent. 3Ls 4th rounding home bend. Kept on well in straight but was one-paced near finish.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. In the last pair final turn. Made up considerable ground 200 M out to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. Around 3Ls 2nd early straight. One-paced final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on well on inside in straight to claim victory closing stages.
Towards rear. Found no clear run when trying to make ground 350 M. Kept on when in clear.
In touch. Weakened steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Slight progress rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout. (Blood in trachea.)
In touch from widest draw. Improved to 2nd approaching 1000 M. Faded on straightening.
Mainly 5th to final turn. Found no extra. (Blood in trachea.)
Midfield or slightly better. Crept closer on inside to 4th 400 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Lost ground at start, last to early straight. Made up some ground when under pressure inside 300 M.
Midfield or behind. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Near rear. Crept closer on outside final turn. Ran on from 8th 400 M, failed to match speed with winner closing stages.
Pushed along from widest draw to take the lead. With around 3Ls advantage early straight. Tired when headed 50 M out.
Settled just off the pace. Quickened well in straight to take charge 200 M out.
Never better than forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Around midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually weakened.
Well back. Ran on down centre of straight past beaten horses.
Never better than midfield. Only kept on at the one pace under pressure in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Trapped wide from poor draw early. Soon dropped to tail-end and made no impression.
Around midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Towards rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Towards rear most of way. (Saddle shifted.)
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Better than midfield. Crept a bit closer to 4th final turn. Soon found no extra.
Midfield early, soon dropped towards the rear. No improvement. (Dropped whip 600 M.)
Slowly away and blundered soon after start, remained at the rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Settled behind midfield from the widest draw. Widest (4-wide) final turn. Ran on steadily to take 2nd closing stages.
Always prominent. Sat outside the winner to straight. One-paced final 200 M.
Took lead soon after start. Won readily.
Ridden along to reach 3rd, 3Ls behind the winner. Weakened from 500 M. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Made up a little ground passing 1000 M to be 7th rounding home bend. Kept on.
Towards rear throughout.
Always thereabouts. Kept on moderately in straight.
Midfield. Improved passing 600 M to be 3rd turning for home. Weakened 100 M out.
Always at the back. (Lame.)
Settled in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled just behind leaders. Quickened well upon straightening to take charge 300 M out. Held on well to the line.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Disputed lead. Unable to sustain effort over 200 M out.
Never far off to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Made steady headway closing stages.
Niggled at early. Held narrow advantage to straight. Soon swamped.
Broke well. With leaders early, settling in midfield rounding home bend. Dropped out into straight.
Settled in midfield. Improving when severely baulked for a run over 200 M out. Produced steady recovery in the run home.
Towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Well back. Wide into straight. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Made moderate progress late.
Never seen with a chance. (Distressed and lame.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well to reach 2nd 200 M out but never able to peg back winner.
Began well and ridden along to race in a prominent position. Under pressure 500 M out to maintain position and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Broke awkwardly and niggled along to race in midfield or better. Under pressure 400 M out but was only able to run on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly and ridden along to race towards the rear section. Unable to show much impression when asked 400 M out.
Jumped with field and raced in midfield. Failed to quicken when asked 400 M and steadily tailed out thereafter.
Slowly away and soon recovered to race in midfield. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to respond and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.

Broke with field and niggled along to take a narrow lead. Ran on well when asked 400 M out but was headed shortly after the 200 M and fought off repeated challenge from 3rd placegetter to hold onto 2nd.
Tardy start and raced at the tail. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and only ran past beaten runners.
Jumped fairly and raced in the rear section. Failed to show any running when asked 400 M out.
Began well and niggled along to race in a forward position. All out 350 M out and ran home strongly to score a comfortable victory.
Slowly away and pushed along to race in midfield or worse. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only able to plug on evenly to the line.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in a prominent position whilst hanging in. Under pressure 400 M out and responded quite well but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the 2nd placegetter.
Jumped with field and pushed along to race in better than midfield. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and weakened steadily inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a forward position on far side rail. Under pressure 400 M out and plugged on fairly but became one-paced over the concluding stages.
Jumped fairly and raced in midfield with cover. Under pressure 400 M out and ran on fairly but was never in position to trouble the principals.
3-wide no cover when 3Ls off speed in 3rd at 1200 M, 2-wide and 2Ls back in 2nd at 800 M, 1L down on straightening, led 300 M out, found extra inside final 200 M to pull away.
Never travelled well, awkwardly away, 10Ls off pace on fence in 9th at 1000 M, niggled along to take closer order on bend, never dangerous.
3-wide no cover at 1000 M when 10Ls off pace in 10th, gained cover at 800 M, only a little closer when 4-wide (widest of all) on straightening, ran on very well to be nearest at the finish.
Best away, 3Ls off pace in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, box-seat position on fence 3Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 2Ls down entering straight, failed to pick up and weakened sharply final 200 M.
10Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1000 M, 6Ls down when 3-wide on straightening, never had much room on the run-in, switched inside at 150 M, never nearer.
6Ls back on fence in 5th at 1000 M, similarly placed turning for home, one-paced and always held.
8Ls back on fence in 7th at 1000 M, a little closer on straightening out 3-wide, well held when tightened for room at the 100 M.
One from rear 12Ls off speed at 1000 M, never going well, moderate late headway past tired rivals late in stretch.
6Ls back when 2-wide in 6th at 1000 M, closer on straightening, 3Ls down and with every chance of a place at 200 M, one-paced close home.
Always in last, never closer than 10Ls off the speed at any stage.
Over-raced a bit when 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls off pace when 3-wide on straightening, looked the winner when upsides at 150 M, no extra close home.
Good speed early to lead by 3Ls on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls clear at 800 M, 1L clear into home straight, headed 300 M out, faded steadily.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Among last pair to enter home straight and ran on without threatening.
Niggled along at midfield. Shuffled back slightly at 700 M and was 6Ls down on straightening. Closed the race off with a late rally.
Ridden to the lead. Held a length's advantage going into home straight. Stayed on well in the straight to keep a slim lead inside 200 M. Fought back nicely closing stages to deny rival.
Outpaced early and raced 2-wide behind midfield. Hung out and raced wide making home turn. Ran on well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Ridden along early stages to keep pace behind leaders. Lost ground at 700 M and dropped to midfield. 5Ls off the lead on straightening and unable to gain ground in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates and kept within a length of the leader. Kept along the fence making home turn and was 3Ls down in 3rd on straightening. Stayed on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Niggled along rounding the turn and was within 4Ls of the leader on straightening. Kept on well in the straight to make the frame.
Off slowly and raced near the back. Trailed field into home straight and weakened thereafter.
Broke well and was allowed to drop back to race 3-wide behind midfield. Caught widest making the turn and made no impression in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Outpaced early and raced in rear section. Made little ground at the turn and only kept on same pace in the straight.

Jumped fairly from a wide draw and kept within 2Ls of the pace early stages. Steadily improved around the turn and was a length down on straightening. Kept on gamely in the straight but came up short in a duel with the winner.
Jumped well and settled within 2Ls of the leader early stages. 2-wide and 4Ls down at 600 M. Lacked a response when pressured at 500 M. Kept on same pace closing stages.
3-back the fence 3Ls off speed in 6th at 1200 M, similarly positioned on straightening, always outpaced by principals.
Over-raced in places with the run of the race in 3rd or 4th place on fence about 2Ls off speed until home straight, failed to quicken up.
3-wide with cover when 3Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, tended to hang out, 3Ls down on straightening, good progress to hold every chance at 200 M, rallied well but outstayed close home.
Slow away, raced keenly when rushing up out wide to lead out 2-wide at 1500 M, soon headed and about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so off final bend, beaten at 200 M.
10Ls last at 1200 M, 4-wide on straightening still in rear, made some minor late ground past a few tired ones.
3-wide no cover when 2Ls down in 4th at 1200 M, ridden along at 900 M, 4-wide on straightening in 5th, one-paced thereafter.
4-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in mid-division at 1200 M, pressed on to dispute lead entering straight and at 300 M, faded slightly inside final 100 M.
4-wide with cover when 5Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, under pressure on circle and 5-wide (widest) on turning for home, no threat from then on.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1200 M, very weak in home straight, never a factor.
8Ls off pace one from rear on fence at 1200 M, closer entering straight but still towards rear, headway when clipped heels and nearly fell at 300 M, stayed on well again close home.
Slowest away, 2-wide and 8Ls behind in 12th at 1200 M, 3-wide and still towards rear on straightening, never likely to figure.
Never travelled well, 6Ls off pace in 11th on fence at 1200 M, under strong pressure to lie up at 600 M, no impression from top of stretch.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 4-wide on straightening in midfield, stayed on well out wide to lead inside final 100 M, kept on.
Led early, headed and then led again by half a length at 1200 M, joined at top of home straight, one-paced inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend to be 4th final turn. One-paced in straight.
Led field soon after start. Just held off runner-up's challenges final 150 M.
Better than midfield. Found no extra in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on for a remote 3rd.
Just behind midfield. Dropped out in straight.
In touch. Sat outside leader (winner) passing 1000 M. 1L behind passing 200 M. Ran on but just failed to catch the winner.
Never better than midfield.
Always in the last pair.
At rear. Made ground on outside final turn. Kept on from 7th 400 M.
Well back. Made up late ground past beaten horses in straight.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily down straight without threatening.
Chased leader throughout. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
In rear. Hampered and carried wide early. Made steady headway past beaten horses in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Hesitated for a run early in straight. Produced good late headway inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Badly hampered and dropped to the rear early. Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear to straight. Made moderate late progress.
Midfield early. Hampered and dropped towards rear. Ran home one-paced.
Never far off to straight, then gradually weakened.
Always well there. Came to challenge under strong pressure upon straightening. Just failed to peg back winner.
Wide throughout. Midfield early. Took closer order approaching home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Made all. Just held on to the line. (Bled.)
Mostly in midfield to straight. Weakened under pressure. (Bled.)
Midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield or slightly behind. Moved up on outside final turn to be 3rd on straightening. Stayed on until one-paced final 200 M.
Soon raced 4th from widest draw. Improved final turn to take lead on straightening. Held on but failed to match speed with winner inside 150 M.
Last. Made ground steadily in straight.
Settled towards rear. Made progress from outside rounding home bend. Ran on from 5th early straight to take command passing 150 M.
Prominent. Mainly 3rd to final turn. Found no extra in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear final turn.
Led field to final turn. Weakened.
Soon 2nd. Moved up to tackle the leader 1000 M. Faded from 500 M. (Mildly distressed.)
Slowly away, near rear. Crept closer order final turn to be 7th 400 M. Failed to quicken thereafter. (Lame.)
Midfield. Stayed on quite well 250 M to take 3rd inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Chased leader to 200 M. No extra.
Well back into straight. Made up good late ground down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Mainly wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Slightly sluggish at start. Soon picked up to forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Always well there. Quickened to hold every chance closing stages but found first two too good.
Midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Attempted to make all. Swamped under pressure closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Found no room early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced in last few. Did not find clear running in straight until 200 M. Kept on well to finish.
Well there to 200 M. Faded.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move upon straightening. Picked up well late to just get up on line.
Slowly away from wide gate and raced towards the rear. Near the 1300 M was inconvenienced by fallen runner. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in midfield around 2 wide. After the 1400 M was crowded for room and fell.
Slow to begin and hard ridden along in early stages to race in midfield or better 3 wide without cover to straight. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 400 M out.
Jumped with field and soon raced in a prominent position on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out and just failed to run into the placings.

Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Near the 1300 M was inconvenienced by fallen runner and dropped to a rearward position. Kept on evenly when asked 400 M and only ran past beaten runners.
Midfield or better on inner. Near the 800 M was checked when crowded for room. Unable to see clear daylight in early part of straight, ran on quite well inside final 200 M to grab 2nd near finish.

Tardy start and soon settled at the rear on rail. Near the 1300 M was checked to avoid fallen runner. Made little headway at home turn, all at 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M but without threatening.
Jumped fairly and soon settled in midfield or worse around 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken and only kept on same pace to the line.

Broke fairly from widest and niggled along to race in a forward position out wide. Near the 1000 M went forward to race outside the leader. Near the 600 M commenced to give ground and steadily faded in straight.
Began well and niggled along to race in better than midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and responded fairly but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter near the line.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 400 M out and took charge shortly after 200 M to win convincingly.
Began well from wide draw and hard ridden along to take lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Plugged on gamely but was headed near 200 M and became one pace thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to race in a rearward position. Near the 1300 M was inconvenienced by fallen runner. Failed to show any running in home straight.

From a wide draw was soon eased to the rear section but closer to the rail. Near the 700 M whilst racing keenly was checked away from heels. Stayed one-pace in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Pressed on from wide gate to lead on fence at 900 M, headed by 1L from 800 M to homestretch, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M and at 100 M, rallied gamely to lead again close home.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home turn, weakened out rapidly thereafter.
Never on terms, never better than 7Ls off pace at any stage.
Steadied at start and got too far back, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M, slightly closer on home turn, kept on fairly without threatening principals.
3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace in 8th or so until home turn, soon petered out.
Prominent through first half of race, struggling when 6Ls down in 10th entering stretch, hung in under pressure and no danger.
Never travelling well, under pressure to lie up when 7Ls off pace in 10th or so at 800 M, matters didn't improve.
Very wide throughout and always in rear, never remotely a factor.
Slowest away, 7Ls off pace in 9th at 800 M, always well behind.
Pressed on from widest gate to lead out 3-wide at 800 M, half a length clear on straightening, headed at 150 M and weakened quickly.
3-wide with cover and 3Ls behind in 6th at 800 M, same margin back in 5th into straight, looked the winner when looming up to lead at 150 M out, outfought close home.
Awkwardly away losing some ground, 3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until homestretch, hemmed in on fence without much room down stretch, kept on, nearest at finish.
Led early on but settled into box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th from 800 M to home straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well but couldn't grab quinella pair.
2-wide and no better than 4Ls off pace when slightly worse than midfield until home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.

Jumped well. Settled prominently behind the leader through to home straight. Boxed in for some distance after straigh- tening before shifting out into the clear at 200 M. Quickened nicely and swept to the lead.
2-wide and tracked leader until home straight. Improved steadily and contended for the lead at 200 M. Kept on well over the final stages for a minor placing.
Niggled to the lead. Held a length's advantage into home straight. Fought on gamely when challenged at 200 M but had no extra to hold off winner final 100 M.
Crowded at start and trailed field. Last to enter home straight and only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
2-wide at midfield early stages. Stayed within 4Ls of the leader in back straight. Ridden and kept pace making home turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Kept within 5Ls of the leader at 1200 M. Ridden along at 800 M but failed to keep pace. Lacked a response and weakened in the home straight.

Slowly away from widest draw and caught deep into 1st turn. 3-wide without cover and kept within 2Ls of the leader in back straight. Ridden along but failed to quicken at 600 M. Tired in the final 200 M.
On fence behind midfield early stages. 7Ls off the lead at 1200 M. Ridden from 600 M and kept on without threatening in the straight.
Dropped back and raced 2-wide in a rearward position. Urged along after 800 M and improved slightly making home turn in a 3-wide position. Made no impression in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield early and middle stages. Improved steadily in the home straight but was no threat to the principals.
2-wide and about 3Ls off pace in midfield or better until home straight, tended to hang in under pressure, one-paced.
Never travelled well, in rear and ridden along at 700 M, always outpaced.
4-wide no cover when 2Ls off pace in 4th from 800 M to stretch, still only 1L down at 200 M, no extra close home.
In midfield or better when 3-back on the fence and within 3Ls of pace until home straight, over 1L down in 6th or so at 200 M, ran on strongly final 50 M to lead on line.
Soon led on fence, always about 1L clear until home straight, faded after being headed at 350 M.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace until final bend, failed to quicken up. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Keen at 1000 M when 5Ls off pace when worse than midfield and 3-wide with cover, 5-wide into straight when 3Ls down in 7th, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, kept on well, just failed.
8Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, 6-wide entering straight when still towards rear 5Ls behind, ran on fairly, nearest at finish.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, under 1L down in 2nd at final bend, looked the winner at 100 M when 1L clear, tired final stages and missed a place.
Slowly away, 8Ls last on fence at 1000 M, 7Ls last when 4-wide on straightening for home, ran on very strongly, missed out only narrowly.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, one-paced in the finish.
3-wide when half a length off pace at 1200 M, still well there entering straight, a neck down at the 200 M, stayed on well but swamped near line.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in mid-division under pressure, outpaced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, 4-back the fence 6Ls off pace at 1200 M when crowded, 4Ls down entering straight when steadied, made some minor late ground.
Checked exiting gates and lost ground, 8Ls last at 800 M, never a factor.
3-wide with cover within 3Ls off pace in about 5th until the 600 M, all out to keep up entering straight, faded.
3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M when 2-wide, steadied at 500 M and further behind entering straight, very weak and eased close home.
Always towards rear and at least 6Ls off pace until final bend, zero pick-up and eased close home.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home turn, kept on fairly well without looking like catching the winner.
Within 1L of the pace out 2 and 3-wide until the 600 M, all out when 3Ls down in 4th entering straight, weakened.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover until final bend, no impression and eased close home.
Steadied at 800 M when 4Ls behind in midfield and 2-wide, slightly worse off turning for home, no impression.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than a neck until turning for home, headed over 300 M out, weakened inside final 200 M.
3-wide sometimes 4-wide without cover down backstretch when 4Ls off speed in mid-division until home turn, tended to hang in under pressure, outpaced.
In rear early, 8Ls last at 700 M, never on terms with leaders.
3-back the fence 3Ls off pace in midfield until the 600 M, back-pedalled from then on.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home turn, made some good late ground for a place.
Stumbled start, pressed on 3-wide no cover at 1000 M to go a neck down in 2nd, upsides on straightening, led over 300 M out, always in command.
Towards rear. Short-lived effort from 250 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well on outside from 8th 400 M to claim victory closing stages. Won readily.
Better than midfield from widest draw. One-paced. Wide throughout.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. Closed up 3rd on 3-wide final turn. Took lead early straight but failed to contain the winner closing stages.
Better than midfield on inside. Improved to 4th passing 1200 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Gave a little ground early straight. Kept on moderately 200 M.
Never a factor.
Led field soon after start. Found no extra when asked when headed early straight.
Held 2nd to straight. Failed to hold place 200 M out.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Midfield. Moved up on inside to 5th 1400 M. Lacked of daylight in straight, not properly tested.
At the back to final turn. Made up considerable ground on outside to take 3rd inside 100 M.
Soon 2nd. Always held by the winner. Kept on in the straight without threatening.
Led field soon after start. Held on well to win unchallenged.
Never a factor.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made up some ground in straight.
Near rear. Only made some minor recovery in straight.
In touch. Was 3rd briefly when given reminders early straight. Soon found no extra.
Made no show.
Jumped well and was in the front briefly. Soon gave a little ground to race in 4th or 5th. Ridden under pressure 300 M to take 3rd momentarily 250 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Jumped well, 2Ls 3rd 700 M. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Soon last. Ran past a couple of beaten horses in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Made no show when wide turning into straight.
Behind midfield. Slightly impeded 700 M and 500 M. Crept closer order final turn. Made ground in straight to just miss 2nd.
Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Gained upper hand close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent briefly. Soon dropped towards the rear.
Chased leaders to straight. Weakened.
Always thereabouts and raced 3-wide to straight. Just kept on at the same pace under pressure without threatening.
Never far off. Kept on well in the run home.
Soon took up running. Led until finding no extra nearing finish.
Behind midfield to straight. Never nearer.
Never a factor.
Settled in 6th within 3Ls of pace. Switched out for a run over 200 M out. Finished off race strongly to just fail to peg back winner.
Missed the back at start. Never a danger. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Settled around midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Moved up along to be 2nd from 800 M. Just missed in a ding-dong battle final 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Slowly away, near rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Prominent on 3-wide. Weakened 200 M.
Slowly away, last to straight. Recovered good ground inside 250 M.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Made no show when wide in straight.
In similar position throughout. One-paced.
Held 4th to straight. Advanced to 3rd 200 M. Lost the minor placing near finish.
Jumped out quickly though blundered. Made all.
Slightly behind midfield on inside. Crept closer to 5th final turn. Kept on steadily to snatch 3rd near finish.
Midfield early. Improved to 2nd outside leader approaching 1200 M bend. Remained same to straight, then weakened badly.
Wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Mostly in midfield to Rock, then gradually weakened.
Settled around midfield. Shaken up upon straightening but only kept on at the one pace throughout straight.
Settled behind midfield. Snuck up on rails turning in despite tight. Fought on doggedly under pressure but unable to peg back winner throughout closing stages.
Soon took up running and held narrow lead to 300 M. Dropped out under pressure.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Slow out. Raced at the back. Made up late ground past beaten horses in straight.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Jumped well and led early. Settled just off the pace. Hit front over 200 M out. Kept on under pressure to the line.
Trailed the field to straight. Made up good late ground to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced keenly in midfield early. Towards rear halfway out. Taken wide home turn. Ran on steadily to grab 3rd closing stages.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in a rearward position on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on same pace to the line.

Broke well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield or worse 3-wide. Steady shifted to the widest at home bend to obtain clear running. Made up steady ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to race at the back on rail through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began awkwardly and ridden along to race in midfield or worse around 2-wide to straight. No extra when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside final 150 M.
Jumped with field and pushed along to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Ran on quite well when asked 200 M out but just lost out to 2nd placegetter in a ding-dong finish.
Began fairly from widest and pushed along to race in a prominent position around 4-wide. Hung out and carried wider at home turn. Unable to show much running in straight. (Roarer.)
Slowly away from wide draw and raced in a rearward position around 2-wide. Under pressure 250 M out and closed the race off quite well to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse around 2-wide through to straight. All out 200 M out and made up steady ground to grab 2nd place on the line.
Jumped well from wide gate and raced in a forward position in the early stages. Near the 600 M commenced to give ground and tailed out in straight.
Jumped well from wide draw and hard ridden along to race in a prominent position around 2-wide to straight. Plugged on fairly when asked 250 M out and slightly weakened in the closing stages.
Broke with field and ridden along to race in a prominent position on rail. Took slender lead near the 400 M and kicked away from the rest in straight to win comfortably.
Jumped fairly and ridden along to race in a forward position around 2-wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 250 M out and steadily weakened over the concluding stages.
Always at least 3 and 4-wide with no cover, mostly midfield about 4Ls off speed until final bend, soon faded out.
Always towards rear, never better than 6Ls off speed at any stage.
Box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1100 M to final bend, 3Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, tame close home.
5Ls off pace in 10th or so on fence from 1100 M to home turn, made up some good late ground, never nearer.
Prominent but 3-wide no cover throughout about 3Ls off pace in 5th or so until taking final bend, dropped away quickly.
Switched from widest gate to fence on exiting, 8Ls last at 1100 M, 6Ls down in rear at 400 M, made some minor late ground.
Tended to carry head awkwardly as usual when 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide until home straight, outpaced thereafter.
Within 3Ls of the speed in 4th or 5th from 1200 M to final bend, soon outpaced.
Slowly away, about 3Ls off pace 3-back on fence from 1200 M to home straight, 3Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, never looked like reeling in winner.
Always worse than midfield, never better than 5Ls behind leader at any stage.
2-wide about 4Ls off pace in midfield through to straightening for home, kept on at much the same pace.
Soon led on fence, about 1L clear from 1200 M to home straight, 2Ls to the good at 200 M, kept on okay despite hanging in.

2-wide and a length off the lead early stages. Shifted out to raced 3-wide without cover after 1000 M and kept within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Wide making home turn and lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Niggled along early stages and then settled 2-wide better than midfield. No more than 3Ls off the lead making home turn but lacked a response when asked on straightening.
Raced on fence behind midfield for the majority of the race. Towards rear on straightening and had trouble finding a clear path until final 200 M. Ran home strongly thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward position. Remained near the back in back straight and trailed field into home straight. Ran into traffic at 100 M whilst closing off strongly and ended its rally.
Settled 2-wide at midfield early and middle stages. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped well and soon led. Held a length's advantage into home straight. Remained in front before being swamped inside final 200 M.
Dropped back from a wide draw and trailed field until 800 M. Urged along making home turn and swung widest for a run on straightening. Swept past the field and assert authority final 150 M.
Among leaders early. 3-wide in a forward position at 1200 M. Trailed leader in a 2-wide position back straight. Did not quicken on straightening and faded after being hampered at 200 M.

Raced among early leaders before settling behind the pace after 1200 M. Checked at 1100 M but soon recovered. Remained in a prominent position behind the pacesetter until home straight. Ran on without threatening.
Raced behind the early leaders. Settled on fence at midfield in back straight. Raced within 2Ls of the leader home turn but was hampered shortly after straightening. Kept on steadily in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Never got a clear path and was interfered a few times before getting a clear run final 150 M. Ran on fairly thereafter.
Settled 2-wide in rear section until home straight. Had trouble finding a clear run in early straight but rallied home nicely once in the clear.
Settled on fence about 8Ls off pace in rear until home straight, tended to hang in under pressure, nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide about a neck off speed in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, led at 200 M by a neck, collared by winner at 50 M, no extra.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th or so until home straight, all out when same margin behind at 200 M, faded close home.
Soon led on fence, always clear by about a neck until being headed at 200 M, faded.
Worse than midfield 4-back on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until home turn, quickened up very well to lead 50 M out, tidily.
Prominent 2Ls off pace but 3-wide no cover in 3rd or so from 1100 M to 600 M, weakening entering straight, dropped further back.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until home straight, held shifting in at 200 M when 4Ls down.
Settled one from rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace until final bend, made up good late ground for a place.
Awkwardly away and over-raced at 1100 M with head on the side about 3Ls off pace in midfield, checked at 600 M, 5Ls down in 8th entering straight, no impression.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off pace until home straight, place chances when over 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no extra close home.
Hampered at start and got back, 5Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, 4-wide and 5Ls down in 11th at home turn, no impression.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 4th on fence until home straight, faded thereafter.
Prominent. 2nd 300 M. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Last. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Moved up gradually to be 3rd 400 M. Ran on well to take lead passing 200 M. Won readily.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Recovered some ground passing course proper to be 4th briefly 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Took lead until headed 200 M. Kept on without quickening close home.
Well there to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Prominent early, soon dropped back. (Blood in trachea.)
Behind midfield. Made ground halfway to be 4th 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
Stayed alone on the inside rail and was never in contention.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily final 400 M.
Mainly in midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Recovered ground to midfield halfway. Ran on steadily for a 3rd closing stages.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield to home bend. Dropped out.
Never seen with a chance.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced. (Lame.)
Led or disputed lead. Unable to sustain effort and swamped under pressure closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Sustained progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Took closer order when 4-wide turning for home. Unable to sustain effort under pressure and weakened 200 M out.
Settled in midfield. Dropped out under pressure in straight. (Lame and irregular heart beat.)
Always in last few.
Disputed lead to straight. Gradually faded.
Settled in forward of midfield. Prominent behind horses into straight. Obtained clear run inside 200 M and finished off race well.
Well there. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Came to challenge early in straight. Hit front about 100 M out.
Always well back.
Well there early, soon settled around 3Ls 4th until straightening. Ran on well 300 M to take command inside 100 M.
Lost ground at start, last or 2nd last throughout. Hung out badly from 600 M. (Mucus.)
Lost ground at start, then ridden along to take lead passing 1000 M. Was joined early straight. Found no extra when headed inside 100 M.
Raced 5th or 6th to 300 M. Responded quite well when under pressure to take 3rd closing stages.
Led briefly after start, then raced 2Ls 3rd to straight. Kept on well 250 M but unable quicken to threaten the winner final 100 M.
Led briefly soon after start, then raced 2nd before joining the leader early straight. Found no extra inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Last from 800 M. Made no show in straight.
In front early, then held back to race behind leaders. Weakened upon straightening.
Trailed field to straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Wide behind midfield. Made moderate late impression closing stages.
Wide in prominent position to straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled in rear of midfield in bunched field. Not much room early in straight. Produced good late finish final 200 M.
Soon took up running. Pushed out to keep runner-up at bay in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Slightly slow out. Settled at the back. Found no room behind runners in straight. Finished off well strongly once into the clear final few strides.
Chased leader throughout. Failed to peg back winner the length of straight.
Began awkwardly. Never better than midfield.
Prominent far side. Dropped to midfield rounding home bend. Lost further ground into straight.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in midfield around 3 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon settled in midfield or better 3 to 4 wide through to straight. Plugged on fairly when asked 400 M out but slightly weakened in the closing stages.

Slowly away and pushed along to race towards the rear on rail. Steadily switched to the outside at home turn to obtain clear running. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and ridden along to race in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and soon took a narrow lead on rail in early stages. Shortly after the 1200 M eased back to 2nd place to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and plugged on gamely to the line.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in midfield around 2 wide. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running but was unable to show much running in straight.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and race in a forward position out wide in the early stages. Near the 1200 M went forward to take lead to straight. Headed shortly after 400 M and steadily faded thereafter.

Broke with field and pushed along to race in a rearward position 2 wide. Made little headway rounding the home turn. Responded quite well when asked 350 M out but unable to match speed with 1st pair in final stages.
From a wide draw was eased to the rear but closer to the rail. Failed to show any running in home straight.
Broke last from widest and steadily eased to the rear around 2 wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to obtain clear running. Closed the race off well but just failed to run down the winner.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in a forward position on inner through to straight. Baulked for a run in early straight, ran on fairly when running was obtained 350 M out but unable to match speed with principals.
Began fairly and soon raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Broke with field from wide draw and steadily eased to a rearward position closer to the rail. Near the 600 M was checked to avoid heels. Made no impression in straight.

Broke fairly and pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening but was baulked for a run in early part of straight. Obtained clear running around 250 M and ran on well to score a narrow victory.
