Always well there, under 1L off pace in 2nd from 1000 M to home straight and at 200 M, weakened inside final 50 M.
In midfield and 3-wide with cover about 3Ls off pace until home straight, stayed on at same pace.
Slowly away, at least 8Ls off pace at 800 M, 6Ls off pace at final bend, never on terms.
Awkwardly away, about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace and slightly worse than midfield until home straight, failed to kick.
Very slowly away losing about 5Ls at start, 7Ls down in rear on straightening, ran on fairly well late into midfield.
8Ls off pace towards rear at 800 M, 3-wide and 6Ls down in 8th entering home stretch, ran on strongly late, never nearer.
Worse than midfield at least 5Ls or 6Ls off pace through to home straight, never properly involved.
3-wide no cover when close up in 4th place and within 2Ls of pace until home straight, swamped at 200 M.
Better than midfield and 3-wide with cover and 3Ls off pace until home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced close home and lost 2nd place on line.
Led at 1200 M, clear by 1L on fence at 1000 M, half a length clear entering straight and 1L to the good at 200 M, extended a little further clear close home. (Lame.)
Never travelled well, 7Ls down in 12th at 800 M, 5Ls down and under pressure taking final bend, weakened soon after.
Disputed lead early on, 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence from 1000 M to home straight, soon outpaced.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, 3Ls down in 6th at the 200 M, ran on well to take 2nd on line.
On fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Niggled along from the start to follow leader. A length down on straightening and improved to challenge for the lead. Edged steadily closer to the lead and fell just short in a duel over final 200 M.
Raced along the rails in rear section. Gradually shifted out after 500 M and quickened well on straightening. Rallied nicely in the straight for a minor placing.
Settled on fence at midfield. Kept within 2Ls of the pace making home turn. Only stayed on same pace in the straight.
Settled 3-wide in rear section. Widest making home turn and only ran past a pair of beaten ones in the straight.
Never worse than midfield and kept within 3Ls of the leader making home turn. Lacked a response when asked on straigh- tening and weakened. (Lame.)
Dropped back from wide draw and trailed field until home straight. Steadily made up ground along the inside rail in the straight and was closest at finish.
Ridden to the lead. Held a length's advantage into the straight. Fought on gamely over the closing stages to hold off a rival.

Jumped awkwardly. Outpaced by leader early and settled 2-wide and within 2Ls of the leader. Improved steadily making home turn and reached within a length on straigh- tening. Unable to quicken much in the straight.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. 3-wide making home turn and moved to within 3Ls of the leader on straigh- tening. Lacked a response and weakened in the home straight.
Settled on fence and no better than midfield. Picked up well on straightening inside 400 M and made up ground in the final stages.
Dropped back from widest draw and raced in a rearward position. Last on straightening and never quickened.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Angled out on straightening and ran on without threatening in the closing stages.
Fractious in gates and awkwardly away, soon recovered and over-raced in front at 1200 M when 3Ls clear, joined at top of home straight, faded out.
10Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, 7Ls down in rear entering straight, made some minor late ground.
Towards rear about 8Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, 5Ls down into home straight still towards rear, 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, stayed on well to snare quinella close home.
4-back the fence about 5Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, 3Ls down in midfield off final bend when without a clear run, forced wider at 200 M, stayed on well for a place.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 1L down in 4th into home straight, hung wider at 200 M when a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, lost out on a place close home.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 2Ls off pace in 5th when 4-wide taking final bend, beaten 200 M out.
6Ls off pace in 10th or so at 1000 M, 5Ls down in midfield at final bend, widest (5-wide) into straight when 4Ls behind, stayed on well, nearest at finish.
Always wide and towards rear, 3-wide no cover most of the time. (Bled.)
No better than one from rear and at least 6Ls off pace until home turn, no danger.
Mostly in 3rd place on fence between 2Ls and 4Ls off pace until home turn, same at 200 M, stayed on well but lost out on a place close home.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1400 M, upsides entering home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd and fading at 200 M, faded further.
Slowest away, soon recovered to be 6Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 9th place taking home turn, always held.
On fence and worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 8th or so at the final bend, plugged on at same pace.
3-back the fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 2-wide entering straight when 2Ls down on straightening, led over 250 M out, ran on well.
Very keen in places, led early on, disputed lead at 1000 M on fence, unbalanced and bumped rail at 800 M, did same again when 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at final bend, faded out.
Over-raced at 800 M on fence 4Ls off pace in midfield, same position taking final bend, held up until the 200 M, too late to make any impression once clear.
Disputed lead out 2-wide until the 800 M, pressed on 2Ls clear out 2-wide entering straight, same margin clear at 200 M, extended further ahead, comfortably.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 2nd off final bend and same at 200 M, no extra close home and lost out on a place.
In midfield about 4Ls off pace until the final bend, faded steadily thereafter.
Settled about 10Ls off pace in rear until the 600 M, 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 6Ls down in rear, kept on fairly, nearest at finish.
Bunched 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, held up for a run until the 300 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
7Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M, unbalanced when 4-wide entering straight out 4-wide and 6Ls off speed in 13th, made some moderate late ground.
Always 3-wide and without cover, 3Ls off pace in 6th or so at 1000 M and same entering straight, beaten over 200 M out.
Mostly with the run of the race in 4th on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until home turn, soon outpaced.
Bounded at start and slowest away, 7Ls off pace in 13th at 800 M, 5Ls down in 11th taking home straight, no impression.
About 5Ls off pace towards rear when 3-wide with cover until the 800 M, closer but out 4-wide entering straight, made some fair late ground.
4-back the fence about 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield until home straight, held up for a run at 300 M, 4Ls down once clear at 200 M, ran on well late to take 2nd on line.
3-wide with cover when about 4Ls behind in midfield until home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no chance with winner but stayed on well for a place.
Near rear to 250 M. Ran on solidly to claim victory closing stages.
Better than midfield. Under pressure early straight to improve to 4th. Failed to quicken 100 M out.
Sat outside leader before racing 2Ls 3rd home bend. Made no show in straight.
Near rear. Made up good ground inside 200 M, never nearer.
Better than midfield. Moved up to 4th rounding home bend. 3-wide 3rd 400 M. Kept on to take 2nd 250 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Midfield or behind on outside. Weakened on straightening.
Better than midfield. Gave a little ground to 7th home bend. Progressed to 5th early straight. Weakened closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on quite well 250 M to claim 3rd closing stages.
Towards rear. Improved to 7th 400 M. Ran on steadily in straight.
Never a factor.
Led field to 800 M. Raced 2nd before weakening final 300 M.
In touch. Ridden along to take lead on 3-wide from 800 M. 2-wide with 1-2/L advantage final turn. Held on until headed closing stages.
Slowly away, near rear. Soon recovered some ground to be just behind midfield. One-paced.
Never a factor.
In the leading pair to 400 M. Faded.
Lost ground soon after start, towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Dropped back slightly to 5th rounding home bend. Unable to quicken in straight.
In touch on inside rail. Was held up early straight. Ran on well when in clear 250 M to just fail to prevail at finish.
Lost ground at start, behind midfield. Widest (4-wide) final turn. Kept on without threatening final 400 M.
Jumped well and led. Was joined near 800 M. Took clear advantage 400 M. Just held off the runner-up's strong challenges inside 200 M.
Always there. Moved up to 2nd 350 M. Kept on for a remote 3rd inside 200 M.
Always at the back.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear early, soon picked up to be in midfield. Weakened final 300 M.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 300 M.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Weakened. (Bled.)
Midfield to halfway. Dropped out.
Never a factor.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to take charge over 200 M out. Soon went clear.
Always well back.
Midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Forward of midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Prominent in 3 or 4-wide to straight. Weakened.
Settled in rear of midfield. Fought on under pressure for remote 2nd.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Never seen with a chance.
Never in contention.
Midfield or behind. Dropped to the rear group final turn. Ran on well from 9th 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Hard ridden early to be prominent. 5th rounding home bend. Dropped out soon after straightening.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield and was wide final turn. Made no show in straight.
Settled towards rear. Crept closer order to 4th final turn. Ran on steadily to be 2nd close home.
Prominent until dropping to midfield rounding home bend. Made no show in straight. (Slightly lame.)
Towards rear. Widest and last final turn. Made ground early straight but failed to quicken closing stages.
Led briefly after start from the widest draw. Dropped back steadily to become last 400 M. Made up good ground final 300 M.
Slowly away, pushed along from the rear to take lead near 900 M. Found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Lost ground soon after start, near rear. Recovered ground rounding home bend to be 6th 400 M. Ran on to take command close home.
In touch. 2nd rounding home bend. 2Ls behind leader 400 M. Moved up to take lead passing 200 M. Found no extra when headed close home.
Midfield. Improved to 3rd 800 M. 3Ls behind leader 400 M. Found no extra inside 150 M.
Near rear. Made some moderate progress on inside in the straight.
Broke well. Well there to home bend. Weakened.
Midfield to home bend. Gradually weakened.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled in rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Midfield into straight. Ran on steadily on rails to reach 2nd late.
Chased leaders throughout. Fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Always in last few.
Missed the start. Remained in rear throughout.
Prominent briefly. Gave ground steadily from midfield home bend.
Settled in rear of midfield. Commenced move turning in. Made moderate progress down centre of track without threatening.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Made moderate late progress closing stages.
Soon dropped out at the back.
Never far off. Swamped for 2nd closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Came to challenge under pressure turning in. Found nothing.
Made all. Hung on well under pressure.

Broke with field and hard ridden along in the early stages to be box-seated behind the leader to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out and fended off late challenge from 3rd placegetter to settle for 2nd.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in better than midfield arond 3 wide. Commenced to give ground around 500 M and tailed out in straight.
From the widest draw was steadily eased to the rear but closer to the rail through to straight. Unable to show much running when asked 400 M out.
Jumped fairly and ridden along to race in better than midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and weakened slightly inside final 200 M.
Broke with field from wide draw and pushed along to race in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made up ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Shortly after the start was checked when crowded for room and dropped to a rearward position on rail to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but was never in position to threaten the principals.
On jumping stood flat footed and raced at the tail around 2 wide through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 250 M to be closest at finish when asked 400 M out.
Jumped with field from wide draw and raced in worse than midfield around 3 wide with cover through to straight. Failed to make any impression when asked 400 M out.
Began fairly and pushed along to race in a prominent position 2 wide to straight. Failed to quicken when asked 400 M out and gave ground steadily thereafter.

Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to miss 2nd placegetter by a short margin.
Jumped with field and raced in midfield or worse 2 wide. Under pressure rounding the home turn to maintain position. Only able to run on evenly in the straight.
Jumped well from wide draw and steadily settled in midfield around 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running, kept on same pace to the line when asked 400 M out.
Began well and ridden along to take up running on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and ran on strongly to win comfortably.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and pushed along to race in midfield or better out wide without cover. Gave ground steadily rounding the home turn and tailed out in straight. (Lame right fore.)
Within 4Ls of the pace in midfield or better on fence through to home straight, all out at 200 M to maintain this position, weakened close home.
Slowly away, always towards rear and at least 6Ls behind leader through to final bend, made some minor late ground past tired horses.
Keen early on, 2-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, found nothing under pressure.
2-wide and 5Ls behind lead in 9th or so at 1000 M, roughly in same position at 400 M, always well outpaced but plugged on through pack to take 3rd at 50 M.
Never travelled well and at least 7Ls last until the 600 M, always very much outpaced despite making some moderate late ground.
Carried head awkwardly in places, 6Ls or 7Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, same turning for home, made some fair late headway through beaten rivals.
Prominent within 2Ls off pace but left 3-wide no cover from 1200 M, under pressure when 3Ls down in 5th entering home straight, faded away tamely.
4-wide no cover when 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield at 1000 M, soon struggling and detached in rear taking home turn, well beaten.
Prominent early, led 1200 M out, on fence and 2Ls clear at 1000 M, headed by winner taking home turn, faded out steadily.
Slowly away, about 5Ls off pace in midfield with cover until home turn, never dangerous.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield until final bend when under pressure to lie up, dropped away.
Prominent and 3-wide no cover until the 1200 M when 2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd, 2Ls down in 4th taking home turn, dropped out tamely. (Mucus in trachea.)
3-back on fence at 1000 M when 4Ls off pace in 5th or so, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, same margin back in 2nd at 200 M, no extra and always held by winner.
Led early on, headed at 1200 M, 2Ls back in 2nd on fence at 1000 M, led out 2-wide at top of homestretch, 2Ls clear at 200 M, stayed on well.
2-wide behind midfield and kept within 4Ls of the leader at 1000 M. Lacked a response when hard ridden at home turn and made no impression in the straight.

Raced along the rails behind the leader. Remained in a prominent position rounding home turn and was boxed in on straightening until final 200 M. Quickened once finding daylight and chrged home for 2nd place.
Jumped awkwardly and settled on fence behind midfield. No more than 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Angled out on strightening swept to the lead at 250 M.
1/2L behind and outside of the leader through to home straight. Failed to quicken and weakened inside 300 M.
Led shortly after start and kept a 1/2L advantage into the straight. Maintained lead until final 300 M and was unable to hold off the top pair.
Raced behind the leaders in a 3-wide position until 1000 M. Stayed within 2Ls of the pace making home turn and only kept same pace in the straight.
Eased back from the start and trailed field until straigh- tening. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners in the straight.
Trailed in the early stages and remained in a rearward position until home straight. Angled out on straightening and made up some ground closing stages.
3-wide behind midfield early stages and was 4Ls off the lead at 1200 M. Drifted further back to be 3-wide rear section at home turn. Trailed field into home straight and never quickened.
Raced 2-wide behind the leaders through to home straight. Kept on before bowing out of contention inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 4th entering home straight, dropped right out.
Worse than midfield and 6Ls off pace with cover at 800 M, 5Ls down and 4-wide towards rear on straightening, always outpaced.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield through to final bend, never looked like making much improvement.
Never better than midfield at any stage, 7Ls back in 12th at 1000 M, dropped back 6Ls down in 13th on straightening, no impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
7Ls off pace in 13th at 1000 M, 5Ls down and still towards rear out 3-wide taking final bend, never on terms on run home.
3Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, soon fell further adrift.
4-wide no cover and hanging out when 6Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, detached in rear on straightening, soon eased down.
In midfield or better until home straight 3-back on fence no worse than 3Ls off pace, over 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, always held by winner despite staying on well.
3-wide no cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 3-wide on straightening when 2Ls down in 3rd, one-paced thereafter.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 1000 M to home straight, all out when 3Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, faded right out.
About 4Ls off pace and 4-back on fence in midfield through to home straight, plugged on fairly well to take a place close home.
Settled about 8Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, 5Ls down and still in rear off home turn, steadied and held up at 350 M out, no impression.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in mid-division at 800 M, 4-wide and 3Ls down in mid-division and under pressure taking home turn, very much outpaced.
Led at 1200 M and on fence 1L clear at 1000 M, 2Ls clear at home turn and same margin clear at 200 M, always in command.
Never travelled well always wide (with cover) towards rear about 4Ls down at 800 M, 8Ls last on straightening, slipped further behind.
On fence over 2Ls down in 6th at 800 M, checked at 600 M and held up on straightening when 3Ls down in 5th on fence, 3Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well late, nearest at finish.
3Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, lost ground on circle and 7Ls off pace towards rear on straightening, no danger.
About 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M, about 2Ls down in 2nd entering straight, 3Ls down in 4th and weakening at 200 M, faded further.
4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M when 3-wide with cover, 7Ls down towards rear and under pressure taking home turn. (Mucus.)
4Ls off pace in 9th or so at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 8th when 3-wide taking home turn, hung out at 300 M and finished off on stands' rail.
Soon led on fence by 1L, over 1L clear taking home turn, over 2Ls clear at 200 M, stayed on well.
Towards rear on fence when 4Ls off pace at 800 M, 3Ls down in 7th entering straight, over 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, kept on finding but post came too soon.
Awkwardly away, 2Ls off speed in 5th at 800 M, shuffled back 3Ls off pace in mid-division on straightening out 3-wide, never troubled principals.
Pressed on 3-wide no cover about 1L or so off pace in 4th at 800 M, still prominent but struggling entering home straight, soon beaten.
Slowly away and detached in rear at least 8Ls off the speed at 800 M, 6Ls down in 9th or so entering straight, no impression.
About 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 900 M, same at top of home- stretch, soon outpaced and over 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, lost further ground late on.
Towards rear. Crept closer order to midfield final turn. Kept on without threatening.
Led field to early straight. Faded.
In touch. Hit front early straight. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Around midfield before dropping out soon after straigh- tening.
Around midfield before improving to 4th 400 M. Was held up before shifting in to the inside rail 200 M. Ran on steadily to just prevail at finish.
Behind midfield. Widest turning in. Made some moderate progress in straight.
Mostly 5th to straight. Kept on well to hit front briefly 200 M. Failed to match speed with the quinella pair closing stages.
Never in contention.
Rear. Made progress from 600 M to be 8th 400 M. Ran on well early straight to take lead 150 M. Just lost narrowly at finish.
Well there from widest draw. Came to tackle leader approaching 800 M. Weakened in straight.
Prominent. 2Ls behind lead final turn. Soon weakened.
Slowly away, near rear. Made ground moderately inside 200 M.
Near rear. Slight progress to 9th turning in. Made ground 250 M.
Midfield early. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M.
Rear. Crept a bit closer to 9th 800 M. Was held up 400 M. Made up good ground in straight to claim 2nd 100 M out.
In touch on inside. 2-3Ls behind pace far side. Ran on steadily 300 M to take command 200 M. Held on.
Prominent. Sat outside leader approaching 1000 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Began awkwardly, midfield the best.
Always at the back.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up good ground 200 M out.
Midfield. Dropped out from 900 M.
Lost ground at start and was whipped to recover ground to behind midfield. Improved steadily far side to be 6th turning in. Kept on.
Slightly better than midfield. Improved to 4th far side. Moved up final turn to take lead on straightening. Was headed 200 M. Just kept on for a remote 3rd.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd far side. Found no extra in straight.
Took lead soon after start. Crossed to inside rail 1200 M. Found no extra when headed home turn.
Prominent to straight, then weakened under pressure.
Well there to 400 M. Dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Ran on down centre of straight to get up on line.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled passing 200 M.
Broke well. Settled in prominent position to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Settled in midfield. Improving between runners when gap closed and checked about 100 M out. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
Settled towards rear. Gained midfield into straight. Failed to make any impression.
Well back to straight. Never seen with a chance.
Always in last few.
Well there to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield to straight. No further impression.

Settled in midfield. Commenced run turning in. Improved from 4th into straight to hit front inside 200 M. Drifted out under pressure about 100 M out and headed close to home. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Around midfield throughout.
Always there. Ran on well on inside passing 200 M to miss narrowly.
Towards rear. Dropped out from home turn.
Towards rear from a wide draw. Made ground moderately in straight.
Took lead soon after start. Headed near 400 M. Found no extra in straight.
Well there. Gained a brief lead near 400 M. Kept on until headed closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Well there from widest draw. Kept on and gained slender advantage briefly closing stages, just beaten narrowly.
Midfield. Made some progress passing the Rock. Ran on from 5th 400 M to gain upper hand in a close finish.
Near rear. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Midfield early. Dropped back steadily 600 M out.
Never a factor.
Chased leader. Dropped out from 300 M.
Wide in midfield early. Took closer order passing winning post the first time. Found nothing under pressure in home straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well between runners in straight to take charge inside final 200 M.
Always in last few.
Soon took up running and led to 150 M. No extra.
Jumped best. In front early. Settled just off the pace. Gradually weakened from 1-1/2Ls into straight.
Behind midfield. Quickened well down straight to hold some chance 200 M out. Found winner too strong.
Settled in rear. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Very slowly away. Trailed the field most of way.
Settled in forward of midfield. Only produced moderate progress under pressure in straight.
Broke with field and pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but unable to find an extra gear and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield around 2-wide. Crept closer to the leader at home bend. Plugged on gamely to the line but without threatening the principals.

Broke well and pushed along to race in a forward position. Near the 1300 M was steadied when crowded for room and raced wide without cover in midfield thereafter. Gave ground rapidly from 600 M. (Irregular heart beat.)
Jumped fairly from wide draw and took lead on rail shortly after the 1200 M with around 1L advantage to straight. Headed near the 200 M mark and weakened steadily thereafter.
Checked soon after the start and dropped to the tail on rail. Failed to make any impression in home straight.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in worse than midfield on rail. Made steady headway rounding the home turn in the middle of the track on straightening. Ran on well in straight but unable to match speed with winner.

Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in a forward position, near the 1400 M was crowded for room and soon recovered to race 1L off leader on rail to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M and faded steadily thereafter.
Pushed along to race in a forward position 3-wide and was checked passing the winning post on first occasion. Raced in midfield or worse to straight. Ran on fairly to the line when asked 300 M out.

On jumping bounded in the air and niggled along to race in midfield on rail, came off the rail and made headway going up the Rock. 1L off pace on straightening and made good impression in straight to win convincingly.

Checked soon after the start and raced in a rearward position 2-wide to straight. Did not see clear daylight in early straight, closed the race off well when clear running was obtained near the 150 M.
Jumped well from widest and niggled along to race behind midfield 2-wide through to straight. Near the 200 M was steadied when closed to heels and only able to run on evenly to the line thereafter.

Shortly after the start checked when crowded for room and raced in a rearward position on rail. Made headway rounding the home turn. No clear running in early straight, ran on strongly inside 150 M to miss 2nd narrowly.
3-wide with cover and worse than midfield at least 4Ls or 5Ls from 1200 M to home turn, making only fair headway when steadied at 100 M, ran on.
Crossed to fence 3Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down in 4th taking final bend, picked up well to lead at 150 M, stayed on.
Slowly away and baulked at start, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, still towards rear and 6Ls behind entering home straight, stayed on well to take 2nd place close home.
3-wide no cover when 5Ls off pace in midfield at 1100 M, 3Ls behind at 800 M, lost position on circle and 7Ls behind towards rear taking home turn, weak thereafter.
4-back the fence 5Ls behind in midfield at 1200 M, pressed on to lead by a neck out 2-wide at 600 M, 2Ls clear on fence off home turn, tired when swamped at 200 M.
On fence in 11th place 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, steadied at 700 M, 8Ls last off home turn, ran on strongly late, never nearer.
Switched inside from widest gate, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, similarly placed on straightening for home, ran on well through pack to get 3rd in final strides.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, unbalanced at 500 M and 4Ls back in 5th taking home turn, picked up to be 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Awkwardly away, pressed on to lead by half a length on fence at 1200 M, headed at 600 M and 2Ls down in 3rd into stretch when under pressure, found nothing.
7Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 9th at 800 M, 4-wide (widest of all) entering straight 7Ls off pace in 11th, no impression.
Awkwardly away losing ground, rushed up to be half a length 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, 2Ls back in 2nd at home turn and regained lead briefly at 200 M before being swamped final 50 M.
5Ls down and 2-wide in midfield from 1100 M to home straight, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no extra thereafter.
Raced just behind leaders in a one off position. Commenced to weaken after 600 M and weakened badly in the straight.
Unable to hold the lead at winning post 1st time, moved outside of leader at 600 M, fought on gamely but was headed for minor placing last 50 M.
Always 3-wide behind midfield, losing ground rounding the home turn and weakened very badly in the straight.
Raced in handy position outside winner, carried very wide on home turn. Never threaten.
Ridden along early to race 3rd on fence. Remained there until straightening, one-paced in the straight.
Ridden very hard in early stages until establishing the lead at 1200 M, set solid tempo but was quickly headed on straightening.
Settled midfield on the rail, remained there till shifting out straightening. Closed the race off strongly.
Steadied from wide draw to be rearward position. Steadily improved from 600 M, gained clear running in straight without looking a main threat.
Raced 5th on the rail eased out to 3 deep position rounding home turn. Took lead but unable to hold off winners challenge.
Shifted across from wide barrier to be rear of the field remain at tail closed to fence until straightening. Gained clear running to close off strongly.
Raced midfield throughout. Widest on home turn. Never a threat.
Raced behind midfield on rail, always there. Never nearer.
Awkwardly away, keen at 1000 M, 2Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M when 2-wide, same at final bend when niggled along, never looked like grabbing the lead.
Never better than midfield always about 4Ls off pace, ridden along to take closer order at 500 M, didn't succeed.
Slowest away, 7Ls last at 1000 M when 4-wide no cover, gained cover at 800 M but still about 5Ls last taking home turn, never on terms.
Awkwardly away and no speed early, about 5Ls off pace worse than midfield 4-back on fence through to home straight, always held.
3-wide with cover when about 3Ls behind lead in midfield until homestretch, about 4Ls down at the 200 M, kept on to nick a place on the line.
Always 3-wide no cover, within 2Ls of the pace in 4th or so until final bend, very one-paced from then on.
Box seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until homestretch, one-paced thereafter.
Led early on fence, always about 1L clear through to home straight entrance, still 1L to the good at 200 M, always in charge.
Always in touch in 2nd about 1L off pace out 2-wide until home straight entrance and the 200 M when all out, lost out on a place on the line.
Awkwardly away, towards rear about 5Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover until home straight, stayed on fairly well in stretch without troubling principals.
3-back on fence 3Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, same entering straight when without a clear run until 300 M out, ran on well to take 2nd close home.
Slowly away, always towards rear at least 5Ls off pace at every stage.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field soon after start. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to just better than midfield rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Crept a bit closer to 9th final turn. Improved moderately in straight.
Better than midfield on inside. Kept on well 250 M out, taking lead 100 M. Failed to contain the winner final 50 M.
Near rear to straight. Made up good ground to claim 3rd closing stages.
Never able to feature.
Slightly behind midfield. 4-wide 7th final turn. Kept on quite well until one-paced close home.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made gradual ground rounding home bend to be 8th final turn. Ran on strongly 200 M out to take over final 50 M.
Led briefly from widest draw, then settled in 4th. 2Ls 3rd on 3 wide rounding home bend. Found no extra in straight.
Near rear. Last from 800 M. Made ground moderately in straight.
Prominent. Kept on but found no extra soon after straigh- tening.
Midfield. Dropped out from home turn.
Pushed along to be prominent. 2Ls 2nd final turn. Kept on until failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Wide in midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Raced in midfield on rails. Found nothing in straight.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Always in last few.
Midfield early. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Broke well. Settled in forward of midfield and never far off the leader. Ran on steadily down straight to snatch 2nd late under pressure.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear to straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield rounding home bend. Dropped out.
Restrained behind leader. Came to challenge upon straigh- tening and gained upper hand closing stages.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Attempted to make all, only to be caught in the closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Settled midfield on inside. Improved to 5th turning in. Responded well 300 M to take lead 200 M out. Headed closing stages.
Led early. 2nd 1000 M. 4th 800 M. 3Ls 3rd final turn. Ran on well to take lead closing stages. Just held on.
In similar position throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear early, ridden along to be in touch. Kept on for a remote 4th.
Near rear. Crept a bit closer to 8th 400 M. Ran on strongly on outside to just miss narrowly.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made ground moderately final 250 M.
Rear. Made ground steadily in straight.
Never a factor.
Held 3rd until hanging out badly home turn. Dropped out.
Midfield early from widest draw. Ridden along to be 2nd 850 M. Faded 300 M.
Took lead from 1000 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M out.
Jumped best to lead to 300 M. Overhauled.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened under pressure.
Always well back.
Never far off. Quickened well to hit front 200 M and soon went clear.
Soon tailed-off.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Well there. Held every chance early in straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Always prominent. Kept on without quickening.
Settled at the back. Taken wide into straight. Made no show thereafter.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Broke well from wide draw and pushed along to race in a forward position around 2 wide to straight. Under pressure 400 M out but was only able to run on evenly to the line.
Began well and soon raced in a prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Ran on well when asked 350 M out and overhauled 2nd placegetter inside final 100 M to win by a short margin.
Sluggish start and soon settled behind midfield 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running, plugged on fairly to the line when asked 400 M out.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and gave ground rapidly inside final 300 M.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 3 wide with cover. Ridden along and made little headway at home turn. Plugged on fairly when asked 400 M out but became one pace inside final 200 M.

On jumping stood flat-footed and lost a lot of ground. Raced at the back on rail through to straight. Slightly held up in early part of straight, made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began fairly from widest and pushed along to race in a prominent position 3 wide without cover to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M and gave ground steadily there- after.
Jumped fairly from wide draw and soon eased to the rear 3 wide with cover through to straight. Unable to show much impression when asked 400 M out.
Jumped with field and soon raced around 1-1/2Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and ran on fairly without threatening the first pair.
Raced in midfield or better around 2 wide and commenced to hang out after 1300 M. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only kept on evenly to the line.
Broke with field from wide gate and pushed along to race in midfield or worse around 4 wide with limited cover. Commenced to give ground after the 600 M and faded quite badly in straight.
Tardy start from wide gate and steadily eased to the rear closer to the rail. Made up little ground from middle of the track inside final 200 M when asked 400 M out.
Slowly away and raced towards the rear on rail through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and pushed along to take up running on rail with no more than 1/2L advantage to straight. Fought on gallantly with the winner in straight but unable to hold off the winner inside final 100 M.
In midfield when 4-wide without cover at 1200 M to be 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, back-pedalling and under pressure entering straight when 8Ls down, soon well beaten.
Always in rear trio, never better than 6Ls off the pace at any stage, eased down a long way out.
Never a factor, crowded at start but always towards rear and never better than 7Ls off pace at any point.
Had the run of the race in 3rd or so about 2Ls off pace from 1400 M to home turn, switched out into clear at 300 M, hung out a bit, one-paced final 200 M and lost 2nd on line.
Crowded at start, niggled along early on when 8Ls off pace on fence in rear, 6Ls down in 8th entering homestretch, made some minor late ground without threatening.
Slowly away, switched from wide gate to fence 5-back about 6Ls off pace in 11th, improved to be 4Ls down in midfield on straightening, held up at 300 M, ran on well to take 2nd on line.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1400 M to top of home straight, led 200 M out, stayed on well, comfortably.
Always 3-wide with cover down backstretch about 6Ls off pace towards rear, lost ground on the circle and weakened right out in straight.
Led on fence at 1400 M by 1L, same margin clear at final bend, headed by winner at 200 M, weakened close home.
3-wide no cover when 1L off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, 4Ls down in mid-division at 800 M, lost all position on the circle and beaten before homestretch.
2-wide and about 5Ls off pace worse than midfield until 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in midfield, same margin down at 200 M, weakened close home.
Keen at 1400 M, 4-wide no cover at 1000 M and 2Ls down in 5th and still wide at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 5th, weakened out steadily.
Always in midfield about 4Ls off pace 3-back on fence until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide with cover about 4Ls off pace in midfield or better until taking home turn, 4Ls down in 4th at 200 M, outpaced by principals.
Raced behind midfield along rail. One-paced early in the straight, making headway closing stages.
Raced handy position, weakened on straightening.
Midfield throughout. Never nearer.
Behind midfield, taken widest turning in and made up good ground in final stages.
Always 2Ls behind leader never quicken beaten for minor placings closing stages.
Forward of midfield. Weakened badly in the straight.
No early pace raced in rearward position, eased out on straightening and made up good ground inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and niggled along to take up running on rail. Hung out rounding the home turn, ran on well when asked 400 M out and pulled away from the rest inside final 200 M to win comfortably.
No early speed raced midfield along rail. One-paced in the straight.
Raced at the tail. Never a factor.
No early speed improved mid-race but at least 4 wide round the circle. Widest turning in and made good ground in the straight.
Raced handy position just off pace, never quickened when asked, weakened closing stages.
Box-seated behind leaders, remained there till straightening without threatening. Made ground closing stages.
Midfield and wide throughout. Widest turning in and weakened in the straight.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed and 2-wide at 1000 M, no better off taking final bend, always outpaced.
Settled 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, over 1L down in 3rd off home turn, one-paced from then on.
Box seat run on 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, 3Ls down in 4th and unbalanced off home turn, beaten 300 M out and very ungainly, dipping on run-in, eased down final 200 M.
6Ls off pace towards rear at 800 M, unbalanced when dipping at 700 M, lost a lot of ground very quickly and detached taking home turn, eased down.
Awkwardly away, 4-wide no cover and 6Ls off pace one from rear at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) when 5Ls down in 10th taking home turn, soon retreated.
3-back the fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, same margin behind taking home turn, one-paced thereafter.
On fence 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, same taking home turn and 4Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on well late without threatening quinella pair.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, same margin clear taking final bend and at 200 M, hung on well under pressure.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, 3-wide and about 1L down in 2nd off final bend, still 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, stayed on well but never looked like overhauling winner.
About 4Ls off pace in midfield when 3-wide with cover at 800 M, 5Ls behind taking home turn out 3-wide, well beaten quickly.
Slow to enter gates and very slowly away losing at least 5Ls, detached and 10Ls off pace at 800 M, 7Ls last at 600 M, ran on well late, never nearer.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 5Ls down into home straight, weakened right out.
6Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, 3-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in midfield, kept on to be 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on finding to take 2nd close home, never looked the winner.
3-back on fence 5Ls off pace at 900 M, over 3Ls down in 5th taking home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Always about 8Ls off pace towards rear down backstretch and entering straight, 5Ls down at 200 M, posed little threat.
Led on fence by a neck at 1000 M, nearly 2Ls clear taking home turn, grabbed by winner inside final 50 M and lost 2nd place on line.
Worse than midfield at least 6Ls off speed through to home straight, 4Ls down in mid-division at 200 M, no extra.
Never on terms, 7Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, 9Ls down taking home turn, soon well beaten and eased down.
Always towards rear and never better than 7Ls off pace until homestretch, dropped right out.
3-wide no cover early but got in 2-wide at 800 M when 5Ls off pace in 6th, blundered at 600 M and struggling 8Ls off pace towards rear on straightening, soon well behind.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, kept on well to lead inside final 50 M, gamely.
3-wide sometimes without cover when 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4Ls down taking home turn, disappointed for running at 300 M, 3Ls down at 200 M, held close home.
Steadied at start, detached in rear and very sluggish down backstretch, never on terms.
A neck down in 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, under pressure when 2Ls down in 2nd taking home turn, very weak thereafter and eased down inside final 200 M.
Awkwardly away, about 6Ls down in midfield at 1000 M, 4Ls down in mid-division taking home turn, switched out left at 300 M into clear running, nearest at finish.
3-wide no cover when 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 3rd until the 800 M, all out when 3Ls down in 4th off home turn, soon beaten and eased down.
In touch. 4-wide final turn. Ran on under pressure in straight for a remote 3rd.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, last throughout.
In touch. 4th final turn. Responded well 250 M to take command closing stages.
Made no show.
Never in contention.
Around midfield on inside. Kept on in straight.
Sat outside leader from widest draw. Dropped back steadily from home turn.
Prominent. 1-1/2Ls 2nd final turn. Soon weakened.
Led. With 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn. Held on but failed to contain the winner closing stages.
Midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Made up good ground on inside in straight.
Lost ground at start, towards rear throughout.
At rear after being slowly away. Midfield from 900 M. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Began awkwardly from wide draw. At back from 900 M. Slight progress rounding the bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Led from 1000 M. Kept on well in straight until being caught by the winner close home.
At rear. Hampered at 500 M. Improved to midfield along the rail rounding the bend. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Slowly away and remained towards rear. Behind midfield turning in. One-paced in straight.
Ridden early to be in touch or forward of midfield. Steadied approaching 600 M. Ran on well final 300 M to snatch victory in the closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Steadied at 500 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Led early. 2nd from 1000 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Midfield or better. Weakened badly final 250 M. (Wide throughout.)
In touch early. Midfield or worse from 1000 M. Dropped quickly out of contention 500 M out.
Midfield early whilst being ridden along. Dropped to rear from 800 M. Never a threat in straight.
Soon in touch. 2nd turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Led until outpaced by the winner about 50 M from home.
Mainly forward of midfield. 4th or 5th turning in. Kept on for a distant 3rd.
Midfield or worse. Failed to quicken in straight.
Always well there. Responded well in straight and took lead 50 M from home.
Midfield early. Dropped towards rear after being trapped wide on first turn. Unable to make up ground in straight.
Soon 2nd. One-paced in straight.
Lost considerable ground at start and remained at rear. Ran past beaten horses in the straight.
Mainly 4th or 5th. Midfield turning in. Never a threat in straight.
Midfield or worse. Steadied on straightening. Never nearer.
Slowly away and settled towards rear. Improved on the outside to midfield rounding the bend. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
In touch early. Midfield or worse from 1200 M. Soon weakened upon straightening. (Wide throughout.)
Blundered after clipping heels at start. At rear and never a threat.
Raced in forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Never better than midfield.
Raced wide in midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Soon dropped to the rear.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Well there briefly. Dropped out after Rock.
Never in contention.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Broke well and made all to win unchallenged.
Chased leader throughout. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield briefly. Dropped out after Rock.
Never nearer than 2Ls off the pace. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield early stages. Towards rear far side. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield. Kept on same pace without threatening.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Behind midfield. Made no impression in straight. (Mildly lame.)
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight for remote 3rd.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Made all. Drew clear in straight.
Never a danger.
Behind midfield early. Ridden and wide in midfield far side. Weakened in straight.
Jumped well from wide gate and ridden along to race in a forward position out wide without cover to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Unable to muster early speed to race at the rear on rail through to straight. Made no impression when asked 300 M out.

Crowded for room on jumping and pushed along to race in midfield 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running, ran on well and looked every chance to win but was overhauled by winner near the line.
On jumping was checked when crowded for room. Soon recovered to race behind midfield on rail to straight. Unable to show much running in the straight.
Jumped fairly and ridden along to race around 1L off leaders 3-wide without cover. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 300 M out.
Broke well and ridden along to race in a forward position 2-wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out but unable to match speed with the 1st pair over the concluding stages.
Broke with field from widest draw and soon dropped to the tail but on the rail. Unable to make up any ground in the straight.
Raced in midfield or better around 3-wide with cover. Around the 600 M commenced to give ground and tailed out in straight.
Jumped with field and steadily settled in worse than midfield around 2-wide through to straight. All out 200 M and ran home strongly to grab victory near the line.
Began well and hard ridden along to take a narrow lead 2-wide. Headed on straightening but still able to plug on gamely to the line without threatening the principals.
Broke well and hard ridden along to race next to the leader on rail. Took lead on straightening and plugged on gamely when asked 250 M out. Headed near the 150 M and one-paced thereafter.
Broke awkwardly and was then steadied when crowded for room. Soon recovered to race in midfield or better on rail to straight. Kept on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Raced about 4Ls off pace in 5th or so until final bend, failed to kick.
Towards rear about 6Ls off pace until 600 M when under pressure, very little response.
Switched to fence from wide gate, about 5Ls off pace in midfield until final bend, hindered at 250 M, always held.
Never better than midfield or closer than 6Ls off pace from 1000 M.
Soon led on fence, always about 1L until final bend, headed soon after and one-paced.
2-wide in mid-division until homestretch about 5Ls off pace, one-paced.
Checked at post first time round, caught about 4Ls behind speed on fence until home turn, no acceleration.
About 2Ls off speed in 4th until 500 M, closer on straightening, no extra.
Settled at least 6Ls off pace in rear until home turn, improved to 4Ls off pace in mid-division at 200 M, led close to home.
Always 3-wide without cover at least 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, well beaten off home turn.
2-wide in 2nd within 1L of pace until 500 M, led off home turn, grabbed close home.
Box-seat run on fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th until home turn, checked at 200 M on fence when trying to improve, just clung on for 3rd.
Ridden along in a forward position 2-wide in the early stages. Dropped back to midfield going up the Rock. Unable to show much impression in straight.
Jumped well and pushed along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Plugged on gamely when asked 300 M out and just failed to catch the 3rd placegetter.
Jumped well and ridden along to race around 1L off leader 2-wide. Ran on well in straight to score a convincing victory.
Slowly away and soon raced at the back. Tailed out in straight.
Jumped with field and pushed along to race in a forward position around 3-wide through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.
Jumped fairly from widest and soon settled in midfield around 3-wide to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but without threatening the principals.
Jumped with field and pushed along to race in midfield or worse 2-wide through to straight. No extra when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Sluggish jump from wide draw and raced towards the rear on the outside. Made steady headway up the Rock and at home bend. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to grab 2nd near the line.
Best out from wide draw and ridden along to take lead on rail with around 1L advantage to straight. Headed near the 200 M and was overhauled by 2nd placegetter near the line.
Unable to muster early speed to race in the rear section. Commenced to lose ground rapidly near the 600 M and tailed out in straight.
Ridden along to race in midfield, made little headway going up the Rock towards the outside. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced in the rear section around 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Never much better than midfield about 5Ls off pace until home turn when 4-wide, always well held.
No cover early on and pressed on to lead out 2-wide at 1000 M, gave ground from 600 M, beaten before home turn.
3-wide no cover 2Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, struggling to lie up at final bend, fell away.
Never better than midfield, beaten shortly after straightening.
Awkward break, unbalanced at 900 M and dipped a few times down backstretch when 5Ls off speed in mid-division, no threat.
Awkward break, behind early, headway to be 3-wide and 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, one-paced.
Box-seat run on fence in 3rd about 2Ls off speed until home turn, led 250 M out, kicked clear.
6Ls down in midfield at 800 M, 4Ls down in midfield and under pressure taking home turn, weakened.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th until final bend, outpaced.
Slow away, about 6Ls behind worse than midfield and wide at 800 M, improved to be upsides leader taking home turn, stayed on well out wide without matching winner's toe.
Held up about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M towards rear, improved to be 3Ls down in 5th taking final bend, plugged on to gain a place close home.
Soon led on fence, about a neck clear until final bend, soon headed and dropped away.
Slowly away and remained towards rear. Never a threat.
Mainly midfield. Failed to make any impression in straight.
4th from 1200 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Soon towards rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away after awkward start. Mainly towards rear. Improved a little on the outside rounding home bend but made no impression in straight.
Ridden early and settled in 3rd position from 1000 M. Kept on steadily in straight before being swamped by first two horses close home.
Soon midfield or behind. One-paced in straight.
Soon midfield or better. Kept on steadily in straight.
Jumped best from wide draw and attempted to make all but run ended 150 M out.
Slowly away and remained at rear throughout.
Ridden in the early stages after jumping fairly. 2nd from 1100 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon dropped to the back from wide draw. Made up a lot of ground on the outside final 350 M, just failed.
Soon settled behind midfield. Quickened well final 300 M to snatch victory in the closing stages.
Began well, ridden along early, box-seated, reached lead, one-paced in the straight.
Slow to begin. Settled in in rearward position 4 wide with no cover. Loomed at the 200 M, scored well.
From wide gate, took up a position on the fence at the tail of the field. Disappointed for a run near the 200 M, closed race off strongly.
Tardy to begin, one off at the 800 M, 6L off lead.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear, hung out 800 M.
Ridden hard early, stalked the leader.
Began awkwardly, then ridden along into a forward position, 3 wide, no cover, gave ground in straight.
Handy, 2Ls off lead on fence, steadied 800 M, overraced for same distance after 800 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Handy position, 3Ls off lead. Held up for shortly after straight until 200 M.
Led without using too much petrol. Tired last 200 M.
Reared slightly at start and lost ground. Settled some 6Ls off lead on fence. Steadied on straightening.
Not the best to begin, raced handy 3 wide with cover. Looked winner but overhauled last 150 M.
Smartly away, shuffled back mid race, settled slightly worse than midfield with cover on fence.
Raced behind the leaders in a prominent position. Kept along the rails making home turn and was 2Ls down on straightening. Stayed on well over the concluding stages for a minor placing.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield early stages. Dropped further back to rear section and was 3-wide making home turn. Ran on without threatening over closing stages.

Ridden quietly in rear section early stages. Niggled after 1000 M to improve position. 2-wide behind midfield making home turn and was 9Ls off lead on straightening. Quickened well and made up ground in the closing stages.
Little slow to begin and raced along the rails near the back. Among last pair to enter home straight and ran on without threatening.
Settled towards the rear. Raced along the rails in rear section making home turn. Switched out at 400 M and closed the race off strongly.
Ridden from the start and raced alongside the leader from 1000 M. Took over the lead after 800 M and held a length's advantage into the straight. Remained in front before fading final 200 M.
Ridden out of the gates and kept within 3Ls of the leader. 2-wide and 4Ls down at 600 M. Unable to quicken on straightening and faded.
Settled 3-wide in midfield until home straight. Responded well under pressure and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Settled wide in midfield. 3-wide making home turn and was under pressure after 600 M. Kept on well in the straight and just missed a minor placing.
Niggled along 3-wide and kept within 3Ls of the pacesetter. 2Ls off the lead entering home straight but faded steadily thereafter.
Niggled along at midfield in a 2-wide position. Checked and shuffled back at 800 M. 3-wide making the turn and didn't find much in the straight.
Best out and was clear in front early stages. Relinquished lead at 800 M but remained a length off the leader. Picked up well when asked and regained lead at 300 M. Drew clear for an easy win.
Ridden along on fence at midfield. Checked near 800 M but remained within 5Ls of the leader until straightening. Lacked a response when asked and weakened over closing stages.
Slowly away. Outpaced and trailed from the start. Last to enter home straight and maintained same pace to line.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, closer taking home turn but still in 4th, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover and 6Ls off pace early on when worse than midfield, same at top of homestretch, outpaced.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in about 8th place until home turn, always outpaced by leading bunch.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, under pressure to maintain prominent position on straightening, soon faded out.
Keen early on, settled about 7Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) when 5Ls off pace into homestretch, made some very steady late progress.
Gradually crossed from wide gate to fence at 1000 M to be 6Ls off pace in 10th, under pressure to take closer order at final bend, no impression.
Awkwardly away, always detached in rear and struggling, never closer than 8Ls to the pace.
Slowly away and never travelling well, 9Ls off pace in 13th at 1000 M, 6Ls down and 4-wide in 13th off home turn, minor late headway to be nearest at finish.
Fractious in gates, bounded on jumping losing 3Ls, raced 5Ls off pace in mid-division at 1000 M, 3Ls down into stretch and 2Ls down at 200 M, kept on well, post came too soon.
Caught 3-wide no cover when 3Ls off pace in 6th at 900 M and closer taking home turn, about 1L down in 4th at 200 M but failed to get any closer.
Led on fence at 1400 M, headed at 1200 M and handed up lead when 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, upsides at top of home straight and clear by a neck at 200 M, all out to hold on.
Led narrowly out 2-wide at 1200 M, kept on to lead on fence by 1L at 1000 M, headed about 300 M out and couldn't regain advantage, one-paced inside final 100 M.
Tardy start, 3-back on fence when 4Ls off pace at 800 M, very one-paced down homestretch and eased down inside final 100 M.
Box seat run on fence within 2Ls of pace in 3rd or 4th until home straight, a neck down in 3rd at the 200 M, tried hard but couldn't poke head in front.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 2nd at 800 M, struggling to hold this prominent position at 500 M, faded out rapidly in home straight.
Slowly away, drifted onto fence (4-back) about 7Ls off pace towards rear at 900 M, marginally closer entering straight, moderate late headway.
Slowly away, 9Ls last at 1000 M, 4-wide with cover at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when 6Ls off speed, posed very little late threat.
Awkwardly away, always in rear bunch and never a factor.
Blundered at start when crowded and unbalanced, 4-wide no cover in midfield when 5Ls off pace at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight, failed to quicken up.
Awkwardly away, always in rear or one from until home turn, never competitive in stretch while hanging in.
Prominent early, pressed on to lead on fence by 2Ls on fence from 900 M to home turn, headed at 250 M out, faded and quite weak through final 100 M.
Best away and led 1200 M, headed at 1000 M to race 2Ls off pace in 3rd, 2Ls down in 2nd entering homestretch, one-paced on the run-in.
3-wide with cover when about 7Ls off pace in 9th or so at 1000 M, 4-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in midfield, just over 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced close home.
6Ls off pace in midfield when 2-wide at 800 M, 4Ls down in 5th entering stretch, just over 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, kept reducing the gap, only just failed.
3-back on fence 5Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, niggled along at 800 M to lie up, beaten entering home straight.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd entering homestretch and led 250 M out, jockey dropped whip 50 M out, all out to just scrape home.
Worse than midfield when 2-wide and about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5Ls down taking home turn, 3Ls down in 6th at 200 M, kept on, never nearer.
Never better than midfield or closer than 7Ls to the speed from 1000 M.
Soon behind midfield. Dropped to the rear when crowded by winner 800 M out. Made good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon 2nd. Led briefly after 1000 M. Crowded for some distance after 400 M before weakening badly final 200 M.
Slowly away and remained at back. Hung out 800 M. Made up significant ground final 250 M without threatening first pair.
At rear. Headway on the outside from 1000 M to midfield. Dropped back rounding the turn and was well beaten upon straightening. (Wide and no cover throughout.)
Soon 3rd. Took lead 300 M out but run ended inside final 150 M and jockey dropped left rein for a considerable distance near 100 M.
Midfield or better. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Slowly away. Mainly towards rear. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon behind midfield. Responded well final 300 M and took charge 150 M out.
Led or disputed lead. Hung out in the middle stages. Kept on whilst hanging in upon straightening and weakened 200 M out.
Forward of midfield. Ran on in straight until no extra 100 M out.
Midfield or better. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Jumped best from wide draw but soon settled in midfield or worse. Caught wide turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Led field to 200 M. No extra.
Well there. Joint leaders inside final 200 M. Pipped at post.
Prominent to 200 M. Gradually weakened.
Prominent. Kept on same pace to the line.
Never far off. Kept on steadily without threatening closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Ran home one-paced without quickening.
Well there to course proper. Gradually dropped out of contention.
Settled towards rear of bunched field. Commenced move halfway out. Held every chance when joint leaders inside 200 M but pipped at post.
Bumped at start. Settled in rear of bunched field. Baulked for a run passing halfway mark. Obtained split closing stages. Quickened well to just get up on line.
Settled in last few. Found nothing under pressure.
Always in rear. Tailed-off passing 400 M.
Broke well, ridden hard to sit outside leader at good clip, didn't fully relax, hard ridden entering straight but failed to sustain effort, soon dropped out to be well beaten.
Began awkwardly, settled last 15 lengths from lead, travelled well to turn, held up when making run between horses at the top of straight. Made up good late ground indicating looking for longer.
Average to begin, mustered speed to settle 6th 1x1, given good run to turn, failed to run on when clear (sustained lacerated fetlock).
Began fairly, hampered at 1200 M, settled midfield on rails, gradually gave ground in straight, not knocked about.
Average away, ridden hard to hold spot 5th on fence 4 lengths from lead, had soft run throughout, urged along in straight but found nothing.
Showed good early speed to take up running (pace good), refused to settle, held together to turn, kept going until 200 M but condition gave out and weakened out of it.
Away well, crossed to rails running 3rd behind leader, travelled well to turn, got clear at 250 M but was outpaced. Every chance.
Jumped with them and eased back to 3rd last 3 wide, made run 4/5 wide on turn, came with a strong run widest in straight, chased gamely but found winner too good.
Away well and showed early speed to settle 4th three wide, urged along to improve on turn, raced one paced under hard riding for most of the straight, got going over final 200 M to grab 3rd.
Average away, allowed to settle back 5th last 2 wide, eased 3 to 4 wide with cover on turn and made run 5 wide in straight, responded well under pressure to score.
Average to begin, drove through to settle midfield 2 wide 6L from lead, given good ride to turn, held up slightly passing 400 M, got clear in straight but failed to run on.
Jumped best but restrained from wide gate to 2nd last. Travelled fairly, eased 3 wide into straight, held up slightly, got clear at 300 M, made steady ground.
Began well but outpaced in first furlong, settled 7th midfield 3 wide with cover, eased 4 wide into straight. Battled steadily without threatening winner.
Began with them, drifted back to third last on fence, travelled well, eased 2/3 wide on turn, raced between runners for most of straight but failed to show any turn of foot.
Slightly sluggish at start. Recovered steadily to rear of midfield before home bend. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced late impression final 200 M.
Raced outside leader. Gained narrow advantage turning for home. Still in front over 100 M out but soon overhauled.
Settled in prominent position. No clear run behind leaders early in straight. Only kept on steadily without quickening inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled in last few. Travelling well when no room early in straight. Obtained split final 100 M and finished off race well.
Settled wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to hold some chance passing 200 M but outsprinted close to home.
Ridden early to muster speed. Raced in midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Ridden along. Forward of midfield to straight. One-paced.
Jumped best. Settled towards rear 3-wide. 3rd last turning in. Made up good ground to hit front closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled at the back. Waited with. Commenced move turning in. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in last few. Not much room behind runners in straight. Kept on to the line.
3-wide in prominent position to straight. Still well there early in straight. Lost touch passing 200 M.
Held narrow lead to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled in prominent position. Baulked behind leaders upon straightening. Obtained run over 200 M out. Quickened to hold some chance but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Jumped best but soon settled in 5th position. Steadied and shifted one for clear running 250 M out. Ran on without troubling the winner.
Mostly behind midfield. Under pressure 400 M out and improved on the outside. Ran on strongly final 250 M to win comfortably.
Last from 800 M. Never a factor.
Always in touch. 2nd from 600 M. Disputed lead turning in but effort not sustained final 100 M and lost 3rd close home.
Prominent to 300 M. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Always in touch. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M. (Wide and no cover throughout.)
Led from 850 M. Kept on steadily in straight for a distant 3rd.
Midfield or worse. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Slowly away and remained at rear. Never a factor.
Slightly worse than midfield. 3L off lead, railed up, got dream run along fence, had every chance.
Followed leader, along fence, let down in straight. Ran on moderately.
Took up lead from wide gate, hummed along in first, capitulated in the straight.
Took up midfield, rails, 2Ls off, failed to flatter in the run home.
Stalked leader, 1 out, 1 back, unable to go on with it at the business end.
Showed no early pace, settled in the rearward position, 6L off leaders, briefly crowded at 150 M, whilst making some ground.
Midfield, 1 off 2L from leaders, failed to go on with it in the straight.
Midfield, 2Ls off lead, had a tough run, 3-wide facing the breeze, gave ground in the run home.
Running along from wide gate, sat outside leader, solid early pace, weakened from 200 M.
Slow to begin, settled last 7L off leaders, flatfooted when field sprinted at 500 M, bumped at 200 M, hung in over latter stages, fair effort.
Checked on jumping. Settled pace 1 off 6L from leaders. Commenced sustained run from 600 M around field, gutsy win.
Slightly worse than midfield, 4Ls off leaders, 3 deep the entire trip with cover, never a threat.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced 2-wide and no better than midfield. Lacked the needed response when asked at home turn and kept same pace to line.
Jumped well from wide draw and raced among leaders early stages. Settled behind leaders in 2-wide position after 1200 M. Kept within 3Ls of the leader back straight but weakened after 600 M.
Trailed field for the majority of the race. Responded well when asked at 400 M. Charged through rivals in the straight and claim victory right at the line.

Pushed along from wide draw and raced 3-wide among leaders into 1st turn. Kept alongside the pacesetter through to home straight. Moved into the lead inside final 200 M but failed to hold off principals closing stages.
Settled on fence at midfield. Closed to within 2Ls of the leader on straightening. Continued well and took over the lead final 100 M. Just failed to hold off winner at the line.
3-wide in rear section into 1st turn. Remained in rear section in a 2-wide position in back straight. Ran on and made up some ground in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed early. Remained racing near the rear throughout back straight. Saved ground making home turn along the rails and closed the race off well.
Hard ridden out of the gates and raced into the lead. Took a length's advantage into the straight but faded steadily inside final 200 M.
Outpaced early stages and raced on fence behind midfield. Under pressure making home turn and responded only fairly. Kept on without threatening in the straight.
Settled on fence in a prominent position behind the leader until home straight. Failed to quicken and stayed on same pace to line.
Held up on fence about 6Ls off pace in rear until home bend, made some minor late ground, never nearer.
Slowest away, 3-wide with cover towards rear about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in midfield, one-paced.
About 8Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover in rear group down back stretch, pressed forward on circle to be 6-wide (widest) into stretch, soon weakened right out.
2Ls behind lead and 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, under pressure taking home turn when 1L down in 2nd, one-paced thereafter.
1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 3rd taking home turn, stayed on fairly without threatening to grab winner.
2-wide and 5Ls off speed in 8th at 1200 M and similarly placed through to home turn, never better than midfield.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, clear by 2Ls at 600 M, kicked on off home turn, never looked like being headed.
3Ls back and 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 4th at home turn, kept on fairly for a place.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, always held by principals.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace when 2-wide at 1200 M, keen at 800 M, 6Ls behind in 11th when 4-wide taking final bend, made no impression.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 5Ls off pace in midfield at 1200 M, 3Ls off pace in mid-division when 4-wide into home stretch, weakened.
Blundered at start, 5Ls behind in 6th on fence at 1200 M, head up at 1000 M, never got much closer.
Steadied at 1000 M, 2-wide and 6Ls off speed in mid-division from 800 M to final bend, staying on well at 200 M when 3Ls down in 4th, couldn't sustain effort close home.
At least 9Ls off pace in rear and 2-wide until home turn, never a factor.
About 9Ls off pace in rear at 800 M and same off final turn, ran on very strongly late, went close.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls or 7Ls behind until home turn, outpaced by principals.
4-wide no cover at 1000 M but got in 2-wide at 800 M when over 4Ls off speed in 5th place, same taking final bend, found wanting in home stretch.
8Ls off speed towards rear at 800 M, same margin behind when 3-wide tackling final bend, ran on very strongly, only just failed.
Over 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at 800 M, same taking home turn, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, kept on finding, went very close.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd at home turn, led over 250 M out, all out, just hung on.
3-wide no cover in 4th about 3Ls off pace at 800 M, 4Ls down in 4th at final bend, faded out.
On fence about 6Ls off pace and worse than midfield until home turn, finish tamely.
Away well and soon led by 3Ls at 900 M racing keenly, 1L clear taking home turn but soon headed and faded right out.
Lost ground at start, towards rear about 7Ls or 8Ls behind leader until home turn, made no impression.
Soon in touch. Took lead on the inside turning in. Headed at 200 M but fought back to gain upper hand just before the line.
Mainly towards rear. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Slowly away and remained at rear. Made up a little late ground.
Midfield. Weakened badly final 100 M. (Hung in.)
Well there. Carried very wide turning in. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Mostly at rear and never a factor.
Slowly away and remained at back. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Around midfield. Wide turning in and soon dropped out of contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon 2nd. Carried wide turning in. Weakened badly final 100 M.
Led. Hung out 600 M and allowed winner though on the inside. Ran on well to regain lead at 200 M but was pipped again just before the line.
Midfield or worse. 3rd turning in. Kept on without threatening first pair.
Settled in rear of midfield. Fought on steadily closing stages without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure inside final 200 M to claim victory near finish.
Well back. Made up good late ground on inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped best. Led to 200 M. Dropped out.
Settled in last few. Made moderate headway down centre of straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in last few. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge upon straightening hitting front over 200 M out, only to be collared in the shadows of the post.
Forward of midfield to straight. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Ridden early and led briefly before sitting behind the leader from 1200 M. Held up in straight. Shifted out 300 M and then closed the race off strongly.
Soon towards rear. Headway from 900 M to midfield. Ran on one-paced in straight.
Slowly away but soon recovered to take up runing from 1200 M. Headed 250 M and run ended 100 M from home.
Jumped well before settling in midfield. Caught wide rounding bend and dropped to the rear. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Soon dropped to the back after jumping awkwardly but would not settle in the middle stages. Ran on strongly final 300 M but lost all chances when checked near 100 M.
Towards rear after jumping slowly. Took closer order along rail rounding home bend to midfield turning in. Shifted out 250 M out and ran on to just miss a place.
Midfield or better. Headway from 900 M to 3rd or 4th. Weakened badly from 300 M. (Wide and without cover through- out.)
Jumped best from wide draw before finding cover at rear. Last turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M until not quickened close home.
Led briefly before settling in 3rd or 4th place. Steady headway 900 M out to 2nd. Ran on well and led 250 M out before being caught by the winner inside 100 M.
Began well, took up off pace position, along fence, 2L from the speed collared leader at 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped at the start. Rearward position throughout. Never looked likely.
Took up midfield position, 1 off, 6L from lead, layed in in straight, never threatened.
Handy position, 3 wide no cover, 2L from lead, compounded over final 200 M.
Back in the field along the fence, 8L from front runners, pressured after 500 M, made some ground on tiring horses.
Jumped awkwardly, tracked leader throughout, did nothing when asked the question in the straight.
No early pace, settled last, never really in contention.
Settled handy position 2L from leaders, 1 out with cover, failed to go on in the run home.
Best to begin from wide gate, allowed to settle slightly worse than midfield, 3 wide no cover. Improved from 500 M. Ran on nicely.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Was able to take up rails position 3L from lead. Steadied briefly on straightening. Run finished over last 150 M.
Slow to begin, rearward position throughout. Ran on well in the straight.
Began awkwardly, lost ground. Took up good position along the fence, midfield. Had its own during the straight.
Settled in rearward division, 7L from front runners, did little when pressured after 500 M.
Ridden along early. Took up lead after 700 M. Battled on over the concluding stages.
Settled 2-wide behind leaders until home straight. Failed to quicken and was one-paced in the final stages.
Ridden up and took the lead. Remained running among the leaders on straightening but weakened thereafter.

Slightly slow on jumping and was niggled forward to race close to pace. Ran alongside the leader making the turn and assumed the lead on straightening. Kicked away from rivals when pressured at 300 M and cruised home.
