Slowly away and raced in rear section early stages. Remained near the back but no more than 4Ls off the lead at home turn. Switched out for a run at 400 M and closed the race off well.
Settled wide and within 3Ls of the lead. Improved from a 4-wide position making the turn to be among leaders after 600 M. A length off pace on straightening but weakened steadily final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field early. Improved slightly rounding home turn and was 3-wide and 3Ls off the lead at 600 M. Ran on strongly in the straight.
Jumped well from wide draw but was taken back. Trailed field from 800 M onwards and was 3-wide making home turn. Quickened on straightening and made up good ground in the straight.

Sluggish start and was ridden to be at midfield. 3Ls off the lead in a 3-wide spot at 800 M. Reached within a length of leader on straightening. Kept on but found no extra to stay in contention final stages.
Among leaders early. Ridden to keep pace behind leaders 800 M. Under pressure to keep pace rounding home turn. Found nothing in the straight.
Raced on fence near the rear. Saved ground along the rails making home turn and ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Keen early on with head up, 3-wide with cover when 3Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th at top of stretch, led 150 M out but headed by winner 100 M later, no more close home.
Didn't break well, 8Ls last at 1000 M, detached in rear on straightening, never a factor.
2 and 3-wide with cover and worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace through to homestretch, made some late ground down centre of track, nearest at finish.
3-wide no cover and keen 1L off pace in 3rd early on, still wide and upsides leader on straightening, marginal advantage at 200 M, headed at 150 M and no extra close home.
Keen early on, 4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M in 9th or so, under pressure to improve off home turn, shifted out at 300 M, never had much room but always looked held.
2-wide and within 1L of the pace in 2nd or 3rd until turning for home, dropped out tamely.
Fractious in gates and slow away, blundered at 1200 M and steadied when 6Ls down on fence in 12th at 700 M, checked at 300 M in 10th place, ran on strongly late, never nearer.
Pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 900 M, joined at top of home straight, weakened inside final 200 M.
Crossed from wide gate to settle about 7Ls off pace one from rear down backstretch, 6Ls down in 13th entering stretch, quickened up well inside runners to lead 50 M out, cleverly.
3-wide with cover in midfield region about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until taking home turn, beaten 200 M out.
Slowly away, 2-wide about 4Ls off pace in 8th or so through to straightening for home, briefly threatened when 3Ls down in midfield at 300 M but couldn't sustain effort.
Away well from widest gate and soon led on fence, headed at 900 M, box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home straight, found nothing off the bridle.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in mid-division through to homestretch, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, outpaced.
Unbalanced at 1200 M, about 4Ls behind in midfield and 2-wide down backstretch, 3Ls down taking home turn, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, kept on at same pace near finish.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, same margin back when 3-wide on straightening, a little closer at 200 M, kept finding but never likely to lead.
2-wide and 3Ls or so off pace in midfield until entering homestretch, still in mid-division when 2Ls down at 200 M, never troubled principals.
2-wide and 1L off pace at 1000 M in 2nd, about 2Ls down in 3rd taking home turn, picked up to lead with 250 M to race, driven out.
Led very early on, settled 3-back the fence about 2Ls off pace from 900 M to home straight, over 1L down in 5th at 200 M but outpaced close home.
Very slowly away losing about 4Ls on field, keen at 1000 M when 7Ls off pace in rear, never a factor.
3-wide without cover after 900 M, never worse than 3Ls off pace in midfield until home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well but winner was too strong.
On fence about 4Ls off pace in 7th until home straight, stayed on fairly well on fence without seriously troubling the winner.
Led on fence at 1200 M, headed 800 M out and 1L down in 2nd and under pressure taking home turn, soon petered out.
3-wide no cover until the 900 M when pressing on to lead on fence at 700 M by 1L, same margin clear taking home turn, headed 250 M out, drifted back.
Awkwardly away, head up at 1200 M and keen, always in rear on fence about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace, never on terms.
Forward of midfield. Gave ground quickly final 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Made up some late ground. (Dropped whip.)
Around midfield and never looked like a threat. (Saddle slipped back.)
Led on the outisde rail. Shifted in continuously final 250 M and was outpaced by the winner close home.
Always there. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Midfield or better. Kept on one-paced.
About 1L behind the leader. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to win in the closing stages despite being taken in continuously.
Never far off. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Midfield after slowly away. Dropped out of contention 300 M out and hung out in the closing stages.
Slowly away and remained at rear. Ran on well final 300 M without threatening placed horses .
Towards rear. Never a factor.
At rear. Kept on without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Mostly in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Trailed the field most of way. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden early settling in 4th some 3 or 4Ls off the pace. Commenced run turning in gaining slender advantage early in straight only to be collared over 100 M out. Lost 2nd late.
Set pace to straight. Dropped out.
Sluggish at start and ridden for pace early. Moved up steadily on rails to first few 400 M after start. Remained same into straight but dropped out under pressure.
Settled towards rear. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without quickening.
Broke well. Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight for distant 4th.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Responded well shortly after straigh- tening to hit front over 100 M out. Held on under pressure to the line.
Midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Well there to straight. Dropped away quickly after straightening.
Raced in 4th or 5th in forward of midfield. Commenced run shortly after straightening. Ran on well under pressure to hold every chance but denied by a narrow margin.
Travelled in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Fairly away, settled last on fence pulling, struggled to keep in touch, put under pressure at 600 M, found nothing.
Jumped with them, settled well midfield 6th, 2 wide, given easy time throughout. Ridden along on turn, obtained rails run and chased gamely, just failing to run down winner.
Jumped well, taken hold of and restrained to 4th last 3 wide, failed to settle and pulled way forward 3 wide. Made run 4 wide on turn, only battled in straight.
Average to begin, ridden hard to sit outside the leader, good tempo, put under pressure at 400 M and quickly gave in, not knocked about.
Jumped well, ridden forward 3 wide early, obtained cover 2 wide 5th, niggled along at turn and tried hard to line without threatening winner.
Began awkwardly, settled midfield on fence, struggled to hold position, lost ground on turn and dropped out to be beaten a long way.
Began awkwardly, ridden hard, pushed forward 4 wide to sit 3 wide outside leader putting pressure on, travelled well past 400 M, wide run took its toll and faded out of it.
Average to begin, settled 3 wide midfield with cover. Improved position approaching turn wide under hard riding, found very little in straight.
Jumped well, settled well 4th on rails behind leader, given good ride to turn, failed to obtain clear run early in straight but only laboured when asked for final effort.
Jumped well, ridden forward to lead with good tempo, travelled well under good hold, found plenty in straight when challenged. Good win.
Began slowly, ridden up to be midfield 2 wide, travelled well to turn obtained fence run at 400 M and battled evenly in straight.
Began awkwardly, restrained back to 2nd last 2 wide 10L from lead, tended to overrace, made run between horses on turn, eased across heals at 250 M and finished strongly.
Jumped well, caught 3 wide early, restrained to worse than midfield 3 wide with cover, eased 4 wide turn, ran on well in straight to grab 3rd.
Began fairly, settled 3rd last on rails, always battling to keep up, eased 2 wide turn but gradually lost touch in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Jumped slowly. Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never far off to straight. No extra. (Bled.)
Prominent to straigt. No extra.
Chased leader to 400 M. Soon weakened out of contention.
Settled mainly in 5th in forward of midfield. Quickened up on straightening to hit front 200 M out. Hung on under pressure to the line.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Mainly towards rear to straight. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Led to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled just worse than midfield. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced keenly in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Always in last few.
Settled in rear. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Kept on well to finish.
Slowly away but soon moved up along the rail to sit behind the pace. Had every chance turning in but was always held off by the winner.
Towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Slowly away. Remained at rear and weakened badly final 200 M.
Slowly away and soon trailed field. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Ran on steadily in straight but lost all chances after being held up inside 200 M.
Soon midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
Soon midfield. Kept on in straight until weakened close home.
Ridden forward to lead and got to rail rounding the first turn. Kept on well whilst holding off the 2nd horse in straight.
Soon 1 off the rail in 2nd place. Gave ground quickly final 200 M.
Ridden early and was never far off. Steady headway rounding the turn to 4th turning in. Kept on without threatening first pair. (Wide and without cover throughout.)
Slowly away. Mainly midfield or behind. Failed to quicken and tired 100 M out.

Ridden forward from wide draw but could only manage midfield round the first turn. Headway down back straight to be in touch before dropping out upon straightening. (Wide and without cover throughout.)
Positioned 1 out, 1 back after the 1200 M. Loomed as likely threat in the straight, run ended over the concluding stages.
From awkward gate, raced midfield, 4Ls away, 1 off with cover, held its own in the straight.
Stalked leader throughout. Had an easy run in transit, collared by winner inside the 50 M.
Raced back, 6L from fast frontrunner. Failed to improve when asked for effort after 600 M.
Ridden along early. Took up midfield position, 4L off leaders, never left the paint until last 100 M where it overhauled front runners to score.
Went back from wide gate, after obtaining clear running passing 200 M, closed the race off nicely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed early, settled 2Ls off the speed along the fence, had difficulty obtaining a run for some distance after straightening, solid performance.
Settled rearward, 5Ls off leaders, inclined to hang out, made up reasonable ground in the run home.
Had a tough run, 3 to 4 deep midfield, no cover 4Ls from lead, never in the hunt.
Took up lead early, even tempo throughout, surrendered easily after the 200 M.
Travelled outside leader through entire journey, first horse beaten, turning for home.
Midfield, 3Ls away, had cover throughout, 1 off, weakened when posed the question near the 500 M.
Ridden out of the gates and took the lead. Held a length's advantage into home straight. Kept on well but failed to hold off winner over closing stages.
Outpaced early and raced on fence behind midfield. Carried back to the rear after 800 M. Among last few to enter home straight. Closed the race off strongly despite hitting traffic at 200 M.
Wide and without cover at midfield early stages. 2-wide at midfield back straight and was 5Ls off the lead at 700 M. Ridden along to keep pace at home turn and kept on well in the straight.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace. Lacked the needed response when asked at 600 M. Faded shortly after straightening.
Jumped awkwardly and settled on fence towards the rear. Switched out to improve after 700 M and made the home turn in a 3-wide position. Closed the race off fairly.
3-wide at midfield early stages. Settled 2-wide behind midfield after 1100 M. Towards rear and raced along the fence rounding home turn. Found nothing in the straight.
Niggled along early and settled on fence at midfield. Commenced to weaken after 800 M and tailed out.
Missed the jump badly and trailed field. Pressured to improve in a 3-wide spot rounding home turn. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Tracked leader in a prominent position and pursued leader well into the home straight. Stayed on well and ran down the leader final 50 M.

Checked shortly after jumping and raced along the rails at midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the leader back straight and improved making home turn to reach within 2Ls on straightening. Stayed on same pace final 300 M.
Tracked leader in a 2-wide spot until home straight. Failed to keep pace after 300 M and steadily dropped out.

Raced 2-wide in rear section. Carried out to be 3-wide without cover at 800 M and steadily improved to midfield at home turn. Quickened when asked on straightening and chased home well to be closest at finish.
Led out 2-wide by no more than 1L through to homestretch, headed at the 200 M, one-paced close home.
Slow away losing 2Ls, in rear 6Ls behind at 800 M, 4Ls down in 10th at final bend, stayed on well and not fully tested inside final 50 M when without a clear run.
Inconvenienced at 800 M when 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 7th, closer when 4-wide entering home straight, held by principals thereafter.
Steadied at 1000 M and inconvenienced at 800 M when 3Ls off speed in midfield and 3-wide with cover, 4Ls down and under pressure into homestretch, no impression.
On fence 4Ls off pace worse than midfield early on, closer turning for home, stayed on well on fence to lead close home.
Broke well from widest gate, always 3-wide no cover within 1L of the pace through to home straight, led 200 M out, caught by winner inside final 50 M, big run nonetheless.
Always well behind in rear, comprehensively outpaced.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, awkward and unbalanced at 800 M, looked uncomfortable inside other horses, switched off fence on circle to be 4-wide on straightening, no extra final 200 M.
Away well and disputed early lead on fence, 1L off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 800 M until entering homestretch, weakened out.
3Ls down in midfield at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening when same margin behind, no impression.
Within 2Ls of the pace in 4th or 5th until straightening, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, every chance but couldn't find any extra.
Always in rear at least 5Ls off pace, never a factor.
Switched from widest gate to fence upon exiting, 8Ls last until home straight, 6Ls down in 10th at 200 M, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish, finished 4th, placed 3rd after inquiry.
6Ls off pace in 8th 1100 M and similar taking home turn, made some minor late ground to be nearest at finish.
3-wide no cover in 7th when 5Ls off pace at 1100 M, 4Ls down at final bend and at 200 M, faded out.
Awkwardly away losing some ground, 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, never competitive despite making moderate late headway.
Slowly away, 7Ls behind when 2-wide in 11th at 1200 M, same distance behind at final bend, ran on well late to be nearest at finish despite hanging in a little.
3Ls behind when 2-wide in 4th at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 4th taking home turn and at 200 M, swamped close home.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 9th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 7th entering straight, 3Ls down and staying on well at 200 M, led 30 M out, readily.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off speed in 3rd until home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, impeded on fence thereafter, finished 5th, placed 4th after inquiry.
About half a length 2nd on fence from 1200 M to home straight, led 200 M out, headed about 30 M out, finished 3rd placed 5th after inquiry.
5Ls behind leader when 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, 3Ls off pace entering straight, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept finding to take 2nd close home.
4Ls off speed 3-back on fence at 1100 M, under pressure to hold position at 500 M, gone in rear 200 M out.
Hard ridden to lead early but couldn't cross to fence, about half a length clear out 2-wide until home turn, headed 200 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Jumped best before settling in touch 700 M out. Dropped to midfield from 500 M. Made no impression upon straightening and checked 100 M out. (Wide and without cover throughout.)
Always well there. Dropped back to midfield rounding home bend and was never a factor in straight.
Slow into stride before moving up to lead or dispute lead around 700 M. 2nd rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Niggled along in midfield. Ran on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Slowly away and soon out at back. Made up a little ground upon straightening before being held up 200 M out.
Soon led. Headed briefly 700 M out but regained lead rounding the turn. Kept on well despite being headed 100 M out and lost 2nd close home.
Towards rear. Improved along rail to midfield turning in. Kept on one-paced and was inconvenienced in the closing stages.
Blundered at start but soon moved up to midfield along rail. Improved to 2nd rounding the turn. Ran on well and took lead 100 M out but was caught just before the line.
Soon midfield or behind. Unable to quicken in straight and had to check 100 M out.
Slowly away and dropped steadily towards the rear but 3 to 4 wide. Kicked home strongly final 200 M and grabbed win just before the line despite hanging in.
Soon at rear. Took closer order along rail to be in midfield rounding the turn. Ran on steadily in straight but got held up 200 M out.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced move coming out of back straight. Gained 5th some 3Ls back turning in. Sustained effort down straight to assert authority close to home.
Ridden early. Settled just off the pace. Fought on to hold some chance in straight but found winner too good.
Began fairly, soon moved up to dispute lead. Found no extra over 200 M out and faded.
Settled at the back. Made up moderate late ground in straight.
Raced on heels of leaders to straight. Soon weakened under pressure.
Raced 3-wide niggling along in midfield. Weakened into straight.
Caught wide in midfield far side. Lost position going up Rock. Faded further in straight.
Raced very wide in midfield far side and around home bend. Dropped out approaching straight.
Attempted to make all. Kicked 1-1/2Ls clear 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and collared close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Sluggish at start. Ridden and quickly recovered to worse than midfield. Made up some late ground down centre of straight without threatening.
Began well. Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without threatening.
Jumped with them, taken back from awkward gate to be on fence 5L from lead, travelled well to turn, kept coming in straight, even effort.
Jumped with them from a wide gate, covered ground when ridden up to take forward position outside leader, had fair run to turn, dropped out when they sprinted.
Jumped slowly settled 3rd last on rails 8Ls from lead, hampered when making run on turn, battled away in straight.
Began awkwardly, failed to stay in touch in early stages, 14Ls off lead under hard riding for most of race, beaten a long way.
Average to begin, eased across to be midfield on rails. 4Ls from lead, enjoyed soft run to turn, made run between runners and finished strongly over concluding stages.
Began with them, ridden to take prominent position 1 wide by 2 back, eased 4 wide in straight responded under hard riding, Tried hard. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, settled 2nd last 2-wide, made run between runners in straight, made a little ground but never threatened winner.
Jumped well, ridden forward to be behind leader, relaxed well, had good run to turn, held ground until 200 M but condition gave out and weakened in finish.
Jumped okay but restrained from wide gate to be rearward 2-wide 5L from lead eased. 3 to 4-wide on turn, ran on well but gave leaders to much start. Lost shoe.
Jumped well, led easily without any real pressure, travelled well to turn, after easy run proved too hard to catch in straight. Solid win.
Jumped with them, settled 1-wide by 1 back, rolled forward to be 3-wide with leaders on straightening, failed to maintain effort in straight and lost ground.
Jumped with them, caught wide from poor draw, settled midfield 3-wide without cover 4Ls from lead, wide run took its toll and dropped out in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Headway from 1200 M to midfield. Kicked home well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon in midfield or better. Dropped towards rear from 1200 M. Never a factor.
Led to 1300 M before dropping to 3rd or 4th position. Kept on in straight without troubling first pair.
Towards rear after jumping slowly. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Ridden early and gradually came in to be 1 out and 1 behind the leader. Improved steadily rounding the turn and took lead 350 M out. Kept on nicely and held off late charge by 2nd horse.
Led from 1300 M. Failed to respond in straight and was headed 350 M out. Kept on only fairly thereafter.
Soon last. Made up some ground in straight despite hanging in.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield or worse from 1200 M. Never a factor in straight.
Soon in touch after being slowly away. Hung out at 800 M. Gave ground quickly 300 M out.
Sat 3 deep, no cover, outside leaders. Responded well in the run home. Took charge inside 150 M.
Midfield, 4Ls away, 1 off with cover. Held its own in the straight. (Bled.)
After being hampered at the start, ridden along to go forward, raced 3Ls off the race, 4 wide without cover throughout, never a hope, compounded from 400 M.
Bounded in the air at start, losing ground. Raced in handy position, always 1 off, one paced early in the run home but found the line well.
Bumped on jumping, settled 3 deep with cover, 6Ls away at the rear from front runners, hooked out on straightening, did little when let down.
From wide gate, took up midfield position, 2 off with cover, 3Ls away, up little when posed the question after 400 M. 400 M.
Slow to begin. Settled at the tail of the field, struck interference near 400 M and nearly fell. Never a threat from that point on.
Began awkwardly. Took up midfield spot 4Ls away, 3 deep with cover. Looked likely after the 300 M, only battled away.
Positioned on the rails, tracked the leader throughout, was held up between 400 M to 200 M, ran on gamely.
Solo leader at an even clip throughout, challenged after the 200 M, found wanting in the run home. Lost right hand plate in running.
Tucked away on the fence, slightly worse than midfield, 4Ls away, couldn't sprint from the 600 M, lost ground, but ran on fairly although couldn't obtain clear running over last 100 M.
Travelled at leaders hindquarters, 1 off, pressured front runner after 500 M, challenged winner, until later stages.
Raced back along the fence, 6Ls off leaders, remained in that position most of the way, did little in the straight.
Settled back in the race, 1 off with cover, 5Ls from leaders, steadied on straightening, shifted to middle of track, made good ground and finished off well.
Jumped well and took the lead. Settled comfortably in front and held a 2Ls advantage at 400 M. Kicked away from rivals when placed under pressure for an easy win.
Raced in a forward position early stages and stayed within 2Ls of the leader at midway mark. Failed to quicken and faded final stages.
No better than midfield and kept within 4Ls of leader until 400 M. Lacked the needed response when asked.
Blundered on jumping. 2Ls off the lead at 400 M. Pressured at 400 M and kept on before fading final 200 M.
Midfield and 4Ls off the lead at 800 M. Tightened for some distance until switching in after 500 M. Ran into traffic again at 200 M and unable to recover ground.

Settled near the back early stages. Steadily improved to midfield and closed to within 5Ls of the leader at 400 M. Held up in traffic for some distance after 400 M but charged home strongly once finding daylight.
Settled towards the rear and was 7Ls off the lead at 400 M. Kept on evenly in the closing stages.
Settled in last place until 400 M. Quickened when asked and ran on well before checking at 200 M. Continued to make up ground to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and raced within 2Ls of the leader 800 M. Niggled to keep pace after 600 M. Unable to quicken when placed under pressure final 400 M and gave ground steadily.
Settled within 2Ls of the leader until being placed under pressure after 400 M. Kept on before fading over final 200 M.
3Ls off the lead at 800 M. Hung out badly and steadily dropped out to finish last. (See Racing Incidents.)
Missed the jump and raced towards the rear. Responded only fairly under the whip and kept on evenly to line.
Settled at midfield. 4Ls off the lead in 6th place at 400 M. Improved steadily over the closing stages.
Ridden out of the gates and raced in a forward position. 2Ls off the lead in 2nd place at 400 M. Kept pace but found no extra final 100 M.
Slow start, 4-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, place prospects when over 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, one-paced.
4-wide no cover for much of backstretch when about 6Ls off pace and towards rear, effort when 4Ls down and 5-wide on straightening, soon faded and eased late.
Slow break, had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence between 3rd and 5th place from 1200 M to home turn, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, lacked an extra gear.
Never better than midfield, 8Ls last at 1000 M, made some very minor late ground past tired rivals late on.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, under pressure at 900 M to maintain prominent position, very weak in stretch.
Prominent but quite keen down the backstretch, moved up 3-wide on straightening when a neck down in 3rd taking home turn, led 300 M out but headed at 200 M, tired near line.
Slow start but recovered to be 3-back on fence in mid- division at 1000 M, niggled along at 800 M and 2Ls off pace in 5th at home turn, drifted back steadily.
Always prominent, 3-wide no cover and 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, 2-wide at 800 M, a neck down in 2nd taking home bend, led at 200 M, driven out.
2-wide towards rear 5Ls or so off the speed until home- stretch, ran on well through the field to take 3rd place close home.
Head up at start, settled on fence in rear at least 6Ls off pace until home straight, making good headway at 200 M when switched inside at 200 M, kept finding but post came too soon.
Always in rear bunch at least 6Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover until home turn, never on terms and eased through final 150 M.
Led by half a length on fence at 1200 M, similar margin clear until home turn, headed at 300 M, no extra. (Mucus.)
Always worse than midfield at least 5Ls off pace until home turn, laboured thereafter.
3-wide no cover in midfield from 1200 M to 800 M, 3Ls down in midfield when 4-wide taking home turn, no impression.
One from rear about 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, 3-wide and 5Ls down in 12th on straightening, always outpaced.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, closer entering straight and held up from 400 M to 200 M, ran on well once clear, unlucky.
Keen early on, led by 1L at 1000 M, disputed lead from 800 M to home straight entrance, about to be swamped when checked at 150 M.
Always detached and under pressure in rear, never a factor.
Tended to over-race a little when 1L off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, same margin taking home turn before leading at 200 M, battled on well despite being headed inside final strides.
2-wide and a neck off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, same margin behind through to final bend, brief lead at 300 M before being headed at 200 M, faded thereafter.
3-wide with cover and worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, hung out at 700 M, 5-wide straightening for home when 4Ls behind in 10th, held by principals when steadied at 100 M.
Slowly away, never travelled well about 6Ls off pace towards rear, well beaten when eased down 200 M out.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls or 5Ls behind in midfield at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls behind, didn't quicken and eased inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield until the 800 M, a little closer on straightening and 2Ls down in chasing pack at 200 M, failed to follow through and tended to carry head awkwardly.
Awkwardly away losing ground, always 4-wide no cover at least 5Ls off pace towards rear until the 600 M, 6-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 3Ls down, stayed on very well despite tough trip.
Awkwardly away, 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, closer at top of home straight and crowded at 300 M, never troubled principals.
Prominent in 4th or 5th about 2Ls off speed but 3-wide no cover for much of backstretch and same entering homestretch, half a length down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well to lead final strides.
Had the box seat run on fence 2Ls off pace until home turn, swamped at 200 M and eased close home.
Towards rear after jumping slowly. Caught wide turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M to just miss a distant 3rd.
Slowly away and remained at rear despite being niggled along. Never a threat.
Midfield. Found nothing in straight and tired badly final 100 M.
Midfield or better. Made no impression in straight.
Soon in touch. 4th turning in. Failed to quicken and dropped quickly out of contention final 100 M.
Wide in 2nd or 3rd place. Responded well final 300 M to take lead 200 M but got pipped by the winner close home.
Soon at back. Went very wide turning in to find clear running. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Soon towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Led to 200 M and then gave ground steadily.
Soon behind midfield. Ran on well in straight to snatch win close home.
2nd or 3rd. Kept on upon straightening and disputed lead at 200 M but weakened 100 M out and just managed to hang on for a distant 3rd.
Never far off. 3rd or 4th turning in. Dropped right out of contention 300 M out.
Behind midfield. Never a threat in straight.
At rear. Widest turning in. Never a factor. (Hung out badly.)
Settled in midfield. Made no impression and ran home one- paced.
Settled mainly in 3rd, made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Settled in last few, ran on well down centre of straight to assert authority closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held up in rear of midfield, took closer order entering straight to be some 3Ls off pace upon straightening but only ran home one-paced.
Jumped best, gradually crossed to rails, held up just off the pace, some 2Ls back turning in. Kept on steadily without making any impression.
Held up towards rear. Produced some late impression near finish.
Settled mainly in 3rd to straight. One-paced under pressure when squeezed passing 200 M.
Jumped slowly and raced in rear of midfield, kept on steadily down inner of straight without quickening.
Jumped fairly, settling at the back, raced 5-wide round the bend, made no show from rear into straight.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Gradually took up running 400 M after start, held some 2Ls break early in straight but could find no extra under pressure and swamped closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Finished off race well inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
OK to begin, driven through to settle behind leader on fence, failed to obtain clear running in most of straight, sprinted strongly when clear just failing to catch winner, solid run.
Slow to begin, ridden hard to be slightly worse than midfield on rail 6Ls from lead, never settled, eased into gap 3 wide to make run on turn, crowded passing 200 M but didn't look like winning.
Broke well, sped through to share lead on rails, refused to settle, travelled well into straight and responded well when asked for effort.
Jumped well, caught midfield 3 wide 5Ls from lead, pulled way forward 4 wide on turn, challenged strongly to 200 M but weakened out of it to be well beaten.
Jumped well, settled midfield 2 wide 5Ls from lead, failed to settle eased clear in straight and tried hard without threatening winner.
Average to begin, settled 3rd last 2 wide 7Ls from lead, urged along 3 wide on turn, failed to obtain clear run in straight, switched back to inside and battled away.
Broke fairly, settled midfield 2 wide 6Ls from lead eased 3 wide on turn, bumped shortly after, failed to run on at all.
Began with them, restrained from wide gate, settled 4th last 3 wide, never relaxed in middle stages, made promising run 5 wide on turn, crowded near 200 M, condition gave out final stages.
Began awkwardly, restrained from widest gate to take up position last on rails 8Ls from lead, made run between runners in straight, held up passing 200 M. Continued to finish hard.
Jumped well, caught wide early, moved forward to obtain cover 2 wide 3rd, eased 3 wide in straight but failed to sprint with them. Average effort.
Jumped with them, settled 5th 2 wide with cover, eased out in straight and came with strong run to take lead and fight on strongly. Strong win.
Began well, showed speed to take up lead without fully crossing, made play at good clip, kept going until 200 M when condition gave out.
Jumped with them, ridden up to hold position midfield on rail 5Ls from lead, tracked up well in straight, held up at crucial stage and checked in straight. Battled steadily thereafter.
Fair to begin, restrained from bad alley to be 2nd last 2 wide 8Ls from lead. Made run 3 wide at 600 M and came with strong run 6 wide on turn to fight out finish.
Settled in rear of midfield, ran on steadily under pressure in straight but swamped for 2nd late.
Rear to straight, ran on steadily down centre of track past beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Wide throughout, settled towards rear, ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide throughout, midfield early, took closer order rounding home bend, gained 3rd into straight, but gradually weakened.
Always well back and never seen with a chance.
Midfield, weakened shortly after straightening. (Lame.)
In last few, kept on steadily in straight.
Always thereabouts, kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Led early, settling on rails inside leader rounding home bend, kept on same pace early in straight but faded passing 200 M.
4-wide in midfield rounding home bend, inconvenienced for a stride early in straight, produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield, just kept on well in straight.
Took up running coming out of back straight, holding slender advantage to home turn, shaken up upon straightening and soon drew clear over 200 M out.
Well there, found no extra under pressure inside 200 M.
Jumped with them, raced keenly to be behind the leader, never fully settled, obtained run in straight but failed to make any impression.
Awkward to begin, restrained to 3rd last 10Ls from lead 2 wide, eased 3 wide turn and ran on widest in straight, chased gamely.
Average to begin, restrained to 2nd last on rails 10Ls from Lead, urged along on turn, failed to show any dash, passed only tiring horses in straight.
Average to begin, settled last 12Ls from lead on rails, ridden along to stay in touch on turn. Did nothing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, urged forward to take up position outside leaders (pace genuine) moved up to be on terms on turn, failed to maintain effort and weakened out of it.

Jumped with them, ridden hard from wide gate to lead, used a lot of petrol to cross, ran along at solid gallop, held ground until 200 M but weakened after hard run. Saddle shifted. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, taken hold of and obtained cover 4 back on fence 4Ls from lead, eased 2 wide passing 600 M, failed to get clear running and bumped badly in straight, motored home late.
Fairly away, pushed forward to hold prominent position 2 wide, 1 back 3Ls from lead, travelled well to turn, eased out in straight, battled steadily without threatening winner.
Broke with them from bad alley, caught 3 wide with cover midfield, ridden up 4 wide on turn, couldn't go with them when they sprinted.
Fair to begin, eased in to settle on fence 8Ls from lead, travelled on bridle to turn, steadied near 350 M, held ground in straight but tired late.
Began awkwardly, ridden up to settle 3 back on fence 3Ls from lead, never travelled and lost ground in straight to be beaten a long way. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped with them from awkward gate, restrained to 5th last 2 wide 8Ls from lead, tracked eventual winner 3 wide on turn, left a little flat-footed when they sprinted but rallied strongly over final 200 M.
Jumped best from wide alley, pressed on when caught wide to sit 3 wide without cover 2Ls off lead, moved forward on turn to tackle leaders but run ended 200 M from home.

Began well, restrained to be midfield 2 wide 7Ls from lead, given easy run to turn, eased 3 wide on turn, came with strong run in straight to overhaul leaders and held off challengers late. Nice win. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Held up slightly making the home turn. Made up good ground final 200 M for a distant 3rd.
Slowly away but soon moved up to be around midfield. Steady headway along back straight to 3rd or 4th position. Weakened 200 M out.
Always at rear after nearly falling at the start. Switched out in straight but never ran on.
Soon towards rear. Never a factor.
Soon at rear. Never a factor.
Ridden hard to be in midfield or better. Dropped right out of contention soon after straightening.
Slowly away. Towards rear after refusing to settle and awkward on heels making the first turn. Improved slightly rounding the home turn but was never a threat in straight.
Always in touch. Ran on well in straight but looked 2nd all the way.
Midfield. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Soon forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Led going into the first turn before sitting 1 out and 1 back in 2nd place. Challenged for lead rounding home turn. Took lead 300 M out and kicked on to win convincingly.
Mainly midfield or worse but out wide with no cover. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Led from first turn. Headed 300 M out. Unable to quicken and failed to hold on for a distant 3rd close home.
Settled in a handy position early, forced from after the 800 M to race, 4 wide, no cover, ran on well when asked for an effort inside the 400 M.
1 out, 1 back for the major part of the race, looked likely from the 200 M, but its run faded inside 100 M.
Jumped badly, wide throughout at the tail of the field, widest runner, no cover, extremely tough run.
From a wide gate, easily took up a position after the 800 M at the leaders' girth. Settled nicely and showed good dash after 400 M, scored well.
Crossed to the lead on the fence without undue pressure. For the 800 M set even tempo, then was quickly overhauled after turning for home.
Began awkwardly, lost ground, hard ridden to take up slightly worse than midfield position. Raced along the fence, but never in the hunt. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled midfield, 1 off, 3Ls from leaders at the 700 M. Hung in over latter stages, found wanting after the 200 M.
Not the best away, travelled well off the rails, 6Ls from the front runners, never made a yard in the run home.
Settled 3 wide, midfield, ridden along to maintain its position. About 3Ls from the lead, did nothing in the straight.
Raced behind the leader, came along the fence in straight. Only plugged away in the latter stages.
Well back in the race, some 2Ls from the rearward runners. Shifted out continually in the straight, made nice ground.
Jumped well from wide draw and settled at midfield. Quickened on straightening and swept to the lead near 100 M.
Dropped back to race a rearward position until home straight. Made up ground in the straight to be closest at finish.
Tracked leaders early. Settled 2-wide and within 3Ls of the leader from 1200 M until home straight. Kept on without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Hard ridden to get to a position behind midfield. Remained in similar position until home straight. Lacked a response when asked and found no extra final stages.
Dropped back and settled in a rearward position. Hard ridden to keep up after 800 M and trailed field into home straight. Only passed well-beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Settled prominently behind the pace-setter until home straight. Moved past the leader near 200 M but was unable match strides with winner in the final stages.
Raced wide and got no better than midfield. 4-wide making home turn and steadily improved to within 3Ls of the leader on straightening. Kept on well but posed no threat to top pair.
Niggled along 2-wide midfield. Dropped slightly back to behind midfield 800 M and was 3-wide making home turn. Unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Hard ridden out of the gates to take the lead. Took a length's advantage into home straight but dropped out quickly inside final 300 M.
Slowly away. Settled at midfield. Raced along the rails and no more than 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Kept on fairly but unable to find extra inside 200 M.
Disputed lead early. Settled within a length of the leader in a 2-wide position from 1000 M onwards. Hard ridden to keep pace on straightening but faded steadily thereafter.
Trailed field until 800 M. Remained near the back when making home turn in 4-wide position. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Fractious at start, 3-back on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in mid-division until hoem turn when momentarily held up for a run, stayed on well once clear to fill in a place inside final 50 M.
8Ls off speed in rear at 1000 M, 6Ls down and 2-wide in 12th on straightening, held up at 300 M, made a little ground but never likely to take a hand.
Pressed on to lead at 1000 M and about 1L clear on fence at 800 M, same margin in front at home turn, headed over 200 M out, stayed on gamely but lacked an extra kick.
Held up towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace on fence until home turn, made some minor late ground.
Towards rear 3-wide with cover and 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, under pressure to stay in touch when 4-wide on straigh- tening, dropped out.
2Ls off pace in 3rd and 3-wide without cover at 800 M, under pressure to maintain this prominent position off home turn, drifted out of contention.
Best away, box-seat run about 2Ls off pace on fence until entering home straight, stayed on fairly thereafter but always held by quinella pair.
Always prominent 2-wide and within 2Ls of the pace in 4th position or so until taking home turn, every chance of filling a place, no extra when it mattered.
Away well and held lead briefly early on, settled 1L behind leader in 2nd from 800 M to homestretch, led over 200 M out, driven out.
Didn't break well, 4-wide no cover from 900 M when about 3Ls off pace in mid-division, 4-wide taking home turn, very weak in stretch and eased late.
5-wide no cover at 1100 M, 3Ls off speed and worse than midfield at 800 M, losing ground and under pressure when 5Ls down on straightening, soon well beaten.
Steadied at 1000 M, towards rear about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, a little closer on straightening, stayed on fairly without threatening principals.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls back at 1000 M, niggled along to lie up at 700 M, further back and struggling in rear on the swing for home, weakened further.
Slow start, 2-wide and 3Ls off speed at 900 M, niggled along at 600 M to retain prominent position, didn't succeed, dropped out tamely in home straight.
Slowly away losing significant ground, 10Ls off pace at 800 M and made some headway on circle to be 6Ls down in 10th, couldn't sustain the effort and no threat thereafter.
Always in rear bunch and never better than 8Ls off speed at any stage.
Slow away, two from rear about 9Ls off the speed at 1000 M, much the same on straightening, never dangerous.
Away well, tracked leader 1L off pace out 2-wide from 1000 M to home turn, led 300 M out, 2Ls clear 200 M, driven out.
Always towards rear, about 8Ls off pace at 900 M, never a factor.
Hindered on fence at 1200 M, about 3Ls or so off pace in 5th or 6th until home turn, one-paced on the run-in and never likely to figure in the money.
2-wide and 6Ls behind in 9th at 1000 M, 4-wide on straigh- tening when 4Ls down in mid-division, stayed on well but had too much of a break to make up on winner.
Settled in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls behind leader through to homestretch when a little short of room, rallied well inside final 200 M, nearest at finish and narrowly missed a place.
Raced prominently about 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M but was always 3-wide without cover, still in 3rd place at 200 M but tired close home.
Crowded at 1200 M, about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th or 5th until home turn, lacked a turn of foot.
3-wide with cover when 4Ls off pace in midfield at 900 M and same entering home straight, one-paced and 5Ls off pace at 200 M, weakened further.
Crowded at 1200 M on fence, had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 4th on fence at 800 M, under pressure to lie up at 600 M, struggling entering straight and dropped out tamely, eased final 200 M.
Away well and led on fence at 1100 M by 1L, same margin clear until entering home straight, headed at 300 M, tired close home but just clung on for a place.
Best away but restrained to settle in rear, detached 10Ls off speed at 600 M, under pressure on straightening, hardly became involved.
Never far off. Dropped back to midfield rounding home turn. Tired badly final 300 M.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M. Kept on and just managed to hold on for a distant 2nd.
Midfield or better. Never a factor in straight.
Midfield or better. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Ridden early and was not far off before dropping back to midfield from 1000 M. Kept on in straight before weakened 100 M out.
Slowly away. Always at rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight without threatening.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Widest turning in. Never featured in straight.
Always in touch. Took lead 200 M out and won effortlessly going away.
Slowly away and dropped to the back. Ran past beaten horses in the straight.
Niggled early to be in touch. Unable to quicken in straight and just plugged on final 100 M.
Blundered at start but recovered quickly to challenge for lead at 1400 M before sitting in 2nd place. Ran on in straight to just miss a distant 2nd.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Wide and without cover from 900 M. Not a threat in straight.
Never better than midfield. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Midfield jumping out. Settled in rear. Never nearer.
Midfield early. Yielded ground over halfway out.
In similar position throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Chased leaders throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight. (Distressed.)
Mainly in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield into straight. Kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Soon took up running and held slender lead. Gained 1L advantage when stalker went off the track. Kept on under pressure but collared close to line.
Jumped slow. Sluggish under pressure and raced in rear to straight. No further impression.
Disputed lead. Went off the track rounding home bend. Never recovered.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Settled mainly in 4th within 4Ls of leader. Commenced run upon straightening and hit front about 100 M out. Won well.

Away fairly from boxes, given time to settle back worse than midfield 9Ls from lead on fence, urged along on turn, eased wide into clear in straight and finished race off strongly. Gave too much start.
Jumped with them, urged along to take up lead, failed to settle and ran along at good clip, travelled strongly on turn, responded well under pressure to go down narrowly.
Jumped with them, positioned well 7th on rails 7Ls from lead, used no energy in run, hugged rails throughout. Showed no turn of foot in straight. Plugged home.
Average from gates, settled outside leader, travelled comfortably throughout, responded well at business end to hang on for third, good for first up.
Jumped best, well placed 2 wide 4th with cover 3Ls from lead. Eased 3 wide on turn, bumped passing 200 M but failed to show any turn of foot.
Jumped awkwardly from wide alley, taken back to settle last on fence 14Ls from lead, made run 2 and 3 wide on turn, came with run widest in straight to pass tiring horses.
Average to begin, settled well 8th 2 wide 8Ls from lead, travelled up 4Ls from lead on turn, made run between horses, got clear and bumped passing 200 M, finished hard to score well.
Away well, caught 3 wide midfield 7Ls from lead, forced 4 wide on straightening, made run with winner and fought bravely despite wide run.
Jumped awkwardly, settled back from wide gate, tracked 2 wide throughout 10Ls from lead, unable to make any ground to turn and gradually lost touch in straight.
Slowly away, settled 3rd last 11Ls from lead, ridden along on turn, stayed on rails throughout straight, failed to sprint over the short trip.
Average to begin, settled worse than midfield 3 wide 9Ls from lead, had cover throughout, didn't respond when placed under pressure.
Away well, allowed to settle 5th 2 wide 5Ls from lead, travelled well throughout, eased 4 wide on turn, made gradual progress until steadied passing 200 M, average effort despite checked.

Bounced out to settle in good position behind the leader, had easy run throughout, not a great deal of room early in straight, bumped when angling for a run, fair effort thereafter, not being fully ridden out.
Jumped well, restrained from awkward gate, settled 2nd last 2 wide 12Ls from lead, made 3 wide run entering straight, made good ground widest in straight.
Jumped best from wide draw. Gradually crossed to rails to settle outside leader. Remained same till swamped passing 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order entering home straight. Only kept on at the one pace without threatening in straight.
Well there. Tightened on rails behind runners over 200 M out. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Settled in last few racing 3 or 4 wide. Ran home at the one pace under pressure.
Attempted to make all but overhauled over 150 M out.
Settled in rear. Made steady headway after straightening despite not much room. Produced good late impression once into the clear in closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Found no room behind runners on rails the length of straight.
Settled in midfield. Found no room in straight until late 100 M out. Failed to quicken near finish.
Settled wide in midfield. Made progress under pressure early in straight. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Never far off. Ran on under pressure to assert authority over 150 M out.
Settled in rear. No clear run between runners early in straight. Ran on quite well inside final 250 M without threatening.
Sluggish at start. Trailed the field to straight. Produced strong late run down centre of straight. Nearest at finish.
Jumped well, caught 3-wide midfield without cover 6Ls from lead from bad gate, moved closer 4 wide approaching straight, maintained effort until 200 M but wide run took its toll.
Jumped with them, restrained back to 4th last 3 wide 8Ls from lead, had wide run throughout much run 4 and 5 wide in straight but faded to show usual sprint at finish.
Began awkwardly and lost considerable ground at start, took up position last off fence 12L from lead, made run 3 wide approaching 500 M, did nothing.
Awkward to begin, ridden up to hold spot on rails in 5th 5Ls from lead, had good run throughout, obtained rails run in straight but failed to make an impression when they sprinted.
Slowly away, settled 2nd last off fence 12Ls from lead, niggled along at 800 M, hard ridden turn, failed to make up any ground.
Slowly away, settled 3rd last 2 wide 10Ls from lead, eased 3 wide and held up slightly on turn, had field in front on entering straight. Chased gamely to make up good late ground.
Average to begin, settled 8th 2 wide 8Ls from lead, travelled well throughout, held up on turn and failed to get any room in straight, doubtful to have threatened.
Jumped well from wide gate, showed speed to cross and make play, had good run in middle stages, still in it until 300 M but gradually weakened out of it.

Jumped fairly, settled well slightly better than midfield. 2 wide 5Ls from lead, improved to be 3Ls from lead on turn, made run between runners 3 wide, little room in straight but raced very one-paced.
Jumped well, pressed forward to settle outside leader (even tempo) relaxed well and travelled up to take lead at 400 M. Found plenty when asked to score well.
Away until then, given time to settle rearward on rails, 9Ls from lead 4th last, hard ridden passing 600 M and failed to make impression in straight.
Away with them, restrained to obtain cover behind the leader, tended to travel keenly in middle stages, got clear at top of straight and tried hard when asked for effort.
Jumped well, obtained nice position one out one back, had good run, niggled along to make ground passing 500 M. Obtained dream run in straight and closed steadily.
Trailed the field to 200 M. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Jumped fairly. Soon took up running mainly holding 1L break. Hung on well under pressure to finish.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well late, doing best work at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace on rails in straight without quickening.
Well there to straight. Faded gradually.
Close up. Unable to sustain effort and faded closing stages.
Race wide throughout, settling in forward of midfield. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M without threatening.
Settled in last few. Ran home one-paced under pressure. (Lame.)
Settled behind leaders. Tightened on rails losing ground coming off Rock. Found no room behind runners down inner of straight and kept on well to the line.
Midfield along fence, 3Ls off the pace with cover, no response in the run home.
Slowly away. Ridden back in the field 4Ls from leader, along fence with cover, ran on gamely over the later stages.
Took up handy spot, with cover 2Ls away from lead. Battled away when pressured inside 500 M.
Raced 3-wide, 3Ls from lead in a handy position, had cover but offered little when ridden along after 500 M.
Raced at leaders girth, pressured to go forward after the 500 M, responded gamely.
Failed to muster early speed despite the riders efforts, settled back 4Ls from the leader 3 deep. Obtained some cover mid-race, ran on only fairly.
From awkward barrier, raced with the forward division 3-wide no cover. Commenced to tire after 300 M.
Took up midfield position with cover after 1000 M 1 off, over-raced somewhat thereafter. When 3Ls from lead. Made solid ground in the straight when taken out.
Settled back in the event, 1 off with cover 4L away, pulled hard in the middle stages. Improved nicely in the straight.
Lead along the fence, even tempo, looked likely winner inside the 200 M, but collared after 100 M.
Pursued leader throughout. Closed the race off strongly after overhauling front runners after the 200 M.
Steadied shortly after the start from wide gate and remained last for the entire trip.
Jumped well and took the lead. Held a 2L advantage into home straight but found no extra to hold off rivals inside final 200 M.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw and trailed field until 800 M. Continued to be on fence at rear section on straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
Settled towards the rear and trailed field into home straight. Ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Settled 2-wide and no worse than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader back straight. Ridden along at home turn to keep up and was one-paced in the straight.
Nearly dislodged rider on jumping. Settled 2-wide at midfield. Switched out at 400 M to improve, rallied nicely in the straight and narrowly missed.

Disputed lead early stages. Settled prominently behind the leader from 1000 M until straightening. Took the lead inside 200 M, stayed on well but failed to hold off late charging rivals close to the line.
Dropped to the back from wide draw. Settled in a rearward position before being pressured at 400 M. Swung widest on straightening but lacked a rally in the straight.
Raced wide among leaders early stages. Kept alongside the leader in a 2-wide position back straight but commenced to weaken 500 M and finished tailed out.

Crowded on jumping and raced on fence in rear section early. Settled in a position no better than midfield back straight. Switched out to improve at home turn and made a nice rally in the straight to pick up win close to the line.

Niggled to race behind leaders early stages. Dropped to midfield after checking at 1100 M. On fence and 4Ls off the leader in back straight. Unable to keep pace rounding home turn and weakened in the straight.

Wide and without cover in a forward position early stages. Steadily dropped back but failed to find cover and ended up wide in rear section. Pressured to stay on home turn and found no extra in the straight.

Outpaced early and raced 2-wide behind midfield. 3-wide without cover at midfield back straight. Strode forward after 600 M and closed to within 2LS of the lead on straightening. Kept on fairly to make the frame.
Niggled along in rear early at least 7Ls off pace, no better off entering stretch, nearest at finish.
Always struggling in rear at least 7Ls off pace from 1000 M to home turn, made some minor late ground.
2-wide worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace until final bend, made a little ground without threatening.
2-wide and 3Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, same taking home turn, failed to make much impression.
3-wide no cover and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, without cover until 500 M out, faded before home turn, dropped out.
Over-raced early when 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1100 M, under pressure to lie up 500 M out, very weak in homestretch. (Mucus in trachea.)
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1100 M, 5Ls down entering straight, one-paced and weakened.
Made all, always about 1L clear until 500 M, shot 2Ls clear off final bend, in command thereafter.
Switched from widest gate to fence on exiting, 5Ls off speed in 8th or so through to final bend, lacked gears.
On fence 4Ls behind lead in 6th at 1100 M, same margin behind on straightening, plugged on at the same pace.
Run of the race on fence from 2nd to 4th about 2Ls off pace until home turn, never looked like catching the winner.
Slowly away, on fence about 6Ls off pace towards rear from 1000 M to home turn, made some good late progress on fence to take 3rd close home.
Held narrow lead out 2-wide at 1000 M, a neck down in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, a head 2nd at 200 M, faded near finish.
Bumped at start, 3Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover until being left without cover from 600 M, pressed on 2Ls down in 4th at home turn, failed to sustain effort and weak final 200 M.
Very wide 4-wide no cover at 800 M when 4Ls off pace, struggling to lie up 6Ls off speed at final bend, dropped out rapidly.
On fence either leading or disputing lead from 1000 M to home turn, still a neck in front at 200 M, faded inside final 100 M.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd until 500 M when niggled along to take closer order, all out when 1L down in 4th at 200 M, no extra.
Bumped and checked at start, recovered to be 3Ls off pace in midfield on fence until home turn, one-paced and posed no threat. (Bled.)
6Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 8th at final bend, stayed on well to take 3rd close home.
Never much of a factor, 8Ls off pace one from rear at 800 M, always detached.
Checked at start, recovered to be 2-wide and 3Ls behind lead in midfield through to home turn, still 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, rallied well late, just held.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th through to homestretch, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out, driven out.
12Ls last at 1000 M, improved to be 6Ls behind in 10th off home turn, 4Ls down at 200 M, flattened out close home.
Average to begin, caught 3-wide midfield 6Ls from lead without cover throughout, asked to improve passing 500 M but failed to make impression coming widest in straight. Tried hard to line.
Bounced away well, obtained forward position outside leader (pace fair), not fully comfortable in run, urged along for effort on turn, weakened out final 200 M to fade out of it.
Slow to begin, settled back from wide gate 3rd last 2-wide 7L from lead, made run between horses rounding turn. Doing best work late.
Slowly away, settled rearward 4th last 7L from lead on rails, drifted back to 3rd last on turn, stuck to rails but raced very one-paced in straight. Did little.

Jumped with them, ridden forward to cross to lead after 500 M. Enjoyed good run in front, no real pressure, began rolling along approaching 400 M. Kicked strongly in straight, found winner just too good.
Away well from wide gate, allowed to drift back to settle 2nd last on rail 8L from lead, last into straight, made run between runners and closed strongly late.
Broke with them, held forward position early, settled 4th 2-wide with cover, used no petrol in the run, eased 3-wide on turn, made steady ground without threatening winner.
Slowly away, taken straight to fence, settled 6th on fence 4L from lead, enjoyed easy run throughout, followed eventual winner early in straight but couldn't sprint. Made late ground.
Best to begin, lead early, took up good position behind leader at 1100 M, had even run throughout, niggled along when tempo quickened at 500 M, couldn't match winner/leader and weakened out of it.
Began awkwardly and lost 4L at start, settled at rear on rails 10L from lead, improved slightly 2-wide passing 600 M, hard ridden at 400 M, battled steadily in straight.
Broke with them, eased to obtain trail settling 7th 2-wide 5Ls from lead, had easy time throughout, eased 4-wide into straight but failed to run on with usual dash. (Bled.)
Fairly away, eased to obtain trail behind early leader, settled 5th on fence 3L from lead, had easy run throughout, obtained clear passage in straight, overhauled lead to score well.
Made all. Kept on well under pressure to resist runner-ups late challenge.
Always in last few.
Mainly 3-wide in midfield to halfway. Short-lived effort around Rock. Dropped out rounding home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Chased leader throughout but unable to close on leader despite coming under strong pressure closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on quite well from straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well there. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Never far off. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear most of way.
Settled in last few. Produced good late impression down centre of straight.
Never nearer.
Slow to begin, settled 2nd last on rails 9L from lead, eased 2-wide passing 600 M, made run hard up against paint in straight, closed well in straight, gave too much start.
Jumped well from inside gate, sped through to take lead (good clip) pressured from 600 M, led until well into the straight, effort told and tired late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, slotted in to good position behind the leader, given easy run throughout, obtained inside run in straight, sprinted well only to be overhauled in shadows of post.
Bounced away, eased back but caught midfield 3 and 4-wide without cover, drifted back to 4th last at turn, made a little ground over concluding stages.
Jumped with them, settled midfield 3-wide without cover 5L from lead, failed to improve position when asked and plugged steadily in straight.

Jumped with them ridden hard to go forward to settle outside the leader 2-wide, over-raced throughout the middle part, under pressure from turn, weakened quickly, not knocked around. (See Racing Incidents.)

Slowly away, restrained at start from awkward gate, taken back to settled 3rd last 2-wide 7Ls from lead, made run between horses from 600 M, weaved between horses in straight to finish strongly over the top of leaders.
Jumped best, caught 3-wide early from awkward draw eased in to obtain trail 4th 1 out 1 back 2Ls from lead, had easy run to turn, battled steadily and passed over last 100 M.
Drifted back from wide gate to settle last 10Ls from lead 2-wide, struggled to keep in touch in middle part, hard ridden from 600 M, lacked dash to make ground.
Fair start, crowded early, settled midfield on fence 4Ls from lead ridden along approaching turn, failed to show any dash in straight.

Slow to get going restrained to obtain cover 4th from rear 7Ls from lead, became unbalanced and dropped back passing 600 M losing valuable ground, didn't improve when asked, got going late (dropped whip.)
Broke well, eased to obtain cover 2-wide midfield 4Ls from lead (raced fiercely), ridden along to make ground 3-wide on turn, made usual honest finish making steady ground in straight.
Held narrow lead to over 200 M out. No extra under pressure.
Midfield early. Gradually weakened.
Disputed lead to over 200 M out. Weakened badly. (Distressed.)
Mainly in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Ridden along behind midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
In similar position throughout. Kept on one pace.
Always in last few.
Soon dropped to the rear. Only ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Mostly in midfield. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Soon dropped to last few.
Tracked leaders. Responded well to take charge over 200 M out. Hung on well to the line.
Settled mainly in 5th. Kept on steadily to reach 3rd closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Quickened well to challenge closing stages but was always held by the winner.
Very sluggish at early stages. Always struggling at the back.
Travelled midfield, 1 off, about 3Ls from pace runners, disappointed for a run near 400 M, continually made ground under hard riding.
Raced in second last position, about 9Ls from lead, continually shifted out in straight to obtain clear running, made good ground in the latter stages.
Assumed the lead along the rails after the 1000 M, without too much effort, didn't go on with it in the run home.
From awkward gate, ridden back, about 4Ls from frontrunners, 1 off, did little overall in the run.
Led early, then restrained, took up handy position on the fence, 2Ls from lead after 1000 M. Hung in over concluding stages.
Followed leader across and sat 3/4L behind throughout the trip. Beaten horse after 500 M.
1 out 1 back in transit, rolled off on turn, loomed as potential winner after the 300 M, caught however inside 100 M.
Had the run of the race, parked behind the leader. Found nothing after the 300 M.
Steadied early to find cover, but was unable to do so and raced midfield 4 deep, 3Ls away, had enough.
Inconvenienced at the start and settled back in the field. Commenced run from after the 600 M around the field, came on with sustained run, overhauled leaders inside 100 M.
Took up midfield fence position, 3Ls from lead, never saw open space over the final 400 M, forget run.
Settled on the fence, 4Ls away, with cover, closed the race off well, however was steadied when crowded near the 150 M.
Slow to begin. Raced 1 off 6Ls away, hooked to the outside in the straight, made up reasonable ground in the run to the post.
Raced in a handy position, 2 away, 1 off with cover, tired after the 500 M.
Niggled along at midfield. 4-wide making home turn. Crowded prior to straightening and fell at 400 M.
Disputed lead early. Settled on fence behind leader after 1200 M and remained in a prominent position until straigh- tening. Kept on same pace to line.
Niggled along in rear section and needed to be pressured to keep up at 1200 M. Hugged the rails at home turn and among last few into home straight. Lacked the needed rally.
2-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leader. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to gain further ground closing stages.
Ridden out of the gates and raced in disputed lead early stages. Kept alongside the leader into home straight but failed to keep pace final 400 M.
On fence and no worse than midfield until 800 M. 2-wide and shuffled back to behind midfield rounding home turn. Briefly held up early straight and made up ground when in the clear.
On fence and got not better than midfield. Dropped to rear section after checking at 700 M and among last few to enter home straight. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.

Jumped well, outpaced by leaders early stages despite being pressured. Settled at midfield after 1200 M. 3-wide making home turn and was 3Ls off the lead on straightening. Kept on without threatening final stages.
Dropped to the rear and was last to enter home straight. Rallied strong and swept past the field final 150 M.
Missed the jump and raced towards the rear. Widest making home turn and closed the race off strongly.
Dropped to rear section. Wide making home turn and dashed briefly in the straight. Unable to sustain effort final stages.
Raced 3-wide and a length off pace until home straight. Faded inside final 300 M.
Jumped well from widest draw and raced in a forward position. Took over the lead at 1200 M. Stayed on well and maintained a length's advantage final 200 M. Failed to hold off top pair close to home.
Settled on fence and within 2Ls of the leader. Unable to quicken in the straight.
4-wide no cover 5Ls off pace at 1200 M, pressed on to be 4-wide no cover and 1L off speed from 800 M to home turn, gone at 300 M.
Dropped out in rear about 10Ls off pace at 1000 M, 5-wide on straightening when at least 6Ls last, ran on very strongly through final 400 M to take a place close home.
Worse than midfield 7Ls behind at 1200 M, marginally closer turning for home when forced 6-wide (widest of all) by AMERICAN VICTORY hanging, no impression.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 1000 M, box seat run in 5th on fence from 800 M to home turn, soon swamped.
Bumped at start, no worse than half a length off pace in 2nd out 2-wide from 1200 M to home turn, swamped over 200 M out, eased close home.
Always worse than midfield, never closer than 5Ls to the speed until homestretch, slightly closer at 200 M but quickly back-pedalled again.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 7th at 1000 M, 3Ls down and 4-wide off final bend, picked up well to lead inside final 50 M, driven out.
9Ls off pace towards rear at 1200 M, 6Ls behind and one from rear off final bend, made some minor late ground.
Worse than midfield 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, hung out quite badly on circle to be 5-wide into stretch and 4Ls off speed in 10th, 2Ls down at 200 M, kept reducing the margin.
Niggled along when 3-wide no cover 3Ls behind in 4th at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd with cover at 800 M, closer when under pressure and 3-wide into stretch, very tired inside final 200 M.
3Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 6th entering home straight, strong hopes of a win when leading inside final 200 M, failed to sustain effort, lost a place final strides.
Awkwardly away and checked at start, one fence about 6Ls off pace towards rear at 800 M, closer entering straight and 3Ls down at 200 M in 10th or so, run quickly petered out.
Shifted out and bumped at start, soon led on fence, always about a neck clear through to home turn, headed just inside 200 M pole, tired inside final 100 M.
Bumped at start, 4Ls behind lead on fence in 5th at 1200 M, steadied briefly entering stretch when same margin behind in mid-division, one-paced inside final 100 M.
On fence in rear group 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, further behind on straightening, checked at 300 M, made some very minor late ground.
Led by half a length at 1000 M, then went too quickly in front to be 5Ls clear on straightening, tired at 200 M and headed 75 M out by winner, lost out on a place soon after.
Always in or around midfield, never looked likely to take a hand in the finish.
Worse than midfield and 5-wide no cover down backstretch, no cover through to home turn when 8Ls behind leader in mid-division, dropped out quickly.
In midfield but 4-wide no cover for much of backstretch, struggling turning for home, soon well behind.
Couldn't muster the speed to lead early, gradually became further detached from the speed while on the fence, very weak in stretch.
Travelled well 2-wide and better than midfield until home turn, quickened up well to reel in long time leader 75 m out, stylishly.
Awkwardly away losing 2Ls at start, worse than midfield 7Ls off speed at 800 M, much further back into home stretch, no impression.
In rear group 3-wide with cover down backstretch, well behind on straightening, never competitive.
Better than midfield and 3-wide but mostly with cover, sat 3rd entering home stretch, no chance with winner, shifted in under pressure inside final 50 M bumping 3rd home, survived objection.
Always towards rear and never competitive, plugged on slowly widest of all down homestretch.
3Ls off speed on fence in 3rd at 1000 M, in 5th place but 2-wide on straightening, always chasing the principals.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th at 1000 M, a distant 2nd turning for home, bumped by 2nd home TOP SCORER inside final 50 M, lodged obection at 2nd, overturned.
On fence and half a length off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, hard ridden to keep up in 4th taking home turn, failed, soon tailed out.
OK to jump, raced in forward division early, settled 6th 2 wide 5Ls from lead, eased 5 wide in straight, gave little thereafter to finish well back.
Slowly into stride, settled at rear 3 wide 10Ls from lead, raced wide with cover throughout, made run 6 and 7 wide in stretch, made no impression.
Average away, settled rearward 2 wide 8Ls from lead, did little work in the run, angled between runners on turn and received split in ample time but failed to show necessary dash.
Slow to begin, dropped out to tail 12Ls from lead on rails, travelled easily throughout, made run between runners 3 wide entering straight, held up until 250 M, flashed home when clear.
Broke well, caught wide in early stages, pushed forward to slot in behind leader, had even run throughout, angled clear on turn and gave all in straight without threatening winner.
Broke with them, caught 3 wide midfield 8Ls from lead without cover, urged along to improve passing 600 M, wide run told and weakened over concluding stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well from widest draw, used up early to cross to sit at leaders girth 2 wide, challenged lead on turn but quickly lost touch when they sprinted to be well beaten. Not knocked around.
Average to begin, trapped 3 wide midfield early settled in mid section 8th 2 wide 8Ls from lead, under pressure turning for home. Gave little when asked.
Broke with then, drifted back to 3rd last on fence 10Ls from lead, spent nothing in run, made run on rails approaching turn and closed steadily in straight without looking a threat.

Bounced away, amongst leading division early, restrained to take trail 4th on fence 3Ls from lead, eased 2 wide passing 700 M and made run 3 and 4 wide in straight. Tried hard but raced very one paced.
Average to begin, taken back from awkward gate to settle 3rd last 2 wide 10Ls from lead, eased 4 wide on turn and chased hard making some impression in straight.
Broke fairly, settled well behind the leader after 100 M, shifted back to be midfield on rails 4Ls from lead in 6th, angled clear midway up the stretch, chased hard but couldn't catch winner.
Away with them, showed early speed to kick through and lead (pace average), dictated terms throughout, pinched break early in straight and gamely held off challengers.
Never better than forward of midfield. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled mainly in midfield. Fought on dourly inside final 250 M to just get up on line.
Soon tailed-off.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Travelled mainly in forward of midfield. Ran home one- paced. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Led or disputed lead. Broke some 3/4L clear about 200 M out. Unable to defy winner's strong late challenge and caught close home.
Towards rear of field throughout.
Disputed lead to 400 M. Gradually weakened.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Settled in rear of midfield. Did not find much room behind runners between 400 M and 200 M. Kept on well to finish.
Towards rear early. Commenced run onto course proper. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish though without threatening.
Soon dropped to rear.
Broke with field, settled 4th last 2 wide 9Ls from lead, even run throughout, made run three and four wide on turn, made up some ground widest in straight, found 1400 m too short.
Away best from wide gate, crossed with ease to leaders girth, restrained to obtain trail (not fully crossed) still in it for early part of straight but weakened last 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, well placed midfield on fence in 6th position 6Ls from frontrunners, made run between horses on turn and closed steadily without looking a danger. (Hung in late.)
Broke well, pressed forward from wide gate, 3 wide throughout outside leaders putting pressure on, spent force in straight and gave ground.
Fair to begin, taken back to last 10Ls from lead from awkward draw, stayed at rear on the rail throughout mid section, plugged steadily over concluding stages passing some tiring runners.
Away fairly from good draw, enjoyed good trail behind the leader throughout on fence, travelled well to turn, no clear run early in straight, responded gamely when clear to score deserved win.
Broke with them, positioned well midfield 2 wide 6Ls from lead in 7th position, made run 4 wide on turn and turned in good effort in straight. Sound first up.
Away well from middle of line, settled 5th 2 wide 3Ls from lead, had good run throughout, made run 3 wide leaving turn, came with strong sprint only to be narrowly denied victory.
Awkward to begin, settled 2nd last 2 wide 10Ls from lead, had field in front of him on home turn, battled steadily but failed to make any significant ground.
Fairly away, settled rearward 2 wide 9Ls from lead, taken to fence passing 800 M, held up in traffic when making run at top of straight. Got clear at 250 M and closed race off well.
Beaten for pace early, positioned midfield on fence 7Ls from lead, became unbalanced passing 1000 M, had clear running in the straight but showed nothing.
