Average to begin, drove through to be slightly worse than midfield 8th 2 wide 7Ls from lead. Caught in traffic at top of straight but only plodded when clear. (Bumped in straight.)
Began poorly, caught in rearward position 3 wide, improved to be midfield 3 wide 7Ls from lead without cover throughout, urged along on turn, wide run told in straight and tired out of it.
Showed good early speed to lead easily, made play in front throughout (speed solid), pressured from 800 M, maintained effort well into straight but overhauled late.
Travelled 4-wide in rear of midfield to straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Gradually improved in forward of midfield approaching home bend. Ran home one-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on doggedly down straight to assert authority close to home. Won well.
Soon took up running holding 1L advantage. Seriously challenged upon straightening and collared close to home.
Midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Rear of midfield early. Dropped out upon straightening.
Well back to straight. Ran on past beaten horses under pressure.
Towards rear throughout and never seen with a chance.
Slightly slow out. Gradually picked up to midfield. Same turning in and kept on same pace to the line.
Travelled 3-wide in prominent position to straight. Dropped out under pressure.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Switched off rails for a run shortly after straightening and ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled on fence just off the pace. Remained same into straight but unable to sustain effort and faded over 200 M out.
Broke well. Settled 3-wide just off the pace. Came to challenge upon straightening holding every chance but out- sprinted close to home.
Away fairly, positioned 6th on rails 5Ls from lead, travelled strongly to turn, made run 2 wide in straight obtained dream run between horses and sprinted well only to be collared late.

Broke well, raced forward early settling 5th 2 wide 4Ls from lead, enjoyed run of race in middle stages, failed to obtain clear running throughout most of straight, checked again near line. (Not ridden out.)
Began fast from inside gate, kicked through to lead at good clip, lead with length advantage throughout, surrended passing 300 M to be well beaten.
Away with them from awkward draw, taken back to settle 2nd last 12Ls from lead, began to circle field 3 wide passing 600 M and tracked 5 wide into straight. Lacked dash to make any ground.

Began awkwardly, ridden up to obtain position midfield 2 wide 7Ls from lead 6Ls from lead 3 wide on turn, came 4 wide between horses without a lot of room early in straight, not enough left at business end.
Bounced out, crossed to fence, travelled well 4th 2Ls off lead behind leader, used nothing in middle stages, 3Ls off lead on turn, drove through gap at 250 M but sprint was short lived.
Broke best from middle of line, ridden up to settle 2nd at leaders heels (speed good) 1L from lead on turn, hit lead briefly passing 250 M but showed little turn at foot to be well back.

Broke with them from wide gate, trapped wide without cover 6th 5Ls from lead, improved to 4Ls from lead at 600 M, challenged 4 wide early in straight but capitulated after wide journey. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fair to begin, settled in rearward spot 3rd last on fence 10Ls from lead, had soft trip throughout, last to turn, came 6 wide on turn and widest in straight, chased gamely without looking a chance.
Awkwardly away ridden with stick early, caught 3 wide mid- field 7Ls from lead with cover, closed 4 and 5 wide, 3Ls from lead on turn, tried hard in straight.

Jumped with them, settled 4th last 3 wide with cover, carted into race 4 wide on turn, only obtained clear running passing 250 M and dashed up to leaders only to fail narrowly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them from wide gate, pulled way forward, settled 3rd 2 wide 2Ls off lead, made run 3 wide on turn but failed to match them in final 200 M when sprint was on, not knocked about.

Began awkwardly, settled last on rails 12Ls from lead, did no work throughout, 6Ls from lead on straightening, followed paint into straight and made good late ground between runners in over final stages.

Average to begin, settled 9th on fence 7Ls from lead, travelled well throughout, made run 2 wide on turn, held up early in straight but obtained split 250 M from home and charged through to score well.
Midfield or behind. Shifted out for clear running upon straightening. Ran on gamely and took charge 100 M out despite hanging in.
At rear. Never in contention.
Midfield. Trapped wide with no cover going into the 1st turn. Headway from 1200 M to 2nd. Soon weakened after 200 M and hung in.
Sat behind the leader going into the 1st turn. Kept on well in straight without threatening.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest finish.
Slowly away and soon at rear. Steady headway along back straight to be in touch after being caught wide with no cover. Under pressure rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
In touch. Gave ground and was inclined to hang in 600 M out.
Mainly towards rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away. At back. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Went forward from wide draw to lead. Headed 100 M out and found no extra close home.
Around midfield. Very wide turning in. Ran on steadily in straight.
1 off no cover, 2Ls from leader, hard ridden from the 500 M, failed to impress in the run home.
Slightly worse than midfield, 4Ls from front runners, 3 deep no cover, faded at the top of the straight.
Last for the entire trip, 1 off 7L back had cover. Found nothing after 500 M.
Raced in a rearward position, 6Ls from leaders, 1 off with cover, ridden along from 600 M, didn't respond.
Raced in a rearward position, crept forward after 600 M. Worked home nicely, shifted out in clear running after 150 M, went to the post strongly.
Slow to begin. Had a nice run parked 3Ls off on the fence. Failed to show any acceleration when pressured after 400 M.
Wide without cover in a midfield position throughout the trip. Hung out badly from the 500 M, eased down in the straight.
From wide gate, had to be used up to lead. In front by about 2Ls turning for home, battled on gamely.
Set solid early pace, took up tracking position along the fence behind leader, worked home soundly.
A little slowly away, ridden along but couldn't muster speed, settled on fence with cover 4Ls away. Ran on moderately.
Settled handy 2Ls from leaders along the fence, shifted out on straightening, took over after the 200 M for easy win.
Out the back, 7Ls away, 3-4 deep, no cover, never picked up in the run home.
Took the lead shortly after start. Held a length's advantage into home straight before being headed inside final 200 M. Kept on fairly for a minor placing.
Raced in a rearward position and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
3-wide towards rear. Advanced to midfield but remained wide at 1000 M. 3Ls off the leader at 600 M but weakened gradually thereafter.
Settled 2-wide midfield. 3-wide and 3Ls off pace at the Rock. Ridden along to keep pace making home turn and found nothing in the straight.
Shifted across to the fence and raced in a rearward position. Near the back on straightening and made up some ground in the closing stages.
Kept alongside the leader until home straight. Failed to turn up a notch and kept on same pace to line.
Dropped to a position behind midfield. Made a ground saving run along the fence at home turn and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field. Remained in rear section and among last few to enter home straight. Ran into traffic 250 M and didn't quicken closing stages.
Raced on fence at midfield. 4Ls off the leader at 800 M. Improved position slightly rounding home turn and kept on well in the straight.
Settled prominently behind the leader until home straight. Quickened on straightening and took over the lead for good final 200 M.
Ridden out of the gates from widest draw to race 3-wide and 2Ls off pace. Remained 3-wide making home turn. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Best out. 2-wide and raced within 3Ls of the leader. Pressured to keep pace from 700 M. Faded steadily inside final 200 M.
Awkward break, 4Ls down in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, pressured at 600 M, 5Ls down and struggling turning for home, soon well beaten. (Breathing obstruction.)
Tended to carry head awkwardly, worse than midfield when 6Ls behind and 2-wide at 1100 M, pressured when 4-wide on turning for home and 4Ls back, no impression.
Slowest away, 5Ls behind on fence in 9th at 1100 M, similar taking home turn, never got much closer.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide in 5th when 3Ls off speed at 1100 M, under pressure entering straight when 3-wide and 4Ls down in 6th, faded out. (Mucus.)
3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, ran on well inside final 100 M for a place.
3Ls off speed on fence in 4th at 1100 M, niggled along to take closer order at 600 M, 2Ls down on straightening, accelerated to lead 150 M out, pulled clear.
Without cover throughout, 4-wide on pace at 1300 M, 3-wide no cover at 1000 M when 1L down in 2nd, 2Ls down in 3rd at home turn, one-paced through closing stages.
7Ls off pace in 10th on fence at 1100 M, niggled along to take closer order at 600 M, never likely to get closer than midfield.
7Ls off speed when 2-wide towards rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down and 3-wide into homestretch, ran on fairly well late to be nearest at finish.
8Ls last on fence at 1200 M, 6Ls down in rear into home straight, stayed on fairly on fence late, never nearer.
Pressed on to lead on fence by 1L at 1100 M, joined for lead at home turn and all out to retain a share at 200 M, faded thereafter.
About 1L off pace in 2nd or 3rd out 2-wide until 600 M, moved up to dispute lead turning for home, headed by winner 150 M out, driven out to hang on for 2nd.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, closer when 3-wide taking home turn, picked up well to lead 150 M out, won comfortably.
Had the run of the race on fence in 3rd 2Ls off pace until home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced in the finish but still managed 2nd.
Checked at start, 2-wide at 1000 M when 6Ls off pace in 10th, 5Ls down and 3-wide swinging for home, stayed on fairly well for a place.
Awkward break, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, 7Ls down entering straight, never competitive.
Slow away and tardy in rear about 7Ls off pace early on, under pressure when 7Ls last and 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, never dangerous.
4Ls off pace on fence in 7th at 1100 M, same entering stretch when tight for room, stayed on at same pace only.
Never travelled well, keen with head up at 1000 M when 3-back on fence 3Ls behind lead in midfield, under pressure to lie up at 600 M and into stretch, dropped out.
Inconvenienced by loose horse early on, within half a length of pace in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn when hard ridden, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, faded markedly thereafter.
2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th from 1200 M to home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, found no more.
Worse than midfield on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed until home turn, always outpaced, tended to hang under pressure.
Unseated rider upon leaving gates.
Carried wide by loose horse at 1400 M but still pressed on to lead by 2Ls at 1300 M, about half a length clear from 800 M to home turn, faded out when headed by winner about 150 M out.
Soon at rear. 3-wide rounding home bend and then shifted back in at 250 M. Ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Soon towards rear. Steady headway along back straight to challenge leader turning in. Ran on determinedly but was just beaten in a ding-dong finish with winner.
Steadied to the back from wide draw. Made a little late ground after being steadied and shifted out for running 200 M out.
In touch early before dropping back to midfield or worse 800 M out. Dropped right out of contention from 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden forward to be in touch. Checked at 1100 M and dropped out to midfield or worse. Weakened from 200 M.
Midfield or worse. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon led. Headed 900 M but regained lead rounding the home bend. Ran on well in straight and fended off strong challenge from 2nd horse final 200 M.
Always thereabouts. Under pressure turning in. Ran on without troubling first pair in straight.
In touch early before dropping back to midfield after being caught wide with no cover rounding the 1st turn. Headway from 1000 M to be in touch. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Niggled along to be in touch. Improved on the outside rounding the first turn and led from 900 M to home bend. Ran on in straight until one-paced final 100 M.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Swift headway on the outside from 500 M to midfield but trapped widest turning in. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Ridden from widest draw to take up running on 1000 M bend. Held lead until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Improved to 9th just behind midfield turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Just better than midfield when steadied between runners and lost some ground. Midfield turning in and found nothing in the run home.
In last few to straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Well there to straight, then dropped out tamely. (Irregular heart beat.)
Waited with. Snuck up along rails turning in. Responded well from midfield over 200 M out to grab victory nearing finish.
Midfield when steadied and lost about 1L over 800 M out. Regained midfield turning in and kept on at the same pace in straight.
Mainly raced wide in rear of midfield to straight. No extra.
Never far off. 3-wide rounding home bend. Quickened to hit front momentarily 150 M out and soon outsprinted. Just held on for 2nd under pressure.
Broke well, settling in 3rd just off the pace. Quickened to join leader after straightening. Holding every chance when flattered 200 M out. Swamped close to home.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well but settled in last few. Raced wide rounding home bend. Made up ground past beaten horses in straight.
Bounced out of gates, eased to take trail behind early leader (pace solid), enjoyed cosy run throughout, eased clear on turn, hit lead at 150 M but unable to hold off challengers.
Bounced with them, trapped 3-wide early, settled 3-wide at rear covering ground throughout, pushed along to stay in touch on turn, battled evenly in straight.
Fairly away, restrained to take trail 6th midfield 2-wide 4Ls from leaders, placed under pressure from 600 M, came 3 and 4-wide but could not make any impression.
Broke best, crossed easily to obtain trail 2-wide in 4th 2Ls from lead, raced on bit for most of way, urged along passing 600 M, showed little turn of foot in the straight.
Slow to begin, went back from wide gate, slotted in nicely 5th last 2 wide 6Ls from lead, spent nothing in run, eased 3-wide when entering straight and finished hard over the top of leaders.
Very slowly away, taken to fence from widest gate, travelled last throughout 9Ls from lead, lost ground to turn, past tiring runners late making steady ground.
Began slowly, drifted back to settle 2nd last 2-wide 8Ls from lead, moved to rails passing 1000 M, followed paint into straight, took split between horses and checked across heels to charge late.
Average to begin, trapped wide without cover from bad gate, pushed forward and raced 3-wide without cover in 5th, used up in middle to cross outside leader, spent force in straight.
Poor to begin, positioned 3rd last on rails, had easy run throughout 6Ls from lead, closed to be 4Ls from lead on turn, followed rails in straight and made good ground between runners.
Away with them, ridden hard to challenge for lead, took leader on and overaced for first 800 M. Crossed at 800 M mark, hard ridden thereafter and well beaten.
Away well, taken straight to fence, raced 7th on fence, 4Ls from leaders throughout, had soft trip to turn, received dream run into straight but showed no dash.
Broke well from inside gate, let roll along to retain lead, fired up middle stages and set genuine speed, had rest of field off the bit on turn but weakened badly after final 150 M.
Never far off. Ran on until no extra 200 M from home.
Ridden forward to be well there but wide and with no cover throughout. Dropped quickly out of contention final 200 M.
Jumped well before steadying towards the rear for cover. Headway from 600 M but was caught very wide turning in. Ran on final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Jumped best before settling behind the pace. Ran on in straight before tiring final 100 M.
At rear. Never a factor.
In touch early before dropping back to behind midfield from 1000 M. Continued to lose ground on the outside rounding the turn. Never a factor in straight.
Well there to 300 M before weakening quickly final 200 M.
At back 900 M despite being ridden along. Never a factor.
Soon led. Kept on well under pressure final 300 M but was passed easily by the winner 100 M out.
Began awkwardly but soon ridden hard to be forward of midfield at 800 M. Kept on but was one-paced close home.
At rear after away very slowly. Made up a little late ground in straight.
Jumped well before dropping to midfield from 900 M. Headway from 600 M to be in touch turning in. Ran on well and took lead 100 M out to win comfortably.
Soon behind midfield from wide draw. Held up early straight and shifted course twice near 300 M and ran on quite well when in the clear.
Had cover throughout, some 6Ls from leaders 1 off, failed to show any dash after 500 M.
Raced 1 out 1 back, pressured after 400 M. Kept on steadily without making ground.
Settled 2 back on rails with cover, shifted out on straigh- tening, made fair ground over the latter stages.
Couldn't go early speed, raced worse than midfield on the fence, 6Ls away, gone at the 500 M.
Raced 1 off with cover, midfield, 2Ls from leader, made some ground in the run home.
Settled last soon after the start and got further back as the race progressed.
Raced wide no cover about 4 off back in the field, first horse beaten.
Set good tempo in front, made every post a winner to score well.
Pursued leader throughout, 1 off, drew almost on level terms in the straight but couldn't capitalise.
Settled in a rearward position, 1 off. Had no luck from 600 M until early part of straight, made good ground, but run ended with 50 M to go.
From outside barrier, ridden along to take up lead, but unable to do so, raced about midfield, left posted 3 to 4 deep, no cover for the entire trip.
About 6Ls back, worked to be 3 deep middle stages, had some cover, slapped up after the 500 M, found nothing there- after.
Tracked leader along fence, throughout, didn't produce at the business end.
Midfield on fence, 4Ls away with cover, under the whip at the 450 M, made no impression.
Settled on fence and kept within 2Ls of the leader. Held up on straightening and had no clear run until 200 M. Ran on fairly once in the clear.
Behind midfield early. 3-wide at midfield making home turn and was 5Ls down on straightening. Responded well when asked 300 M out, but unable to match strides with winner over closing stages.
Dropped back to race in a rearward position. Quickened nicely when asked at 300 M and stormed to the lead at 100 M.
2-wide midfield early. Dropped further back after being crowded at 1100 M. Hug the rails rounding the turn but was held in traffic early part of the straight. Made a late dash final 200 M.
Led briefly at the start before taking a sit behind the leader. Remained a length off the lead on the rails until home straight. Unable to quicken and faded inside final 200 M.
Ridden out of the gates from a wide draw and took the lead at 1200 M. Held a narrow lead into home straight and was swamped inside final 150 M.
Outpaced from widest draw and raced wide without cover at midfield. Reached within a length of the leader 800 M and was 4-wide making home turn. Found no extra in the straight.
No worse than midfield. 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Held up in early straight. Kept on steadily to make the frame.
3-wide midfield early. Improved to be 3-wide and a length off the lead making home turn. Kept on well and took the lead briefly inside final 200 M. Unable to hold off top pair closing stages.
Settled 2-wide midfield. Held up in traffic for some distance after straightening. Kept on without threatening.
In front early. 2-wide disputed lead prior to straigh- tening. Unable to pick up and weakened final 200 M.
No better than midfield early stages. Bad check at 1100 M and dropped to the rear. Trailed field into home straight. Quickened final 200 M and made up ground.
Botched the start badly and trailed early. Wide making home turn and near the back on straightening. Ran on only fairly in the straight. (Bled.)
Outpaced and raced in rear section early stages. Caught 4-deep at midfield making the turn. Stayed on same pace to line.
Drifted back 6Ls off pace in midfield and 3-wide with cover until home turn, staying on well when 2Ls down at 200 M, kept on finding, finished 3rd placed 2nd after objection / inquiry.
Always 3-wide no cover, 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 800 M and 4Ls down in 4th at top of stretch, recovered some late ground inside final 200 M but was always just held by principals.
Slow away and switched to fence from wide gate, 10Ls down in rear at 800 M, never on terms with principals.
Bounded at start losing some ground, 7Ls off pace towards rear at 800 M, further back on straightening, soon with no chance.
Slowest away diving left from gates, towards rear about 8Ls behind lead at 800 M, about 6Ls down at final bend, 4Ls down in 10th at 200 M, one-paced late.
Bumped at start, about 5Ls or 6Ls behind pace in mid- division until home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Bumped at start, 5Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, under pressure to take closer order at 500 M, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, hung out close home, finished 4th placed 3rd after objection / inquiry.
Settled behind a good tempo about 4Ls off pace in 5th or so until home turn, picked up well to lead over 100 M out, driven out.
Towards rear about 8Ls off pace at 800 M, marginally closer on straightening, 4Ls down when checked on fence at 150 M, eased late.
Fractious in gates, away well, led on fence by 3Ls at 900 M, 2Ls clear into home straight, headed over 100 M out, faded late on.
No better than 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, good headway to be 2Ls off pace in 5th or so when checked at 150 M out, finished 5th placed 4th after objection / inquiry.
Always about 6Ls off speed and worse than midfield until 500 M when steadied, no impression in homestretch.
Prominent until the homestretch about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd, swamped and checked at about 150 M out, eased late.
About 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from back to homestretch, shifted in under pressure when 1L down in 2nd place 150 M out, finished 2nd placed 5th after objection / inquiry.
Never better than 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, never competitive.
Niggled along at 1000 M when one from rear, never travelled, all out to be 6Ls down in 13th at final bend, eased late.
Slowest away and switched to fence from wide gate, towards rear about 7Ls off speed at 1000 M, never got much closer.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, struggling to hold this position straightening for home, faded out.
In rear bunch about 5Ls behind speed but mostly with cover until home turn, briefly threatened when 4Ls down in mid- field at 300 M, no extra.
Soon detached in rear and 10Ls off pace, never a factor, eased inside final 200 M.
About 5Ls off speed towards rear when 2-wide at 1000 M, hard-pressed to take closer order on home turn, no impression.
4-wide no cover in places about 4Ls off pace in midfield until the 600 M, plugged on at same pace in homestretch.
Always 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide until home turn, led 300 M out, dug in well to score.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home turn when travelling smoothly, half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, couldn't head winner.
3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, outpaced by first three home.
Settled in midfield about 4Ls behind lead when 2-wide until home turn, never dangerous.
Led by 1L 1300 M out, joined turning for home, headed over 300 M out, dropped out tamely.
Stumbled at start, 3-wide no cover at 1200 M in 4th when 3Ls off pace, 2Ls down and 4-wide straightening for home, stayed on fairly without threatening quinella pair.
Around midfield. Shifted out abruptly 800 M and started to hang out. Improved to be in touch turning in but dropped right out of contention final 200 M.
Soon dropped to the back from wide draw. One-paced in straight.
Soon 4th about 3Ls behind the leader. Responded well final 200 M and took charge 50 M out to win readily.
Around midfield. Hampered 800 M out. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Forward of midfield. Improved to be in touch rounding the bend. Kept on until no extra 150 M out.
Soon towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M despite having to steady near 200 M.
Towards rear. Good progress rounding the bend to be in touch by saving ground along the rail. Kept on without quickening in straight.
At rear. Never seen with a chance.
In 2nd place until weakened steadily final 150 M.
In touch to 800 M before dropping back to midfield turning in. Not a threat in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from wide draw but would not settle and pulled forward to behind midfield. Severely checked at 800 M and dropped to rear. Made no impression in straight.
Soon midfield or worse. Severely checked at 800 M and dropped towards rear. Hung out from home turn and never featured in straight.
Led to 50 M before being over-powered by the winner.
Soon midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight until not quickened close home.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in last few. Finished off race well inside final 250 M to snatch 2nd final strides.
Forward of midfield early. Ran home one-paced.
Towards rear. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Well there to 200 M. No extra.
Always well there. Hit front passing 200 M. Hung on well to finish.
Showed early speed. Led to 200 M and swamped.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure but lost 2nd placing late.
Soon dropped to the rear. Never seen with a chance.
Prominent to 200 M. Gradually weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well to challenge passing 400 M but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Broke well, drifted back to settle 5th last 6Ls from lead, urged along on turn, offered little when asked in straight.
Away well, caught 3 wide midfield without cover proving difficult to settle, hung out on turn when making 4 wide run, responded to hard riding in straight without threatening winner.
Awkward to begin, restrained from awkward gate to settle 4th last 7Ls from lead 2 wide, made run between runners on turn, only got going late to make up good ground. Not fully extended.
Average away, caught 4 wide midfield and settled 3 wide 5Ls from lead, made run 5 wide in straight but covering extra ground took its toll and could not get close enough in straight.

Average to begin, settled midfield on fence, 4Ls from lead, eased 2 wide approaching turn, held up early in straight, unleashed strong sprint when clear past 200 M but gave winner too much start. Better over longer.
Slow to begin, settled last on rails 10Ls from lead, rear- ward throughout, had field in front on home turn, battled away in home stretch.
Bounced well, asked to settle in early stages 5th on fence 3Ls from lead, followed rails throughout, didn't go round a runner in straight and continued to make good ground.
Away with them, slotted into good spot 4th 2 wide 2Ls from lead, eased into clear on turn and tried hard throughout straight but was unable to match first two.
Awkward to begin from outside draw, restrained to last 2 wide 10Ls from lead, improved 3 wide on turn but failed to make any impression in straight.
Slow at start. Positioned 4th last on rails 8Ls from lead, followed rails throughout, never looked comfortable in run and gave nothing when pressured.
Bounced with them, positioned well 2 wide midfield 4Ls from lead, came 3 wide between runners passing 600 M but weakened out noticeably in straight.
Jumped well, settled 2nd outside the leader, travelled at leaders heels throughout, failed to match frontrunners when they sprinted at top of straight, one paced throughout stretch.
Fastest into stride and showed good pace to cross easily, restrained to take up position behind leader eased out entering straight and responded to hard riding only weakening final 100 M.
Sped across from widest gate to take up running after 200 M, set fast pace in front, had field off the bit and chasing on home turn, kicked strongly in straight and scored impressively.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to hit front just inside 200 M. Held on well.
Travelled mainly in midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Raced mainly 3-wide in rear of field. Wider turning for home. Made no show.
Settled at the back. Last into straight. Ran on past beaten horses down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Settled just behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Led early. Settled just off the pace rounding home bend. Gradually weakened in straight.
Travelled in rear of midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to hold every chance over 200 M out but unable to peg back winner throughout closing stages.
Always prominent. Quickened in straight to hold some chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Well there. Took up running rounding home bend. Led until overhauled over 200 M out.
Well there to straight. Gradually weakened.
Mainly in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure inside final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Did not find much room behind horses upon straightening. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Average to begin, settled just worse than midfield 5Ls from lead 2 wide, had good trip throughout, had trouble getting clear in straight and lost momentum thereafter.
Clearly best to begin, crossed easily to take up running, rolled along in front, made field chase from 600 M, sprinted strongly in straight to win easily.
Average to begin, positioned midfield on rails, 4Ls from lead, used no petrol throughout, held up in early part of straight, got clear passing 300 M and chased hard, unable to overhaul winner.
Away with them, ridden up to settle outside the leader under good tempo, travelled at leader's heels throughout, hard ridden on turn and battled gamely in straight.
Rider lost stirrup at start, lost considerable ground, settled 15Ls from lead in early part, ridden up to settle 3rd last 10Ls from lead, ridden hard on turn, well beaten.
Began with them from wide gate, trapped 3 wide with some 7Ls from lead worse than midfield, made 5 wide run in straight but showed nothing in stretch.
Jumped well, caught 4 wide without cover early, raced 3 wide without cover 3Ls from lead throughout, travelled well into straight and tried hard in stretch despite covering ground.
OK to begin, checked shortly after, ridden along to settle 3rd last on rails 8Ls from lead, held this position throughout, battled early in straight but made some late ground between runners.
Fairly away, drifted back to 4th 2 wide 7Ls from lead, came between runners in straight and got clear passing 350 M but unable to make up ground.
Slow into stride, settled 5th last on fence 7Ls from lead, followed paint throughout, did nothing in straight, not knocked around. (Blood in trachea.)
Away well, caught wide from awkward draw, travelled 3 wide with cover 5Ls from lead in run, came 4 wide on straigh- tening but failed to make any impression.
Away well, ridden up to take forward position 4th 4Ls from frontrunners, closed to be 2Ls from lead entering straight, held up badly passing 350 M mark and only got clear when race was over.
Reared at start, taken back to settle last 10Ls from lead on rails, eased 2 wide at 700 M and made run 5 wide on turn, made up some late ground, gave to greater start.
Away well from good draw to settle behind the leader, had good run throughout, niggled along when entering straight, couldn't match them over last 150 M.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on well down centre of straight.
Jumped well to lead early. Then settled just behind leader. Came to challenge inside 300 M and ran on under pressure to just prevail final strides.
Never in contention.
Well there to 400 M. Dropped out tamely.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Raced towards rear of field to straight. Made steady headway down inner of track with- out threatening.
Wide throughout. Midfield to straight. Made some impression early on but unable to sustain run final 200 M.
Mainly in prominent position. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
With leaders. Took up running coming out of back straight. Went over 1L clear after home turn but unable to sustain effort and worn down close to home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Briefly baulked behind runners upon straightening. Unable to quicken to challenge final 300 M.
Raced wide in prominent position. Joint 2nd just behind leader turning in. Dropped away quickly.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled in last few. Ran on quite well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. No clear run early in straight. Made moderate late progress inside final 200 M.
Settled just off the pace, raced down the middle of the track, ridden along at the 400 M, fair effort.
Began awkwardly, but took up a prominent position early along the inside fence. Lacked dash even latter stages.
Settled about 2Ls off the front runners, couldn't sprint from the 400 M, but more good ground towards the finish.
Settled with the mid-division, middle of the track, never threatened.
Ridden along early to take up a forward spot. Raced on the inside rail, commenced to tire after the 500 M.
Jumped fairly but hung out for the major part of the race whilst in the forward division. Shifted to the middle of the track, tired after 400 M.
Tailed the field throughout, never competitive.
Raced off the speed, made good ground after the 500 M, closed the race off well.
Raced in a rearward position, became detached when the field sprinted near the 400 M. Made up good ground in the run to the post.
Began on terms, but never competitive when racing back on the middle of the course. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin and blundered shortly afterwards. Travelled OK for about 200 M but did little after the 600 M.
Led them up early, but surrended inside the 300 M.
Raced greenly throughout, on the speed along the inside. Good effort.
Midfield for most of the trip, weakened noticeably after 300 M.
Ridden along to a forward position. Settled 2-wide behind the leaders until home straight. Kept on well but failed to match strides with top pair inside final 100 M.

Stood flat-footed as the gates opened and trailed field until 600 M. Remained towards rear on straightening and was held up behind traffic until switching out final 200 M. Made a late dash but veered out sharply near the post.
2-wide and got no better than midfield. In rear section rounding home turn. Failed to quicken when pressured and was held up for some distance near 300 M. Found nothing thereafter.

Raced along the fence at midfield. Hugged the rails making home turn but had to switch out away from slow traffic near 300 M. Quickened nicely once in the clear and ran out of ground to chase winner down.
Settled nicely behind the leader until home straight. Boxed in until 300 M but picked up nicely once finding daylight. Kept on strongly final stages to deny a late challenger.
Ridden along out of the gates and raced on fence behind midfield. Dropped slightly back to rear section after 800 M. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates and took the lead into first turn. Remained racing in the lead and held a length's advantage final 200 M. Failed to hold off the principals closing stages.

Slow to muster speed and raced 3-wide at midfield. 3-wide and 3Ls off pace at 1200 M. Niggled along rounding home turn to be within a length of the leader on straightening. Weakened quickly thereafter.
Missed the kick. 2-wide in rear section. Remained towards the back making home turn and swung wide to make a run before straightening. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Settled in a rearward position. Steadily advanced to mid- field and 3-wide back straight. Remained 3-wide making the turn and only kept same pace in the straight.
Botched the start and raced towards the rear. Trailed field into the straight and only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Remained same pace in the straight.
Wide at midfield into first turn. Improved to be alongside the leader in backstraight. 1/2L off the lead on straigh- tening but failed to keep pace final 200 M. Weakened thereafter.
Always prominent within about 2Ls or 3Ls of the pace in 4th or 5th through to home straight, 1L down in 4th still at 200 M, stayed on fairly but never likely to pick off the winner.
3-wide no cover when 1L off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, pressed on to lead by 1L on fence from 800 M to home turn, no more to give once headed 200 M out.
In midfield about 3-wide with cover and 5Ls or so off pace at 1000 M, 3Ls down on straightening, 1L down in 3rd and looked certain of a place at 100 M, lost out on line.
Always close up 2-wide and within 2Ls of the pace in 5th or so until straightening for home, failed to quicken up and quite pedestrian inside final 200 M.
3-wide with cover in rear bunch between 5Ls and 7Ls off pace until home turn, finished tamely down centre of track.
Led on fence until being headed at 1200 M, ridden along when 1L down in 3rd at final turn, swamped at 200 M and faded out.
Always in rear bunch and didn't get any closer than 5Ls off pace at any stage, never a factor.
Always prominent, 1L off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, 1L down in 2nd at home turn, one-paced and swamped about 200 M.
Crossed from widest gate to fence, 8Ls last at 1000 M, 6Ls down in rear turning for home, didn't get much closer.
On and off the bridle throughout 3-back on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield until home turn, steadied at 300 M, never troubled principals.
Shuffled back to about 6Ls off pace on fence in 10th or so at 1200 M, about 5Ls down at home turn, 2Ls down in mid- division at 200 M, finished strongly to nick a place on the line.
Left 3-wide without cover at 800 M when 2Ls behind lead in 4th or so, 4-wide taking home turn when 1L down in 3rd, still close up at 200 M but wilted thereafter.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, crept closer on circle to be 4-wide and 3Ls down in mid- division turning for home, picked up nicely to lead 200 M out, kept on well.
Over-raced with head up early on, 4Ls off pace in midfield when 2-wide from 800 M to homestretch, soon outpaced.
Slowest away, about 6Ls off speed in 11th or so down back- stretch, same margin back and 5-wide (widest) on straigh- tening for home, ran on well for 2nd without threatening winner.
Close-up 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, over 2Ls down in 2nd at 800 M but closer again at final bend, all out to be a neck 3rd at 200 M, weakened.
Slowly away, 4Ls off pace on fence in 4th at 800 M, under pressure to lie up at 600 M, very one-paced.
Always worse than midfield about 6Ls behind until the 800 M and same to homestretch, always outpaced by principals.
On fence about 5Ls off speed until the 800 M, 3Ls down and 3-wide in 6th at home turn, led at 200 M, driven out.
Never travelled well, niggled along on fence when 6Ls off speed in 9th or so at 1000 M, under pressure to take closer order into home straight, found nothing.
8Ls last at 1400 M, still towards rear and 6Ls off pace when 3-wide on straightening, stayed on fairly, nearest at finish.
Over-raced out 3 and sometimes 4-wide no cover when 2Ls down in 3rd, 3Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, closer and with every chance off home turn, a close 2nd at 200 M when hard ridden, no extra.
Over-raced when half a length clear on fence at 1200 M, went over 2Ls clear at 800 M, tired and headed 300 M, very weak late.
Raced 2-wide outside winner about 5Ls off pace through to home turn, soon outpaced and hung in under pressure.
2-wide and 4Ls behind lead in 5th or 6th down the back, closer and dangerous on straightening, all out to be 1L down in 4th at 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls or 7Ls and 3-wide with cover until home straight when hard ridden, found zero, detached 200 M out.

One from rear 7Ls off speed at 1400 M, in rear and 4-wide no cover at 1200 M, gained cover but 8Ls last at 800 M and into home straight, stayed on quite well through beaten horses, never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in rear at least 7Ls of the speed through first half, still well behind on straightening, made some nice late headway to be nearest at the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fair to begin, urged along to settle 3Ls back on fence mid- field, had soft run throughout, came between horses in the straight and closed race off strongly.
Awkward to begin, ridden up to settle midfield 4Ls from lead 2 wide, checked passing 800 M, eased 3 wide passing 600 M, lost momentum when bumped in straight and not fully ridden out.
Jumped with them from wide gate, drifted back to last 2 wide 6Ls from lead, made run 3 wide when entering stretch, left flat footed but passed plenty in final 200 M.
Average to begin, held inside running early and took trail behind leader after 600 M, had easy run thereafter but showed no dash when placed under pressure.
Away with them, ridden up to take prominent position 2 wide 5th 2Ls from lead, caught between runners throughout, showed little acceleration and only battled away in straight.
Began well, caught wide from awkward draw, trapped 4 wide 3Ls from lead throughout, improved to be 4 wide outside leader on straightening, had nothing left when pressured.
Jumped best from wide gate, caught 5 wide early, raced 3 wide without cover throughout, lead approaching turn, fought gamely in stretch but wide run took its toll in final 100 M.
Broke well, let stride to take up running, pressured throughout race and travelled on bit, tackled for lead at top of straight, fought solidly but passed over final 150 M.

Jumped with field, restrained to settle 3rd last on fence 5Ls from lead. Travelled strongly throughout, made run between runners upon entering straight. Shouldered way clear passing 250 M and sprinted hard to win going away.
Away well from widest gate, trapped wide so restrained to tail 2 wide 7Ls from lead, under pressure passing 1000 M. Field to beat on turn and gradually lost touch to be beaten a long way.

Awkward to begin, trapped wide early proving difficult to settle, eased back to settle last 5Ls from pace, tracked 3 wide passing 600 M came widest in straight and made some ground without threatening winner.
Away fairly, settled midfield 3 wide between runners 3Ls from lead, wide with cover throughout, tracked well to turn, did little when clear and weakened noticeably over con- cluding stages.
Broke well, unable to cross, posted 3 wide in leading division, drifted back to midfield 4 wide with cover, no sprint when required and raced greenly over concluding stages.
Bounced with them, ridden up to take forward position, caught 3 wide outside the leaders early, positioned outside leader from 1000 M, sprinted well in straight to fight off all but winner.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Settled 3-wide in rear of midfield early. Took closer order approaching home bend. Prominent 4th turning in and ran on to hit front 200 M out. Just held off runners-up's strong late challenges.
Settled in last few. Made modest headway early in straight. Only one-paced closing stages.
Well there. Soon weakened after straightening.
Mainly in midfield. Did not have much room in the run home.
Waited with. Commenced run upon straightening. Ran on well under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Well back. Made moderate progress under pressure in straight without threatening.
Waited with. Not much room behind runners early in straight. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M to just fail to peg back first two.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made modest headway down straight without threatening.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Broke fairly, taken back from widest gate, positioned last 2 wide 12Ls from lead, held up when attempting to improve on turn and in early straight, extended well over final 200 M when clear.

Tardy to leave stalls, gathered good speed to hold spot behind leader 2Ls away, over-raced slightly in middle stages, failed to get clear running early in straight, couldn't match it inside last 200 M.
Began with them, positioned well 6th 2 wide 6Ls from lead, enjoyed good trip to turn, came 4 off in straight and sprinted well just failing to match first two.

Awkward to begin and lost ground, settled 10Ls from lead 4th last on rails, had easy run in middle stages, came 2 wide on turn and 3 wide in straight, got clear passing 250 M and gathered them in like a good horse.

Away with them, positioned well 5th on fence 5Ls from front- runners, had soft run in middle section, asked to improve at top of stretch, didn't have 100% clear running but was one paced nevertheless.

Easily best to begin, showed speed to cross and lead with 2Ls advantage (solid tempo), continued to run along through- out, pressured at top of straight and gave best but early pace took its toll and failed to finish off.
Began fairly, taken back from awkward draw, settled 3rd last 2 wide 11Ls from lead, tracked along well to turn made run along fence in straight only warning up final 200 M. Needs longer.

Fairly away but showed speed to hold forward position. 1 out 1 back 4th 4Ls off lead with cover, given charmed run throughout, peeled wider on entering straight, hit lead passing 200 M and just failed to hold off winner.
Broke with them, taken back from awkward draw, caught 3 wide at rear, 2nd last throughout, came 3 wide passing 600 M and widest in straight but offered little in run to line.
Away well, drifted back to settle 9th 2 wide 10Ls from front, made run 3 wide passing 500 M but offered little when asked and only hands and heels thereafter.
Began well, crossed from wide gate to sit 2nd at leaders heels (good solid tempo), gave leader 2Ls thereafter, loomed up to take lead passing 300 M but quickly headed and battled thereafter.
Awkward to begin, taken straight to rails, 4 back on rails in 8th position 7Ls off the lead throughout, had clear running from 400 M but made no impression.
Jumped well, caught wide and restrained to worse than midfield, 3rd last 2 wide 11L from lead thereafter, tracked 3 wide entering straight but couldn't sprint to make up ground.
Slowly away, gathered speed to settle 7th 2 wide 7Ls from lead, spent nothing in run, tracked wide in straight and made steady ground in straight.
Settled in last few. Ran on past beaten horses in straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well. Settled wide in rear of midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out in straight. (Bled.)
Settled wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Well there. Quickened to hit front momentarily 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort near home.
Always in last few.
Soon took up running and led until headed over 200 M out. Fought on well under pressure but found winner too strong at the finish.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order turning in on rails. Ran home one-paced.
Never far off in fourth. Gradually came to challenge upon straightening and ran on steadily to gain upper hand close to home.
Always struggling in last few.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually faded.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening in straight.
Midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never seen with a chance.
Began slowly and lost ground, ridden up to be just worse than midfield 3 wide 5Ls from pace, between horses there- after into clear passing 300 M and chased gamely to time.
Jumped with them, taken back from awkward draw, last throughout 2 wide 8Ls off pace, improved 3 wide passing 600 M and came 4 and 5 wide in stretch, couldn't make up ground.
Away well, caught deep from widest gate, pressed forward to settle 3 wide without cover outside leaders (even slow tempo) hit lead at 300 M and drew away for easy victory.
Slow to begin, ridden up to hold spot three back on fence 4Ls from pace, used nothing in run, held up badly passing 400 M and lost momentum, showed little thereafter.
Slow to begin, settled 2nd last on rails 7Ls from pace, enjoyed even run throughout, niggled along on turn and showed nothing in straight.
Bounced out to hold position behind the leader, enjoyed good trip in mid section, angled 2 wide on turn and had no clear running early in straight but couldn't match them when sprint went on.
Broke with them, restrained from wide gate, positioned 3rd last 2 wide 7Ls from lead, race between runners on turn and didn't have a lot of room, finished race off fairly without threatening.
Fairly away, positioned midfield 2 wide 5Ls from lead, spent no petrol in run travelled well to turn, didn't respond when pressured and not knocked around in straight.
Showed good early speed, settled 6th 3 wide with cover 2Ls off pace, had wide run throughout, came 4 wide in straight but raced one paced under pressure.
Only fairly away, ridden up to hold a forward position 5th 2 wide 2Ls from pace, 1 out 1 back between runners to turn, lost ground entering straight and dropped out to be well beaten.
Broke fairly, ridden hard to take up running at even slow tempo, overraced slightly when pressured in mid section, gave ground from 400 M and was beaten a long way.
Fast into stride from wide alley, crossed to sit outside leader (even tempo) shaded inside horse throughout, lead into stretch but lacked turn of foot to match it in last 200 M.
Broke well, positioned 4 wide with cover 4Ls from lead throughout mid section, raced between runners to turn, came 5 wide in stretch and pursued leader valiantly in stretch finding him too good.
Jumped well, lacked early speed and trapped 4 wide with cover, raced 3 and 4 wide 5Ls from lead in middle stages, improved passing 600 M and tried hard in straight but couldn't make up ground.
Midfield, yielded ground after Rock.
Always well there, tended to hang in early in straight, fought on steadily closing stages to just fail to peg back winner.
Mainly in midfield, closer turning in, improving when squeezed 200 M out, never recovered.
Mainly in midfield to straight, found nothing.
Settled in midfield, switched out for a run 200 M out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always struggling in last few.
Jumped slowly, well back to straight, ran on past beaten runners down centre of track.
Never better than midfield.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled over 200 M out.
Never far off, joint 3rd turning in, fought on steadily under pressure despite tight between runners, pipped at post for 2nd.
Showed speed early, settled just off the pace, came to challenge under pressure upon straightening and hit front 200 M out, just held on to the line.
Midfield briefly, dropped towards rear turning into back straight, tailed off upon straightening.
Raced at leaders girth 1 off with cover. Had every chance.
Settled 1 off in a midfield position about 3L from the leader. Did little when pressured in the run home.
Midfield 3 deep with cover 4L from leaders shifted out on straightening made up good ground over latter stages.
Tardy to begin, ridden along early but caught 4 deep without cover in a midfield position the entire trip. Battled on gamely in the straight.
2L away from the leader along the fence with cover. Battled on fairly over the concluding stages.
Worked hard early, 3 deep no cover whilst racing in leading position for the entire journey.
Midfield 3 deep, had cover 2L away, one-paced after the 300 M.
Raced 1 off 2L away with cover. Never threatened in the straight.
Led and maintained even tempo, overhauled after the 450 M.
Tracked leader along the fence throughout the trip. Maintained its rail position and able to secure inside run on straightening.
Settled along the fence in a rearward position. Made steady ground whilst holding an interrupted passage in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled last about 7L from the front runners. Lost touch after the 650 M however commenced to make good ground around the field passing the 500 M.

Better than midfield but was 3-wide without cover. Kept within 2Ls of the leader in backstraight but still no cover. Unable to keep pace despite being pressured rounding the turn. Made no impression in the straight.
Slowly away. Failed to muster speed and then settled towards the rear. Swung out on straightening and closed the race off fairly.

Checked badly at the start. Hard to settle and raced towards the rear early stages. Allowed to stride forward near 800 M to reach within 2Ls of the leader at 600 M. Widest making the turn and tired in the straight.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. 3Ls off the pace rounding home turn. Kept on well in the straight but unable to get past winner.

Jumped sideways and raced at the rear. Slightly detached from main field early in the backstraight but improved gradually to catch up with main field near 400 M. Continued to improve in the straight and made up late ground.
2-wide in a forward position. Kept within a length of the leader until home straight. Battled for the lead near 200 M but weakened out of contention in the closing stages.
Raced along the fence at midfield until home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
Checked badly at the start and then raced 3-wide behind midfield. Struggled to keep pace after 600 M and found nothing in the straight.
Jumped well and took a sit behind the leader in a prominent position. Quickened when asked on straightening and took the lead final 100 M. Stayed on well to deny rivals.
Jumped awkwardly and then was crowded. Settled 2-wide at midfield until home straight. Kept on but unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.

Outpaced despite being ridden along out of the gates. Settled on fence behind midfield early stages but gradually dropped to rear section after 1000 M. Remained towards the rear on straightening and failed to quicken in the straight.
Ridden hard from widest draw and took the lead after 1400 M. Kept a length's edge into the straight and remained in contention before being outmatched final 100 M.
Soon led on fence, no more than half a length clear through to home turn, 1L ahead at 200 M, headed by winner 50 M out.
Slow away, in midfield 5Ls behind at 1100 M, 4-wide and 3Ls back still in mid-division at 400 M, one-paced.
4Ls behind in 5th at 1100 M, 3Ls back in midfield off home turn, ran on only evenly.
Awkward break losing ground, disputed early lead, about half a length 2nd out 2-wide from 1100 M to home turn, swamped inside final 200 M.
Had every chance with box-seat run on fence 2Ls behind leader in 3rd through to home turn, failed to accelerate.
Slow away, 8Ls last at 1200 M, held up momentarily on straightening when about 4Ls down in 11th, always outpaced.
Keen at 1000 M when 2-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd, 4-wide taking home turn when still 2Ls down in 4th, 1L behind in 2nd at 200 M, no extra, faded late.
6Ls back in 9th at 1100 M on fence, moved closer on straightening, came off rail at 200 M to challenge when 2Ls down, quickened up to lead 50 M out, readily.
One from rear when 2-wide and 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, 5Ls last turning into homestretch, always held.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off speed in 5th or 6th from 1200 M to home turn, stayed on fairly without posing a serious threat.
On fence 7Ls off speed in 10th at 1100 M, advanced 600 M out to be 4Ls back and 4-wide in 8th or so taking home bend, ran on pretty well but never likely to win.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, forced wider at 600 M and 6-wide (widest of all) when 4Ls back in 10th, never dangerous.
On fence within 1L of the pace in 3rd or 4th until home turn, checked at 200 M when 1L behind, soon beaten and eased down. (Bled.)
Always prominent but 3-wide with cover down backstretch and without cover on circle, 1L down in 3rd on straightening, led 200 M out by a head, collared inside final strides.
Better than midfield less than 2Ls back until home straight, 3Ls back and toiling at 200 M, no impression late.
Always well placed on fence in 3rd about 2Ls off speed through to home turn, battled well to get up in final strides.
Slowest away and soon outpaced about 8Ls last at 800 M, always in rear and offered little threat.
About 3Ls down in midfield until home turn, stayed on fairly well to snare 3rd on line.
Inconvenienced at start and lost ground, towards rear about 4Ls behind until home turn, never in contention.
2Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, always held by principals.
4-wide with cover down backstretch when about 2Ls off pace in 8th or so, 4Ls behind and under pressure taking home turn, no danger.
Always caught 4-wide no cover, about a neck down in 3rd at 800 M, widest into straight when 1L down in 5th or 6th, same margin down at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Led by a neck out 2-wide at 800 M, still there off home turn failed to quicken with quinella pair and lost 3rd place on the line.
Always worse than midfield and no closer than 3Ls off pace.

Fairly away, restrained to take up position just worse than midfield, travelled 3rd last 6L from lead on rails throughout, used nothing in run followed paint in straight and made good sprint but ran out of time.
Began well, ridden up to take lead after first 200 M, raced keenly in front at steady tempo, pressured from 500 M, led until 200 M but couldn't sprint over latter stages.
Broke well, showed pace to take up forward position outside leader (pace slow), had easy run throughout, moved up to challenge on turn, responded well under pressure to score.
Awkward to begin, taken back to last from awkward alley, positioned last 2 wide 8L from lead, made rails run from 600 M, still last passing 200 M and made good ground late between runners.

Broke best, held inside running early, took position behind leader on rails, enjoyed easy trip through middle section, reserved dream run when entering straight but failed to show enough dash to match winner.

Average to begin, settled midfield in 6th position on rails, remained 4L from the lead thereafter, enjoyed good trip to turn, made run between runners and bumped in straight, battled away. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, hard ridden in early stages, settled 2nd last 2 wide 7L from lead, travelled well in middle stages, made run 3 wide from 500 M and came 6 wide on turn, made no impact on leaders.
Average to begin, settled 5th 2 wide with cover 2L from lead, raced greenly throughout, came 2 wide entering straight but only plugged away over final 200 M.
Jumped well, urged along to take up forward position, remained 4th wide 2L from lead throughout middle section, came 3 wide from 600 M, gave ground on turn and faded out of it.
Began fairly, showed no early pace and settled 4th last 2 wide 5L from lead, closed to be 3L from lead on turn, inconvenienced and held up for most of straight. Didn't look like threatening.
Broke well, settled in 3rd not travelling too well, came under pressure rounding home bend only to produce good late impression final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield, raced tightly between runners early in straight. Produced good late impression to grab 3rd late.
Settled mainly 3-wide just behind midfield, circled field around home bend and hit front over 200 M out, won readily.
Settled in forward of midfield, commenced move coming out of back straight, disputed lead turning in, but quickly swamped by winner and lost placing inside final 200 M.
In last few early, effort rounding home bend, one-paced from midfield into straight.
Never nearer.
Raced wide towards rear, ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Never too far off in forward of midfield to straight, weakened upon straightening.
Soon took up running, led field to straight, folded up quickly. (Mucus.)
Mainly in midfield, ran on steadily in straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Chased leader to straight, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Well back to straight, ran on well down inner of straight despite briefly inconvenienced 200 M out.
Jumped with them, caught 3 wide with cover 7L from lead, allowed to relax, 3rd last to turn, came widest in straight and gathered them in easily.
Average to begin, niggled along early to take up spot 4 back on fence 7L from speed, ridden along passing 600 M and gave nothing in run home.
Began best, crossed to be outside leader early, raced at leaders heels throughout (pace genuine) carted field up to leader on turn and hit lead passing 150 M but quickly passed. Tried hard.

Jumped well, showed good speed to cross to lead passing post first time, rolled along in front at good clip, pinched 2L lead passing 600 M, lead until 200 M mark but quickly collared and battled rest of straight.
Away fairly, taken straight to fence, 7th in running 3L from leader for middle part of race, hugged rails on turn, made steady ground in straight without threatening winner.

Average to begin, restrained at start and taken quickly to fence, raced on rails last 9L from lead throughout, closed to be 6L from lead 3 wide on straightening, made up significant ground late between horses.

Average to begin, eased out of it early, settled 5th from rear 2-wide 7L from front runners travelled comfortably throughout, tracked through to be 4th from lead on turn, came 4 wide in straight but showed little turn of foot.
Broke with them, held good position 6th 1 out 1 back 3L from lead 2-wide, enjoyed easy run throughout, urged along passing 500 M, came 4 wide in straight and tired hard finding winner just too good.
Slow to begin, mustered speed to hold spot behind the leaders, had soft trip in middle section, pushed along to make ground at 500 M, came 2 wide in straight but only battled away.
Away with them, rolled forward to take up prominent position, trapped 3 wide without cover 3L from leader, ridden along from 500 M, wide run took its toll and weakened in straight.
Only average to begin, trapped 3 wide midfield throughout, raced wide with cover 4L from lead until turn, came 6 wide on turn but raced very one-paced over concluding stages.
Fair to begin, settled 2nd last 2 wide 9L from pace, tracked along in middle stages, asked to improve from 500 M but showed little under pressure, passed tiring runners in last 200 M.
Slowly away. At back. Never a factor.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Headway rounding the turn to be behind midfield turning in. Kept on in straight and was steadied when one-paced close home.
Midfield early. Improved from 800 M to 2nd from 600 M. Weakened badly final 200 M. (Wide and no cover throughout.)
Led from 1000 M. Headed 700 M and hung out. Gave ground 300 M from home.
In touch. Kept on in straight before dropping quickly out of contention inside 200 M. (Bled.)
In touch. Ran on upon straightening until no extra 100 M out. (Bled.)
Soon at rear. Never a factor.
Soon midfield or just behind. Took closer order along rail rounding the bend but got held up until 200 M. Made up a little late ground when clear.
Soon behind midfield despite being ridden along. Dropped towards rear from 700 M. Ran on upon straightening but had to be steadied 200 M out.
Slowly away after jumping awkwardly. Ridden forward to be forward of midfield from 1000 M. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along to be in midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Led or outside the leader. Kept on well in straight to win comfortably despite late charge by placegetters.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and raced to a forward position, 4 wide no cover, 6Ls from front division, fair effort.
Back in the field, wide all the way no cover. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked the leader throughout, under pressure inside the 700 M, didn't go on with it.
Back in the field, some 7Ls away 1 off with cover, made up little ground in the straight.
Settled back about 7Ls off along the fence at the 900 M, had cover, ridden to stay in touch after the 800 M, but tired.
Placed 1 off with cover midfield about 5Ls from lead, never threatened.
Settled slightly worse than midfield, 3 deep no cover about 5Ls from leader, worked home impressively to score.
Travelled midfield 2 deep with cover, 4Ls off leader, did little when pressured after the 500 M.
Midfield along the fence, 3Ls away, commenced to give ground from the 500 M.
Settled along the fence, continually lost ground from the 900 M when in handy position, ridden along from turn and passed tired horses in the straight.
Led until about the home turn, overhauled shortly there- after.
Travelled back at the field, about 6Ls away 3 deep, had cover, made up nice ground over the last 400 M.
Raced at leader's girth after being made some use of early stages, 1 off for the duration, gone at the 400 M.
Blew the start, ridden along to take up forward spot. Raced off the speed had cover, 1 off at the 800 M, tired final 200 M.
Slowly away and then was checked. Wide making the turn and near last on entering home straight. Only ran past some beaten runners.
Outpaced from the start and raced in a rearward position until home straight. Only managed to run past a pair of beaten ones.
Blundered on jumping and outpaced early stages. Raced along the rails behind midfield until straightening. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Botched the start and was ridden along towards the rear. Remained at the rear on straightening and made no impression thereafter.
Settled 4-wide towards midfield. Remained wide making the turn and only kept on same pace in the home straight.
3-wide and a length off the pace. Kept alongside the leader rounding home turn and took the lead at 400 M. Shook loose pursuers 300 M and remained clear under a drive.

Began well from widest draw but unable to keep pace with leaders. Settled wide at midfield middle stages. Improved in a 4-wide spot at home turn to reach within 2Ls at 400 M. Unable to find more and only kept on same pace to line.
Outpaced early and raced no better than midfield. 3-wide making home turn and reached within 3Ls of leader at 400 M. Quickened well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Jumped well and took the lead. Continued to be in front rounding home turn but failed to quicken when headed on straightening. Weakened thereafter.
Settled 2-wide midfield and was 2Ls off the lead making the turn. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.

Jumped well and duelled for early speed. Took a sit and settled behind the pace after 1000 M and never more than 2Ls off lead. 3-wide making home turn and a length down at 400 M. Kept on fairly to make the frame.

Jumped fairly and raced in a forward position. Niggled along in a prominent position behind the leader in the middle stages and was a length down at 400 M. Lacked a response when asked and weakened in home straight.
Slowest away and taken back to rear from wide gate, on fence 7Ls off speed in 10th at 1000 M, similarly placed tackling final bend, soon eased down.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 6th from 800 M to home turn when crowded and short of room, comfortably held by principals.
Niggled along at 1000 M when 4Ls off speed out 2-wide in 6th, bumped and laid in entering straight when 3Ls down in 4th, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, led at 100 M and pulled clear.
3-wide with cover when 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, marginally closer turning for home, 3Ls behind in 4th at 200 M, one-paced.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th or so from 1200 M to 600 M, 4Ls behind and struggling in midfield off home turn, no impression.
In midfield on fence about 5Ls adrift of leader at 1200 M, soon under pressure, 8Ls last heading into homestretch, soon eased down.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls off pace in 11th when 2-wide at 1000 M, no better off taking home bend, eased down over 200 M out.
On fence in 5th about 4Ls off pace at 1200 M, headway to be 2Ls in 2nd at home turn, half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, all out when headed by winner at 100 M, lost 2nd final strides.
Two from rear when 7Ls behind and 2-wide at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 9th entering straight, 4Ls behind in 7th at 200 M, ran on strongly late for 2nd.
2-wide and 2Ls behind in 3rd at 1200 M, pressed on out 3- wide with no cover at 600 M to lead by 2Ls entering home- stretch, headed by winner at 100 M out, no extra and lost a place close home.
Hard ridden to be 3-wide no cover and 1L off speed in 2nd at 1200 M, disputed lead out 2-wide at 800 M, began toiling around 600 M out, well beaten before the home turn.
Always 4-wide no cover towards rear, 7Ls last at 1000 M, still well behind on straightening, never on terms.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, never much more than 1L clear until being headed by COTTON BALL about 600 M out, plugged on evenly thereafter.
Lost some ground at start, worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover down backstretch, 4Ls down in mid-division at 400 M, one-paced.
In rear about 8Ls down in 12th at 1000 M, improved out 4- wide no cover at 600 M to be 4-wide and 4Ls down off home turn, about 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
5Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, same turning for home, stayed on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L until home turn, headed by quinella pair about 300 M out, faded quickly.
Raced in 4th place out 2-wide 3Ls off pace at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at the home turn, disputed lead over 200 M out, asserted close home.
Never a factor.
Bounded in air as gates opened, 4Ls behind lead and 2-wide in 5th down backstretch, 3Ls in 5th on straightening, soon outpaced.
Always 3-wide no cover, settled about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield from 1000 M to home turn, stayed on quite well for a place despite tough trip.
Slowest away, under pressure to lie up as far out as 1200 M, soon well behind.
7Ls back and 2-wide in rear group at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 11th taking home turn, stayed on at the same pace.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 12th off final bend, never dangerous.
Couldn't lead, about half a length off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at 1000 M, same turning for home, disputed lead with winner over 200 M out, couldn't go with winner inside final 100 M.
Over-raced early on but still well placed on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd from 1000 M to home turn, found very little under pressure.
On fence 4Ls off speed in 6th from 1000 M to home turn, soon well behind.
Soon led or disputed lead. One-paced after being headed 200 M out.
Never far off. 4th turning in but was held up. Ran on final 300 M without troubling the first pair.
Slowly away. Never seen with a chance.
Mostly behind midfield. Ran past beaten horses in the straight.
Thereabout. Widest turning in. Not a factor in straight.
Midfield or behind. Held up after straightening. Kicked home strongly 250 M out to score a commanding victory.
Never far off. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield or better. Under pressure rounding home bend. Unable to quicken in straight and run ended 200 M out.
Slowly away but soon recovered to be in 3rd place. Dropped out of contention 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led or disputed lead. Kept on well in straight before finding no extra final 100 M.
Slowly away. At back and never in the hunt.
Towards rear. Behind midfield turning in. Shifted out at 300 M for running and ran on for a distant 2nd.
Settled mainly in midfield. Quickened well inside final 250 M to hit front shortly afterwards only to be outsprinted close to home.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Found nothing.
Settled mainly in midfield. Came to challenge under pressure down centre of track after straightening but only ran home one-paced.
Always thereabouts until failed to hold place inside final 200 M.
Never far off. 4th turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening and outsprinted close to home.
Never seen with a chance. (Mucus and lame.)
Slowly away. Soon ridden and picked up under pressure to positions behind midfield. Gradually faded after straigh- tening.
Led early, settled just off the pace rounding home bend. Kept on early in straight before weakened badly over 200 M out.
Well there. Took up running coming out of back straight. Led until finding no extra and swamped 150 M out.
Settled in rear early. Commenced move passing 1000 M and took closer order home bend. Responded well from 8th into straight and finished off race strongly to grab victory in a matter of strides.
Broke best, taken hold of early, settled wide midfield 4Ls from lead, had cover to turn, held up early in straight and made strong run but was outpaced by winner.
Average to begin, ridden hard in early stages to lead shading inside horse (pace good), held front until 300 M but early pace told and weakened out of it quickly.
Began awkwardly, settled last on rails 8Ls from leaders, followed paint throughout, showed no turn of foot in stretch but wasn't knocked around.
Away well, ridden up to cross outside lead, raced 3 wide without cover pressuring throughout, tackled at 200 M and couldn't go with them after wide run.

Fairly away, settled rearward 3rd last 7Ls from lead, made good ground between runners from 600 M, came 3 wide on turn and sprinted with well timed run in straight to quickly pass leaders and draw away.

Jumped well, showed speed early, caught wide from awkward alley, raced 3 wide throughout 2Ls from lead and ran 4 wide in straight, loomed up passing 200 M but lacked final dash. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, ridden up to take forward spot, raced just off speed 2 wide 3Ls from lead, checked badly at 700 M and lost ground, regained momentum over concluding stages to rally strongly.

Away well, restrained to take cover 4th last worse than midfield 7Ls from lead, checked mid race and lost ground, ridden up 3 wide on turn and widest in straight, tried hard but lacked zip over last 200 M.
Average at start, raced midfield 2 wide, 5Ls from front on the fence from 500 M but only battled away behind the leading division.
Fair to begin, taken back to 2nd last 7Ls from lead, raced 3 wide with cover throughout, made run widest on turn and finished race off well without threatening winner.
Broke well, hard ridden to hold lead, maintained forward position on rails and pressured throughout, under pressure on turn and dropped out to be well beaten. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin, ridden up to take up good position. Behind frontrunners on rails, travelled 3Ls off speed throughout angled 4 wide on turn and matched eventual placegetters to 200 M but knocked up.
Raced wide in last few. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early. Forward of midfield turning in. Kept on well in straight. Nearest at finish.
Always struggling at the back.
Settled in midfield. Ran on quite well inside final 200 M to get up near finish.
Well there. Forced to steady for a stride coming out of back straight. Made moderate headway from 3rd turning in without threatening.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Never better than midfield, but made up some late ground home.
Tracked leader. Hit front over 200 M out, holding some 1L break until worn down close to home.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Gradually faded from midfield into straight.
Led field to over 200 M out. Weakened under pressure.
Midfield briefly. Dropped out home bend.
Midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Jumped with them, dropped back to 2nd last on rails, 6Ls from frontrunners, struggled from 800 M and had field in front on turn, past tired runners late.
Showed good gate speed, settled 2nd early, 3 back on fence 4Ls from speed when pace slowed, ridden along from 600 M, offered little in straight.
Away well, took up prominent position in 4 wide early, pressed forward to take up running passing 1000 M (pace true) pressured from 600 M, headed at top of straight and gradually weakened out of it.
Broke well, caught wide from awkward draw, 4 wide 3Ls from lead throughout mid section, continued to race without cover, came 5 and 6 wide on turn but felt effects of wide run over final furlong.
Jumped well, caught wide early, pressed on from wide gate to race at leaders' girth, had fair run thereafter, fought out finish for most of straight only tired late.
Began awkwardly, caught very wide from awkward draw, pressed on 5 wide, caught 4 wide without cover in mid section, ridden along from 600 M, 6 wide on turn and gave ground rapidly.
Broke well, showed good early speed to take up running (pace genuine) handed up lead passing 800 M raced behind lead thereafter, came 2 wide on turn but couldn't sustain sprint over final 200 M.
Average to begin, caught 3 wide 3rd last 6Ls from lead, wide with cover in mid section 5Ls off speed, urged along from 600 M, came wide on turn but struggled in run home.
Fair to begin, settled 6th midfield 3Ls from front runners, raced between runners throughout, niggled along on turn, gained split with 200 M to go and quickened well to score.
Slow to begin, caught 3 wide with cover midfield 3Ls from lead, pushed forward to race 3 wide without cover O/L throughout, hit lead passing 300 M and fought on well. Good for wide run.
Jumped well, tracked across to settle midfield 3 wide with cover 3Ls from lead, travelled well in middle stages, made run 4 wide on straightening and battled gamely in straight.
Away only fairly midfield early stages 5Ls off lead, raced tight between runners in mid section, battled away fairly in straight never threatening winner.

Began with them, settled 3 back on fence 3Ls from lead, drifted back to 2nd last on rails 5Ls from lead passing 600 M, came 2 wide on turn, and disappointed slightly for a run early in straight but only battled from that point.

Began only fairly, dropped back to 2nd last 6Ls from lead 2 wide, closed to be within 5Ls of front runners on turn, made run 3 wide between runners on entering straight and made good ground giving too great a start.
Slowly away and remained towards rear. Improved along rail to midfield turning in. Kept on for a distant 3rd.
Soon midfield. Under pressure 400 M out. Shifted off the rail upon straightening, ran on well to lead 100 M out and held on.
In touch. Carried wide at 500 M. Midfield turning in and faded away.
Slowly away. At rear. Held up approaching home turn. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite having to steady and shift out 150 M out.
