Behind midfield. Under pressure but dropped towards rear rounding home turn. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Behind midfield but wide and without cover. Gave ground rounding home bend and was already last turning in.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Kept on until no extra close home.
Soon led. Headed 1200 M. Under pressure rounding home bend. Weakened badly 200 M from home.
Midfield. Soon dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Always in touch. Took lead upon straightening and kept on well despite being outpaced by the winner 100 M from home.
Went forward from wide draw and took lead rounding the 1st turn after being trapped wide no cover. Headed 250 M out and weakened steadily.
At rear. Never a factor in straight.
Led from wide gate, headed at the 200 M, not far away at the finish.
Settled back in the field about 4L off leaders, 2 deep with cover, showed good turn of foot in the straight to score convincingly.
Raced outside leader, about a length behind, commenced to weaken after 400 M.
Raced along the fence 6L from front runners, ran on moderately.
Settled in last position, about 8L from the leader, pressured after the 600 M, made up nice ground in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Went forward after being slow to begin, however caught 3-wide no cover when racing 1 back from the leader, tired after 400 M.
Blundered on jumping, distanced throughout.
Handy position, 2 deep with cover, 2L back, weakened after the 400 M.
Settled worse than midfield on the fence, 5L away, ran on well.
Tracked behind the leader along the fence. Looked the winner at the 200 M but overhauled inside the final 100 M.
Midfield along the fence, 4L away, one-paced in the straight.
Travelled 1 off with cover midfield, about 4L off leader, didn't improve with pressure.
Raced a length off the leaders early stages. Kept within 2Ls of the pace making home turn but unable to draw closer in the straight.
Settled 3-wide near midfield. Widest making home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Ridden along in a rearward position. Remained towards the rear and was slightly checked on straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Outpaced and raced behind midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Niggled along in a wide position and contested for the early lead. Eased after 800 M and raced a length off the pace. Remained in similar spot into home straight but unable to quicken final stages.
Missed the jump and was detached from main field until home turn. Trailed field into home straight and only ran past a beaten runner.
Outpaced early stages and raced behind midfield. Fell further back after 600 M despite being pressured and among last few to enter home straight. Lacked a rally.
Niggled along behind the leaders early stages. Gradually dropped to midfield and was 3Ls off the lead 700 M. Checked badly at 600 M and fell to a rearward spot. Never recovered.
3-wide at midfield and was 4Ls off the lead at 600 M. Raced along the rails at home turn but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.
Disputed lead until home straight. Continued to vie for the lead near 200 M but was outmatched in the final stages.
Disputed lead until home straight. Gained upper hand inside final 200 M but unable to hold off the late charging winner.
Jumped well and eased back to midfield. 2-wide 4 back at 500 M and swung out on straightening to make a run. Rallied well and charged to the lead final 50 M.
A little keen at 800 M when 2-wide and 4Ls behind in midfield, 3-wide off final bend when 5Ls down in 7th or so, no impression.
4Ls off pace on fence in mid-division at 800 M, lost ground on circle when short of room and 5Ls down in 9th into stretch, couldn't improve.
No worse than 3Ls off pace in 4th or 5th from 800 M to homestretch and always had cover, same margin behind at 200 M, always held by principals.
Tight for room and keen at 1000 M when 3Ls off pace in 5th, shuffled back 4Ls down in 5th turning for home, outpaced.

Box-seat spot on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, shuffled back 3-back on fence 3Ls or 4Ls down in mid-division at 600 M and into stretch, 2Ls back in 4th at 200 M, squeezed through to lead at 50 M.
Over-raced at 1000 M when 2-wide in 8th about 5Ls off pace, similarly placed at final bend, never threatened.
Pressed on to lead by 1L out 2-wide at 800 M, still 1L clear on straightening, all out when headed 100 M out, lost out on a place close home.
Led by 1L at 1000 M on fence, soon headed and raced 1L or 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 800 M to homestretch, one-paced on run-in but still managed to reach the frame.
Awkward, crowded break, niggled along when 6Ls last at 900 M, 3-wide no cover on circle and 4-wide on straightening (widest of all) when 5Ls down in 10th, no impression.
Prominent but mostly 3 and 4-wide no cover until 600 M when 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd, kept on well to lead briefly at 100 M, no answer when headed by winner soon after.
Swerved left exiting widest gate, always towards rear, left 4-wide no cover at 600 M when about 6Ls behind in 11th, weakened further in straight.
Messy start and slowest away, always in rear pair and never better than 5Ls off pace from 1000 M.
Always close up within 2Ls of speed out 2-wide in 3rd mostly until home turn, led at 300 M, over 1L clear at 200 M, just clung on.
Half a length 2nd out 2-wide at 1100 M, pressed on to lead at 900 M, 1L clear turning for home but headed by winner at 300 M, one-paced and swamped inside final 50 M.
Mostly 3-wide no cover, 3Ls down in 6th at 1100 M, pressed on at 500 M to be 4-wide on straightening and 1L down in 3rd, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, swamped close home.
Always in rear trio at least 5Ls off speed until turning for home, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
Led by half a length at 1100 M, handed up lead at 900 M, 2Ls down in 4th on fence on straightening and same at 200 M, battled back quite well late, not far away.
Always in last place, 8Ls last at 1000 M, a little closer off final bend but never likely to take a hand.
3-back on fence when 3Ls down in 5th at 1100 M, over 2Ls down in 5th at home turn, short of room at 200 M but stayed on strongly, narrowly failed.
5Ls down in 8th on fence at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 8th at final bend, made some moderate late ground.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace in 10th on fence at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 9th on straightening, 4Ls down at 200 M, kept on well, nearest at finish.
Keen and nearly fell when clipping heels at 1000 M when 5Ls down in 7th place, 3-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in 5th, ran on strongly late out wide to claim a place final strides.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 1100 M, shuffled back 3Ls down in mid-division on straightening, ran on well to get close in a bunched finish.
Settled 7Ls behind a slow pace in 11th at 1000 M, still 6Ls down at 200 M, made some late ground, nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Weakened badly 200 M from home.
Never far off. Kept on without threatening in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear from 1000 M. Raced wide and without cover in the middle stages. Never a threat.
Slow into stride. At rear. Never looked likely.
Soon dropped to the back from wide draw. Never a factor.
Led briefly before settling in 2nd place inside the leader. Unbalanced rounding the home turn. Kept on but found no ext final 100 M.
Soon midfield or behind. One-paced in straight.
At rear. Kept on steadily in straight.
Took lead from 1000 M. Headed 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Jumped well before dropping back to forward of midfield from 1000 M. Kicked home strongly final 250 M to win going away in style.
Disputed lead briefly before settling in 3rd place. Kept on in straight and gained narrow advantage 200 M out before being outsprinted by the winner and lost 2nd close home. (Hung in.)
Soon behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight for a distant 2nd.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Quickly into first few after beginning from widest draw. Dropped out upon straightening.
Behind midfield when awkward in running and lost position badly. Never recovered. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off. 5th rounding home bend. Only kept on at the one pace in straight.
Wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Broke well. Made all to win nicely.
Well there to straight. Soon weakened under pressure.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to just fail to claim minor placing.
Rear to straight. Ran past beaten horses to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Kept on early in straight before no extra close to home.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily down inner of straight to be nearest at finish despite inconvenienced 200 M out.
Soon dropped out of contention.
Average to begin, taken back from widest gate, raced in last position 2 wide 10L from pace, placed under pressure from 500 M and only plugged home in straight.
Slow to begin, took up position 3rd last 2-wide 8L off lead, remained rearward throughout, travelled well on turn, failed to make any impact in straight after slow early pace.
Broke well, ridden up to take spot outside to leader (pace slow) shaded leader from 600 M when proving difficult to settled, held 1/2L advantage into straight but failed to sprint with first two.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, hard ridden to hold spot, positioned 2nd last on rails 9L from lead for most of journey, pushed along on turn, did little in the straight.
Fairly away, taken straight to rails, raced 7th on rails 5L from lead, held 4 back position to turn, angled between runners in straight and came with strong surge late to score well.
Average to begin, settled 4th last on rails 7L from lead, had easy time throughout, still had job ahead into straight but showed no turn of foot and battled away to pass a few.
Began well, ridden up to take forward spot, race 4th 2-wide 3L off lead, 1 out 1 back to turn, push 4 and 5-wide in straight and raced one-paced thereafter.
Broke with them, restrained to take trail worse than midfield, raced in 5th position 6L off front runners throughout, under pressure on turn, very one-paced in straight, hands and heels only.

Away well, moved forward early to take up prominent position on rails behind leader, had soft run throughout (pace slow) angled 2 wide on turn, came between horses in stretch and hit lead momentarily before being run down.

Broke well, showed enough speed to hold rails position, raced 3 back on fence 4L from lead throughout, used nothing in run, niggled along entering straight, obtained saloon passage on rails but unable to sprint on final 200 M.
Began with them, restrained to take up midfield position 2-wide, raced 6th 5L from lead through middle section, made 3-wide run passing 500 M and came 4-wide in straight, closed soundly in straight.
Broke well, showed good early speed to take up running, slowed speed during middle stages, pressured from 600 M, still in it entering straight but compounded quickly thereafter.
Mainly behind midfield. Took closer order along rail rounding the turn. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish despite being held up at 200 M.
Slowly away but soon moved forward to be forward of mid- field. Commenced to give ground and proved difficult to ride out whilst hanging in from 300 M.
Around midfield but proved difficult to settle and dropped towards rear from 900 M. Failed to quicken in straight after checking and shifting out for clear running.
Soon dropped to the back from wide draw. Shifted out of running upon straightening but bumped twice with another runner and became unbalanced. Made up good ground final 300 M.
Sat outisde the leader from 1200 M. Kept on in straight before finding no extra inside 100 M.
In touch early. Dropped back slightly from 1000 M to around midfield rounding the turn. Checked when disappointed for running near 400 M. One-paced thereafter.
Led to 150 M before finishing one-paced.
At rear. Widest turning in. Never a factor.
Prominent. 3rd or 4th turning in. Bumped at 400 M and again 300 M before weakening badly final 200 M.
Always in touch. 3rd or 4th turning in. Shifted out for running at 400 M. Responded well inside 300 M and took command final 100 M.
At rear. Never a threat.
Soon midfield or better. Ran on well final 300 M and gained slender advantage 150 M out before being outpaced by the winner.
Midfield but proved difficult to settle. Kept on without threatening in straight. (Lost plate.)
Mainly behind midfield. Hampered and lost ground at 800 M and remained wide turning in. Bumped twice upon straigh- tening. Kept on without threatening.
Raced about midfield, had cover, 1 off, commenced to shift out and improve after the 600 M, made up moderate ground in the run home.
Positioned last throughout, about 8 lengths from front division. Held up early after turning for home, ran on well to the straight while recovering inside passages.
Ridden 1 off in a rearward position, 7Ls from leader, did little when asked for an effort after the 600 M.
Camped 4 wide for the entire trip, 3Ls from leader, no cover, beaten after the 500 M.
Settled 3 deep no cover, 1 length behind leader, shifted out on home turn, weakened considerably over final strides.
From average inside draw, was parked behind the leader, took the length of the straight to overhaul frontrunner, got there in the shadows of the post. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 1 length behind the leader, 1 off. Pressed after the 400 M but commenced to weaken. (See Racing Incidents.)
Just worse than midfield, about 3-1/2Ls off forward division, 2 deep with cover, little impression over the last 300 M.
Led at even tempo, just collared close to the line.
Midfield, 3 off with cover 3Ls away, run ended inside the 100 M.
Midfield, 2 deep, had cover, 3Ls away, commenced to shorten stride approaching the furlong whilst hanging in.
Handy posiiton about 2Ls away, had cover along the fence, held up early in the straight. Ran on fair.
Slow to begin, placed in a rearward position, some 6 to 7 lengths away on the fence. Made up nice ground in the straight along the fence.
Raced 3 to 4 wide, no cover, midfield about 5Ls off forward division from the 600 M, had hard run.

Broke well and was restrained to midfield. Improved steadily in a 3-wide position rounding home turn and reached within 3Ls of the leader on straightening. Quickened past rivals and took charge final 100 M.
Niggled along early to settle in a prominent position behind the leader. Couldn't keep up in the straight and steadily dropped out of contention.
Off slowly and raced on fence behind midfield. Closed the race off only fairly.
Trailed early and remained among last few to enter home straight. Steadily made up ground but unable to threaten.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Improved after 800 M and was 3-wide among leaders on straightening. Unable to quicken and weakened final 200 M.
Kept close to the pace early. Dropped back to midfield after 900 M. Ran on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Settled 3-wide in rear section. Remained towards the back on straightening. Made a late rally for a minor placing.
Jumped well and raced wide in a forward position. 2-wide and 1/2L off the leader rounding home turn. Unable to turn up a notch on straightening and kept on only fairly closing stages.
2-wide and got no better than midfield until home straight. Ran on without threatening.
Slowly away and raced towards the rear. Lacked the needed response when asked on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Niggled along and raced behind the pacesetter. 2-wide and 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Failed to quicken in the straight.

Niggled to the front. Remained in the lead and took a 1/2L advantage into the home straight. Stayed on well and opened up a clear lead near 200 M. Headed by winner final 100 M but held off a late challenger for 2nd.
Eased back from widest draw and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and made up some ground through tight traffic in the closing stages.
Fractious in gates, in rear early, 6Ls down in 11th at 800 M, 5Ls back in 9th off home bend, made some steady late ground, never nearer.
Mostly without cover, 4-wide at 800 M when 8Ls last at 800 M, 7Ls down at 400 M, pushed wider at 300 M when making headway, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish.
Lost about 3Ls at start when slowly away, towards rear and keen at 1000 M when 6Ls off pace, 10Ls last on circle, never a factor.
3-wide with cover and about 3Ls off pace in 6th until 800 M, left 3-wide no cover at 600 M and was 4Ls down in 6th entering homestretch, failed to pick up.
Led by no more than 1L on fence from 1000 M to stretch entrance, quickened over 1L clear at 200 M, always in command.
3-wide no cover about 1L off speed in 2nd or 3rd through to the 600 M, under pressure when a neck down in 2nd and 2-wide at home turn, dropped out very quickly from 300 M.
Over-raced with head up at 1000 M when about 1L off pace and 2-wide, 2Ls down in 3rd off final bend, held every chance to pick off winner, just clung onto 2nd place on line.
Slowly away, worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace through to home bend, hung left under pressure, never troubled leaders.
3Ls off speed in 6th when 2-wide at 1000 M, similar taking home turn, about 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced late and missed out on a place.
3-back on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in midfield from 1000 M to home turn, comprehensively outpaced.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th until the 600 M, under pressure turning for home when 3Ls down in 6th, no impression.
3-wide with cover in mid-division about 4Ls off pace through to homestretch, 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, well held there- after.
Over-raced a little when 2-wide and 4Ls off speed at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 8th on straightening, always held by principals.
Settled one from rear between 4Ls and 6Ls off pace through to final turn, about 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, no further improvement.
Away well, had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th down backstretch, 1L down in 3rd at top of stretch, led briefly about 250 M out, headed about 150 M out but hung on well for 2nd.
Awkwardly away and settled about 8Ls last through first half of race, still towards rear when 5Ls down on straightening, stayed on strongly down centre of track for a place.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield through to the 600 M, closer on straightening, picked up well to lead 150 M out, stayed on strongly.
Over-raced 3-wide no cover 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd at final bend, swamped about 250 M out and eased late.
Bounded at start, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, similarly placed turning for home, all out when 1L down in 4th at 200 M, no extra thereafter.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls behind lead in midfield down the back, 4-wide on straightening when about 2Ls down in 6th, same at 200 M but weakened out late.
Worse than midfield and 3-wide with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to homestretch (when under pressure), failed to dash.
2-wide and half a length down in 2nd at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, struggling to retain prominent position off home turn, soon wilted.
Towards rear on fence about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, much the same at top of stretch, held up for a run at 200 M when 3Ls down in mid-division, stayed on fairly late.
Led on fence by about 1L from 1200 M to homestretch, headed about 250 M out, soon swamped.
Never far off but inclined to hang in from the outside rail. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Slowly away, then inconvenienced and remained at rear throughout.
Soon in touch. Inconvenienced at 300 M. Closed off strongly only to be narrowly beaten for 2nd.
In touch. Responded well final 250 M and just got up to win by a narrow margin.
Slowly away. Towards rear throughout. (Dropped whip.)
Never a factor at the back of the field.
Took up running along the inside rail. Headed 150 M out and lost 3rd when one-paced in the closing stages. (Hung out.)
In touch until no extra 200 M out.
Began awkwardly and was around midfield throughout the race.
Well there to 200 M until finding no more final 100 M.
Behind the pace. Under pressure 400 M out but just kept on without threatening the front runners.
In touch to 300 M. Weakened 200 M out.
Soon in touch. Kept on well final 400 M but could not match speed with the first pair final 100 M.
Well there to 250 M before dropping quickly out of contention.
Settled towards rear. Made up late ground under pressure closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled behind midfield to straight. Made moderate progress without threatening.
In similar position throughout in mid-division. Ran home one-paced.
Never better than midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily from 4th into straight to just fail to get up on line.
Broke well. Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Very slowly away. Remained well back. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace mainly in 3rd. Quickened to hit front inside final 200 M and just held off runner-up's late challenge close to home.
Soon took up running and led field to 200 M. Dropped out.
Broke well. Settled just behind leader. Hit front briefly about 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Always in rear. Never nearer.
Away well, restrained to take trail, raced 5th from rear 2 wide 7Ls from lead, raced between runners on turn, failed to sprint when pressured from turn.
Broke well, ridden up to take forward position, 1 out 1 back 3Ls off lead, had every chance in straight but only plugged home.
Broke with them, ridden up to go forward, caught 3 and 4 wide from awkward draw, relaxed well in mid section, came with strong run in straight finding winner too good, very good run.
Broke with them, taken back to 3rd last from widest gate, raced 2 wide 8Ls from lead in usual rearward position, made 3 wide run from 600 M and came 5 wide on turn. Ran on fairly with pace against.
Showed good early pace to take up running (pace slow) had easy trip to turn, fought strongly in straight only to be overhauled late, much improved run.
Average away, last throughout 10Ls from lead, hard ridden on turn, gradually dropped out to be well beaten. (Irregular heart beat.)

Jumped with them, settled in 6th position, 2 wide 5Ls from lead, raced ungenerously and not suited by slow pace in mid section, held up between runners on turn and crowded in straight but battled away well without showing usual dash.
Hard ridden early to take up forward position outside leader (pace slow), had easy time through middle stages, 4Ls from leader on turn, couldn't match them when sprint went on over final 300 M.

Began fairly, settled in good spot 3 back on fence 5Ls from lead in 5th position, had even run throughout, tracked rails into straight and came with fair run between horses but couldn't sustain effort.
Jumped fairly, restrained to 2nd last early, raced 2 wide 10Ls from lead thereafter, eased 3 wide on turn and widest in straight, gave too great a start but lacked usual dash.
Slowly away, settled 4 back on fence midfield, raced 7Ls from lead in mid section, used nothing until turn, held up passing 200 M but only battled away when clear.

Broke best, showed great early speed to cross from wide alley, held position behind leader throughout, did no work in run, held up early in straight but dashed quickly when clear passing 200 M to score.
Began fairly, raced 3 wide worse than midfield 6Ls from speed, had cover throughout, travelled well to turn, but raced one paced when pressured.
Slow away, settled 4th from rear 8Ls from frontrunners, travelled on rail throughout, made up some ground in straight off unsuitable speed.
Midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield to straight. No impression.
Broke well. Chased leaders to straight. Gradually weakened.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Attempted to make all. Led field until overhauled over 200 M out.
Raced wide in last few. Made moderate headway down straight without threatening.
Behind leaders on rails. Held up in box-seat early in straight before obtained clear run 200 M out. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Settled in last few. No clear passage at the back early in straight and just kept on at one pace inside final 200 M.
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled never far off in 5th. Quickened well to hit front about 200 M out. Won unextended.
Always well there. Fought on well but outclassed by winner closing stages.
Slightly slow out. Travelled mainly towards rear to straight. Did not find much room and kept on to the line.
Fairly away, taken back to last from awkward gate, rearward 10Ls from lead thereafter, had field in front on turn, past tiring runners late.

Broke best, restrained from wide gate to take trail, caught 3 wide midfield 6Ls from lead without cover, pressed forward 4 wide to be 3Ls from lead on straightening, tried hard in straight but passed final 100 M.
Broke well, drifted back to worse than midfield, raced in 9th position 2 wide 7Ls from lead, under pressure on turn and made some ground without threatening winner.
Awkward to begin, settled 4th last on rails 8Ls from front- runners, had easy run in middle stages, raced very one paced in straight.
Away well, ridden hard to take up forward spot, raced 2 wide without cover 4Ls off lead throughout, urged along 3 wide to make ground on turn and given every chance in straight but not up to it.
Broke with them, drifted back to settle 3rd last 2 wide 9Ls from lead, came 3 wide from 600 M and 4 wide on turn, showed no turn of foot in straight.
Away well, settled in good spot 6th 2 wide 5Ls off lead, tracked 4 wide on turn and came with strong run in straight, bumped and hung in over final stages, should be a little closer.
Away with them, caught wide from awkward draw, trapped 3 and 4 wide throughout 8Ls from lead, hard ridden on turn and failed to respond. (See Racing Incidents.)
Awkward to begin, settled 2nd last on rails 9Ls from speed, came 2 wide on turn but unable to make any impact in straight.
Hard ridden early to cross to rails, held spot behind leader throughout, travelled well to turn but lacked dash in straight to make impression.
Jumped with them, settled well in 5th 4 back fence 5Ls from lead, used nothing in run, made run between runners and had no clear run when making good ground late. Not fully tested.
Broke well, showed good early speed to work across to lead, dictated terms in front, kicked strongly passing 400 M and kept going to post solidly.

Broke with them, pressed forward early to take up prominent position, settled 3 back fence 3Ls off lead through mid section, inconvenienced entering straight and held up before bumping clear to finish well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, settled nicely 8th on rails 6Ls from lead, midfield, spent nothing in run, followed rails in straight and made good ground late.
Midfield or behind. Made up a little ground whilst hanging in final 200 M.
Soon in 2nd place. Unable to quicken upon straightening and dropped quickly out of contention final 200 M.
Always at back. Never a factor.
Slowly away. Mostly towards rear and trapped wide with no cover throughout the race.
Towards rear. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or better. Ran on determinedly final 200 M and was doing best work near finish. Just failed.
Midfield or better. Hung in when racing wide and without cover rounding the first turn. Not a factor in straight.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon led. Headed 200 M and tired badly final 100 M.
Led briefly before settling 2 to 3L behind the leader. 2nd turning in. Ran on well and hit the front 200 M out and just held on to win.
Midfield. 3rd or 4th turning in by saving ground along rail. Ran on in straight without troubling the first pair.
Positioned back on the fence 5L away, made up steady ground in the run home.
Last position on the rails until the home turn made good ground in the straight.
Raced outside leaders hindquarters until the 400 M, improved from that point to score sound win.
Settled handy along the fence, 2 off leader finished the race strongly.
Settled on the rails 6L back, made ground after the 600 M. After switching out about 3 deep, hampered near the 200 M.
Led at even tempo, challenged after the 400 M, battled away over latter stages.
Midfield 1 off with cover, about 4L from leader, ran on okay.
Midfield along fence about 4L from forward division, impeded while making up some ground near the 200 M.
Raced 1 off with cover 2L back, surrendered after being bumped near the 200 M.
Had the run of the race behind the leader, under pressure turning for home, weakened noticeably after run ended near the 200 M.
Checked at the 700 M while racing on the fence, midfield, about 4L back, did nothing after.
Took up rear position, 7L from front runners, carted 4 wide no cover from the 600 M, did little from there on.
Rearward position early stages. Settled 2-wide and behind midfield in back straight. Last few to enter home straight. Rallied well but unable to match winner's stride.
Settled at the back and trailed field until 400 M. Swung wide on straightening and swept past the field under a strong rally.
Settled on fence at midfield. 5Ls off the lead at 800 M and was ridden along to keep up at home turn. Unable to quicken in the straight.

Led shortly after start. Headed briefly 1200 M but regained lead after 1000 M. Took a 2Ls lead into home straight and continued to hold a clear advantage into final 200 M. Yielded grudgingly and just missed a minor placing.
3-wide in a forward position into 1st turn. Led briefly after 1200 M. 2-wide and a length off the lead back straight. Unable to keep up rounding home turn and weakened in the straight.
Settled 2-wide in mid-division. 4Ls off the pace making home turn and kept same pace in the straight.

Jumped well and raced in a forward position. Always stayed within 3Ls of the pace. Kept on chasing into the home straight. Ran down the early leader but unable to keep strides with top pair final stages.
Slowly away and settled on fence in a rearward position. Near last to enter home straight. Held up in traffic in early straight and closed the race off fairly once in the clear.
3-back on fence 3Ls behind in 5th at 1200 M, travelled well 2-wide same margin behind in 6th at home turn, clear 300 M out, led at 100 M, pushed out.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls clear at 1000 M, 1L to the good at home turn and at 200 M when all out, headed at 100 M, just clung on for 3rd.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 1200 M when 5Ls behind leader in 7th, pressed on at 800 M to be 3-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, very weak inside final 200 M.
Best positioned on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to 500 M, held up into straight, shifted out at 200 M when over 1L down in 3rd, ran on for 2nd despite awkward head carriage.
Bounded at start, sat 2nd out 2-wide and 1L back at 1200 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at 1000 M, 1L behind in 2nd at home turn and at 200 M when under pressure, couldn't quicken.
4Ls or 5Ls behind in midfield until 600 M, progress on circle to be 4-wide into straight and over 2Ls down in 5th or 6th, place prospects at 200 M but faded close home.
Bumped when 2-wide and 3Ls behind in 4th at 1200 M, lost position on circle and struggling off home turn in midfield, soon well detached.
Lost a little ground at start, 8Ls last on fence at 1200 M, 6Ls last on straightening for home, never threatened.
Settled 8Ls back in rear at 1200 M with cover, left 4-wide no cover at 700 M, headway to be 5-wide (widest of all) off home turn when 3Ls off speed in 7th, weakened inside final 200 M.
On fence 6Ls off speed in 8th at 1200 M, quietly ridden 4Ls down but still towards rear at final bend, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
In 9th place 7Ls off speed and 2-wide at 1100 M, unbalanced at 600 M, 3-wide off home turn when over 3Ls down in 9th, one-paced.
Niggled along when 6Ls down in 8th and 2-wide at 1200 M, 3-wide and 5Ls off speed in 8th at final turn, ran on well but was always held by principals.
Slowly away, niggled along in 10th when 8Ls behind at 1200 M still struggling in behind at final bend, minor late ground but never really got involved.
Well placed 3Ls back in 4th when 2-wide at 1100 M, under pressure to hold this spot at 500 M, didn't lose much ground on the run-in but did not quicken up either.
On fence in 5th about 4Ls off the pace at 1200 M, not 3Ls back in same position at home turn, held up for a run until inside final 200 M, switched inside final 100 M to finish well for 3rd.
Didn't show his usual pace to lead easily, pushed on to lead by 1L over 1100 M out, speed solid, still 1L into home stretch, headed at 200 M and soon swamped.
Always in rear two, 10Ls last on fence at 1000 M, 8Ls last at home turn, nearest at finish but only passed one en route.
Best position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home turn, pushed out to lead by a neck at 200 M, always held this margin to line.
Awkward break, pressed on without cover early until being 2-wide and 1L off speed in 2nd at 1100 M, all out to maintain this position entering homestretch, swamped at 200 M and faded.
Settled 7Ls behind on fence in 9th at 1200 M, similarly placed tackling home turn, switched inside at 200 M and finished off fairly well, nearest at finish.
In rear about 10Ls off speed at 1100 M, left 3-wide no cover at 700 M and pressed on at 600 M to be 4-wide (widest of all) into homestretch when 5Ls down in 9th, stayed on well, nearest at finish.
5Ls behind in 6th when 2-wide at 1200 M, pressed on 3-wide no cover from 500 M to be 3-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at home turn, good speed to be a head 2nd at 200 M, couldn't pass winner.
5Ls down in 7th on fence from 1100 M to home turn, stayed on fairly well but never likely to figure in the frame.
In touch. Held up at 150 M and was not properly tested.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily whilst laying out in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Slowly away. At rear. Held up at 400 M and again badly at 150 M. Not tested.
Slowly away. At rear. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Under pressure rounding the turn. Ran on in straight but could not match speed with the first pair in the closing stages.
Soon behind midfield. Ran on strongly final 200 M to score a commanding victory. (Lost plate.)
Forward of midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight and was steadied 100 M out when short of racing room.
Soon 1 out and 1 back from the leader. Kept on in straight and led 200 M out but was swamped when one-paced final 100 M.
Went forward to take lead. Headed 200 M and weakened final 100 M.
In touch. Ran on in straight but was outsprinted by the winner inside 100 M.
Settled in midfield. Quickened into straight. Gained slender lead 200 M out. Fought on well but pipped at post.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort under pressure and overhauled 200 M out.
Wide in prominent position to straight. Dropped out.
Settled around midfield. Ran on doggedly in straight to gain upper hand on line.
Chased leader to straight. Gradually weakened.
Towards rear. Made steady headway down straight without threatening.
Settled at the back. Swung wide into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace before tightened and lost position 200 M out.
Mainly 3 or 4-wide in straight. Quickened to challenge upon straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Never far off to straight. One-paced when tightened on rails 200 M. Never recovered.
Settled towards rear. Produced good impression despite tight early in straight. Kept on at the same pace closing stages.
Well back. Commenced run turning in. Briefly baulked 200 M out. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Showed good early speed to go forward and take up lead, set good speed through early section, backed off in middle stages, unable to produce sprint after leading into straight and quickly compounded.
Jumped fairly, settled 4 back on rails 5L off front runners, had easy time throughout, followed rails in straight and made good ground without clear running and checked near post.
Slow to begin, settled 3rd last on fence 6L from speed, travelled well throughout middle section, had field in front on turn, stuck to rails and passed a few tired runners late.
Began with them, ridden up to take up prominent position outside leader, raced at leaders heels throughout, urged along when entering straight but weakened noticeably over final 200 M.
Slowly away from wide gate, held position 2nd last on rails 8L from front, closed to be 5L behind on turn, came between runners in straight and failed to obtain clear running over concluding stages.
Broke with them, ridden up to hold spot early, settled midfield 2 wide 5L from lead, raced between runners thereafter, made run 3 wide into straight but raced very one-paced.
Away well, restrained from awkward alley to settle 5th last, raced 3 wide midfield without cover thereafter, asked to improve 4 wide from 400 M and stuck on well despite wide run.
Broke fairly, moved forward to take up spot 1 out 1 back 3L off front, had charmed run throughout, eased 3 wide on turn and hit lead at 150 M mark, fought strongly to score.

Reared at start and lost considerable ground, raced in last position thereafter 8L from lead, 3 wide from 600 M and made sweeping run 4 and 5 wide on turn, couldn't make up ground (hands and heels only).
Slowly away, taken back from awkward gate to settle 3rd last 2 wide 6L off pace, eased 3 wide from 500 M, made some late ground without threatening winner.
Away with them, taken straight to rail, travelled 3 back on rails 3L off lead in middle section, used nothing in run, eased 2 wide on turn, held up slightly in straight and fought on well when clear.
Broke best, showed good speed to cross to rails in early lead, travelled behind leader for most of race, had easy run to turn, got gap in straight and sprinted strongly unable to match winner.
Soon 2nd. Ran on well 300 M and won going away final 100 M.
Soon led. Kept on well in straight but was outsprinted by the winner final 100 M.
Soon at rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away. At rear. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Ridden forward to be in midfield or worse. Checked near 300 M and dropped right out of contention. (Bled.)
Ridden forward to take up 3rd or 4th place. Kept on one paced in straight.
Never far off. Under pressure rounding home bend. Commenced to give ground soon after straightening. (Lame.)
Soon midfield but trapped wide and without cover. Never a threat in straight.
Soon dropped behind midfield or worse. Made up steady ground in straight to claim 3rd without toubling the first pair.
Never far off. Every chance turning in but unable to quicken and tired inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail but remained one-paced in straight before weakening close home.
Midfield 1 off with cover, 4Ls away. Found little over the final 400 M.
Positioned back in the field, about 5Ls away, 3 deep without cover, made up good ground in the straight.
Raced midfield 1 off with cover, hard ridden turning for home, recovered soon after. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in rear division along the fence. Didn't find much when called on passing the 500 M.
1 out, 1 back gradually gave ground inside the 500 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield along the fence, 3 back, over-raced in the middle stages, finished the race off fairly.
6Ls back towards the rear, 1 off, made moderate ground without threatening.
Took up front running duties soon after the start, over- hauled passing the 200 M.
Enjoyed the run of the race, behind the leader, one paced in the run home.
Settled last on the fence about 6Ls from the front runner, held up early in the straight, closed the race off well.
Raced a length back outside the leader. Took over near the 200 M and went on to win.
Always at the rear, 1 off with cover, made no impression after the 300 M.
Niggled along early stages and was within 2Ls of the leader at 800 M. Remained similar position into home straight but never picked up and weakened.
Sluggish start and was ridden along to settle behind midfield. Towards the rear on straightening. Ran past tired runners in the straight.
Dropped to a rearward position and tailed the field into home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Ridden along and took the lead after 1000 M. Took a length's advantage into home straight but was headed at 300 M. Faded thereafter.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Crowded on straightening but picked up well to go through rivals. Continued well in the final stages and narrowly missed 2nd.
Jumped well and kept within 2Ls of the pace early stages. 2-wide and 4Ls behind the leader making home turn. Quickened well under the stick at 300 M and took charge final 100 M.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Hugged the rails at the rear of the field making home turn. Made a brief dash on straightening but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Settled 3-wide at midfield and remained wide making home turn. Ran on same pace in the straight.

Jumped to an early lead. Took a sit behind the leader at 800 M and was checked. Kept pace behind the leader into home straight and easily moved into the lead at 200 M. Had no answer when challenged by winner final stages.
Settled on fence at midfield until straightening. Moved away from the fence to get a clear run at 400 M. Made up some late ground when in the clear.
On fence and better than midfield. Kept along the fence and was 2Ls back on straightening. Ran on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Travelled in a rearward position. 4-wide making home turn and remained towards the back on straightening. Only ran past a beaten runner.
6Ls down in 8th when 2-wide at 1000 M, about 4Ls down in 6th or so taking home bend, all out and same margin behind at 200 M, rather one-paced.
Led out wide at 1200 M, clear by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, 1L to the good entering home straight, grabbed by winner at 300 M, one-paced from then on but good enough for 3rd.
Switched from widest gate to fence and was 10Ls last at 1400 M, 7Ls down in 13th when 4-wide on straightening for home, never likely to be competitive.
8Ls back in 11th at 1000 M, still worse than midfield when at least 5Ls down into home turn, made some minor late ground.
One from rear and 7Ls off speed at 1400 M, 9Ls down in 12th at 1000 M, hung out on straightening when 7Ls down in 12th then tended to hang in under pressure, minor late headway.
Always towards rear at least 7Ls or 8Ls off pace until 700 M when under pressure to lie up, became further detached.
Had no cover throughout, 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M when 3-wide, hung out at 600 M and 4-wide on straightening when 5Ls back in midfield, soon retreated further back, eased late.
Over-raced when leading by a neck at 1200 M, settled 2Ls on fence in 3rd at 1000 M, same position going well off home turn, angled out to lead at 300 M, driven out but always in charge.
Awkward break, raced no worse than 3Ls off pace in 4th out 2-wide from 1200 M to homestretch, 1L behind winner at 200 M, couldn't draw much closer.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at final bend, one-paced until the 200 M when 2Ls down in 4th, then dropped out tamely.
Slowest away, 8Ls off speed in 10th at 1000 M, crept closer to be 5Ls back in midfield on fence into homestretch, headway to be about 2.5Ls back when steadied briefly at 100 M, no extra.
3-wide with cover in 9th at 1000 M when 7Ls off the pace, still 11th when 4-wide off home turn and 6Ls down, finished flatly.
3-back on fence 3Ls down in 5th at 1200 M, still well placed entering homestretch, didn't find much under pressure and weakened through final 200 M.
On fence 6Ls adrift of the lead in midfield at 1000 M, 2- wide and 5Ls down in 8th taking home turn, stayed on only fairly, nearest at finish.
Slow away, recovered to be within 3Ls of speed on fence in midfield through to the 400 M, well held thereafter.
4Ls back in mid-division early on, headway to be 2Ls down in 5th or so at 400 M when under pressure, all out at 200 M when same margin behind, one-paced close home.
Within 2Ls of pace speed and better than midfield towards stand's rail until the 200 M, flattened out close home.
Raced prominently towards centre of track, about 2Ls down early and just 1L behind at 400 M, failed to quicken up with principals.
Always worse than midfield at least 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed, never posed much of a threat.
Outpaced and 10Ls last early on, never remotely on terms.
Jumped left, towards rear about 4Ls off pace towards far side through first 500 M, over 2Ls down in midfield at 400 M, never able to land a blow and weakened late.
Crowded at start, 5Ls down in 12th early on, still at back of pack when 4Ls down at 400 M, 3Ls back in midfield at 200 M, no extra and slipped back final 200 M.
In midfield about 2Ls behind leaders until half way, always hanging in and travelling ungenerously thereafter, weakened late.
Slowly away and about 7Ls down in 13th early on, 4Ls back and still towards rear at 400 M, progress to be 2Ls down at 200 M, ran on strongly but winning post came too soon.
Always close to pace nearer centre of track, led about 400 M out, kept finding all the way to the line for pressure.
Away well and made early running by about a neck on fence stand's rail until 400 M out, outpaced by quinella pair inside final 200 M but did enough to hold 3rd.
Managed to race within 2Ls off pace in midfield out wide on far side (down centre of track) until the 400 M, dropped out rapidly from then on.
About 2Ls off pace through early stages, edged closer at 400 M, soon under pressure and failed to match speed of first three home.
Led to 200 M and weakened 100 M out.
In touch. Quickened well in straight despite being hampered by the 2nd horse 300 M out. Hit front at 200 M and held on to win.
Towards rear. Ran on well final 250 M after being held up after straightening but lost all momentum after checking 150 M out.
Prominent. Soon gave ground upon straightening and was beaten when checked at 400 M.
Midfield or worse. Ran on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Around midfield but trapped wide and without cover. One-paced in straight.
Well there to home straight before giving ground quickly 300 M from home.
Always thereabouts. Responded well in straight but was held up at 300 M and bumped the winner. Closed off strongly when clear but was always held off by the winner.
Slowly away. Niggled along to be in midfield from 1400 M. Steadied at 400 M. Ran on a bit before finishing one-paced close home.
In touch but trapped wide and without cover. Dropped quickly out of contention 250 M out. (Blowing hard.)
Towards rear. Headway on the outside rounding home bend to around midfield but widest turning in. Ran on steadily until no extra inside 100 M.
Slowly away after bounding in the air. At rear. Made up a little late ground final 200 M.
At back. Shifted in at 300 M for clear running and kicked home strongly final 200 M to claim a distant 3rd.
Around midfield. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend. Not a factor in straight.
Broke well. Gradually settled about 2Ls off the lead. One-paced from 4th into straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled mainly in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Made moderate headway down straight without threatening.
Settled wide in midfield after beginning from poor draw. Dropped out into straight. (Distressed.)
Waited with. Responded well soon after straightening to just get up by the narrowest of margins.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Always towards rear in similar position throughout.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Settled in last few. Gained midfield on rails turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Never far off. Commenced move after straightening. Hit front 200 M out going 1L clear but pipped at post by fast- finishing winner.
Niggled at early. Chased leader to straight. Dropped out quickly.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Jumped fairly, caught 3 wide from awkward alley, raced 3 wide with cover 6Ls from lead thereafter made run 6 wide on turn and came with strong run to figure in finish.

Broke well, pushed forward to take up prominent position raced in 4th 1 out 1 back 3Ls off lead, had good run there- after, not a lot of room when making run early in straight and ran usual honest race.
Slow to begin, restrained to 3rd last on rails 8Ls from lead, made run 2 wide on turn, no racing room for first half of straight and made good ground when clear.
Jumped with them, restrained to take trail, raced 3rd last 2 wide 6Ls from lead, had soft run in transit, got great run through field and hit lead at 300 M but couldn't hold off first 3.
Slowly away, settled 4th last on rails 6Ls from lead, had easy run throughout, eased 2 wide entering straight and held up until 200 M but showed plenty of dash when clear to score easily.
Broke well, settled 3 back on fence 5Ls from lead, midfield throughout with easy run, followed rails in straight and had no clear running until 200 M but only plugged on when clear.
Jumped fairly, ridden hard to take up lead (good early pace), dictated terms in mid-section, pressured from 500 M, led into straight but weakened badly final 200 M.
Began with them, trapped 3 wide without cover 2Ls off lead, covered ground throughout, moved up to tackle leaders at 500 M.
Average to begin, ridden up to go forward and take up spot outside the leader (pace good early), raced at leaders girth thereafter, applied pressure on turn but compounded in straight.
Away fairly, trapped 3 wide and without cover most of the way about 5Ls from lead, came 4 to 5 wide on turn, raced very one-paced when asked for final effort.

Awkward to begin and lost ground, proved difficult to settle in early and middle section, raced 2 wide in 6th 4Ls off front-runners, eased 3 wide from 500 M and urged along 4 wide on turn but lacked any turn of foot.
Fairly away from widest draw, dropped back to last 10Ls from lead, had field in front on turn, held up early in straight but stuck to task well and made steady ground.
Broke with them, restrained from wide alley to tail of field, raced in 2nd last position 2 wide 8Ls from front to 500 M, made strong run 5 wide on turn and made up good ground.
Jumped well, took up prominent position behind leader, had dream run in mid section, raced on bit most of trip, run presented at 300 M but lacked dash to finish race off. (See racing incidents.)
Broke well. Settled in midfield. Just kept on at the same pace and made no impression in straight.
Well there. Took up running approaching home bend and led to 350 M. Gradually faded.
Waited with. Ran on strongly shortly after straightening to just fail to get up on line.
Settled in midfield. Shaken up upon straightening and ran on quite well inside 300 M. Gained slender advantage 200 M out and just held on to the line.
Raced very wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.

Settled in midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Joint leaders 3-wide turning in, holding slender lead shortly afterwards. Headed 200 M out. Fought on gamely without pegging back the winner closing stages.
Never far off. Tightened for a run shortly after straightening. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Led early. Settled just off the pace rounding home bend. Remained same on rails turning in. Not much room in straight and kept on steadily to the finish.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move approaching home turn and 4-wide straightening. Gradually faded.
Raced wide in rear. Commenced run upon straightening and finished off well to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Well there. Yielding ground when forced to steady for a stride over 200 M out. No further impression closing stages.
Towards rear. One-paced in similar position when tightened early in straight. Kept on to the line.
Niggled at in rear of midfield. Lost position turning for home. Made no impression at the back in straight.
Only average to begin, positioned 3 wide midfield 4Ls off lead, had cover throughout, crowded badly passing 250 M and didn't finish race off thereafter.
Broke well, sat behind leaders holding the inside running rail, drove through to share lead entering straight, kicked passing 250 M showing good dash to score.
Away with them, taken back to last early, raced on rails 6Ls from lead throughout last until 250 M and made good grond late.
Away with them, caught 3 wide, proved difficult to settle early and 5Ls from lead throughout, tried hard in straight making good ground without threatening.
Began awkwardly, trapped 3 and 4 wide for entire trip without cover, 2Ls off lead 4 wide on straightening but couldn't sustain effort and weakened out of contention.
Broke with them, settled in midfield position 2 wide 3Ls from lead, held up early in straight and inconvenienced, plugged away steadily only thereafter.
Away well, settled midfield on rails 3Ls from lead, had easy run throughout, held up passing 200 M and battled gamely when in clear.
Fastest away, led without crossing at good tempo. Pressured from 600 M, still in it passing 200 M but early work told and compounded late.
Away with them, trapped wide and pressed forward to race 3 wide outside leaders without cover, ridden hard to match them at top of stretch but wide run took its toll.
Fair to begin, trapped 4 wide without cover from awkward alley, tried hard in straight making strong run but wide trip took its toll over concluding stages.
Jumped well, went forward early to sit 3 wide outside leader, had cover from 600 M, didn't obtain running for most of straight but couldn't quicken when in clear.
Jumped with them, settled 3rd last on rail 5Ls from lead. Badly held up until 150 M mark, flew late and should have finished closer.
At rear. Ran on well in straight and took lead 150 M out but got pipped by the winner just before the line.
Soon at rear. Last turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Checked when crowded at 1300 M. Hung out in the middle stages. One-paced in straight and not ridden to the line after being held up near 100 M.
Crowded at start but soon moved up to dispute lead before settling in 3rd place from 1100 M. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Never far off. Ran on steadily in straight and was crowded when one-paced near 100 M.
Mainly in touch after disputing for lead briefly. Dropped quickly out of contention final 250 M.
Behind midfield or worse. Made no impression in straight.
Ridden forward and took lead at 1100 M. Headed 150 M and gave ground rapidly.
Soon behind midfield. Ran on in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
Well there. 2nd from 1000 M. Kept on in straight until finding no extra final 100 M.
Forward of midfield from 1200 M after proving difficult to settle. Shifted out at 400 M for running and made steady ground but not ridden out after running into traffic near 100 M.
Soon dropped towards rear and on rail. Shifted out rounding home bend for running. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to win just before the line.
Blundered at start. Soon dropped towards rear but wide with no cover. Hung out at 800 M. Nothing left 300 M out. (Slightly lame.)
Jumped best before dropping back to around midfield. Ran on without threatening in straight. Not ridden out after losing ground near 100 M due to crowding.
7L back, 4 wide no cover at the rear of the field. Hard run. (Lame.)
In handy spot 2L back 1 off with cover, commenced to tire after 500 M.
Last turning for home, never a factor.
Slow to begin and settled midfield on fence 4L from leader. Made up nice ground along the inside rail from the 400 M.
Raced 3 deep, had cover about 5L back, did little when eased for an effort over latter stages.
Led early prior to the 800 M, accelerated on the home turn for decisive win.
Raced 1 out 1 back, never quickened in run home.
1 off with cover about 5L away from front runner. Hung out in the run home.
Midfield 3 deep with cover, about 4L back, gave ground inside the 600 M.
Parked outside the leader, battled along over the concluding stages.
In rearward position, 1 off with cover, 6L back, made some ground in the straight.
Tracked leader throughout, one-paced when pressured after turning for home.
Jumped awkwardly raced towards the back early. Settled on fence behind midfield and among last few to enter home straight. Ran on only fairly thereafter.

Missed the kick and was at the rear of the field early. Hugged the rails at the turn and trailed field into home straight. Could not find clear path for the majority of the straight and unable to do much.
Settled in rear section. Improved in a wide spot making home turn and was 4Ls off at 500 M. Made a nice rally in the straight but unable to match winner's stride in the final stages.
Blundered on jumping and was slow to muster speed. Settled 3-wide and behind midfield and home turn. Ran past tired runners in the straight.
Settle 3-wide towards midfield. Unable to quicken in the straight and weakened final 300 M.
Dropped to rear section. Remained in a rearward position home turn and swung widest on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Steadily picked up on straightening but was unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.

Settled on fence and no worse than midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the leader until home turn. 2-back on fence going into home straight. Kept on well despite not finding clear path early straight and again after 200 M.
Wide and without cover towards the rear of the field. Improved in a 4-wide position rounding home turn and reached within 3Ls of the lead before straightening. Steadily faded thereafter.
Led briefly before settling behind the pace. Pressured 500 M out but only kept same pace. Weakened out of contention 200 M.

Among leaders early. Eased at 1600 M and raced behind the pace in a 2-wide position. Assumed the lead before the straight and remained in front at 200 M. Headed final 100 M but held on for a minor placing.
2-wide and within 4Ls of the leader until 800 M. Improved to within 2Ls of the leader heading into the straight. Kept on well in the closing stages and just missed a minor placing.

Settled on fence at midfield. Shuffled back to rear section at home turn. Trapped in the early part of straight but quickened well once in the clear. Charged through rivals and took charge final 50 M.
Took the lead at 1600 M and remained in front until 500 M. Dropped out quickly on straightening and tailed out. (Bled.)
11Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls behind in 13th at home turn when 4-wide, made some fair late ground out widest of all but much too late.
Always 4-wide no cover, 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, tended to hang out on turns, still well behind on straightening, never a danger.
Led by 1L on fence from 1200 M to 600 M, only a neck clear into homestretch, headed at 200 M, one-paced and lost 2nd place inside final 50 M.
Always driven along 3-wide no cover when prominent 2Ls to 3Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to 600 M, a neck down at home turn, narrow lead at 200 M, stayed on gamely.
On fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th or 6th from 1300 M to home turn when hard ridden to pick up, finished off only evenly.
Towards rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed until turning for home, ran on fairly well down centre of track to be nearest at the finish but never likely to figure in the money.
2-wide and 5Ls down in 7th at 1300 M, hard pressed to hang onto this position entering home straight, laboured for nought.
7Ls back in 9th when 2-wide at 1200 M, much the same on straightening, posed no kind of threat.
Had the run of the race in 3rd or 4th about 2Ls off pace on fence until turning for home, same margin down in 4th at 200 M, found a little extra past tired tiring rivals to take 2nd close home.
Slow break, 8Ls back on fence in 10th at 1200 M, under pressure at 600 M to take closer order, didn't succeed.
2-wide and 3Ls behind pace in 5th at 1200 M, struggling to lie up on circle and 6Ls down in 7th off home turn, continued to lose ground.
Always on pace, 2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd on straightening and still every chance at 200 M when a neck off the lead, couldn't sustain effort and lost a place late on.
Slow away, always in rear at least 8Ls off pace, never a factor. (Lame.)
6Ls behind in 8th on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 6th into home straight, no extra gears and always well held. (Blood and mucus in trachea.)
Slow away, 3-wide no cover in 10th at 1000 M when 7Ls down, forced wider at 600 M, 5-wide (widest) on straightening when 4Ls off in mid-division, 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, tired late.
Bumped at start, ridden along in rear at 1000 M, detached 10Ls last at 800 M, never remotely on terms but still ran past a few stragglers late on.
11Ls behind when one from rear at 1000 M, forced wider at 800 M, still towards rear when 5Ls off pace and 4-wide entering home straight, no chance with winner but stayed on fairly for quinella.
7Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, still worse than midfield about 5Ls down into homestretch, disappointed for running at 300 M and steadied at 200 M when 6Ls back in 10th, no danger.
Slow break, 7Ls down in 8th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls down in mid-division into home straight, quickened up to be 1L down at 200 M, led at 150 M, ridden out to draw clear.
6Ls down in midfield when 2-wide at 1000 M, hindered at 600 M, 4Ls back in midfield off home bend, hung in and out very awkwardly under pressure, folded inside final furlong.
Unbalanced when bumped at start, 6Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 4th into home straight when hard ridden, didn't find much under pressure. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Couldn't lead, box seated on fence 2Ls down in 3rd at 1000 M, keen at 700 M, led at top of stretch, grabbed by winner at 150 M, driven out to hang on for 3rd inside final 100 M.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, edged wider at 700 M, struggling at 600 M to lie up, faded right out in stretch.
On fence 9Ls behind in 12th at 1000 M, hindered at 600 M, 3-wide on straightening towards rear when at least 5Ls behind, ran on past a few tired rivals late on.
In 4th place about 4Ls back on fence at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up when over 2Ls down in 3rd at final bend, retreated quickly through field.
Pressed on out wide to lead by 2Ls on fence at 800 M, headed at top of home straight, dropped out rapidly.
4Ls back in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M, similarly placed off final bend but very hard pressed to be there, soon gone.
Around 2L behind the leader and on rail. Ran on in straight until one-paced final 100 M out did enough to claim a distant 3rd.
Trapped wide 1st turn and remained at rear. Steadied and shifted out very wide for running at 500 M. Made up a little late ground.
Mostly behind midfield but trapped wide both turns. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish. Good effort considering the extra distance covered.
Went forward from wide draw but trapped very wide with no over. 2 out and 2 back in 3rd place down back straight. Dropped out upon straightening.
Crowded at start before settling in midfield and was checked at 1300 M. Never a factor in straight.
Bumped at start. Dropped to the back after turning into the back straight. Never a factor.
At rear. Checked at 1300 M. 6th turning in by saving ground along rail. Unable to quicken and weakened in the closing stages.
Mostly forward of midfield. Checked at 1400 M and raced wide with no cover from 1200 M. Not a factor in straight.
In touch but had no cover and difficult to settle in the early stages. Tightened 1st turn and dropped to midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
Took up running 1st turn. Kept on gamely and held off the challenge from 2nd horse quite comfortably final 200 M.
1 out and 1 back off the lead (slow tempo). Hung out from 800 M and gave ground quickly 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled behind the pace in 4th or 5th position. Headway rounding home bend to 3rd turning in. Ran on well to be nearest at finish but was always held off by the winner.
Soon midfield and on rail. Ran on in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
Towards rear. Held up turning in. Not a factor in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily inside 300 M without threatening.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Soon picked up to prominent position behind leaders. Ran on at the one pace without quickening.
Sluggish at start. Well back into straight. Only ran past beaten horses.
Prominent briefly. Midfield rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Broke well. Disputed lead to straight. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Led or disputed lead to 250 M. Gradually weakened.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to reach 2nd late. (Bled.)
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to take charge over 200 M out. Won readily.
Never in contention and always struggling at the back.

Left gates best, didn't have speed to cross, slotted in nicely behind speed, raced in 6th 2 wide 4L from lead in middle section, hard ridden on turn but couldn't quicken under big weight. Fought on well.
Slow to begin, settled 3 back on fence 4L from lead, had easy run throughout, pressured on turn and gradually weakened out of it.
Jumped well, showed speed but caught wide for awkward gate, pushed forward to sit outside leader, under pressure on turn, dropped out at 200 M after hard run.
Jumped well, settled midfield 2-wide 5L from front runners, had fair run in middle stages, stuck to task in stretch making good ground without threatening winner.
Away with them, showed no early speed and slipped back to 3rd last 3 wide, raced rearward covering ground for rest of journey and made no impression in straight.
Began with them, pushed forward wide early to hold 1 out 1 back position, had even run thereafter, lost ground approaching turn to be well beaten.
Away well, showed good early speed to take up forward spot, shifted back to 5th 2 wide 3L from leaders, had soft run thereafter came 3-wide with strong run in straight to score a nice win.
Fairly away, caught 3-wide midfield from wide draw, raced 3-wide without cover thereafter, under pressure on turn and showed no turn of foot in the straight.
Fast to begin, held lead from inside draw, pressured in early stages and went along at a fair speed, nursed along to turn, put 2 lengths on field at 350 M but overhauled final 100 M.
Missed the kick, urged along to gain position 4 back on fence 5L from leaders, always ridden along, failed to make ground in straight.
Began with them, drifted back to 2nd last on rails 9L from front runners, maintained rearward position throughout, made steady ground on rails in straight.
Began fairly, drifted back to 4th last 2-wide 7L from lead, travelled well throughout, made run between runners on turn and made up good late ground from impossible position.
Away with them, settled in good spot behind the leader, had soft run throughout, obtained clear run in straight but couldn't go on with it over final 200 M (not fully ridden out).
Average to begin, slow to muster speed, hard ridden early in last position, remained rearward 3 wide 9L from lead came between runners in straight and closed race off fairly.
Well there to 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Always well there. Took lead 400 M out. Outpaced by the winner 100 M out and lost 2nd close home.
Well there to 300 M. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Slowly away and squeezed. Always at rear. Never a factor.
Always well there but unable to dash home with principals final 100 M.
At rear. Kept on without threatening.
Slowly away. At rear. Never a factor. (Hung out.)
Thereabout to 300 M. Tired badly inside 200 M.
Slowly away but soon travelling behind the pace despite hanging out badly throughout the race. Responded well final 400 M and won going away final 100 M.
In touch to 200 M. No extra 100 M out.
Behind the pace. Weakened badly final 100 M.
In touch. Kept on well to be nearest at finish.
Behind the pace. Weakened 200 M out.
Led or well there. Kept on well to grab 2nd in the closing stages without troubling the winner.
Checked on jumping. Settled last along the fence 8Ls back, made up good ground inside the 500 M, held up slightly near 300 M.
Raced wide without cover, in forward division, gave ground quickly after the 500 M.
Midfield 4Ls back, 1 off with cover, closed off the race well.
Raced handy, 3Ls back, 1 off with cover, ranged up near the 200 M, but overhauled passing the 100 M.
Led until the 200 M until challenged and weakened from then on.
Inconvenienced shortly after the start raced about 5Ls off the front-runner 3 deep with cover. Shifted wide turning for home, finished off well.
Travelled wide without cover about 2Ls from the front-runners.
Settled just behind the speed, 3 deep, had cover, tired after the 100 M.
Raced 3 off with cover, midfield about 4Ls away, commenced to improve after the 500 M 4 deep, went on to win convincingly.
Almost last, about 7Ls back 1 off, held up on straightening, got on the outside, ran on well.
Positioned 1 off about 1-1/2 length from the leader, no cover, gave ground turning for home.
Settled 3 back on the fence, weakened out of contention near the 400 M.
Slow to begin and settled slightly worse than midfield along the fence about 4Ls from the leader. Unable for some distance after the 200 M and obtain clear running. Never fully tested.
Checked at the start, raced 4 deep with cover early, about 7Ls back, steadied on straightening but didn't run on over the latter stages.

Hard ridden to be among leaders early stages. Settled prominently behind the leader making home turn. Kept pace in the straight but slightly held up 300 M. Stayed on well final stages to make the frame.
Jumped well and steadily dropped to a rearward position. Trailed field around the bend and was last to enter home straight. Quickened and made up some ground in the final stages.
Outpaced from wide draw and raced 3-wide behind midfield. Moved up to midfield after 800 M but remained 3-wide making the turn. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Trailed field shortly after start. Remained in a rearward position on straightening. Steadily made up ground but its run ended when steadied near 100 M.
Among leaders at 1000 M. 2-wide behind the pace making home turn. Responded well when asked in the straight. Remained in the battle for the lead final 50 M but fell short close to the post.
Off slowly. On fence and no better than midfield until straightening. Failed to pick up in the straight.
Outpaced by leaders and settled on fence ahead of midfield. Unable to find daylight for some distance after straightening. Remained on same pace once in the clear.
Raced 3-wide behind the pace. Tackled leaders on straightening and took the lead 300 M. Stayed on well but was headed by top pair close to the post.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Ran on only fairly on straightening and was crowded 300 M. Steadied again at 100 M and unable to threaten thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Still behind midfield on straightening but quickened into a nice rally and swept to the lead final 50 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was niggled along to be at midfield. 3Ls off the pace on straightening but unable to quicken when asked. Faded closing stages.
Off slowly. Ridden along and shared the lead after 1000 M. Continued to be in a disputed lead going into home straight but weakened quickly inside final 200 M.
Settled in a rearward position until home straight. Made a late rally and was closest at finish.
Best out and raced in the lead or disputed lead until home straight. Remained in hunt after straightening but faded out of contention final 100 M.
Led by a neck on fence at 1200 M, 1L clear at 600 M, all out when headed about 250 M out, retreated with some haste.
Slowly away, pressed on 3-wide with cover at 1000 M to be 5Ls off speed in 9th at 800 M, same on straightening and all out to be 3Ls down in mid-division at 200 M, no extra.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off speed at 1200 M, still about 2Ls down when a clear 2nd off final bend, swamped 300 M out.
Slowly away, about 8Ls or 9Ls off pace in rear group until 600 M, about 6Ls down towards rear off home turn but held up for a run until the 300 M, always outpaced.
Awkward start, in midfield 2-wide and 4Ls back at 1200 M, crept closer to be 4-wide off home turn and over 2Ls down in 3rd, clear lead 250 M out, headed at 50 M, hung on for 3rd.
Lost ground when checked at start, 9Ls off pace in rear early on, 5Ls down in 13th off home turn, kept only evenly down centre of track.
3-back on fence when 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, ridden along to take closer order on straightening, struggling at 200 M and well beaten thereafter.
A neck down in 2nd when 2-wide at 1200 M, struggled to maintain this position at 600 M, dropped out very quickly from top of stretch.
Always 3-wide no cover, 2Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, began to lose this prominent position at 600 M and was 3Ls in 8th off home turn, faded further back quickly.
Settled in rear group 3-wide with cover about 8Ls behind lead until the 600 M, 4-wide off home turn when 6Ls last, picked up well down centre of track to lead on line.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, short of room momentarily when 4Ls down in midfield at top of homestretch, stayed on fairly well, never nearer.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 3-wide on straightening and briefly held up when 4Ls behind in mid pack, quickened up to lead at 50 M, grabbed on line.

Always prominent, 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1200 M, niggled along but still close up at final bend, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M with strong place claims, faded inside final 100 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Slowly away, 6Ls behind in 9th on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls behind on fence at top of stretch, briefly held up at 300 M but still with place prospects when over 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, faded late.
Best away, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd at 1400 M, 1L back in 2nd at 800 M and disputing the lead into homestretch, dug in well to lead at 150 M but headed final strides.
Held an early lead but headed 1600 M out and settled 2Ls back in 2nd at 1400 M, 2Ls down in 3rd on fence at 800 M and same off home turn when under pressure, very one-paced.
On fence 10Ls off speed in 12th at 1200 M, hard ridden to be 5Ls down in 12th at final bend, soon retreated further back.
One from rear about 11Ls behind at 1400 M, closer 6Ls from the lead but 6-wide (widest of all) towards rear entering home straight, made some good late ground, nearest at finish.
4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th at 1400 M, 3Ls back in 4th at 800 M, disputed lead on straightening and a neck in front at 300 M, headed 150 M out and wandered under pressure, no extra late.
3-back on fencd about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in 5th place until the 600 M, 2Ls down in 5th off final bend, one-paced from then on.
Pressed on to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1400 M, headed at top of home straight, soon swamped.
10Ls last at 1600 M, never got much closer.
On fence in 9th about 8Ls off speed at 1400 M, improved on circle to be about 4Ls back in mid-division at the 400 M, no further acceleration and always well held.
Never travelled well, worse than midfield when 8ls back at 1400 M, ridden along at 1000 M to get closer, all out when 5Ls behind in 10th at final bend, no impression.
6Ls off pace when 2-wide in 6th at 1400 M, headway to be 4-wide but 1L down in 3rd off home turn, bumped at 150 M when making more ground, stayed on well to lead final strides.
In 8th place about 7Ls behind lead at 1400 M, under pressure at 800 M to take closer order and moved to 3Ls back in mid pack taking final bend, could only plug on at the one pace.
7Ls down on fence in 7th at 1400 M, improved to be 3Ls down in mid-division off home turn, disappointed for running at 200 M but much too one-paced and never likely to land a blow.
Checked at 1800 M, one from rear about 10Ls behind at 1400 M, never a factor.
Ridden forward whilst hanging in to be in midfield or worse. Unable to quicken in straight.
Thereabout to 100 M before dropping quickly out of contention.
Midfield or better. Ran on final 300 M and was not far from getting a minor placing.
Soon led. Headed 300 M out. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Shifted out for running at 400 M. Ran on final 200 M without threatening principals.
Midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover. Ran on determinedly final 300 M and just held on for a distant 3rd.
Slowly away and settled at rear. Held up for some distance near 300 M. Kicked home strongly final 250 M and won going away after hitting front 50 M out.
Knuckled at start. Soon forward of midfield and was awkward on heels for some distance near 1000 M. Kept on in straight until finding no extra final 100 M.
At rear but proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Ran on well in straight and was doing best work near finish. Just missed 3rd.
At back. Made up some ground without threatening in straight.
Midfield early. Swift headway from 1200 M to 2nd place at 800 M. Kept on in straight until tired 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Held up for a considerable distance after 400 M. Kept on one-paced when in the clear final 200 M.
Ridden forward to be in 3rd position. Dropped to 5th about 5Ls back from the lead 900 M out. Took closer order rounding the bend. Ran on until no extra 100 M out.
Disputed lead briefly before tracking the leader in 2nd or 3rd place. Ran on well upon straightening and took lead 300 M out but got outsprinted by the winner 50 M out. (Hung out and dropped whip.)
Settled in midfield. Ran on under pressure to just get up on line.
Trailed the small field to straight where always struggling.
Waited with. Came to challenge from second last some 4Ls back turning in. Ran on well and did best work at finish.
Settled around midfield or better. Quickened well upon straightening to gain 1L advantage over 200 M out only to be pipped at post.
Settled behind pace, hitting front briefly after straightening. Soon unable to sustain effort and overshadowed by better horses.
Settled behind midfield. In 6th some 3Ls off the lead turning in. Just kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Quickly into lead after beginning from poor draw, going 4Ls clear at one stage on far side. Still leading turning in but soon overhauled.
Raced mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield or better. Some 2Ls 4th turning in but soon weakened.
Jumped in air and lost ground at start, settled 2nd last 2 wide 6Ls off speed, did little in run, travelled well to turn, responded only fairly when placed under pressure in straight.
Jumped well, rolled forward to race at leader's girth 2 wide, travelled well through middle stages at slow pace, challenged leader entering straight and tried hard over final 200 M to hold 3rd.
Slow to begin, settled in rearward position, 3 wide 6Ls from leaders, had cover thereafter made 4 wide run on turn and stuck to task well making up some late ground.
Broke well, obtained good position behind speed 1 out 1 back, raced 2Ls off lead thereafter, travelled on bit throughout, sprinted strongly and hit lead passing 200 M but couldn't hold off winner.
