Broke well, trapped 3 wide with cover 4Ls from lead throughout, ridden along on turn but raced very 1 paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Fairly away, restrained to take trail, raced in 5th position 2 wide 4Ls from front-runners , had good trip, made run between runners in straight and held ground without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, travelled 3 back on fence 4Ls from speed, had soft run thereafter, followed paint into straight and got clear passing 200 M but couldn't make impression on placegetters.
Broke with them, restrained to last position on rails 6Ls from pace, had soft run throughout, travelled well to turn, lacked turn of foot when required in straight.
Clearly fastest into stride, rolled on with it to take up front, slowed speed in mid section after good early speed, had good run to turn, tackled passing 350 M and failed to respond.
Broke with field, caught 4 wide early, trapped 3 wide 3Ls from lead thereafter without cover, relaxed well, responded when asked for effort over final 300 M and scored a determined win.
Raced keenly in midfield from 1200 M. Went 4 wide without cover rounding home bend. Slightly closer order turning in but ran home one-paced.
Prominent to 400 M. Weakened.
Around midfield throughout. Made no show in straight.
Sluggish at start. Gradually improved to midfield. Soon faded in straight.
Wide in midfield far side. Circled field to join leader on top of home bend. Came under pressure to maintain speed early in straight but no answer to rider's pressure late.
Restrained on rails behind leader early. Forced to steady and lost position dropping to midfield approaching home bend. Closer turning in but found nothing in the run home.
Settled at the back. Switched inside for rails run turning in. Quickening when hampered 250 M out. No impression thereafter.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled mainly in last few. Jostled early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 300 M.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position early. Moved up to make running coming out of back straight. Soon joined rounding home bend. Still up there on top of straight but faded passing 250 M.
Led far side, settling in 3rd just off the pace rounding home bend. Quickened to re-gain advantage 200 M out but caught close home.
Settled at the back. Taken wide into the centre of track turning in. Ran on doggedly to snatch victory short of line.
Prominent to 600 M. Weakened.
Towards rear. Wide into straight. Ran on well alongside winner early in straight until slightly baulked passing 200 M. Unable to sustain effort thereafter.
Jumped well, taken hold of early, travelled 7th 5Ls from front-runners, raced 2 wide throughout and tracked 3 wide on turn, made strong run in straight making good ground.
Average to begin, taken back to last 12Ls from lead, made 3 wide run from 600 M and came 6 wide on turn, chased gamely but gave to greater start.
Slowly into stride, settled in a rearward position on rails 12Ls from front, came 3 wide at 500 M and had field in front on home turn, only battled away in home stretch.
Broke well, hard ridden to take up forward position behind leader on rails, raced 2Ls off leader thereafter, niggled along on turn, weakened badly in straight to be well beaten.
Fairly away, taken back to 2nd last and 10Ls from lead, travelled 2 wide thereafter, made run between runners on turn and made steady ground in straight (hands and heels only).
Average to begin, held rearward position on rails 8Ls from lead, used no energy throughout, came between runners on turn but only plugged away in straight.
Broke well, allowed to stride forward and take up forward position 1 out 1 back 3Ls from leader, had run of race, loomed strongly to take lead passing 200 M and kept on to score strong win.
Showed early speed to contest lead, raced outside leader throughout middle stages, had fair run to turn, in finish until 200 M but couldn't sustain effort over concluding stages.
Only fairly away, caught 3 wide in rearward position from awkward alley, raced wide 6Ls from lead thereafter, pressed forward from 600 M and fought on gamely despite wide run.
Jumped with field, settled 4th last 2 wide 8Ls from lead, came 3 wide passing 500 M and made run 5 wide in straight but showed little turn of foot when pressured.
Broke with them, showed some early speed to cross to rails, travelled 3 back on fence 4Ls from lead throughout, made run between horses in straight but raced a little one paced over final 200 M.
Showed good gate speed, pressed forward from widest gate to take up running, lead throughout at even tempo, held 1L advantage early in straight but couldn't hold off challengers over final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, ridden up to obtain closer position on rails 6Ls from lead, had easy run thereafter, showed no dash when pressured at business end.
Away with them, slotted in midfield spot 6th 2 wide. 4Ls from lead, had easy time in mid section, tracked winner in straight and challenged strongly passing 200 M but couldn't match it, very game.
Soon dropped towards rear. Steadied at 400 M. Made up ground steadily in the straight.
Led to 1000 M before tracking the leader. Ran on in straight but found no extra 100 M out.
Behind midfield. Steadied off heels near 800 M. Never a factor in straight. (Mucopus.)
Midfield or better but trapped wide. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away. Soon midfield or worse. Made up some ground final 200 M for a distant 3rd despite racing greenly.
Prominent in 2nd or 3rd place. Kept on in straight until no extra 100 M out.
Slowly away. Midfield or better. 4th turning in. Ran on in straight without getting close to the winner.
Always at back. Never seen with a chance.
Took lead approaching 1000 M. Kept on well in straight to win easily.
Prominent but trapped wide and with no cover. Hung out badly from 600 M and soon dropped right out of contention.
Towards rear and had to be steadied off heels near 900 M. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Covered ground behind the leaders, 3 off tired passing 500 M.
Midfield 3L back, 3 wide no cover. Struggled over final stages.
Settled worse than midfield, 4L back 2 deep with cover.
Raced midfield along the fence, 3L back failed to improve after the 400 M.
Sat outside leader, even tempo, gone turning for home.
Settled 4L back along the rail, saved ground on the fence. Ran on well to the latter stages.
Positioned 1 off with cover about 4L back settled in the outside on straightening, faded out of contention over the concluding stages.
Reared at the start, became cast and took no part. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin, well back, about 6L away, briefly held up on straightening, closed off well.
Took up front running duties, pressured throughout and weakened final 200 M.
Raced behind the leader on the fence, dashed clear at the 200 M and held good advantage to the post.
Settled 1 out 1 back, one-paced in the straight.
3-wide at midfield. Shuffled back slightly 400 M. Ran on steadily in the straight.
Slowly away and settled towards the rear. Swung out on straightening and only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and trailed field early stages. Gradually made up ground and was on fence near midfield making home turn. Continued to improve in the straight and ran down the leader final 50 M.
outpaced early and settled on fence at the rear. Made a ground saving trip around the bend and kept improving in the straight to be closest at finish.
2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader until home straight. Moved outwards at 250 M to get a run but unable to turn up a notch in the final stages.
Ridden out of the gates from wide draw and stalked leader until 600 M. Kept within a length of the leader making home turn but unable to keep pace on straightening. Weakened closing stages.

Outpaced by front runners and raced wide at midfield. Bumped heavily at 600 M and got carried wider. 4-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leader home turn. Ran on fairly but unable to draw closer in the straight.
Raced prominently behind the leader until home straight. Kept chasing but unable to draw closer in the straight.
Best out and took the lead. Remained in front going into home straight and held a 2Ls lead final 200 M. Stayed on well but was headed final 50 M.
3-wide and no better than midfield. Widest making home turn and kept on same pace in the straight.
No worse than midfield. 3-wide and 2Ls off the pace at 600 M. Faded steadily rounding home turn and tailed out in the straight.
Outpaced early stages and trailed field after 700 M. Last to enter home straight and was shifted wider to get a clear run at 250 M. Made a late dash.
Awkward start, settled one from rear about 7Ls or 8Ls behind slow tempo until home turn, ran on strongly in stretch, no chance with winner but just missed out on 2nd place.
Switched from wide gate to be 2-wide and worse than midfield at least 6Ls behind leaders until the 600 M, 3-wide on straightening, made some very minor late ground.
Slow away, prominent but forced 3-wide no cover at 1200 M, no cover thereafter and 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M, struggling when 4-wide into home straight, faded further.
Lost a little ground at start, 4Ls down in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, similarly placed into home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Always hung out left with head up, even more ungenerous than usual, 2-wide and disputed lead from 1200 M to home turn, a neck clear at 200 M, soon headed and just hung onto 2nd.
Keen 1400 M out and hung in, 3-wide with cover towards rear about 6Ls off speed down the back, never competitive.
On fence about 5Ls off speed in 8th place or so through to home straight when driven along, never dangerous.
Keen at 1200 M, 2Ls off speed in 5th on fence at 1100 M, 3Ls down in 6th on straightening, always held by principals.
Slowly away, settled last about 9Ls off pace at 1200 M, never on terms until home turn, ran past a few tired rivals late.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1100 M, slipped into box-seat spot on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 900 M to home turn, quickened up to lead at 150 M, comfortably.
3-wide no cover when 1L off pace disputing 2nd at 1100 M, got in 2-wide with cover and 2Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, under pressure to get closer on straightening, stayed on at same pace.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, pressed on to dispute lead from 1000 M to home turn, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, faded close home.
On fence 6Ls off speed in 7th at 1100 M, similar margin behind when 8th off home turn, didn't quicken and beaten over 200 M out.
A little keen early on, had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off speed until final bend, led 200 M out, caught by winner on the line.
10Ls last on fence at 1200 M, never got involved despite making some minor late headway.
2-wide and about 4Ls behind in 5th or 6th through to home straight, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M and with every chance, couldn't follow through.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 4th at 1100 M, well placed in 4th when turning for home, soon outpaced.
On fence in 5th about 4Ls off speed at 1100 M, similar margin behind but in 7th place taking home turn and 200 M, retreated further close home.
A neck 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, same at 400 M but hard ridden to lie up, swamped over 200 M out.
9Ls behind in 10th at 1200 M, 8Ls back in 10th off final bend, make some minor late ground.
7Ls off speed in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, over 4Ls down in 6th taking home turn, stayed on well and looked like getting up at 100 M, no extra close home.
Over-raced in front through first half of race when about neck clear, lost out on a place inside final 100 M.
One from rear when 10Ls off speed and 2-wide at 1200 M, under pressure to take closer order at 500 M and was 7Ls down in 10th off home turn, ran on strongly despite laying in to lead on line.
Forward of midfield but proved difficult to settle near 1600 M. Checked after straightening. Kept on and just held on for a distant 3rd.
Took lead rounding the first turn. Headed near 200 M and tired badly.
Midfield or better. Ran on well in straight despite hanging in and took control inside 100 M.
Always in touch. 4-wide turning in. Ran on well and hit front 200 M out. Hung in, proved difficult to ride and got outsprinted by the winner inside 100 M.
Slowly away. At rear. Never a factor.
Led to first turn. Behind leader from 1600 M. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Midfield but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish despite being held up near 200 M.
Sat 1 out and 1 back off the leader passing winning post the first time. Under pressure turning in but gave ground quickly 200 M out.
Around midfield. Made up good ground final 200 M to just miss a distant 3rd.
Stumbled at start. Behind midfield. Ran on steadily without posing a threat.
At rear. No response when put under pressure in the final turn. Made up a little late ground.

Well there but wide early after beginning from poor draw. Gradually crossed to 2-wide outside lead around Rock. Gained a length's advantage under pressure soon after straightening only to be caught in the shadows of the post.
Broke well. Led to 200 M. No extra.
Midfield to 400 M. Weakened into straight.
Jumped well. Settled 3 back 4th on rails. Weakened into straight.
Trailed field to straight. Ran past some beaten horses closing stages.
Never far off. Came to challenge from some 2-1/2Ls 3rd into straight. Ran on determinedly to snatch victory from tiring leader final stride.
Settled in midfield. Ran on quite well down straight to do best work at finish.
Midfield. Came under pressure into straight. Soon weakened.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Rear. Made moderate headway in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 4-wide in midfield far side and around home bend. Soon weakened in straight.
Rear of midfield most of way until late progress under pressure closing stages.
Only fair to begin, settled rearward 4th last on rails, never travelled well and urged along on 3 occasions before turn, began to make some ground late before being badly checked.
Broke with them, held good position 1 out 1 back 3L from lead, raced between horses throughout, obtained split in straight but lacked turning of foot to figure in finish.
Showed good early speed to cross from wide gate (pace genuine) dictate terms throughout, under hard riding early in straight and weakened badly over final furlong.

Away fairly allowed to stride forward when difficult to settle, trapped wide in midfield 3-4L from lead, had cover for rest of trip, eased 4 wide into straight and battled gamely but wide run took its toll.
Away with field, pushed forward but unable to slot in raced 3-wide around front runners without cover throughout, under pressure on turn wide run, took it's toll and weakened in straight.
Slow to begin, ridden up to hold spot behind leader (squeezed passing 1300 M), had run of race from that point, came between horses in the straight and battled away over final 200 M.

Fair to begin, settled in last position on the rails, 8L off lead, spent nothing in run, came 2 wide on turn and made run between horses in straight, finished race of well without fully clear running.
Began awkwardly, ridden up to hold close position, midfield 2 wide between runners 4L from front, travelled fairly throughout had something to offer when checked in straight, game effort.
Broke best, restrained to obtain trail 4th last 2 wide 6L off pace, had good run thereafter, came 4 wide on turn with a strong sprint and only just caught late.
Slowly into stride, settled 3 back on fence 4L from lead, had soft run in middle section, followed paint in straight and made good ground but unable to catch winner.

Slow to begin, restrained to obtain trail in rearward position, settled 2nd last 2-wide 7L from lead, travelled well throughout, made run 3 wide on turn, had field in front at 200 M but overhauled them with a powerful finish.
Away well, showed speed to take up prominent spot outside leader (pace genuine) travelled on bit thereafter, niggled along on turn, lead until 150 M but overhauled later.
Forward of midfield but trapped wide and with no cover throughout. Ran on in straight without posing a threat to principals.
Soon sat 1 out and 1 back behind the leader. Kept on in straight until weakened inside 200 M.
Never far off. Held up at 200 M and again in the closing stages. Not ridden out.
Led to 200 M before weakening badly final 100 M.
Slowly away. At rear. Never seen with a chance.
At back. Made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or worse. Held up at 400 M and again passing 300 M. Ran on final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
In touch in 3rd or 4th position. Ran on final 300 M and hit front 200 M out but could not match speed with the first pair inside 100 M.
Soon midfield but wide and with no cover throughout. Ran on well and took lead 100 M out but just failed to hold off the winner.
Soon dropped behind midfield from wide draw. Widest turning in. Kept finding in straight to snatch victory just before the line.
Very slowly away. Towards rear. Shifted out for running in straight but never looked like a threat.
In touch to 350 M and faded away. (Bled.)
Forward of midfield. Kept on in straight until one-paced inside 100 M.
Raced 3 to 4 wide no cover, about 2Ls back, sound performance.
Settled back in the field, 3 wide in a trailing position about 5Ls away, shifted to the outside on straightening to win well.
Raced midfield about 4Ls back, two wide with cover, held up for some distance approaching and passing the 200 M.
Travelled slightly worse than midfield on the fence about 5Ls back, experienced a little difficulty obtaining a run after the 400 M, disappointing effort.
Last all the way.
Settled at tail 6Ls back in the field along the fence, made up nice ground over latter stages despite over racing early.
Sat outside the leader, About 1L back, beaten horse after the 400 M.
Began awkwardly and was checked shortly after. Raced 6Ls back 1 off with cover. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Settled 3 back on the fence, forced a clear passage after the 400 M, ran on well.
Raced 1 out 1 back, 1 paced to the straight.
Led until the 200 M, tired from that point.
Box-seated, but clipped heels after the 400 M and almost fell. Charged late, held up in the run to the post.
Travelled 3 to 4 deep, midfield about 3Ls away, closed the race off fairly under hands and heels riding.
Began awkwardly and was then taken in across behind runners. Settled about 6Ls back 3 off, made good ground for the run home.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and contended for the early lead. Settled 2-wide and 2 to 3Ls off the pace in 3rd place home turn. Lacked a response when asked and steadily dropped out in the straight.
Slow into stride and raced on fence in a rearward position. Towards the rear on straightening and closed the race off well.
Jumped well from widest draw and dropped to midfield. 3-wide making home turn and never picked up in the straight.
Hit the front at 1300 M. Took a sit at 800 M and kept within 2Ls of the leader in 2nd place making home turn. Kept chasing on straightening but weakened inside final 200 M.
Outpaced early. Settled 3-wide in rear section middle stages. Wide making home turn and ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.

Kept within a length of leader but stayed wide on the track backstraight. Crossed to the fence, took the lead 800 M and held a 3Ls advantage home turn. Maintained a clear lead 200 M, dug in gamely to deny rival at the line.
3-wide behind midfield. 2-wide making home turn. Improved steadily in the straight but ran into some traffic 300 M. Kept on well thereafter.
Tightened at the start, found no speed and settled towards rear. Last to enter home straight and was carried wider on straightening. Made up some ground in the closing stages.
Among leaders early. Better than midfield middle stages and 3-wide making the turn. Weakened on straightening.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the leader making home turn and stayed on well in the straight to make the frame.
On fence and a length off the early leader at 1200 M. Better than midfield and 4Ls off the pace at home turn. Unable to quicken and faded final 200 M.
Checked at the start and trailed field early stages. Remained towards the back and was last few to enter home straight. Made a strong rally in the straight and just failed to catch winner.
Botched the start but was niggled forward to be on fence at Midfield. Remained on the rails making the turn and was 5 to 6Ls down on straightening. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Broke slowly with head up, 7Ls behind lead in 10th at 800 M, under pressure entering stretch when 5Ls back in 10th, never on terms.
Pressed on 3-wide no cover down backstretch to be 1L off pace and 2-wide at 800 M, all out to maintain prominent position at home turn but steadied when giving ground at 300 M, eased late.
Over-raced early on, between 2Ls and 3Ls down in 4th from 800 M to home turn, all out at 200 M when more than 2Ls down in 5th, faded late.
Always worse than midfield, no better than 6Ls or 7Ls off speed until home turn, made some minor late ground past beaten rivals.
Slightly worse than midfield about 6Ls off the speed until home straight, one-paced on the run-in.
Slowest away by 2Ls, 10Ls last 800 M, marginally closer turning for home but still last, stayed there.
Bumped at start, in midfield about 5Ls off speed down the back, 3-wide no cover on circle and 4-wide into homestretch when 4Ls down still in mid-division, always held by principals.
3-back on fence within 3Ls of the pace in 5th or so through to final turn, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no chance with winner but stayed on best of remainder for 2nd.
On fence in midfield about 4Ls off the speed until the 600 M, closer 2Ls behind when steadied in 6th on final turn, over 1L down and disputing 3rd at 200 M, no extra thereafter.
With cover between 3Ls and 4Ls off pace in 6th from 800 M to home turn when under pressure and 3-wide, headway to be 2Ls down disputing 3rd at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort, one-paced late.
Led by 1L on fence at 800 M, same margin clear off home turn, quickened away under minimal pressure inside final 200 M, impressive.
Keen when about 8Ls off pace and 3-wide no cover in rear at 1000 M, gained cover on circle and about 6Ls down towards rear into home straight, no impression.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off the speed until home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M and close enough if good enough, quickly outpaced by winner and lost 2nd close home.
Always towards rear and never closer than 7Ls to the speed until home bend, no danger.
5-wide no cover in rear at 900 M when 8Ls last, 4-wide (widest of all) on straightening when 6Ls down in 11th, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 1L off speed in 2nd at 1000 M, hung out a little on straightening in 2nd, held a brief and marginal lead at 300 M before being headed by winner over 200 M out, soon swamped.
Always niggled along in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to home straight, headway to be 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
In rear bunch 7Ls off pace at 800 M when 3-wide with cover, improved on circle to be 4Ls down in midfield at home turn, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, ran on well for 2nd, winner was much too strong.
Led on fence by about 1L at 1000 M, still clear at home turn, headed 300 M, faded steadily.
Keen at 800 M when 5Ls off pace in 8th, disappointed for running entering home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, never troubled leaders from then on.
Lost ground at start with head up, 8Ls off pace in rear on fence at 800 M, 7Ls last on straightening, made no impression.
3-wide no cover at 800 M when over 2Ls back in 4th, similarly placed off home turn, soon retreated.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until the home straight, held up until around 200 M and disappointed when trying to shift into clear running, place chance soon gone, luckless.
Awkward break, 7Ls off speed towards rear at 800 M, same entering home straight, never competitive.
Crowded and steadied at start, towards rear and 8Ls off pace at 800 M, 5Ls back in 10th at final bend, steadied at 200 M when 4Ls down, short of room and not fully tested late.
Steadied at start, covered up in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed through to home turn, tried to challenge when 2Ls down in 5th or so at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Always a little worse than midfield, 6Ls down in 9th at 800 M, shuffled back further on turning for home, never dangerous.
Always travelled well, 2-wide and 3Ls off the speed in 5th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th at final bend, picked up well to lead over 200 M out, pushed out, comfortably.
Checked after being hampered at start. Remained towards rear whilst racing wide and with no cover. Never a factor.
Checked after being hampered at start. At rear. Got carried extremely wide whilst hanging out turning in. Never a threat.
Checked shortly after start. Towards rear. Checked at 800 M and steadied at 600 M. Not a threat in straight.
Midfield or better. Kept on in straight without threatening principals.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Ridden forward and took lead from 1000 M. Headed 50 M out and lost 2nd just before the line.
Checked shortly after start. Towards rear. Hampered at 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Soon towards rear. Steadied whilst proving difficult to settle at 800 M. Started to hang out and went wide rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
In touch. Badly unbalanced after bumping with another runner at 800 M and dropped to midfield. Not a threat in straight.
Led to 1000 M. 3rd from 800 M after shifting out on the turn. Kept on well in straight to grab 2nd just before the line despite hanging out and proving difficult to ride final 200 M.
Towards rear early whilst proving difficult to settle. Heading on the outside rounding home bend to 4th turning in. Kept on in straight despite laying in.
Went forward from wide draw. 2nd from 850 M. Ran on well in straight despite hanging in and took command 50 M out.
Shifted out abruptly and lost considerable ground at start. Proved difficult to settle. Checked at 800 M. Never a factor.
4th or 5th from 1000 M. Unbalanced and lost ground at 800 M. Held up at 400 M. Ran on final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in closing stages.
Always well back and never seen with a chance.
Always well there. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M. Hung on well under pressure to the line.
Never far off. Held every chance 200 M out. Unable to peg back winner throughout closing stages.
Midfield to halfway. Weakened. (Mucus.)
Well there, with rails run, to 200 M. No extra.
Broke well. Held narrow lead in the centre of the track to 300 M. Weakened under pressure.
Mainly in midfield throughout. Kept on steadily under pressure in closing stages.
Settled at the back. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Never better than midfield.
Slowly away, ridden up to obtain closer position, raced midfield 3 wide 5Ls from lead, had cover thereafter, came 4 wide on turn and made strong run in straight only to be just collared.
Away fairly, trapped wide and failed to settle so sent forward to take up lead, pace good thereafter, tackled approaching 350 M and gradually weakened out of it due to early effort.
Away with them, settled just off pace midfield on rails, drifted back to 4th last 7Ls off front, followed paint in straight, tried hard but could only manage to hold ground.
Broke with them, taken back from awkward gate, settled 3rd last 3 wide 6Ls from pace, 4 wide from 700 M and came 6 wide on turn, made good ground in straight to make frame.
Broke well, restrained from awkward gate, caught 3 and 4 wide without cover 4Ls from lead, rolled forward 5 wide on turn but had run took its roll and was unable to finish race off.
Began with them, drifted back to settle 2nd last 7Ls from lead 3 wide, had cover throughout, tracked into race nicely behind favourite, came with well timed run passing 250 M and hit front on line.
Slow to begin, hard ridden to take up forward spot, settled 5th 2 wide with cover 4Ls from lead, over-raced in middle stages, held up early in straight but only battled away when clear.
Away well, contested early lead, eventually settled outside leader 2Ls off lead, came 3 wide on turn and battled it out for most of straight before overtaken late.
Jumped best, showed early speed to cross to rail, raced 3 back on fence 3Ls off lead thereafter, spent nothing to turn, gained split passing 250 M but lacked dash to make an impact.
Slow to begin, mustered speed to take up position 4 back on fence 5Ls from front-runners, enjoyed run of race thereafter. Tried hard in straight but unable to match placegetters.
Average to begin, taken back from awkward gate, settled last 2 wide 8ls from lead, travelled fairly throughout, couldn't make ground on them in straight.
Broke with field, ridden along in early stages, positioned midfield 2 wide 4Ls from front-runners, under pressure on turn, battled steadily to finish.
Broke well, showed good gate speed to take up running early on, raced behind leader for mid-section and eased 2 wide on turn, sprinted well over final 200 M but overpowered by first two.
Away with them, rolled forward early, travelled 3 wide without cover 3Ls off lead throughout, pushed along from top of straight when 4 wide, condition gave out final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Always well there. Ran on steadily inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon dropped to rear. Never nearer.
Prominent to straight. Faded gradually.
Attempted to make all. Narrowly headed passing 300 M but fought on doggedly to regain upper hand on line.
Midfield. Produced some impression closing stages without threatening.
Tracked lead. Quickened to hit front inside 300 M. Fought on under pressure throughout closing stages only to be pipped at post.
Always struggling in last few.
Prominent to 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Raced 3 to 4 wide in close-up 4th early. Dropped to midfield home bend. Dropped further back upon straightening. (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Mainly in rear of midfield. Produced good late impression under pressure inside final 200 M.
Mainly in midfield. Produced some late impression under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled in last few. Made modest headway under pressure passing beaten horses closing stages.
Showed good early speed to hold prominent spot behind leaders, travelled 3rd throughout, eased 3 wide in straight but couldn't sprint over final 200 M.
Away until them, raced 3 back on fence 6Ls off lead, under pressure on turn and followed fence in straight, failed to respond when pressured, wasn't ridden out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden hard to take up early lead, pressured throughout at fast speed, lead until 300 M but couldn't sustain effort and weakened due to early workload.
Away with them, taken back from wide alley to settle 3rd last 12Ls from front-runners, eased 3 wide entering straight and made up good ground over concluding stages.
Missed start by 10Ls, raced in 2 last position thereafter, 15Ls from lead followed paint into straight but raced very one paced to line.
Jumped with them, settled midfield on rails 8Ls from leaders, had good trip thereafter, followed paint to turn and made up some ground between horses in straight without threatening winner.
Slow to begin and lost 10Ls at start, travelled in last position thereafter, hard ridden on turn and passed a few tiring runners late.
Began awkwardly and nearly fell, lost considerable ground raced in 3rd last position on rails 14Ls from lead, came 2 wide on turn and made a little late ground from impossible position.
Slowly away, settled 4th from rear on rails, 11Ls off pace, eased 2 wide in straight but only plugged away.
Jumped with them, showed good early speed to contest lead, raced outside leader throughout at fast speed, in it to 350 M but weakened after early turn.
Broke best, restrained from speed battle to settle midfield in 8th position 2 wide 9Ls from pace, tracked eventual winner into race and challenged strongly but outclassed on day.
Began with them, drifted back with fast early speed to be in rearward division 11Ls from pace, made good ground in straight chasing gamely.
Broke well, urged along to go forward, settled behind pace and drifted back to be 6th 2 wide 8Ls from speed, came with strong run in straight to overhaul leaders and score well.
Bounced from gates, restrained from early speed battle, travelled 5th 2 wide 6 to 7Ls from pace, challenged 4 wide at 300 M but lacked turn of foot to hold off placegetters.
Soon midfield. Kept on in straight without threatening and inclined to lay out under pressure.
Soon led. Headed 100 M out. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Mainly forward of midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Hampered at start. Towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Led briefly before settling in 3rd place. Ran on in straight but could not match speed with the first pair inside 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Never a factor.
Soon 2nd and found rail at 700 M. Responded well final 200 M and took command 100 M out.
Soon at back. Never a factor.
Soon dropped behind midfield or worse from wide draw. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon behind midfield but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Never a threat.
Hampered at start. Headway from 800 M to 4th rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away but soon moved up along rail to midfield or worse. Unbalanced at 800 M. Unable to quicken in straight whilst laying in under pressure.
Settled 1 off and 2L away, moved forward passing the 700 M to be just behind the leaders, had to come 3 wide on straightening, finished off strongly.
Handy early just behind the leaders, gave ground after the 700 M, never competitive.
From outside barrier was immediately steadied and taken in across the field, settled 1 off with cover about 6L back, went wide on straightening, finished soundly.
Positioned 2nd last 1 off, about 7L back, went to the outside of the field at turning for home, made moderate ground, last 200 M, inclined to shift ground.
Settled in last position on the fence about 7L away, worked to line well, steadied near the 150 M.
Caught 3 wide just off the speed early, no cover, went forward after the 1200 M to sit outside of the leader, tired in the straight.
1 out 1 back early, box seated after the 700 M and railed up for solid win.
Midfield at the 800 M, 1 off, 4L back, worked home well, without much room to manoeuvre.
Raced along the rail 6L back, made up a few lengths in the straight.
1 off, 4L back, did nothing at the business end.
Led early, pressured after the 1200 M, weakened in the straight.
Midfield along the rails, 3L back ran on fairly.
Jumped well from widest draw and raced among leaders. 2-wide in a disputed lead from 700 M onwards. Unable to keep pace on straightening and weakened inside final 200 M.
Outpaced by early leaders and settled 2-wide at midfield. Swung out on straightening and only kept same pace in the straight.

Niggled early stages to race in a forward position. Settled prominently behind the leaders in back straight and home turn. Kept on well on straightening and took the lead briefly 100 M. Failed to hold off winner closing stages.
Outpaced and trailed field until straightening. Only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
3-wide without cover and no worse than midfield. 4Ls off the pace at 600 M and pressured to keep up at home turn. Weakened in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and dropped to a rearward position from wide draw. Remained towards the rear and swung widest on straightening. Made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
On fence and no better than midfield. Hugged the rails making home bend. Quickened 200 M and claimed a minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly. Niggled along early stages and raced 2-wide behind midfield. Checked off heels and shuffled back before straightening. Made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Eased towards midfield and settled nicely. Kept along the rails making home turn and switched out on straightening. Quickened well when in the clear and took charge final 100 M.
Best out and contested for the early lead. Raced 2-wide behind the pace back straight. Ridden to keep up at home turn and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Outpaced and raced along the rails in rear section. Made a ground saving trip rounding home bend and improved steadily in the straight.

Held a narrow advantage early stages. Disputed lead from 700 M until straightening. Shook off co-leader on straightening and had a length's advantage near 200 M. Faded final 100 M and narrowly missed a minor placing.
8Ls off speed in 9th at 1100 M, headway out wide from 500 M to be 4Ls back in 8th taking home turn, ran on only fairly down centre of the track.
7Ls back in 8th on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls behind but still towards rear on straightening, always well held.
3-wide no cover 1300 M out, got in 2-wide 3Ls behind in 3rd at 1100 M, closer 1L down in 2nd at final bend, stayed on fairly well but always held by winner.
Switched from widest gate to race 10Ls last at 1200 M, 6Ls last turning for home, tended to hang in but never troubled leaders. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, set slow tempo and same margin clear until home straight when kicking on, had just enough in reserve to hang on.
Best away but handed up the lead at 1200 M to sit 2Ls 2nd on fence at 1100 M, over 1L back in 3rd turning for home, failed to quicken up.
Over-raced a little when 5Ls off speed in 6th at 1100 M, unbalanced at 500 M, 3Ls down and 4-wide in midfield on straightening, made up ground running on strongly, post came too soon.
5Ls off pace when 2-wide in 5th at 1100 M, about 2Ls down in 5th taking home turn, faded out rapidly. (Mucus.)
Crowded at start, 9Ls off pace in 10th at 1100 M, 5Ls down in 10th at final bend, never on terms.
6Ls back in 7th when 2-wide at 1100 M, pushed out 4-wide to challenge at 500 M and just 2Ls down into home straight, kept on at same pace.
Keen early when 3Ls off speed in 4th at 1100 M, 2Ls back in 6th on straightening, headway to be over 1L back in 2nd at final bend, kept finding but couldn't poke head in front.
On fence 5Ls down in 7th at 1100 M, 4Ls back worse than midfield on fence into home straight, outpaced by principals and bumped when short of room at 150 M.
3Ls back in 5th on fence at 1100 M, similarly placed turning for home, every chance leading narrowly at 200 M, headed soon after, lost a place final strides.
Out 2-wide a neck down in 2nd at 1200 M, lost position about 500 M out, dropped out markedly from top of home straight.
Always 3-wide no cover, out wide in 3rd when 2Ls off speed at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 2nd at final bend, all out to be within a neck of the lead at 200 M, weakened sharply thereafter.
5Ls down when 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, 4Ls back in midfield entering home straight, 2Ls down in mid-division when bumped and unbalanced at 150 M, no extra.
Led by a neck on fence at 1100 M, over 1L clear taking home turn, headed at 200 M and weakened out.
Coldly ridden 10Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, bumped when 3-wide and 6Ls down in 11th heading for home, ran on very strongly, failed only narrowly.
2Ls behind in 4th when 2-wide at 1100 M, still prominently placed turning for home and a neck down in 4th at 200 M, petered out inside final 100 M.
6Ls back in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 4-wide turning for home when over 2Ls down in 3rd entering homestretch, led at 150 M, tipped out by winner close home.
Slowest away losing at least 2Ls on field, 10Ls last on fence at 1200 M, never a factor.
In 10th place about 8Ls back at 1200 M, crept closer when 3-wide at 500 M to be 4-wide and 4Ls down in 9th on straightening, ran on strongly to lead final strides down centre of track.
8Ls down in 9th on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 10th taking final bend, ran on fairly to be nearest at the finish.

In touch early but refused to settle going down the straight the first time. 5th behind tearaway leaders along back straight until home bend. Shifted out for running upon straightening and won unchallenged final 200 M.
Soon behind the leaders. 3rd behind tearaway leader along back straight. Kept on in straight and held on for a distant 2nd.
Behind midfield or worse. Checked at 1600 M. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Steadied at 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear and inclined to lay in whilst being trapped wide and without cover most the way. Made no impression in straight.
Soon thereabout. Checked at 1600 M. 4th behind tearaway leader along back straight. Kept on in straight but got passed easily by the winner 200 M out and was always held by 2nd horse.
2nd passing winning post 1st time. Took lead at 1000 M and built up a big lead with early leader along back straight. Folded 250 M out. (Blowing heavily, see Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Saved ground on the inside turning in. Ran on a little before finishing one-paced inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Headway from 700 M to midfield rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
At rear. Not a threat in straight.
Soon led. Headed at 1000 M but went with the leader and left the field behind down the back straight. Re-gained lead upon straightening but nothing left 200 M from home.
Behind midfield. Towards rear turning in. Never a threat in straight.
Gradually crossed from poor draw to settle outside leader before stable bend. Held 4th 2Ls back far side. Similar position turning in but kept on without quickening under pressure.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend and switched wide to challenge from midfield into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Slightly held up after straightening. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M without threatening.
Settled in last. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled at the back. Made up some late ground under pressure on inner of home straight.
Settled behind midfield. Failed to quicken to challenge in straight.
Led field to straight. Gradually weakened. (Mucus.)
Well there. Gained narrow advantage upon straightening, but unable to sustain effort and swamped passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield on rails. Shaken up upon straightening. Established 2Ls break over 200 M out and hung on well to the line.
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Fairly away, ridden up to hold forward spot, travelled 2 wide with cover 5L from lead, had good run between horses thereafter, eased wide in straight and chased strongly but tired final 100 M.
Jumped with them, showed early speed to go forward and take up prominent spot, raced 2 wide without cover 3L off lead, carted field up to lead and fought strongly to go down narrowly.
Showed good early toe, took up running after 400 M, lead thereafter at good clip, pinched 4L lead down side lead until well into straight and headed only in shadows of post.
Slow to begin, taken straight back to fence, raced in last position 8 to 10L of lead throughout, couldn't keep up on turn and made no ground in straight.
Slowly away, drifted back to be 2nd last 2 wide 7L off front, had easy time through middle stages, travelled well to turn, eased wide in straight and closed steadily without threatening winner.
Began with them, ridden up to take up closer position, unable to slot in, trapped 3 wide 6L of lead with cover, tracked into race nicely, put in gallant effort to close in straight.
Showed good early speed to take up running, restrained to take trail behind leader, overraced thereafter and never fully comfortable, commenced to give ground on turn and weakened right out.
Broke with them, trapped wide from awkward gate, travelled 3 wide without cover for majority of journey, wide took its toll and only plugged home.
Fairly away, settled back on fence, shuffled back to 4 back 6L off lead, had soft run throughout, eased 2 wide on turn and came with strong run in straight to overhaul leaders.
Fairly away, ridden up to hold midfield position, raced 2 wide 6L from lead just worse than midfield, offered little when asked for effort in straight.
Broke best, taken straight to fence, obtained ideal trailing position 3 back on fence 3L off lead, had run of race, held ground in straight lacking the required dash to figure in finish.
Slowly away, drifted back to 2nd last on rails 7L off lead, had fair run throughout, followed paint in straight and battled away after passing tired runners.
Ridden along early to be in touch. One-paced in straight whilst hanging in and became unbalanced when being shifted out 100 M from home.
Never far off but trapped wide and with no cover. Kept on in straight until weakened 200 M out.
Around midfield. Hung in upon straightening and steadied off heels near 300 M. Made up a little late ground.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Dropped to the back from wide draw. Steadied and shifted out when commencing to close off the race at 300 M. Ran on but simply had too much to do.
Led to 1000 M before settling in 2nd or 3rd place. Ran on well in straight but looked 2nd all the way.
In touch early before dropping back to midfield or better than 800 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Took lead from 1000 M. Kept on strongly to win unchallenged.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Hung out from 800 M and proved difficult to ride. Never a threat.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. Made up a little late ground.
Never far off. Steadied and shifted out upon straightening. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Slowly away but soon recovered to be in touch whilst racing wide with no cover and greenly. 2nd or 3rd from 800 M. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Positioned well back, saved ground along the fence, held up early in straight, ran on late.
Box seated until the home turn, rushed through runners on straightening and went to the line strongly.
Slightly worse than midfield, about 5Ls back, on the fence, held up for a considerable distance after running for home, made some impression.
Positioned last, 1 off with cover, 7Ls back, went to the outside of the field on straightening. Ran on fairly.
Overraced in the middle stages, whilst 1 off with cover, 4-1/2Ls back, found nothing under pressure.
Raced 2Ls back, 3 deep no cover, capitulated over the final 400 M.
Settled third the fence, stayed on strongly to the line after being held up in early straight.
Settled back in a three wide trailing position, 6Ls away worked home without threatening.
Camped just off the speed, 1 deep, had cover, kept on steadily in the run to the post.
Raced wide the entire trip, midfield 4Ls off, never a hope.
Took up midfield, 3 deep with cover, over-raced in the run home.
Raced 3 wide, with cover, 6Ls back, went wide in the straight. Failed to come on the latter stages.
Raced 1 off just behind the leader, did little in the straight.
Led before tiring over the concluding stages.
Eased towards the rear. Clipped heels and nearly fell at 1300 M. Settled in a rearward position until straightening. Made a nice rally to claim a minor placing.
Settled 2-wide behind the leaders. Kept within 3Ls of the pace making home turn. Quickened near 300 M and grabbed the lead 150 M.
Missed the jump and raced at the rear. Trailed field into the home straight. Rallied and was closest at finish.
Led or disputed lead until 1000 M. Kept a length's advantage making the turn and maintained the lead until being swamped inside final 200 M.
Better than midfield. On fence and 4Ls off the leader making the turn. Got no clear run early straight and was switched out near 300 M. Only stayed on same pace.
Outpaced by front-runners early stages. Settled 3-wide and no worse than midfield until home straight. Kept on in the straight to make the frame.

Crowded on jumping and then settled behind midfield. Saved ground along the rails home turn but was awkwardly placed for some distance after straightening. Rallied between rivals but failed to catch winner.
Jumped well from widest draw and dropped steadily to a rearward position but 3-wide. Widest turning for home. Quickened at 300 M but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Raced in a forward position. Kept alongside the leader after 1000 M. 2-wide and a length off the lead home turn. Failed to keep up on straightening and weakened final 200 M.
Settled wide at midfield. Remained near midfield and was 2-wide making the turn. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Caught wide among leaders early. Remained 3-wide without cover and 2Ls off the pace making the turn. Kept on briefly on straightening but weakened final 300 M.
On fence in rear section. Remained towards the rear on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Settled on fence and stayed within 2Ls of the leader until home straight. Contested for the lead near 200 M but found no extra to keep in contention final stages.
Best out but soon outpaced. Settled in a 2-wide spot behind midfield. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Worse than midfield and 2-wide and about 5Ls off pace through first half, over 4Ls back in 10th at final bend when held up for a run, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, no extra late.
Led on fence at 1400 M, disputing lead at 800 M but a neck ahead at 400 M, headed 300 M out and fell away rapidly.
6Ls behind in rear bunch at 1400 M, still a fair behind and bumped out wide turning for home, never on terms. (Bled.)
Tended to hang out, 3-wide no cover in 3rd when 2Ls down in 3rd at 1600 M, sent on to dispute lead out 2-wide from 800 M to homestretch, still there at 200 M, faded close home.
3-wide with cover outside winner in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls back until home turn, with place chances when staying on over 1L down at 200 M, didn't follow through.
Keen early on but got in 2-wide 3Ls off pace at 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd taking home bend, led at 300 M but headed at 150 M out, did enough for a place.
Awkward break, ridden to lie up 4-back on fence 5Ls back in midfield at 1200 M, similarly placed entering stretch, over 2Ls down in midfield at 200 M, always held by principals.
4Ls back in midfield on fence at 1400 M, over 3Ls down in 6th at top of home turn, never threatened and weakened markedly in final 100 M.
7Ls last on fence at 1400 M, 6Ls down in 12th off home turn when shifting out, bumped at 300 M, never troubled leaders.
Always without cover at least 3-wide, 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, still close up entering straight but all out at 200 M to stay within 2Ls of the lead, faded late.
3-wide with cover when 7Ls back in 11th early on, 4-wide on straightening when 4Ls down in 9th, 2Ls down in 6th or so at 200 M, stayed on at just the one pace.
Covered up 2-wide in midfield about 4Ls off pace down backstretch, marginally closer turning for home but picked up well to lead 150 M out, always in command from then on.
Never going, always in rear about 7Ls last down backstretch, beaten a long way out.
Over-raced early on when 2Ls off pace in 2nd, well placed on fence over 2Ls back in 4th from 1200 M to home turn, dropped out tamely from top of stretch.
Away well but shuffled back to midfield 4Ls off speed at 1000 M, left 3-wide no cover on circle and 4-wide on straightening when 2Ls down in 3rd, lost a place inside final 50 M.
3Ls behind when 2-wide in 4th at 800 M, struggling to lie up entering home turn, soon well behind.
Worse than midfield on fence about 5Ls off speed until home turn when short of room, hemmed in on fence and got no clear run, not fully tested.
Pressed on to lead on fence by a neck at 900 M, 1L to the good entering home straight, headed at 300 M, entitled to fold completely but hung on quite dourly.
Settled 8Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, about 6Ls behind off final bend when held up, found all kinds of trouble inside at 200 M, switched out wider but too late, unlucky not to get closer.
A neck behind in 2nd out 2-wide at 1000 M, 1L down and sharing 3rd when all out taking home turn, gone at 300 M.
Always worse than midfield at least 5Ls off speed through to homestretch, never on terms with leaders.
3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, under pressure when 3Ls down in 5th taking home turn, 2Ls back in 4th at 200 M, no chance with winner but still stayed on well for 2nd.
Ridden to lead but headed 1000 M out and settled 2Ls off speed in 3rd or so until the 500 M, 1L down in 2nd at final bend, led at 300 M, pulled clear, comfortably.
Towards rear about 7Ls behind at 1000 M, briefly hindered and forced 5-wide no cover at 800 M, gained some cover on circle and 3Ls down in mid-division at 400 M and 200 M, no extra late.
Slow away, in last about 9Ls last at 1000 M, posed no kind of threat.
No better than 5Ls or 6Ls off the front at any stage, hindered and briefly forced wider at 800 M, always outpaced in stretch.
Slowest away, towards rear 8Ls off speed at 1000 M, a little closer turning for home, made some fair late ground through beaten rivals, nearest at finish.
Midfield or better about 3Ls or 4Ls behind when 2-wide until homestretch, ran on fairly well for 3rd place.
At rear. Steadied at 300 M. Made up a little late ground.
Midfield or worse. Trapped wide turning in. Kept on one-paced in straight. (Blood - see Racing Incidents.)
Soon 4th but trapped wide and with no cover throughout. Kept on in straight until finding no extra final 50 M.
Soon midfield or better but trapped wide and with no cover throughout. Carried wider rounding home turn. Ran on well in straight to feature in a tight finish.
Led to 250 M. Headed badly inside 100 M.
In touch early. Crowded at 1200 M and dropped back a little whilst proving difficult to settle. Held up twice after straightening. Ran on but only managed 3rd in a tight finish.
At rear. Made up good ground final 250 M to just miss a place.
Towards rear. Kept on in straight but had difficulty in obtaining clear running final 200 M.
Soon 1 out and 1 back off the leader. Took lead 250 M out. Kept on well but got pipped right on the line.
Midfield. Took closer order along rail rounding home bend. Kept on until finding no extra inside 100 M.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Kept on to be nearest at finish despite having to steady at 200 M.
Soon towards rear. Steadied at 1200 M and again at 600 M. Kept on in straight to be nearest at finish after having to shift out for running near 300 M.
Soon 3rd. Held up from 400 M to 200 M. Ran on but unable to quicken final 50 M.
Soon midfield. Hung out rounding home turn. Ran on determinedly in straight to snatch victory right on the line.
Settled just beind midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Sluggish at start. Remained well back until running past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled in midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Finished off race well inside final 250 M to just fail to get up on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led field to about 350 M. Faded gradually.
Raced keenly in midfield on rails. Took closer order turning in. Gradually faded from some 2Ls 4th into straight.
Settled towards rear. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Well there. Hit front about 350 M out. Just held off runner-up's late surge closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Prominent to straight. Soon weakened.
Never nearer.
Mainly 4-wide in midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Joint 3rd when some 2Ls back turning in. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Fair to begin, restrained to take trail, settled 5th from rear, 2 wide 9Ls off lead, made run 3 to 4 wide in straight, made steady progress in the straight, given too greater task.
Away with them, couldn't go early speed and settled 7th midfield 6Ls off lead, came 3 wide from 800 M and 4 wide into straight, kept trying in straight, solid effort.
Fair to begin, settled 2nd last 10Ls off lead. Made 3 wide run on turn and came 5 wide into straight, chased gamely in straight giving too greater start.
Broke well, showed good early speed to cross outside leader from widest gate, had even run thereafter and travelled well to turn, kept trying in straight but found winner too good.
Broke well, showed good early speed to take up running, kept going at a solid speed, tackled passing 300 M and couldn't go with them, missed place late.
Away with them, no early toe, settled midfield on rails 6 to 7Ls off lead, followed paint into straight, lacked turn of foot to make ground and could only held position at same pace.
Slowly away, travelled in rearward position 4 back on fence 9Ls from lead, had reasonable run in mid-section, made run between horses in straight and couldn't make real progress late.
Fair to begin, raced a touch worse than midfield, 2 wide 7 to 8Ls off lead, had fair trip in middle stages, made run between horses in straight but was one paced to line.
Reared at start and lost ground, raced in last place on rails 12Ls off lead throughout mid-section, had field in front on home turn and made some ground widest in straight.
Slow to begin, settled 3rd last 11Ls off lead on rails, did no work in mid-section, held up entering straight but showed nothing when clear.

Away with them, restrained from early speed battle when unable to cross, travelled in 5th position 2 wide 3 to 4Ls off lead, tracked eventual winner in straight but unable to quicken and merely held ground.
Began with them, restrained from awkward draw, trapped while midfield 7 to 8Ls off lead, clipped heels at 800 M, proved difficult to settle thereafter, early effort told and was one paced in stretch.
Broke well, ridden up to hold forward spot, raced behind leader thereafter, had good trip to turn, stuck to paint and made steady ground in straight without 100% clear running in final 200 M.
Broke well, showed solid speed to take up prominent spot 4th 1 out 1 back 2Ls off lead, enjoyed dream run, always travelling and eased out in straight and dashed passed them easily. Easy win.
Raced wide in midfield throughout. Ran home one pace.
Mainly 3-wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled at the back. Produced good late finish past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Made running to straight when narrowly headed turning in. Weakened passing 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Made short-lived effort early in straight but unable to sustain headway final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out quickly.
Never far off in forward of midfield. Moved closer to be 3rd some 1L back turning in. Fought on doggedly but unable to draw level throughout closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Prominent to straight. Soon dropped out.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced outisde leader. Gained slender lead upon straightening. Came under pressure to maintain advantage over 250 M out but soon swamped.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Made up some late ground.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on well to assert authority 100 M out.
Settled in last few. Improving well when hampered passing 200 M where too late from recovering.
Slowly away, raced 4th last 2 wide 10Ls from lead, made some ground to turn but unable to sustain effort and didn't finish race off.

Broke with them, caught wide and refused to settle, passing the 500 M went forward to take up lead, led thereafter at even clip, pinched break in straight and showed good fight to keep going after early work.
Taken back from outside gate, raced well back in 2nd last 12Ls off pace, followed fence thereafter but only battled away in stretch.
Began well, raced 3 back on fence in early part but shuffled back to 6th on fence 7Ls from lead, had soft run in mid-section, stuck on well in straight.
Slow to begin, raced worse than midfield 5 back on fence 8Ls from lead, had easy run thereafter, lacked usual fast finish in concluding stages.
Fairly away, restrained to rearward position, raced in last spot 2 wide 12Ls from lead, made wide run on turn but couldn't make up enough ground.
Fastest into stride and crossed to lead early, handed up passing 1500 M, enjoyed good trail behind leader thereafter, eased 2 wide in straight and could only manage to hold ground.
Lost ground at start, ridden up to hold spot behind early leader, raced 3 back on fence in mid-section 4Ls off lead, followed paint into straight and battled fairly without looking winner.
Average to begin, raced in 3rd last position on fence 11Ls from lead, eased wide in straight but made no impression.
Showed early speed to take up position outside leader, travelled 2 wide without cover 4Ls off lead, came 3 wide on turn and challenged strongly but overhauled late.
Away fairly settled in rearward spot 8Ls from lead, made run 5 wide on turn and tried hard in straight without threatening winner (shifted out near 50 M mark).

Jumped with them, restrained to take trail 4 back on fence, travelled 2 wide midfield 7Ls off lead thereafter had good run to turn, made 4 wide run and looked the winner but just couldn't maintain effort.

Away with them, ridden forward from widest gate, slotted into prime position 1 out 1 back 5Ls off lead, had run of race thereafter eased out in straight and showed good dash to overhaul leaders and score well.
Led to 850 M before settling in 3rd place. Kept on in straight only to loose 2nd close home.
Ridden forward and led from 850 M. Kept on well in straight to win quite comfortably.
In touch early. Steadied at 600 M and dropped behind midfield. Held up upon straightening and had to shift out before making ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Crowded at start. Never in the hunt.
Soon 2nd. Lay in and brushed rail at 600 M. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Towards rear. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Hard ridden to maintain a forward position. Steadied at 700 M and dropped to forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground.
Crowded at start. Mainly towards rear. Made up a good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon midfield. Steadied at 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away. Always at rear. Never a factor.
Slowly away but moved up quickly to be behind the pace from 800 M. Steadied and shifted out at 600 M and again upon straightening. Ran on and grabed 2nd close home.
Settled worse than midfield, along the fence 5L back, ran on strongly, checked near home.
Towards the rear, on the fence 6L off the leader, made some impression in the last 200 M.
From wide gate, overraced when attempting to find cover, allowed to stride forward and race outside the lead near the 700 M, ran home only fairly.
Settled in a rearward spot, 4L back, 3 deep with cover, ran on well.
Began awkwardly and settled further back than expected, about 3-1/2 back, 1 off with cover, somewhat flat in the straight.
Raced 1 out, 1 back near the 800 M, after racing 3 deep early, found little in the run home.
Missed the start, and settled last, clipped heels and blundered near 800 M. Closed the race off well.
Raced at the back of the leader, finished off well under strong pressure.
Led until the shadows of the post where overhauled.
Midfield, 1 off with cover, 4L back, never a factor.
Settled midfield on the fence, 4L away struggled before the home turn.
Last throughout, passed some tired runners over the last 200 M.
Taken back from a wide draw. Raced on the fence in rear section back straight. Hugged the rails making home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Switched out on straightening and quickened nicely. Kept chasing in the closing stages and gunned down rival at the line.
Niggled early and then settled on fence at midfield. Kept pace but unable to make up ground in the straight.
Niggled to take the lead. Took a length's advantage into home straight. Kept on well despite hanging out in the final stages. Caught at the line.
Eased back from widest draw and trailed field early stages. Remained in a rearward position in back straight and on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners.
Ridden along early stages to be in a forward position. Raced on fence and kept within 3Ls of the leader in 3rd place back straight. Stayed on well in the straight and fell short in a close finish.
Jumped awkwardly and crowded shortly after. Towards the rear early stages and trailed field in back straight. Last to enter home straight, found nothing and finished tailed out.
Ridden out of the gates from wide draw and was caught wide behind the pace into 1st turn. Tracked leader in a 2-wide spot in back straight and was a length off into home straight. Weakened quickly.
Settled 2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Unable to quicken when asked on straightening.
Outpaced by frontrunners and settled 3-wide without cover at midfield. Remained 3-wide against the breeze until home straight and weakened thereafter.
4Ls behind in 5th on fence at 1100 M, 3Ls back in 5th taking final bend when steadied, one-paced on the run-in.
Awkward break, keen 3-wide no cover at 1200 M when 3Ls back in 4th, gained cover 2-wide at 900 M, 2Ls down in 4th into straight, finished tamely while hanging out badly.
4Ls behind in 6th when 2-wide at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 6th at final bend, switched out and picked up well to lead at 150 M driven out.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, a neck 2nd at 600 M, led at top of stretch until being headed about 150 M out, faded.
Soon led on fence, 2Ls clear at 1100 M, a neck clear at 600 M, headed at top of stretch, soon dropped away.
5Ls down in 7th on fence at 1100 M, 4-back on fence and 4Ls behind on straightening when steadied and switched inside to challenge, always outpaced by winner.
No cover early but got in 2-wide when 5Ls behind in 8th at 1100 M, under pressure at 500 M and 5Ls down on straightening, plugged on at the one pace.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, settled into box-seat run on fence 2Ls back in 3rd from 1000 M to home turn, never likely to tackle quinella pair.
Awkward break losing ground, 9Ls behind in 11th at 1200 M, checked when 8Ls last entering straight, never on terms. (Lame.)
Slowest away, 9Ls last at 1200 M, tried to improve out 3-wide no cover down the back, 8Ls down in 11th into home straight, found nothing, tailed off.
In 9th place when 7Ls off speed on fence at 1200 M, similarly placed on straightening, very one-paced.
In 9th place about 7Ls off speed and 2-wide or so from 1200 M to home turn, made some minor late headway out wide.
4Ls back in 6th on fence at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 4th taking home turn, stayed on fairly well to take 3rd inside final strides.
Bumped at start losing ground, 7Ls down in 9th on fence at 1100 M, 6Ls pack in midfield entering straight, moderate late headway, nearest at finish.
Crowded at start, 8Ls down in 10th when 2-wide at 1100 M, not much better off turning for home, tended to hang out under pressure, never dangerous.
Couldn't lead and tended to over-race, 4Ls down when 2-wide in 5th at 1200 M, held up entering straight when 6Ls down in mid-division, posed no threat thereafter.
Half a length 2nd at 1200 M out 2-wide, 1L down in 2nd off final bend, all out to be a neck 2nd at 200 M, lost out on a place close home.
Tended to over-race, 6Ls behind in 8th when 2-wide at 1100 M and same turning for home, still well behind when steadied at 250 M, made some nice late ground, never nearer.
Soon led on fence, about half a length or a length clear on fence until home turn, stayed on gamely but all out when collared by winner inside final 50 M.
9Ls down in 11th on fence at 1200 M, 8Ls down on straightening, made some minor late ground but never a threat.
Over-raced when 3-wide no cover 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 1100 M, got in 2-wide at 500 M but struggling to lie up with pace, gave ground from top of stretch, finished tailed off.
Had the run of the race 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed in 3rd or 4th until home turn, took a while to fully pick up but finally asserted inside final 50 M.
Didn't break well, 10Ls last and 2-wide at 1200 M, 9Ls down in rear entering straight, never got involved.
4Ls off speed when 3-wide with cover at 1100 M, 3-wide no cover at 500 M when 6Ls behind in 6th, 5-wide (widest of all) taking home corner, faded out.
Soon sat behind the pace. Responded well final 250 M to score an early victory.
In touch early. Trapped wide rounding 1st turn and dropped back to midfield. No response upon straightening and eased down 200 M out.
In touch. Kept on one-paced in straight.
At rear. Made up some ground inside 200 M before having to steady 50 M out.
Midfield. Ran on a bit upon straightening but unable to quicken inside 200 M.
Led from 1200 M. Headed upon straightening and dropped right out of contention inside 200 M.
Very slowly away. At rear. Last and widest turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or behind. Ran on in straight to just miss 2nd.
Towards rear. Trapped wide turning in. Made up a little late ground.
Prominent but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Took lead upon straightening but effort not sustained final 100 M.
Led to 1200 M. 1 out 1 back off the leader down back straight. Tired badly 200 M out.
Towards rear and inclined to hang in. Shifted to the rail 250 M out and made up good ground without threatening the winner.
Jumped in midfield but soon dropped well back. No further impression.
Settled in midfield. Slightly held up early in straight. Kept on steadily to the line.
Settled in rear of midfield. Finished off well strongly inside final 200 M to take charge close to home.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily on rails down straight without threatening.
Prominent. Faded under pressure passing 200 M.
Jumped best. Settled 4 wide some 2Ls off the lead. Dropped to midfield going up Rock. Soon faded after straightening.
Ridden to take up running passing 1000 M bend. Remained same into straight but soon came under pressure to hold place. Outsprinted inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Chased leader. Found nothing under pressure inside final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance in last few.
Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to home bend. Weakened out of contention. (Mucus.)
Jumped with them, settled in prime position 1 out 1 back 3L from leader, spent nothing in run, travelled like winner on turn, got split at 200 M and quickly put paid to opposition to score well.
Broke well, showed good early speed to take up running, raced in lead throughout at good clip, snuck 2L clear at 600 M, still in front until well into straight but tired late.
Average to begin, taken back behind field to settle last on rails, travelled well to turn, stuck to paint in straight and closed the race off strongly making up considerable ground.
Bumped early and lost ground, ridden up to hold spot 3rd from rear 7L off lead 2 wide, made run 3 and 4 wide on turn between horses and closed strongly despite being badly checked at 200 M.
Fast away, caught a little wide early, crossed to race outside leader 2L away, under pressure entering straight and weakened out of it over final 200 M.
Showed good early speed from inside gate, restrained to take trail behind leader, had good run on rails thereafter, tracked well to turn, obtained split but didn't show enough dash to figure.
Broke with them, settled 3 back on fence 4L off lead, enjoyed good trip in middle section, not comfortable on turn and failed to finish the race off. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fairly away, lacked early pace and settled rearward 4 back on fence 6L from front, had easy run through middle stages, made run between runners in straight and stuck to task well.

Crowded early, ridden up to obtain close position, 2 wide 5L off lead throughout, tracked into race well 3 wide on turn and looked set to figure in finish before being inconvenienced in straight, good debut.

Best to begin, trapped wide and restrained from early speed battle when unable to cross, raced 3 wide without cover thereafter, niggled along to improve on turn, tried hard but couldn't sustain effort.
Away with them, taken in behind from awkward draw, raced 2nd last on fence 9L off lead, travelled well to turn, raced one-paced in straight making only a little ground.
Broke with them, hard ridden early, trapped wide from awkward draw, 3 wide with cover in middle section, under pressure on turn and weakened out of it.
Midfield or better from the first turn. Ran on well final 200 M to snatch 2nd just before the line.
Soon forward of midfield whilst hanging in. 5th along back straight. Failed to quicken in straight.
Towards rear. Held up upon straightening and shifted out. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
At back. Hung out at 700 M. Made up good ground final 200 M and was doing best work at finish.
Towards rear. Headway on the outside rounding home bend. Ran on a bit until not quickened 200 M out.
Towards rear. Hung out first turn and proved difficult to settle. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to 350 M before dropping right out of contention.
Never far off despite being trapped wide and with no cover throughout. 3rd rounding home bend. Took lead 200 M out but was outsprinted by the first pair close home.
Ridden forward and took lead rounding first turn. Headed upon straightening. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Never far off. Weakened 200 M from home.
Began awkwardly but soon in touch. 2nd going down back straight. Took lead upon straightening but effort not sustained inside 100 M.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Unbalanced at 700 M and widest turning in. Made up some late ground.
Began awkwardly and was ridden along to be in midfield or better. Kept finding final 250 M to snatch victory close home.
Midfield early but was hampered passing winning post first time. Steadied at 1400 M and dropped towards rear. Never a threat in straight.
Fair jump, hard ridden but couldn't muster speed. Last horse making the turn and entering the straight. Far from leader and never a factor.
Clean jump with an outside draw. Kept rearward early. 3 wide making the turn. Shifted wider on straightening. Made up ground and passed weakening runners.
Slow to begin. Pressured to stay midfield on back straight. Raced rearward turning into home straight. Couldn't make up ground and weakened badly at 350 M.
Fair jump. Pressured to stay midfield. 2 wide 5Ls behind leader going into the straight. Behind midfield and never improved position. Weakened badly at 300 M.
Slow start. Remained rearward by the rail making the turn. Made up ground at 200 M but made no improvement in position.
Quick jump. Led and raced on the rail until the turn. Stayed 2Ls behind leader entering home straight. Hard ridden in the straight but weakened at 300 M.
Responded well from the gates and kept midfield before the turn. 2 wide entering the straight. Ran strongly when being ridden. Quickened nicely once in the clear and ran strongly to chase winner.
Jumped well from an outside barrier. Kept midfield without pressure on back straight. 3 wide without cover at the turn and went wider on straightening. Did not quicken and weakened at 200 M.
Good speed early stages from an outside barrier, took the rail going into the turn, led by half a length rounding the home turn. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Clean jump and raced within 2Ls from the leader in the back straight. 2 wide 2Ls behind leader entering the straight. One-paced and did not improve position. No challenge to the winner.
Slow to begin, hard ridden to make up ground in the early stages, ran 4 wide without cover behind midfield entering the turn, responded late to be closest at finish.
Jumped fast from an outside barrier, 2 wide and kept within a length from the leader making the turn. Took the lead at 200 M and held off other contenders for a close win.
3-wide at midfield. 4-wide turning for home and only kept same pace in the straight.

Jumped well and was a length off the pace early stages. Crept closer making home turn and raced beside the leader on straightening. Took the lead near 250 M and kept on well closing stages to hold off late challenger.
Quickest out from wide draw and led field until straightening. Continued to battle for the lead at 300 M but dropped steadily out of contention thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly from widest draw. Outpaced and raced wide at midfield. 6-wide making home turn and unable to threaten in the straight.
Off slowly and niggled to race no worse than midfield. 5-wide turning for home and was 4Ls off on straightening. Weakened thereafter.
Off slowly and travelled no better than midfield. 3Ls off at 400 M and kept on strongly in the straight. Got to within a length of winner closing stages but unable to draw closer thereafter.

Stumbled out of the gates and raced wide at a rearward position. Checked and shifted wider near 700 M. Remained towards the rear on straightening, made up good ground but unable to find more inside final 100 M.

Outpaced and raced at rear section until the turn. Improved to midfield making home turn and reached within 5Ls of the leader on straightening. Kept on well in the straight and made a late push to claim a minor placing.
No better than midfield early stages. Hung out and checked at 700 M and drifted back to last place home turn. Trailed field into the straight and only ran past a weakening runner.
Niggled and kept within 2Ls of the pace early stages. Faded towards midfield around the bend and continued to lose ground prior to straightening. Made no impression thereafter.
Outpaced and trailed field. Checked at 500 M and remained in a rearward position on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners.

Tracked leader in a 2-wide position. Steadied when crowded at 700 M and lost a bit of ground. Switched to 3-wide turning for home and was a length off on straightening. Kept on but unable to find more to challenge closing stages.
2-wide and 4Ls behind in 6th at 1000 M, 3Ls back in 5th into home straight, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on at same pace.
Flat-footed at start losing 6Ls or so on leaders, in rear at least 7Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, never on terms.
5Ls back in 7th when 2-wide at 1000 M, 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 5Ls back in 10th, finished off tamely widest and down centre of track.
Led on fence by 1L at 1800 M until being headed by winner at 800 M, over 2Ls back in 4th and struggling entering home straight, came home in own time.
2Ls off pace and 2-wide in 3rd at 1400 M, keen at 1000 M, advanced to be about half a length down in 2nd entering stretch, every chance when a head 2nd at 200 M, didn't follow through.
In rear but with main body of field and 3-wide with cover until the 600 M, detached and 8Ls down at the 400 M, soon eased down. (Heart irregularity.)
