Pressed on out wide to be a neck down in 2nd when 2-wide at 1400 M, led at 800 M, same at final bend and a head to the good at 200 M, gamely asserted inside final 50 M.
Despite gate 7 draw he was caught 4-wide no cover when 3Ls down in 5th at 1000 M, 5-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in midfield, faded inside final 200 M.
Towards rear about 7Ls behind at 1200 M, marginally closer turning for home, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
3-wide no cover when 3Ls down in 4th at 1200 M, gained cover at 1000 M, under pressure to retain prominent position at 600 M, very one-paced in straight.
3-back on fence 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, niggled along at 500 M, 3Ls down in mid-division taking home turn, never got any closer to first three home.
Towards rear at least 5Ls off pace through first half of race, still worse than midfield when 4Ls off pace but 5-wide on straightening, always outpaced by front three.
3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M when throwing up head and losing some ground, headway to be 2Ls down in 3rd taking home turn, weakened badly inside final 300 M.
Slowly away, raced freely when 7Ls off pace worse than midfield at 800 M, hung out at 600 M, further back and struggling entering straight, never dangerous.
9Ls behind in 9th at 800 M, always outpaced and never on terms.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off speed at 800 M, hampered at 600 M and forced wider, 4-wide on straightening when 7Ls down in 7th into homestretch, never troubled leaders.
3-wide a neck off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 2nd at 800 M and only 2Ls back in 2nd of final bend, led at 300 M, 1L clear at 200 M, always in charge.
3-wide no cover in 4th when 4Ls back at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th on straightening, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on to take 2nd close home but never going to grab winner.
6Ls back in 6th and hanging out a little at 800 M, not much closer turning for home, weakened.
On fence about 5Ls off speed in 4th or so at 800 M, about 3Ls down in 3rd entering straight, all out to maintain this prominence at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide disputing lead at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 3rd at 800 M and just over 2Ls back in 3rd off home bend, under 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra and caught for 2nd close home.
8Ls last at 800 M, never got any closer to the lead, only ran on past a few well-beaten rivals.
Led by 3Ls on fence at 800 M, went too quickly in front and over 2Ls clear at final bend, headed at 300 M, tired into 5th place.
Slowest away and checked at start, 9Ls back in 10th at 800 M, never a factor.
Slow into stride. At rear. Hung in at 700 M. Not a threat in straight.
Towards rear whilst being trapped wide and without cover throughout. Steady headway to midfield along back straight. Nothing left 200 M out.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Steadied at 1100 M. Checked turning in. Made up some late ground.
Towards rear. Widest turn in. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish despite rider dropping rein near 100 M.
Took lead from 1300 M. Headed upon straightening and dropped right out of contention.
Behind midfield. Ran on strongly final 300 M and never looked back after hitting front 100 M out.
Midfield. Ran on well in straight but unable to match speed with winner final 100 M.
In touch and over-raced down back straight. Hung in upon straightening but kept on until one-paced close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to 1300 M and settled in 2nd or 3rd place. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Around midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
In touch. Kept on in straight until no extra 100 M out.
Prominent. Hit front 300 M out but got outsprinted by the first pair final 100 M.
Well there to 100 M and weakened quite quickly.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Never far off. Kept on steadily down straight for distant 2nd.
Jumped in prominent position but soon dropped to rear.
Ridden early. Towards rear to straight. Ran on steeadily without threatening.
Wide in midfield throughout. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Forward of midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Made all. Broke clear passing 200 M to win unchallenged.
Always struggling at the back.
Midfield to home bend. Gradually weakened.
Well there to 200 M. Faded.
Raced wide towards rear. Kept on steadily down centre of straight without quickening.
Showed good early speed to contest battle for lead, trapped 4 wide without cover outside lead at good pace, still there on turn but wide run took its toll and couldn't go on over final furlong.
Broke with them, raced in 6th position behind leaders, had good run in middle stages, under pressure on turn, raced very one paced in straight.
Broke with them, hard ridden but couldn't go early speed, drifted back to 3rd last 10Ls off lead 2 wide, gave huge start entering straight and made up some late ground.
Showed early speed to contest lead, trapped 3 wide outside leaders under good speed, began to tire on turn and weakened right out of it. (Bled.)
Slow to begin, settled in rearward position 7Ls from lead on fence, had good run throughout, made steady ground in straight giving too greater start.

Broke well, showed usual speed to hold lead on rails, engaged in early speed battled and pressured throughout travelled well into straight and held length break until 250 M but couldn't sustain effort after hard run.
Amongst the first away, showed early speed, eased in to travel 5th just off pace 2 wide, obtained break entering straight and made strong run to fight out finish.
Began with them, drifted back to last 15Ls off lead, followed paint into straight and passed tired horses in run home.
Away with them, restrained from wide gate to hold midfield position 7Ls from lead 2 to 3 wide, under pressure on turn, stuck to task in straight making up some ground.
Average to begin, had ridden to make up ground to challenge lead, raced 2 wide outside leader at good clip, under pressure turn and weakened out of it after being gassed early.

Fair to begin, ridden up early to hold midfield position, travelled in 7th position behind speed 2 wide 6Ls from lead, made run between runners on turn and drove through gap at 200 M and gathered them in.
Average away, hard ridden early in 3rd last spot, 13Ls off front-runners, niggled along throughout only plugged home in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced move approaching home turn. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never in contention.
Prominent to straight. Ran home one-paced before faded under pressure close to home.
Settled in rear of midfield. Quickened well inside final 250 M down inner of straight to assert authority close to home.
Well there. Hit front over 200 M out but caught close to home.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield. Improving when forced to steady over 200 M out. Made no impression thereafter.
Midfield. Lost position rounding home bend, but made up some late ground under pressure closing stages.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Shared 3rd into straight. Weakened 200 M out.
Never in contention.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight before faded passing 200 M.
Led to 250 M. Weakened.
Slowly away, taken straight to rails, raced 3 back on fence thereafter 4Ls from front, had run of race to turn, came 2 wide in stretch and tried hard to straight without 100% clear running.

Showed good early speed to hold lead from inside alley, had fair run in mid-section after being pressured early, travelled well to turn, pinched 2Ls break in straight and looked winner but overhauled late.
Showed average gate speed, settled 3 back on fence, obtained spot behind leader mid race, had good trip thereafter, under pressure on turn, very one paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Broke best, slotted in behind speed, raced 2 wide 3Ls off front runner throughout mid-section, tracked nicely 1 out, 1 back to turn, held up early in straight but dashed well when clear to score good win.
Broke with them, drifted back from awkward draw, raced in last position 2 wide 8Ls from lead, made run widest in straight but couldn't make any impression.
Away well, showed early speed but unable to cross, raced 3 wide with cover throughout, hard ridden from 800 M, failed to respond and only plugged away.
Average to begin, taken across behind to race 4 back on fence 6Ls off leader, spent nothing in run, travelled well to turn and followed paint in straight making some late ground.
Fairly away, drifted back to 3rd last 2 wide 7Ls from lead, followed well on turn coming 3 wide between horses and closed race off well.
Began with them, trapped wide in 4th last position 6Ls off front-runners, raced 3 wide with cover in mid section, made 5 wide on turn but lacked dash to make impression on leaders.

Broke well, pushed forward from widest gate to take up position outside leader, pressured leader early and sat at girth thereafter, challenged entering straight but early effort told when asked and weakened out of it.
Fair to begin, settled midfield 2 wide 5Ls from lead, raced between runners thereafter, held up when angling clear at 300 M, didn't finish race off from that point.
Showed good early speed to race outside the leader early, handled up position but refused to settle and raced 3 wide without cover from 1100m mark, niggled along on turn, one paced in run home.
Fairly away, taken back to last on rails from wide gate, raced in rearward position 8Ls from lead thereafter, made run 5 wide on turn and chased gamely passing all but winner.
Began well, pushed along to hold midfield position, race 3 wide with cover throughout 5 to 6Ls of speed, came with 4 wide run on turn but couldn't keep going last 200 M.
Slowly away. At back whilst being niggled along. Shifted out for running upon straightening. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to win going away.
Began awkwardly and dropped towards rear from wide draw. Took closer order on the inside rounding home bend. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish despite losing momentum when crowded near 200 M.
Soon midfield or worse. Trapped wide and without cover throughout. Proved difficult to settle and pulled to 3rd place along back straight. Kept on and was tightened when giving ground 100 M out.
Began awkwardly but took up running passing the winning post 1st time. Headed upon straightening and then dropped right out of contention.
Behind midfield or a little worse. Steadied at 1000 M. Ran on well in straight but was unable to match speed with winner inside 100 M.
Prominent but proved difficult to settle rounding the 1st turn. Kept on the straight but nothing left 100 M out. (Cut heel and see Racing Incidents.)
Crowded after jumping awkwardly. Midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight for a minor placing.
Began awkwardly but soon in touch. Hit front briefly 200 M out but effort not sustained final 100 M.
Towards rear after being trapped wide rounding the 1st turn. Made up good ground whilst hanging out final 200 M.
In touch early. Caught wide 1st turn and dropped to forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Never far off. Steadied passing winning post 1st time. Kept on in straight but failed to quicken final 100 M.
Slow into stride and was ridden along early to be in midfield rounding the 1st turn. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Set pace to straight on the rail. Led by 1L on straightening. Outpaced by the winner at 150 M and lost 2nd late.
Midfield, 3 wide with cover, 4Ls from lead. On straightening shifted wide onto the track and weakened quickly with 200 M left.
Settled 3 wide rearward. Saved ground along the rails making home turn. Failed to quicken and was one-paced in the final stages, never looked like a threat.
Fair jump. Ridden to keep within 2Ls from leader going into the turn. 3 wide without cover entering the straight. Weakened at 200 M.
On jumping bumped with another runner, 3 wide rearward with cover until straightening. Quicken in the straight and made up ground outside in the straight.
Quick jump and stayed within 2Ls behind leader on rail. Was held up and unable to improve inside from 200 M to 100 M. Never really tested.
Slow to begin. Midfield and was crowded at 700 M. 3Ls behind the lead entering the straight. Made progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fast but was held back and shifted across runners to the rear. Improved position during the turn before shifting out for a strong run at 250 M. Just failed to run down winner.
Quick jump and about 1L behind leader throughout without cover. Responded well shortly after straightening to hit front over 100 M out. Held on under pressure to the line for a close win.
Slow to begin and was ridden to stay midfield on the rail. 4Ls behind leader on straightening. Kept on to stay in contention final stages.
On jumping bumped another runner. Raced wide without cover throughout and within 3Ls of the lead. Weakened badly final 250 M.
Was bumped on jumping. Remained last but no more than 5Ls off the lead. Improved position on the rail making the turn. Switched out and made up good ground final 200 M. Closest at finish.
Best out and led early stages. Overtaken at 1400 M and settled 2 to 3Ls behind the pace in 2nd. Remained on fence behind the leader making home turn but unable to pick up in the straight.
3-wide at midfield. Hampered at 1700 M and carried wide. Remained 3-wide and no better than midfield until home turn. Swung wide on straightening and ran on steadily to make the frame.

Crowded at 1900 M and shuffled back to race in rear section. Ridden to keep up at 600 M and was under the whip 400 M. Quickened nicely on straightening and took the lead 150 M. Unable to hold off a late charging rival.
Difficult to settle at midfield early stages. Switched out at 1700 M and was allowed to stride forward to take the lead. Took a length's advantage into the straight but was swamped near 200 M.

3-wide without cover and raced behind leaders early. Continued to be without cover and remained in similar position back straight. Struggle to keep up making home turn then weakened and tailed out in the straight.
Missed the kick and raced at the rear. Remained racing near the back and swung widest on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners.
On fence behind the pace early stages. Remained racing on the rails and settled at midfield in back straight. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Settled 2-wide in rear section. Steadied and shuffled back slightly at 500 M. Near last on straightening and ran on without threatening.
Cruised along in a rearward position. Near last to enter home straight. Made a nice rally between rivals and stormed to the lead final 150 M.
On fence and behind midfield. Saved ground along the rails making home turn. Not much quickening in the straight and was tightened for room 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
2-wide disputed lead at 1600 M. 4Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M and closed to within a length of the leader making home turn. Contested for the lead at 200 M but weakened thereafter.
Behind the pace early. Settled 2-wide at midfield from 1400 M onwards. Niggled forward to challenge home turn and hit the front at 250 M. Unable to find more when headed near 150 M.
Well placed 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1200 M, in 3rd taking home bend, failed to pick up and swamped at 200 M.
Slowly away, 10Ls last at 1200 M, 8Ls last entering home straight, ran on well in straight, nearest at finish.
Switched from wide gate to fence to be 8Ls down at 1200 M in rear, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls back in 11th, ran on well late but post came too soon.
3-back on fence 4Ls back in 7th through to home straight, a little closer at 200 M, ran on well to squeeze through to a gap inside final 50 M and lead on line.
Head up when clear by a neck out 2-wide at 1200 M, pushed along to maintain similar margin until home straight, kept on better than normal for pressure, gave way only very late.
On fence 2Ls back in 4th from 1200 M to home turn, switched out to be 1L back in 3rd at 200 M, led inside final 50 M but grabbed again on line.
7Ls behind lead in 10th at 1200 M, mostly 3-wide but with cover, 5Ls down in 9th off home straight, kept on fairly, nearest at finish.
6Ls back in 8th at 1100 M out 2-wide, pushed out 3-wide no cover at 500 M to challenge and 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in 6th, kept on fairly well for pressure, never nearer.
On fence and a neck down in 2nd from 1100 M to home turn, all out in same position at 200 M, swamped inside final 50 M.
Awkward break, 6Ls back in 9th on fence at 1200 M, similarly placed taking home turn, never dangerous.
Always 3-wide no cover when about 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until straightening for home, capitulated quickly.
4Ls down in 6th at 1100 M when 2-wide, similar on straightening, one-paced.
Keen early on, 6Ls back when 2-wide at 1100 M, 3-wide with cover at 600 M, 4-wide no cover at 400 M and 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight when 4Ls back in mid-div, always held.
Bounded at start losing at least 4Ls on field, 8Ls behind in 10th at 1100 M, still worse than midfield and 5Ls behind taking home turn, never threatened.
5Ls back in 6th when 2-wide at 1100 M, 3-wide no cover at 700 M, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in 5th, soon beaten.
Settled 8Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide, 6Ls back in 10th taking home turn, never a danger.
9Ls down one from rear at 1200 M, not much closer in same position entering home straight, ran on past a few tired ones late.
Soon led on fence, 2Ls clear down the backstretch, headed at 200 M, faded late.
Got in 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 4th at final bend, sharing the lead at 200 M, only got head in front in final strides.
4Ls back in 5th at 1200 M when on fence, 3Ls back in 6th off final bend, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, stayed on fairly for 3rd.
10Ls last at 1200 M, 7Ls behind entering straight, 6Ls down at 200 M, ran on quite well until the 100 M when steadied, held up close home and not fully tested, never nearer.
Opted not to race on fence and sat 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 2nd until the 500 M, 1L back on straightening, jockey dropped whip at 250 M, led at 150 M narrowly, lost out on line, unlucky.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls behind on fence in 7th at 1100 M, 4Ls back in midfield on straightening, marginally closer at 200 M, outpaced.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off speed on fence in 3rd through to home turn, all out to hold this position at 200 M, faded late.
Behind midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Soon 2nd. Kept on in straight but effort not sustained inside 100 M.
At rear. Shifted out for running in straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish final 200 M despite jostling with another runner.
At rear. Made up good ground whilst hanging in and jostling with another runner final 200 M.
Prominent early. Slotted in midfield rounding 1st turn. Under pressure rounding home bend. Ran on well final 250 M. Hit front 100 M out and held on.
At rear. Widest turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
In touch. Crowded and dropped to forward of midfield rounding the 1st turn. Checked upon straightening. Ran on a bit until one-paced final 100 M.
Soon steadied towards rear and on rail. Steadied and shifted out for running 500 M out. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Under pressure rounding home bend. Soon gave ground after 200 M.
Soon 3rd. Kept on whilst hanging in. Steadied off heels after 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Behind midfield or a little worse. Ran on steadily in straight to just miss a minor placing.
Soon led. Headed 200 M out. One-paced thereafter.
Settled well back. Never nearer at the finish.
Raced mainly 3-wide behind midfield. Short-lived effort rounding home bend and early in straight. Soon no extra.
Waited with. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish but not good enough to feature in the blanket finish.
Led field to straight. Soon weakened despite coming under pressure.
Disputed lead to straight. Hit front momentarily turning in but soon found no extra.
Well there. Awkwardly placed behind weakening front-runner turning in losing position. Kept on steadily in remainder of straight without threatening.
Settled towards rear. Did not find too clear running after straightening till late in closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Lost position on rails behind runners rounding home bend. Kept on steadily down straight without threatening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Gained slender advantage after straightening but worn down inside final 100 M.
Always prominent. Fought on steadily under pressure to hold every chance inside final 200 M only to be overshadowed short of line.
Settled in midfield. Jostled upon straightening. Closed off race strongly to assert authority final strides.
Settled mainly in midfield. Slightly held up passing 200 M. Sustained headway throughout closing stages without threatening.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw. Last turning in. Made up good ground inside 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Midfield or worse from 1200 M. No extra 200 M out.
Midfield or worse. 4 or 5 wide turning in. Ran on gamely in straight and took control 100 M out to win convincingly.
Around midfield but difficult to settle. Steadied and lost ground rounding home bend and shifted out for running upon straightening. Made up good ground final 350 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Steadied off heels after 400 M. Ran on well inside 200 M after obtaining clear running to be nearest at finish.

Went forward to be in touch from 1200 M but trapped wide and with no cover throughout. 2nd from 1000 M. Kept on well in straight and led 300 M out before being outsprinted by the first pair final 100 M.
Slowly away but soon thereabout. Hampered at 400 M. Unable to quicken in straight and checked 200 M out when already beaten. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden forward and held 2nd or 3rd position. Held up at 400 M and shifted out for running. Ran on quite well until effort not sustained inside 100 M.
Midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover in the middle stages. Ran on upon straightening until one-paced final 100 M.
Slowly away. At rear. Ran past beaten runners final 200 M.
Led to 300 M after pulling hard and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Gave ground rapidly thereafter.
In touch. Ran on steadily in straight until one-paced final 100 M.
In touch. Midfield or better rounding home bend. Ran on steadily until weakened 100 M out. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Fell at 800 M.
Shortly after the start was crowded. Stayed behind midfield on back straight. Checked near the 800 M. Widest runner going into the straight. Kept on steadily without threatening. (Blood in trachea.)
Set pace to straight on the rail. Led by 1L rounding home turn. Rider started to pressure at final 200 M and responded strongly. Won convincingly.
Fell at 800 M.
Clean jump. Settled within a length of the leader in a 2 wide position from 800 M onwards. Hard ridden to keep pace on straightening but weakened badly at 300 M after bumping and became unbalanced.
Jumped cleanly and kept behind midfield. Checked near the 800 M. At least 8Ls from leader rounding home turn. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Fair jump. Settled 3 wide and within 3Ls of the leader. 2 wide with cover on straightening. Hard ridden to keep on and found no extra inside 200 M.
Jumped well from wide draw. Travelled 3 wide in the lead without cover. Only kept on at one pace without threatening in straight.
Slow start. Checked near the 800 M. Behind midfield entering the straight. Ran strongly and was inclined to lay in at final 200 M. Made up good ground inside to be closest at finish.
Behind midfield on the rail early. 3Ls 3 deep from winner at 600 M, shifted wide on straightening. Kept on fairly early part of the straight and weakened with 200 M left.
Slow to begin. Soon at the tail of the field. Steadied at the 800 M and became unbalanced. Never a factor from then on.
Quick jump, pressured to stay within 2Ls from the leader. 4th turning in and weakened badly with 350 M remaining. (Bled.)
Jumped best. Raced 4 wide in midfield. Ran on well inside final 250 M without quicken near finish. Lost 3rd late.
Soon at rear. Checked near the 800 M. Ran wide on straightening. Finished off race strongly but unable to challenge the winner.
Eased back to race in rear section and was 3-wide in back straight. Improved in a 5-wide position making home turn. Closed the race off only fairly.
Settled towards the rear and trailed field back straight. Swung widest and near last to enter home straight. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
No better than midfield and was wide and without cover. Continued to be wide turning for home and was 3Ls down on straightening. Stayed on well in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Slightly held up at 200 M but made a late dash to make the frame.
Settled on fence at midfield. Niggled along to stay in touch making home turn. Crept to within a length of the lead before being crowded at 200 M. Unable to recover thereafter.
No worse than midfield early stages. 7 to 8Ls back in 4th at 1200 M. Struggled to keep pace making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Settled 2Ls behind the pace in 2nd until home straight. Engaged in a 3-way battle for the lead at 250 M but was swamped shortly after.
In a forward position early stages. 5Ls off the pace in 3rd at 1200 M. Steadily improved and was 3-wide and 2 to 3Ls back on straightening. Took some time to quicken and ran on without threatening.

Kept within 3Ls of the pace early stages. 7Ls back in 4th at 1200 M. 4-wide and 2 to 3Ls behind the leader turning in. Kept on well and disputed lead at 200 M. Unable to match winner's stride but stayed on for a minor placing.
Set the pace most of the way and took a length's advantage into the straight. Swamped inside final 200 M.
Settled towards the rear until home straight. Charged through rivals near the 200 M and clinched the race.

Settled towards the rear and was among last few to enter home straight. Held up in traffic for some distance near 200 M. Picked up speed when in the clear but ran into traffic again near finish and was unable to be ridden out.
10Ls last on fence at 1400 M, edged out 4-wide on straightening when 5Ls down in 13th, stayed on widest of all down centre of track, never likely to figure.
9Ls off pace and one from rear at 1400 M, closer about 4Ls back worse than midfield at final bend, 2Ls down and with place prospects at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
Always 4-wide no cover, 7Ls off speed in 9th at 1300 M, 3Ls down in mid-pack turning for home, failed to quicken up.
Soon led, clear by 2Ls on fence at 1400 M, joined at top of homestretch, swamped over 200 M out, one-paced late on.
Slow to begin and checked, 8Ls off speed when 2-wide in 11th at 1300 M, held up for a run when 5Ls behind on fence entering straight, still without a clear run past 200 M, too late.
3-wide with cover about 8Ls behind in 10th at 1300 M, improved to be 3Ls back in midfield on straightening, led at 200 M, driven out.
Never competitive, 8Ls off speed on fence at 1300 M, 7Ls last at final bend, soon detached.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home straight, found very little off the bit.
Always prominent but 3-wide no cover, 3Ls off speed in 4th at 1300 M, pressed on to dispute lead turning for home but beat hasty retreat inside final 300 M.
4Ls behind speed in 6th on fence at 1300 M, similarly placed turning for home when short of running room, shifted out behind winner to challenge at 200 M, ran on well for 2nd.
5Ls behind in 8th when 2-wide at 1300 M, about 4Ls behind in mid-division entering home straight, stayed in midfield.
3Ls off speed when 2-wide in 5th at 1300 M, closer turning for home in 4th place but under pressure, soon faded.
5Ls down in midfield when 2-wide at 1300 M, headway to be 2Ls back in 4th on straightening, a head down in 2nd at 200 M, grabbed for 2nd place inside final 50 M.
2-wide and about 1L behind in 2nd from 1400 M to 600 M, disputing lead at top of home straight, grabbed by winner 200 M, no extra thereafter.
Lost ground at start, 5Ls last until the final 200 M, never dangerous.
Prominent about 1L off speed early at 800 M, under pressure to lie up at halfway, faded steadily.
Midfield or better about 2Ls off pace until the 400 M, tended to hang in thereafter, not dangerous late.
Slow to break, towards rear about 4Ls off pace at 800 M, never got involved.
Away well and disputed early lead on stand's rail, hard pressed to maintain this advantage at 600 M, soon faded, eased late.
Outpaced from the off, hung out under pressure at halfway when 4Ls behind leader in midfield, never a factor late.
Travelled well within 2Ls of the speed through to final 300 M when hard ridden to pick up, always held by principals.
Crowded at start, never any better than 3Ls off speed from midfield to rear.
Towards rear about 4Ls off speed early on, stumbled when crossed at 500 M, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, finished very strongly and just missed 4th.
About 2Ls behind in midfield early on, 1L down in 2nd and under pressure at 400 M, left in 3rd at 200 M but ran on well again to take 2nd place close home.
Always close up within 2Ls of the speed through to the 400 M, over 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, failed to find any extra and lost out on 2nd close home.
Disputed early lead, clear advantage at 600 M, over 1L clear at 400 M and 200 M, always in command.
Prominent 2nd. Took lead 250 M out but got swamped for a place final 50 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well but soon dropped towards rear. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to 200 M. No extra 100 M out.
Slowly away. At rear. Steadied at 800 M. Closed off strongly from 200 M but was steadied when disappointed for running in the closing stages.
At rear. Hampered at 800 M. No show in straight.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. Made up good ground final 300 M and was doing best work at finish.
3rd or 4th to 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Soon midfield or better. Shifted out for running upon straightening. Ran on well final 300 M to win inside 50 M.
Slowly away. Soon midfield or worse. Ran on well final 300 M but was always held by the winner in the closing stages.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Severely hampered and checked near 300 M. Made up a little late ground.
Prominent 3rd or 4th. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
At rear. Never a factor.
Forward of midfield. Never a threat in straight. (Dropped whip.)
Slightly slow out. Travelled in midfield racing keenly in the run to home bend. Remained midfield on rails turning for home but made no impression throughout the straight.
Settled prominently in 3rd. Gradually faded under pressure in straight.
Soon took up running and led field until headed by winner about 300 M out. Faded under pressure closing stages.
Settled just off the pace mainly one out one back. Quickened to hit front about 300 M out. Overhauled by fast-finishing winner near home.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Towards rear. Raced tightly between runners early in straight before produced late impression closing stages.
Settled three off the fence towards rear. Commenced run turning for home and only ran on moderately from midfield into straight without threatening.
Settled just worse than midfield. Came to challenge under pressure passing 300 M but only produced moderate progress without threatening.
Settled wide in last few. Carried wider turning in. Ran on down straight and showed a great turn of foot inside final 200 M to take charge close to home.
Midfield to straight. Kept on same pace to finish.
Settled well back on rails. Closer turning in. Not much room after straightening before headway passing 250 M. Unable to sustain effort close to home.
Began well settling in forward of midfield. Some 2Ls back in 5th approaching home bend before gaining joint 3rd upon straightening. Kept on before fading inside final 200 M.
Waited with. Made up good ground after straightening down centre of track to be nearest at finish.

Began awkwardly trapped three wide near rear into first turn, slotted in 2 wide during mid-section, raced 4 to 5 off leaders to turn, followed eventual winner in straight, tried hard but just lacked vital pick up.

Began with field, showed no early speed, settled just worse than midfield 2 wide 5Ls of pace, did no work in run, tracked nicely into race and made run widest on turn and chased gamely to run down all but the winner.

Broke with them, took up move forward than usual position raced 1 out 1 back 3Ls from lead, had run of race and travelled strongly to turn, eased 4 wide in straight and showed great turn of foot to gather them in.
Began with them, held prominent position behind leader, had ideal trip thereafter, followed paint into straight and angled wide but lacked dash and didn't finish off when checked at 250 M mark.
Left gates well, took up spot at leaders girth, held 2 wide position throughout with moderate speed, took lead entering straight but collared passing 200 M and weakened from that point.
Broke with them, awkwardly placed 3 wide, midfield 3Ls off lead, raced without cover throughout, wasn't pressured with average pace in mid-section, one paced in straight but stuck to task.

Fair to begin, proved difficult to settle when restrained to rearward position 4 back on fence 5 to 6Ls off lead, did no work in run, followed paint into stretch, came between horses in straight and did best work late.
Average to begin, took up spot 2 wide at rear, raced 7Ls off lead throughout, had field in front on turning from home, made late ground down outside in straight giving to greater start.
Best away, showed speed to take up front running, lead throughout at easy speed, dictated terms to turn but couldn't match them in stretch and weakened out of it.

Slow to begin, held position 3 back on fence 3 to 4 Ls from pace, overraced in early stages, travelled on bridle in mid-section, no clear run entering straight and badly checked passing 250 M and lost all momentum. No luck.
Chased leader to 400 M. Gradually weakened. (Bled.)
Held up in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and ran on stoutly to gain upper hand short of line.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well to hit front passing 200 M. Fought on well but pipped at post.
Settled in prominent position. Quickened upon straightening to hold some chance 200 M out but soon over-shadowed.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent. Forced to steady on rails behind awkward runner approaching home bend. Some 3Ls back in 6th turning in. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Prominent to straight racing awkwardly far side. Ran home one-paced.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Towards rear throughout.
Settled in last few. Ran on down straight. Did best work at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Shifted out rounding home bend and was 5-wide turning in. Ran on well whilst hanging final 300 M and held on after taking lead 150 M out.
Towards rear. Very wide turning in. Failed to make any impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off. One-paced in straight until no extra 100 M out.
Midfield or worse but trapped at least 3-wide throughout. Never a threat in straight.
Thereabout to 1100 M before dropping steadily back to midfield or better. Never a threat in straight.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
2nd from the 1st turn. Led at 400 M. Unable to quicken but did enough to retain a distant 3rd after being headed 150 M out.
Slowly away but niggled forward to be in midfield and on rail. Shifted out for running rounding home bend. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Towards rear despite being niggled along. Tightened and unbalanced at 600 M. Wide turning in and made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
3rd and on rail from 1st turn. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Soon led. Headed 400 M and plugged on final 200 M.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield by saving ground along rail. Steadied and shifted in at 400 M. Ran on well but was always held off by the winner.
Slowly away. At rear. Made up some ground without threatening final 300 M whilst hanging in.
Midfield or worse whilst being trapped wide and with no cover. No show in straight.
On jumping bumped another runner. Good early speed to keep within 2Ls from leader. Ran on steadily and faded final 300 M.
Slow to begin. Last for most of the race. Over 10Ls from leader throughout. Passed beaten runners.
Set solid early pace. Led until being passed by the winner at 150 M. Outpaced by the top 3 in final 50 M to finish with a close 4th.
Slow to start. Last few early stages, midfield at 400 M. Kept on moderately and failed to impress final 250 M.
Good early speed, but kept slightly behind midfield. Responded fairly under the whip and kept on evenly to line.
Slightly behind midfield, no cover, never picked up. Found no extra after 300 M.
Bumped with another runner on jumping. Responded well final 400 M. Kept on until finish with no extra final 150 M.
Midfield early. Within 2Ls from leader. Hard ridden from 200 M on. Could not outpace the top pair.
Settled 1L behind leader on the outside fence. Responded to riding strongly at 200 M and kept on the lead until finish.
Kept 2Ls from leader with cover behind the winner. Improved steadily over closing stages. Ran on strongly in clear running.
Within 2Ls from leader. Pressured at 400 M with no extra. Weakened badly with 300 M to go.
Fair jump. Always in rear. Tailed off passing 400 M. Never a factor. (Roarer.)
Behind midfield. Ridden along but couldn't muster speed. One-paced with no pick up in home run.
Settled in last few. One-paced to the finish. No response to riding. Weakened final 200 M.

Pressed forward from an outside draw and then kept within 3Ls of the leader in a 3-wide position. Remained 3-wide making home turn and was a length off into home straight. Steadily weakened thereafter.

Missed the jump and was niggled forward to race behind the leaders. Kept in a prominent position behind the leader making home turn. Found an opening at 300 M and quickened well. Unable to match winner's stride final 200 M.
Botched the start and raced at the rear. Kept along the rails in a rearward position making the turn. Stayed on fairly in the straight.
Best out from wide draw but was soon outpaced. Settled wide behind midfield and was widest making the turn. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Settled in a rearward position from widest draw and trailed field into home straight. Quickened when asked and closed the race off well.
Took the lead at 1100 M and held a length's advantage into home straight. Remained in front before being swamped at 250 M.
Dropped back to the rear. Near last to enter home straight. Rallied and was closest at finish.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Unable to quicken and weakened.
Settled 3-wide in rear section. 4-wide making home turn and made up good ground in the straight.
Slowly away and was in rear section early. Niggled along to move up to midfield at 1000 M. 3 to 4 wide making home turn and 4Ls off on straightening. Stayed on one pace in the straight.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Switched out on straightening and chased on well for a minor placing.
Jumped well from wide draw and led briefly. 2-wide and a length behind the leader at the turn. Unable to pick up on straightening and weakened in the straight.
Better than midfield. 2-wide and 2Ls off the lead making home turn. Switched out for a run on straightening, quickened and drew clear final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and settled on fence at midfield. Switched out away from traffic shortly after straightening to get clear running. Ran on only fairly once finding daylight.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1200 M, under pressure when joined for the lead shortly after turn for home, faded steadily once headed at 300 M.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover down backstretch when about 5Ls off the speed in 8th or 9th, 5-wide no cover on the circle and widest into stretch, soon capitulated.
3-wide with cover early in midfield about 5Ls off speed, pressed on 4-wide no cover on circle to be 1L down in 4th but out 4-deep entering stretch, led at 300 M, pulled clear, comfortably.
4-wide no cover at 1400 M, left 3-wide no cover at 1000 M when 3Ls back in 5th or so, 1L down in 2nd on straightening when 3-wide, had little hope with winner but stayed on best of rest for 2nd.
Slowly away, in 2nd last about 7Ls off speed at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 12th on straightening, posed no kind of threat.
On fence about 6Ls off speed towards rear at 1000 M, not got much closer, always very one-paced.
Best away, restrained to be 2-wide and 2Ls down in 2nd at 1200 M, settled 4th or 5th from 800 M to home straight, plugged on fairly on fence to take 3rd final strides.
Never better than 7Ls last in rear until home turn, ran on past a few very tired rivals late.
Had the run of the race at 1200 M on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd, all out to hold this position at 600 M, well beaten turning for home and soon detached and eased down.
3-wide no cover at 1100 M and pressed on to be 1L back in 2nd out 2-wide at 800 M, same turning for home, failed to kick and one-paced final 200 M.
Couldn't muster any early speed, always niggled along when 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield or slightly worse, never dangerous in stretch.
Always worse than midfield about 5Ls off the speed until the 600 M, similarly placed when held for a run on straightening, very sluggish once clear.
Keen halfway when 5Ls off pace 2-wide and worse than midfield, 3Ls back in mid-div on straightening, had every chance of a place but couldn't quicken up sufficiently.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th or 6th at 1100 M, slightly worse off turning for home when 3-wide, always outpaced.
Bumped at start, worse than midfield about 4Ls off the pace through first half of race, never likely to figure despite staying on past a few beaten rivals.
Kept within 3Ls of the speed until the 400 M before dropping out very rapidly.
Bumped at start, worse than midfield about 4Ls off the pace through first half of race, always held despite staying on past a few beaten rivals.
Detached in 13th at least 9Ls off pace at 800 M, hung out at 400 M and switched back in at 200 M when tacked on to main body of field, ran on past a few tired rivals late, flattered by late flourish.
About 2Ls off speed in midfield down centre of track until halfway, picked up well to lead at 200 M, shot well clear and eased down final 50 M, very easily.
Close up about 2Ls off pace in midfield until becoming unbalanced at 600 M, struggled through latter half of race and eased late.
Disputed lead until halfway, clear lead at 400 M but headed at 200 M, no chance with winner but stayed on best of the rest for 2nd.
Awkward break, on stands' rail about 3Ls off speed in 9th or so through first half of race, hung out under pressure 250 M out, never likely to improve.
Always prominent within 2Ls of the pace until the 200 M, stayed on same pace for 3rd.
Close up on stands' rail about 1L off speed until the 500 M, under pressure to maintain prominent position at 400 M, faded inside 200 M.
Always close-up within 1L of the speed in 3rd or so until the 200 M when under pressure, no extra and held by leading trio inside final 100 M.
Bounded in gates and blew the start by about 6Ls, always well detached.
Disputed early lead on stands' rail early on, 1L down in 2nd at 400 M and all out to keep up, gone at 300 M, eased late.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls behind through to the 500 M, well beaten at the 300 M, eased late.
Jumped best from wide draw but immediately dropped towards rear. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Soon midfield or better. Made up good ground final 250 M to just miss 2nd.
Soon 2nd. Weakened quickly 300 M out. (Saddle shifted forward.)
At rear. Never a threat. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or worse. One-paced in straight.
Niggled along to be in midfield or worse. Dropped towards rear from 800 M. Never a threat in straight.
Soon led and made all.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. Improved to midfield on the outside whilst hanging out rounding home bend. Nothing left inside 400 M.
Slowly away. Behind midfield or a little worse from 1200 M. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish. Just missed a place.
At rear. Never a factor. (Abnormal breathing noise and mucopus.)
Never far off. 2nd turning in. Ran on well but was always held off by the winner.
Soon towards rear. Not a threat in straight. (Lame day after race.)
Midfield. 5th turning in by saving ground along rail. Ran on steadily until one-paced close home.
Slowly away but moved up swiftly to be in touch from 1100 M. Kept on in straight until no extra 100 M out.
Prominent to 200 M. Faded under pressure.
Mainly in midfield. Improving when steadied for a run passing 200 M. No further impression.
Towards rear. Dropped to tail-end rounding home bend.
Soon dropped towards rear. Kept on steadily to finish and steadied near home.
Well there. Took narrow lead halfway out. Soon headed after straightening. Dropped out.
Led to halfway. Settled just off the pace on rails before regaining lead upon straightening. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled passing 200 M.
Settled mainly in midfield. Finished off race well but just failed to peg back first two.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. With leaders and held some chance 200 M out but soon faded under pressure.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Ran on well inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Quickened well into straight to hit front over 150 M out only to be caught in the shadows of the post.
Always thereabouts. Quickened to hold some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Forward of midfield to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Waited with. Commenced run rounding home bend and ran on well inside final 250 M to assert authority short of line.
Away well, showed good early speed to take up running, dictated terms in front, tackled when entering straight and held on until 200 M but swamped late. Fair effort.
Jumped with field, trapped wide from outside draw, taken back to 3rd last 6L off lead, made run 3 wide with cover from 600 M, came between runners in straight and did best work late.

Okay to begin, allowed to stride forward when caught wide early to take up spot outside leader, travelled well throughout with moderate pace, tried hard in straight but a little one-paced. Looking for longer.
Average away, mustered speed to hold forward spot, raced in 7th position 2 wide 4L off lead, in traffic on turn, obtained clear run from 300 M and showed great tenacity to pass all but winner.

Slow to begin, positioned 4th last proving difficult to settle, worse than midfield on rails thereafter 6L off pace, had good run to turn, held up entering straight, didn't have 100% clear running in straight but only battled to line.
Best away, raced 4 wide without cover in middle section when unable to cross, made run 5 wide on turn but early work took effect and only battled last 300 M.
Average to begin, ridden hard to hold position, raced 2 wide 4-5L from pace, tracked 3 wide on turn but only battled away in straight.

Fair to begin, restrained to rear, travelled in last throughout 7L from pace, tracked 3 and 4 wide on turn and came widest in straight. Made good ground giving too greater start. (See Racing Incidents.)
Reasonably away, caught 3 wide without cover 2L off lead, remained 3 wide throughout facing the breeze came 3 wide on turn but lacked dash and condition gave out final 200 M.
Average to begin, maintained position 3 back on fence 3-4L off lead, had soft run and travelled well to turn, failed to respond when placed under pressure and weakened out of it.

Broke with them, ridden up in early stages to hold midfield position, raced 3 wide with cover thereafter, came 4 wide on straightening and came with powerful sprint (drifting to outside rail) to claim prize.
Broke with them trapped 3 wide 3L off lead in midfield, raced with cover throughout, made 4 wide run on turn and maintained effort until 300 M but couldn't sustain run and gave ground thereafter.

Began well, hard ridden to take up forward spot, challenged for early lead but finally crossed, raced behind leader with run of race, gained split at 250 M and charged to lead but couldn't hold out first two.
Slow to begin and struggled in early stages, drifted back to 3rd last on rails 7L from lead, had field in front on home turn, made run between horses in straight and passed tired runners late.
Soon led. Responded well 300 M from home and held on to win despite hanging out and proving difficult to ride final 200 M.
Never far off although travelling wide and without cover throughout. Hampered and lost running 300 M out. Not a threat thereafter.
Always in touch in 2nd or 3rd place. Kept on well in straight to secure a solid 3rd place without troubling the first pair.
Always thereabout. 4th from 1000 M. Ran on quite well until not quickened final 50 M.
Towards rear. Crowded at 800 M. Midfield turning in by saving ground along rail. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Checked after start. At back. Failed to make any impression in straight. (Mucopus.)
Midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover in the early stage. No show in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Checked at start but soon recovered to be in midfield or worse. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend and well beaten 200 M out.
Jumped with them but dropped towards rear from 1000 M. Not a threat in straight.
2nd from 1000 M. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Soon dropped to the rear but on rail. Behind midfield turning in. Made up good ground final 100 M.
Slowly away. Towards rear. Checked at 300 M. Never a factor.
Midfield or better. Shifted out for running near 300 M and continued to make ground but the post came too soon.
Ridden early to be in midfield or better. Kept on in straight until weakened 100 M out.
Slow begin. Behind midfield on fence within 4Ls from leader at 800 M. Responded well and made up good ground in straight. Kept on without threatening first pair.
Slow start and remained third last on fence. Last few entering the straight. Responded late inside at 200 M but found no clear room to run.
Settled 2 wide with cover midfield. Behind midfield on straightening. Kept on well and made slight improvement in position.
Started best and took the rail early. Stayed about half length from leader with 600 M to go. Took lead 300 M out but run ended inside final 150 M.
Bumped another runner on jumping. Midfield or better, 6th to enter the straight. Kept on without posing a threat.
Slow to begin. Settled at tail from the start. Always detached and maintained same pace to line.
Midfield early stages. Settled 3Ls off lead on fence. No clear running room in final 200 M. Ran on without threatening over closing stages.
Travelled wide without cover with a wide draw. Never far off lead. Kept on steadily and weakened at 200 M. (Bleeding from mouth.)
On jumping was bumped. Always within 2Ls from lead on fence. 3rd at 400 M and hard ridden inside 300 M. Chased gamely but found winner too good.
Kept wide behind midfield throughout. Shifted out for a strong run inside 300 M. Outpaced others and took charge 100 M out.
Led with a 2 wide position early stages. Half length in front on straight. Tired last 200 M and weakened badly.
Soon 3rd. 2 wide with cover within 2Ls behind leader on straightening. Over raced early and weakened badly at 350 M.
Second last to enter home straight. Hard ridden and responded strongly. Made up ground late to be closest at finish.
Settled in last few. 2 wide with cover rearward entering home turn. Found nothing under pressure.
3-wide at midfield. Switched out on straightening and responded well when pressured. Kept on final stages to make the frame.
Ridden out of the gates and contended for the early lead. 3-wide and kept within 3Ls of the pace making home turn. Only maintained same pace in the straight.
Jumped well but was eased back to race behind midfield. Saved ground along the rails at the turn. Quickened under the whip at 300 M and improved steadily in the straight.
Best out but raced wide and without cover in a forward position. 4-wide and 2Ls off the lead making the turn. 3Ls down on straightening and unable to pick up in the straight.
Dropped to the rear from wide draw and trailed field into home straight. Ran on without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Improved steadily to race at midfield but was wide and without cover. Weakened in the straight.
Ridden along to contest for the early lead. Took a sit behind the leader making home turn. Switched out on straightening and stayed on well for a minor placing.
Outpaced and raced in rear section. Kept along the rails making the turn and among last few to enter home straight. Only ran past tired runners.
Eased back to race on fence at midfield. Responded only fairly when asked on straightening and stayed on same pace to line.
Settled behind midfield and was 4-wide making home turn. Quickened when asked near 300 M and ran on only fairly.
Jumped fairly and was niggled along to a forward position. Took the lead near 800 M and had a 1/2L advantage going into home straight. Swamped after 300 M.
Better than midfield early stages. Shuffled back to race behind midfield 900 M. Unable to find a clear run for some distance after straightening and made no impression final stages.

Jumped awkwardly. Niggled along to keep pace behind the leaders. Tracked leader in a 2-wide spot making home turn and cruised to the front on straightening. Drew clear at 200 M and maintained a comfortable margin to the finish.
Off slowly and trailed early. Wide and remained in a rearward spot making the turn. Swung widest on straightening and made a charge. Unable to sustain effort final 100 M.
4Ls down in 5th on fence at 1400 M, under pressure in midfield about same margin behind on straightening, always outpaced by leading trio.
Led by 1L on fence at 1800 M, same margin ahead at 800 M, headed at 600 M, faded out from top of home straight.
2-wide and 1L behind in 2nd at 1400 M, a neck back in 2nd at 800 M and under pressure when 3Ls down in 4th at home bend, faded rapidly.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th down backstretch, all out when over 2Ls down in 2nd at final bend and at 200 M, faded late. (Blood in trachea.)
8Ls down in 12th when 2-wide at 1400 M, 5Ls back in 12th at 800 M, under pressure on straightening when 6Ls down, never dangerous.
7Ls behind lead in 9th when 2-wide at 1400 M, took closer order to be 3Ls down in midfield at 800 M, 5Ls down and hard ridden in 10th at final bend, plugged on modestly past tired rivals.
Head up at start and lost ground, 8Ls back on fence in 10th at 1400 M, about 4Ls or 5Ls back in midfield from 800 M to stretch, no chance with winner, stayed on well to easily snare quinella.
3-wide but with cover when 8Ls down in 11th at 1400 M, 4-wide no cover on circle when 4Ls down in midfield, 5-wide (widest of all) taking home bend, posed little threat.
5Ls behind when 2-wide in 6th at 1400 M, pressed on out 3-wide no cover at 900 M to lead at 600 M, 2Ls clear at top of stretch and at 200 M, comfortable win after an enterprising ride.
On fence about 6Ls back in 7th at 1400 M, 2-wide at 800 M when steadied and 4Ls down in mid-division, 5Ls back on straightening, stayed on fairly well but never likely to figure in quinella.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M, niggled along on circle to maintain prominent position, 4Ls down in 5th entering straight, soon well beaten.
9Ls behind and one from rear at 1400 M, 7Ls last at home turn, always behind.
Fractious in gates and much the slowest away by 5Ls, 10Ls last at 1400 M, 7Ls behind in rear at 800 M and taking final bend, never dangerous but never had much room on the run-in either.
Always 3-wide no cover despite being drawn in gate 3, 6Ls back in 8th at 1400 M and closer 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M, struggling to lie up at 600 M, gone before home turn.
Stumbled at start, 4Ls down in 5th on fence at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 7th on fence off home turn, over 2Ls back in 4th or so at 200 M, had just enough to run a place.
4Ls behind in 6th when 2-wide at 1000 M, eased closer 2Ls back in 4th taking home turn, picked up nicely to lead inside 300 M, driven out, never likely to be headed.
About 8Ls last and niggled along at 800 M, marginally closer but still in rear group at home turn, never troubled leaders or those in midfield.
Slowly away, 3-wide no cover when 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1000 M, same margin behind at top of home straight when hard ridden to keep up, retreated hastily.
On fence when about 7Ls off speed in 10th or so until the 800 M, checked at 500 M and 5Ls down in 12th at top of home straight, making some minor headway when steadied at 100 M.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 1000 M, pressed on to be a neck down in 2nd at home turn when with every chance, failed to follow through and weakened inside final 200 M.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, a neck clear at top of stretch, headed around the 300 M mark but had enough in reserve to hang onto 2nd.
6Ls down in 9th when 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 6th entering home straight, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover when worse than midfield about 6Ls off speed down the back, 4Ls down in mid-division on straightening, over 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, no extra close home.
Broke badly, becoming unbalanced, 2-wide and about 7Ls down in 12th until 800 M, still towards rear when 5Ls behind into stretch, made some modest late ground down centre of track.
Tended to over-race from 1100 M to 800 M when 2Ls off speed from 2nd to 4th, never had much room from top of home straight to 100 M, couldn't quicken once clear.
A little slow to begin, on fence 6Ls back in midfield at 1000 M, worse than midfield and 5Ls behind the speed off home turn, made only minor late ground.
6Ls down in 8th when 2-wide at 1000 M, hard pressed on the circle to get within 4Ls of speed in 9th or so taking home turn, always outpaced.
Lost ground at start, never really travelled well and always 4-wide no cover towards rear at least 7Ls off speed until the 600 M, 4-wide (widest) on straightening, had little hope.
Disputed lead early before tracking the leader. Challenged for lead whilst hanging out rounding home turn. Kept on in straight until weakened 100 M out.
Towards rear. Never a threat.
Slowly away. Moved up along rail to midfield or worse from 1200 M. Kept on in straight without threatening principals.
Away awkwardly but ridden forward and took lead from 1200 M despite hanging in. Headed 250 M out and soon weakened badly.
Midfield or worse. Kicked home strongly final 300 M. Took lead inside 100 M and held off strong challenge from 2nd horse.
Towards rear. Trapped widest turning in. Made up a lot of ground whilst hanging in and proving difficult to ride out final 200 M.
Prominent 3rd or 4th. 3-wide and challenged for lead rounding home bend. Unable to quicken in straight and dropped out of contention 250 M out.
Midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Ran on in straight until crowded for room 200 M out. Not a threat thereafter.
Forward of midfield. Unbalanced at 700 M. Headway rounding home bend to track leaders turning in but unable to quicken in straight.
Led to 1200 M before settling in 4th place about 3Ls back. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on well and hit front 200 M out but got outpaced inside 50 M.
Midfield or better. Had to shift in at 400 M and out at 200 M for running. Kicked home strongly but failed to catch the winner. Unlucky.
Towards rear. Never a threat.
Forward of midfield. 5-wide turning in. Failed to quicken and inclined to hang in final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear from 1200 M. Last rounding home bend. Never a factor.
Settled in last few. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily to pinch 3rd late.
Sluggish start. Never seen with a chance.
Well back. Made up late ground past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield on rails. No clear run early in straight. Produced good late impression inside 200 M to snatch 2nd late.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Shared 4th some 2Ls back turning in. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly. Settled in rear of midfield on rails. Did not find much room behind runners early in straight and kept on steadily to the line.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Took up running coming out of back straight. Went over 1L clear 200 M out. Pushed out.
Mainly 3-wide in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Jumped well and led early. Settled 1L off the speed on rails rounding home bend. Just kept on at the one pace in the run home.
Settled in rear. Commenced run turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Lacked speed in early stages, taken back to slot in midfield position 2 wide 5Ls from pace, in traffic on turn, followed eventual winner in straight but lacked turn of foot to get closer.
Average to begin, hard ridden to muster speed, drove through to hold inside running at leaders heels, levelled up entering straight, showed no turn of foot when placed under pressure.
Away well, trapped wide from awkward draw, restrained to 2nd last 7Ls from pace, raced 2 wide between runners to turn, travelled well into straight, had field in front but made some ground late.
Broke with them, trapped wide from outside draw, 4 wide without cover throughout, had hard run to turn and consequently compounded in the straight.

Broke with field, showed good early speed to take up running, maintained length advantage but remained 2 wide, dictated terms until turn, tackled upon entering straight and found little from that point.
Began well, showed early speed but restrained to take trail when unable to slot in, raced 3 wide midfield 4Ls from front runner, tracked well to turn, unable to produce when placed under pressure.
Average to begin, mustered speed to hold spot on fence 2Ls from lead, used nothing in run, came 2 wide on turn and tried hard in straight without threatening winner.
Crowded on jumping, took up rearward position 3rd last on rails 6 to 7Ls from lead, caught in traffic for most of straight and steadied at 100 M. Fair effort to make ground under circumstances.

Jumped away with field, ridden up to take up forward spot 3 wide without cover early, raced 3 wide throughout always working, challenged until 300 M but wide run took its toll in straight and weakened out of it.
Away fairly, drifted back to worse than midfield on rails, raced 5Ls off pace thereafter had good run to turn, stuck to fence in straight and battled strongly without 100% clear running in straight.
Began with field, raced 3 wide with cover midfield 5Ls front leader, ridden along from 800 M mark, weakened out of it from turn (abnormal breathing).
Average to begin, settled 2nd last, raced 4 wide without cover at rear of field, made 5 wide run on turn, battled away but set too greater task. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began reasonably, restrained when unable to get closer in early stages, raced in 4th last position 3 wide with cover, raced 6 to 7Ls of lead thereafter, made run between runners and made good ground when clear.

Average to begin (crowded), obtained 1 out 1 back spot with slow early pace, had run of race through middle stages, travelled fairly to turn, dashed well when clear passing 300 M and held on for strong win.
Raced wide from poor draw in prominent position. Kept on one pace in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Well there. Hit front shortly after straightening going some 1L clear 200 M out only to be worn down over 100 M out.
Never far off to straight. No clear run after straightening until about 250 M out. No impression closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield. Switched out for a run turning in. Made modest headway without threatening.
Well there. Gained slender lead briefly approaching home straight. Soon weakened after straightening.
Settled on rails in prominent position. No clear passage behind horses upon straightening. Obtained split 200 M out but only kept on steadily without quickening.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear. Finished off well inside final 200 M to grab 3rd late.
Towards rear of field throughout.
Midfield on rails. Making steady headway when did not find too much room inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Quickened well to take charge over 100 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled at the back. Made up some late ground past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Led field till headed approaching home straight. Soon weakened after straightening.
Began well, hard ridden to lead, crossed to front after 200 M, made running at better than average pace, travelled well to 250 M but ran out of gas over final 200 M.
Jumped with them, restrained to tail from awkward alley, settled last 10Ls off lead 2 wide, made run 5 wide on turn, made good ground in straight giving to greater start.
Average to begin, showed little early speed, raced 5 back on fence 7Ls from speed, did little in run, followed paint in straight and angled clear passing 200 M sprinting sharply to score.
Fairly away, ridden up to settle midfield on fence 4Ls off speed, had good run throughout, eased wider entering straight and showed good dash to challenge strongly. Found winner too good.

Away well, showed good early speed to hold forward spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls off pace, had easy run to turn, swung wide in straight and challenged strongly until 200 M when checked. Kept on to line (doubtful would have figured without check.)
Began well, ridden up to hold forward spot, raced at leaders girth through mid section, under pressure entering straight, badly checked at 300 M mark, didn't put in thereafter.
Best to begin from middle of line, restrained to take trail, trapped 3 wide with cover thereafter 6Ls off speed, came 4 wide on turn but effort was one paced in straight.
Broke with field, restrained from awkward alley to 3rd last position, raced 7 to 8Ls from lead throughout, came 3 and 4 wide on turn, only battled away in straight.
Average to begin, settled 2 wide 4th from rear, 8Ls from lead, made run between horses in straight and checked on two occasions, battled steadily thereafter, closest at finish.
Began with field, hard ridden in early stages, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout 5Ls from front, pressed on to turn, wide run took effect in straight and lacked dash to make impression.
Awkward to begin, ridden up to hold forward position behind leader, travelled well to turn, hung out repeatedly in straight but put in strong sprint to fight out finish.
Average beginning, niggled along to go forward, raced in 6th position 2 wide 4Ls from leaders, under pressure on turn, only battled away in home stretch.
Lost ground at start, restrained to 3rd last position 2 wide 9Ls from lead, travelled strongly to turn, followed rail in straight and made up fair amount of ground.

Crowded on jumping, ridden up to obtain midfield spot on rails 5Ls off lead, travelled 4 back thereafter, made up good ground from turn, inconvenienced slightly over last 200 M when bumped. Solid effort.
Steadied to the back soon after the start. Never in the hunt.
Soon midfield and on rail. Kept on steadily without threatening placed horses.
Led briefly before sitting in 2nd or 3rd place. Under pressure rounding home bend but failed to respond. Soon weakened and hung out after straightening.
Towards rear from 1000 M whilst proving difficult to settle. Awkward rounding home bend. Made up steady ground without posing a threat in straight.
Steadied shortly after start to a rearward position but on rail. Took closer order rounding home bend to around midfield. Ran on steadily to claim a distant 3rd.
Bumped well and sat behind the leader from 1000 M. Took lead near 200 M and held on well to win quite comfortably.
Took lead near 1000 M. Headed 200 M out and weakened. (Saddle shifted back on jumping.)
Slowly away. At rear. Widest turning in. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Soon forward of midfield but trapped 2 or 3-wide. One-paced in straight.
Around midfield early. Steadied off heels and dropped towards rear near 700 M. Not a threat in straight.
Midfield but trapped 3-wide. Tightened 250 M out. Found nothing thereafter.
Jumped well before dropping to 4th place about 3Ls back from 1000 M. Ran on steadily in straight but was always held off by the winner.
Trailed the field most of way. Shifted wide on home straight. Made no impression in straight.
Towards rear. Last few to enter home straight. One-paced to finish. Never a factor.
Kept rearward. Behind midfield entering home turn. Shifted out for running final 300 M. Kept on but found no extra to stay in contention final stages.
Fair jump then shifted inside to the rail to stay 3 back. Midfield entering the Straight. Ran well when clear inside 150 M and ran on to just miss a place.
Attempted to make all. Took the rail being out-paced by first pair at 250 M. Tried hard but weakened inside 150 M.
Began very awkwardly and rider lost left stirrup momentarily. Ridden early. Settled 2 wide just off pace. Weakened quickly into straight. Very weak in stretch. (see Racing Incident.)
3 deep 2 wide with cover on back straight. Around midfield and never looked like a threat. Kept on steadily in straight without improving its position.
3 wide without cover throughout the race. 1L behind leader entering the Straight. Fought on to hold some chance final 200 M and was outpaced by the winner close home.
Jumped best and showed good early speed. Stayed a length within leader on the rail. 3rd to turn in. Finished strongly over concluding stages to clinch a close win.
Midfield or better. Hard ridden before straightening to maintain position. Found no extra and gave ground final 200 M.
Checked on jump. Tailed throughout. Responded strongly on the rail inside 300 M. Made up good ground final 200 M without clear running. Wasn't fully tested.
Never far off. 3wide with cover 3Ls from leader entering the straight. Ran on well final 250 M to produce some late impression near finish.
Settled nicely on fence at midfield. Responded well when asked on straightening and charged to the lead at 100 M.
Hard ridden out of the gates but was outpaced early. 2-wide and no better than midfield. Kept same pace in the straight.

3-wide at midfield. Peeled out to a 4-wide spot when making the turn at 600 M to make a run. 2Ls off the leader at 400 M and was widest turning in. Kept on but unable to gain much ground closing stages.
Began well and took the lead near 1400 M. Remained in front and was a length ahead going into the straight. Kept on well but unable to hold off the winner at the 100 M.
Ridden to be in a forward position. Kept alongside the leader in back straight but unable to pick up on straightening. Weakened.
Quickest out and settled in a prominent position behind the leader until home straight. Kept on for a minor placing.
Taken back from widest draw. Remained at the rear mostly and trailed field into home straight. Made up ground in the final stages.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Made up ground saving trip around the home turn and chased on well in the final stages.
Settled in a rearward position. Hard ridden from 600 M but lacked a response. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners.
Settled 2-wide and no worse than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader making home turn. Continued well in the straight but unable to draw closer in the final stages.

Allowed to drop back in the early stages and raced towards the rear. Improved after the 1000 M and was 3-wide behind midfield near the rock. Niggled along at midfield making home turn and kept on well to be closest at finish.

3-wide better than midfield early stages. Remained wide and without cover in back straight and stayed within 2Ls of the leader until straightening. Failed to keep up in the straight and weakened closing stages.
Best away on fence, let DRAGON AND GOLD lead by a neck out 2-wide but not cross to the fence from 1000 M to home turn, led at 300 M, driven out, had just enough in reserve.
Had cover about 5Ls off the speed towards rear and niggled along in places until home straight, didn't find much under pressure, eased late. (Blood in trachea.)
Always detached from main body of the field about 7Ls or 8Ls off the speed in rear until home turn, never on terms.
Bumped at start losing ground, pressed on 4-wide no cover at 1000 M to be 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, still wide and struggling to lie up entering straight, faded swiftly. (Blood in trachea.)
3-wide with cover about 3Ls or 4Ls behind lead in or round midfield until the 600 M, 5-wide (widest of all) on straightening, gone before the 200 M.
In midfield or slightly worse on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed until home turn, improved to be 2Ls down in 5th on fence at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide about 3Ls off speed in midfield through to home straight, shifted out into the clear at 250 M, gave chase to winner, jockey dropped whip at 50 M, hung late but always just held.
Led by a neck out 2-wide at 1000 M, couldn't cross to the fence and disputing the advantage on straightening, began to fade out before the 200 M.
Keen early when about 1L back in 3rd or 4th, well placed about 2Ls down in 3rd entering straight, emptied in homestretch, disappointing finish.
Always niggled along worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed, hard ridden at 600 M, responded to persistent driving in home straight to take third close home.
Towards rear on fence about 5Ls behind leader until home turn, headway to be 3Ls down in 7th at 200 M, no extra inside final 200 M and lost out on 3rd close home.
Slow away but well placed on fence about 2Ls off speed on fence in about 4th or 5th until homestretch, all out to hold this position at 200 M, faded late.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th or so through to home straight, 1L down in 5th at 200 M and hung most ungenuinely under pressure late.
About 5Ls behind when 2-wide in mid-div until home turn, forced 3-wide turning for home, stayed on only fairly late.
Disputed lead out 2-wide from 1000 M to home turn, a neck down in 3rd and all out at 200 M, soon petered out.
In 5th place or so between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace but caught 3-wide no cover until getting in 2-wide at 600 M, stayed on fairly well in straight for a place.
Disputed lead on fence through to home straight, clear advantage at 300 M but headed at 200 M by winner, one-paced close home.
Always about 3Ls behind in 6th or so on fence until being bumped entering home straight, never really threatened from then on.
Slipped from middle gate to be on fence about 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th from 1000 M to home turn, broke through to lead at the 200 M, pulled clear.
About 5Ls behind on fence in mid-div until home turn, stayed on modestly in stretch, never nearer.
Awkwardly away, towards rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed until the home turn, ran on stoutly through the field to grab 2nd close home.
Stumbled at start, 2-wide and about 6Ls or 7Ls behind in 9th until home straight, never remotely dangerous.
Poor effort, under pressure when 3-wide with cover about 8Ls down in 11th at 800 M, further back turning for home, tailed off.
Outpaced about 8Ls or 9Ls last or 11th until home straight, never on terms.
Midfield or better. Ran on well final 250 M to just miss a distant 2nd.
At rear. Never in the hunt.
1 out and 1 back off the leader. Kept on one-paced in straight without posing a threat to placed horses.
In touch around 3 to 4Ls behind the leader. Hung in and had to be checked when severely hampered near 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Took up running. Headed near 200 M. Held on for a distant 2nd.
Awkwardly away. Checked at 1600 M when attempting to improve and dropped to the rear. Never a threat. (Lame and See Racing Incidents.)
Sat behind leader. Crowded 250 M. Kicked home strongly final 200 M to score a commanding victory.
Checked at start. Towards rear. Improved on the outside from 600 M to behind midfield on straightening. Ran on steadily but never looked threatening.
Very slowly away. Moved up along rail to be behind midfield going into the first turn. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield or better but trapped wide and without cover throughout. Under pressure 600 M out but failed to respond and dropped back steadily.
Slowly away but soon took up position in midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
Checked at 1600 M. Towards rear after being trapped 3 wide rounding the first turn. Made up minor late ground in straight.
Settled in midfield. Did not find any clear passage on rails in straight until about 100 M out. Recovered some late ground close to home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Attempted to make all. Plugged on when joined for lead early in straight. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Towards rear. Lost position rounding home bend.
Settled in forward of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on under pressure from 3rd into straight. Gained upper hand over 150 M out and just held on to the line.
Settled towards rear. Made good progress down home straight weaving his way through to do best work at finish.
Settled in rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Dropped out under pressure upon straightening.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Switched wider for a run turning in but produced only moderate progress closing stages.
Well back. Made up some late ground past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent to home turn. No extra and soon weakened.
Travelled mostly 2-wide in midfield. Giving ground gradually when squeezed about 200 M out. No further impression.
Tracked leader. Disputed lead early in straight but unable to sustain effort under pressure inside final 200 M.
Began with them, caught 3 wide with cover 5L off pace, under pressure from 600 M, dropped right out as if amiss and eased down in straight. (Heart irregularity.)
Away well, showed good early toe to take up running, backed off pace in middle section, lead into straight, unable to offer resistance when tackled and compounded over last 200 M.
Broke with field, drove through to hold spot behind leader, spent nothing in run, travelled kindly to turn, gained split in straight and tried hard lacking the dash of first two.

Began with them, taken hold to slot in 2 wide off pace (didn't settle well) and raced midfield 4L off lead throughout, enjoyed good run to turn, gained split entering straight and closed strongly to score with ease.
Slow to begin, restrained to 3rd from rear from awkward alley, trapped 3 wide 5L off lead with cover throughout, always working and extra ground covered resulted in battling effort to line.
Away well, showed good speed to take up prominent position, raced 1 out 1 back throughout 2L from leader, had run of race, angled 3 wide on turn and hit lead at 150 M but found winner too good.
