Away with field, positioned well 3 back on fence 3L off pace, had quiet run in middle section, made run between runners in straight, tried hard but lacked usual finishing burst.

Fair to begin, drifted back as usual to race 4 back on fence 5L from pace, had soft run in middle section, tracked well into straight and made good ground between runners late giving too greater start.
Average to begin, drifted back to settle 2nd last 2 wide 6L off frontrunners, travelled comfortably from that point, ridden along on turn, made up a little ground late but never likely.
Started with them, trapped 3 wide without cover midfield from widest draw, had tough run to turn, under pressure in straight and gave up completely over last 200 M.
Jumped nicely from wide gate, ridden forward to assume position at leaders girth, moderate pace in middle section, niggled along on turn, still in it until 150 M but weakened over concluding stages.
Began fairly, no early speed, settled at rear of field on fence 7L from lead, not troubled throughout, placed under pressure from 500 M, stuck to rails in straight only passing beaten runners.
Always within 1L off the leader. 2nd from 400 M. Ran on strongly final 300 M to win by the narrowest margin on the post.
Around 2 to 3Ls behind the leading pack. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Around 2 to 3Ls behind the leaders. Hung in from 400 M but kept on for a minor placing without troubling the first pair.
Lost a lot of ground after becoming badly unbalanced on jumping with rider almost dislodged. Detached from main field the whole trip.
Soon 2 to 3Ls behind the leaders. Carried wider at 500 M. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Slowly away. Remained at rear. Never a threat.
Soon towards rear. Never seen with a chance.
Soon 1 to 2Ls off the leader. No extra 100 M out.
Soon towards rear. Never a factor.
Amongst the leaders to 150 M and tired badly.
Well there until finding no extra final 100 M.
About 1 to 2Ls behind the leader. Unable to dash home with principals final 100 M.
Soon led. Kept on strongly but lost by the narrowest margin on the post.
Soon towards rear. Never a factor.
Midfield. Raced wide without cover throughout. Kept on steadily after straightening, one paced until finish and never a threat.
Average jump. Kept midfield or better, 4Ls on the rail at 1000 M. No response when asked at 400 M and weakened shortly after 350 M.
Was slow to begin. Last runner on fence over 8Ls from winner at 800 M. Tailed at 400 M. Made up good ground inside 250 M on the outside. Narrowly missed a place.
Clean jump with an outside draw. Stayed 1L outside leader until home straight. Failed to keep pace and weakened badly at 300 M out.
Crowded for room on jumping. Raced rearward on back straight. 2nd last to enter home straight. Shifted wide for running after straightening. Made some impression over concluding stages.
Broke well from widest gate. Took the rail and led throughout. 1L ahead of others at 400 M and clear by 2Ls at 200 M, kept on nicely and held off late charge.
Travelled midfield or worse. 2 wide at least 4Ls from winner. Made nice ground between runners to be closest at finish.

Always 2 wide within 3Ls from winner until straightening. 4 wide on straight and responded well under riding. 2Ls behind winner at 200 M, made late charge final 100 M. Tried hard but lacked an extra kick.

3 wide with cover slightly worse than midfield on back straight. Shifted out for a strong run after straightening. Finished strongly over concluding stages and provided late contest for the 2nd place.
Raced behind midfield on fence. At least 6Ls from winner at 800 M. Stayed on well and not fully tested inside final 300 M when without a clear run.
Tracked leader until final 200 M. Kept on steadily down inner of straight without quickening.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Last few entering the straight, shifted out for better running. Same pace until the line and never improved position.
2 wide 3Ls off pace with cover at 1200 M. Shifted wider for clear running after straightening. Kept on but found no extra to stay in contention final stages.
Raced prominently about 2Ls off pace on fence. 6th rounding home. Did not quicken early part of the straight. Ran on little final 50 M but made no difference to position.
Steadily moved into the lead. Held a slight advantage going into the straight. Lost the lead near 400 M and was swamped thereafter.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Trailed field into home straight. Ran on and made up a bit of ground early straight but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Botched the start and was at the rear on jumping. Ridden along to get to midfield. 2-wide behind midfield making home turn. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Niggled along at 600 M but only stayed on same pace in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and eased towards the fence in rear section. Pressured turning for home but only managed to run past beaten runners.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Caught behind traffic at 300 M but made a late dash close to the finish despite hanging in.
Outpaced by front runners early. Settled 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the pace until straightening. Kept on fairly in the straight to grab a minor placing.
Kept alongside the leader until 800 M. 2-wide and a length off pace making home turn. Quickened on straightening and drew clear final 200 M. Kept a comfortable margin to the line.

Settled behind midfield early stages. 3-wide at midfield making home turn. Waited before being pressured at 300 M. Quickened nicely past rivals. Reached within 2Ls of winner at 100 M but unable to draw closer final stages.
Better than midfield. On fence and 3Ls off the pace at 1200 M. Remained in similar spot making the turn. Never quickened and dropped out 300 M.

Wide without cover in a forward position early. Remained wide and 2Ls off pace at 1000 M. Advanced in a 3-wide spot after 600 M to dispute lead. Hit lead on straightening but headed near 200 M. Held on to make the frame.
Settled prominently behind the leader until home straight. Kept on fairly but unable to gain much ground in the straight.
Crowded shortly after start and trailed field. Near the back on straightening and made no impression thereafter.
Settled 3-wide at midfield until home straight. Kept on same pace to line.
Mostly 4-wide without cover about 3Ls behind the lead in mid-division through to home straight, stayed on only fairly down the centre of the track.
3-back the fence slightly worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed from 1000 M to home straight when under pressure, failed to quicken up, beaten over 300 M out.
Mostly 3-wide no cover about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so through to final bend, loomed up with every chance upsides at 300 M, couldn't quicken further but did well to hang on for a place.
About 3Ls off pace when 3-wide with cover in midfield until the circle, under pressure when 2Ls down in 3rd at 300 M, no extra and held inside final 200 M when hanging under pressure.
Settled around midfield about 5Ls off the speed until home turn, always outpaced by principals.
4-back on fence towards rear about 6Ls off the pace at 1000 M, no better off on straightening, one-paced.
Dropped in midfield or slightly worse about 5Ls off speed and 2-wide down the back, same turning into homestretch when under pressure, never troubled leaders.
A little slowly away, mostly had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th or so until home turn, no chance with winner but did best of the rest for 2nd.
Soon led, about a neck in front at 1200 M, 2Ls clear at 800 M and 1L ahead turning for home, joined at around 250 M, faded markedly inside final 200 M.
2-wide and about 6Ls behind down backstretch, hard ridden to try and improve turning for home, didn't seem to find much but was not helped by being short of room, not fully tested.
A neck down in 2nd at 1200 M out 2-wide, in 2nd between 1L and 2Ls behind the pace from 800 M to home turn, had every chance but failed to kick sufficiently.
5-wide no cover very early on, got in 3-wide with cover at 1000 M when 4Ls back in midfield, a little closer turning for home, quickened up very well to lead at 150 M, pulled right away, impressive.
Always last, never better than 8Ls off the pace at any point.
Slowest away, one from rear about 8Ls of speed at 1000 M, same margin behind and struggling on straightening, well beaten.
Couldn't lead and unbalanced at 800 M when 3-wide with cover and 3Ls off speed in midfield, 4-wide (widest of all) on straightening, soon beaten.
Very wide on the track at least 7-wide no cover early on, 8Ls behind pace sharing last place at 800 M, made some minor late ground past tired rivals late on. (See Racing Incidents.)
5-wide no cover early when on the pace, 3-wide no cover a neck down in 3rd from 800 M to home straight, one-paced late on.
Disputed a strong pace on fence through to home straight, wilted over 300 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
About 2Ls off the speed in 4th or so from 800 M to home turn when 3-wide but with cover, didn't have much room at 200 M when 1L down in 5th, no extra late.
In midfield about 3Ls off the speed through to home straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well but couldn't head the winner.
Slowest away, always towards rear at least 6Ls off the speed until home straight, never on terms.
Disputed pace out 2-wide until the home straight, a neck clear at top of home straight, joined at 200 M when attempting to savage WIN FORTUNE, one-paced close home.
Couldn't muster much speed early on, always at least 8Ls last until home turn, tailed off.

Niggled along worse than midfield about 5Ls off the pace through first half of race, only slightly closer turning for home, kept finding to lead at 150 M, had just enough in reserve to fend off runner-up.
Niggled along at 800 M to take closer order when 3Ls down in mid-division, same margin behind at final bend, always outpaced.
Led to 1000 M. Forward of midfield turning in. Weakened badly 300 M out.
Around midfield. Made no impression in straight.
At rear. Trapped very wide turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon in 5th or 6th place about 3Ls back. Difficult to settle from 800 M and improved on the outside to 2nd turning in. Kicked home strongly final 250 M to win comfortably.
Soon in touch but trapped wide and without cover in the early and middle stage. Took lead from 1000 M. Headed rounding home bend. Weakened badly 250 M out.
Soon in 4th or 5th place about 2 to 3Ls back. Ran on without posing a threat to winner and was outsprinted for 2nd 50 M out.
Towards rear. Held up at 500 M. Made up a little ground whilst hanging out in straight.
At rear. Widest turning in. Made up a little late ground.
At rear. Never a threat.
Forward of midfield. Headway along back straight and took lead turning in. Headed 250 M. One-paced thereafter. (Dropped whip.)
Slowly away. Around midfield. 4 wide turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M but simply had too much to do.
Towards rear. Improved rounding home bend between horses to be in midfield but wide turning in. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Soon forward of midfield about 4Ls back. Hampered and carried wider at 800 M. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Ridden forward early and was 3rd rounding the first turn. Gave ground quickly 600 M out.
Settled in forward of midfield in small bunched field and never far off. Commenced run turning in and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Hung out and lost position turning in. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on stoutly down centre of straight to just fail to get up on line.
Took up running turning into back straight. Led field until headed over 250 M out. Soon weakened.
Prominent to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily under pressure down inner of straight without threatening.
Never in contention.
Held up behind leader. Quickened to hit front over 250 M out. Just held off runner-up's strong late challenge closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily inside final 300 M to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Always in last few. Ran home one-paced.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Failed to quicken from 4th into straight and swamped passing 200 M.

Jumped with them, eased back to obtain usual spot near enough to last, raced 2nd last on rails 9Ls from lead, made run between runners in straight, held up near 300 M but only closed fairly when clear.

Away well, showed good early speed to cross to rails, crossed shortly after and took up spot outside leader from 1400 M, travelled strongly on turn, lead into straight but lacked turn of foot to figure in finish.
Only fairly away, positioned 3rd last 2 wide 8Ls from front-runner, made 3 wide run from 600 M coming 6 wide on turn, made good late ground from impossible position.

Away well, took up good position behind leader 2Ls away, had great run throughout, angled clear entering straight and led passing 300 M, tried hard when tackled but out-dashed last furlong to narrowly go down.
Average to begin, trapped wide from awkward draw, raced 3 wide without cover throughout, made run 5 wide on turn, put in strong effort in straight but gave too greater start.

Average break, settled worse than midfield 2 wide 5 to 6Ls from lead, didn't settle, tracked into race well, came 5 to 6 wide on turn, made some ground but only held position from 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Slow to begin, settled 4 back on fence 5 to 6Ls away, used nothing in run, ridden along entering straight, gradually weakened out of it.
Began well, taken forward to obtain spot close to lead, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls away throughout, travelled OK to turn, placed under pressure entering straight, condition gave out final furlong.
Broke with them, ridden up to hold position 3 back on fence 4 to 5Ls off pace, not used up in run, tracked well in straight and chased hard but unable to peg back margin.

Average to begin, restrained to rearward position to obtain cover, raced in last position 2 wide 7Ls off lead, last to turn, gained split at 250 M through to middle of pack, sprinted hard and just held on.
Reasonable to begin, positioned in 5th 4Ls from lead, made 3 wide run from 600 M, lacked turn of foot to make impression and only battled away last 200 M.
Broke well, showed great early speed to take up running, dictated terms to turn, tackled entering straight, compounded over final 200 M to be well beaten.

Held slender lead on rails early. Headed and settled just off the lead rounding home bend. Came to challenge upon straightening but ducked away from rails over 300 M out. Sustained effort to gain upper hand 100 M out.
Disputed lead far side. Held narrow advantage rounding home bend. Dropped out of contention shortly after straightening.
Well there in 3 wide position. Hit front turning in but unable to sustain effort and headed over 100 M out.
Wide towards rear. Ran on steadily under pressure inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Wide throughout. Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Never better than midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Trailed field most of way until running on past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Raced 4-wide in midfield early. Made short-lived effort rounding home bend. Soon dropped out in straight.
Niggled along in forward of midfield. Raced keenly just behind leaders coming out of back straight. Held same turning for home. Kept on steadily without threatening.
With leaders early. Lost position and dropped to 1L off pace sharing 5th coming out of back straight. Kept on in home straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails mainly in forward of midfield. Lost some ground approaching home turn. Fought on steadily to reach 2nd late.
Slowly away, drifted back to worse than midfield 7Ls from lead 2 wide, followed 3 wide into straight, didn't have much room in straight but only battled away when clear.
Broke well, held rails early, restrained to race behind leader throughout, had dream run to turn, held up twice in straight and should have finished a little closer. Good effort.
Began awkwardly, taken back behind runners to settle raced 2nd last 9Ls from leaders, followed paint into straight, made up some ground without threatening winner.
Began with them, raced behind pace in midfield spot, 2 wide 5Ls away throughout, enjoyed good trip to turn, tracked 4 wide into straight and moved up to threaten but couldn't go with them last 200 M.

Began with them, settled 3 back on fence 5Ls off pace, had quiet run throughout, on bridle entering straight, had something to offer but didn't get 100% clear running at any stage and couldn't make ground.
Average to begin, niggled along in early stages to maintain spot 4 back on fence 7Ls from front, held up in traffic for most of straight but only battled fairly when clear.
Slowly away, settled just worse than midfield 7Ls from lead, made 3 wide run from 500 M, 3Ls off them entering straight, only battled away when placed under pressure.
Fairly away, ridden hard to go forward, assumed position outside leader, relaxed well, 1L away on turn, hit lead at 400 M, showed great fight to hold off all challengers to score.
Away reasonably well, pushed along to race in forward division, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, placed under pressure on turn, weakened out of it in straight to be beaten a long way.
Average to begin, taken back from wide alley to settle 3rd last 2 wide 9Ls from front-runners, last into straight, taken to outside and flew late from impossible position narrowly missing out.
Began well, pushed along to go forward, unable to get in and raced 3 wide without cover, throughout, 1L from lead entering straight, sprinted well to fight out finish only narrowly going down.
